papers.title: Evaluating Scene-based In-Situ Item Labeling for Immersive Conversational Recommendation
papers.abstract: The growing ubiquity of Extended Reality (XR) is driving Conversational Recommendation Systems (CRS) toward visually immersive experiences. We formalize this paradigm as Immersive CRS (ICRS), where recommended items are highlighted directly in the user's scene-based visual environment and augmented with in-situ labels. While item recommendation has been widely studied, the problem of how to select and evaluate which information to present as immersive labels remains an open problem. To this end, we introduce a principled categorization of information needs into explicit intent satisfaction and proactive information needs and use these to define novel evaluation metrics for item label selection. We benchmark IR-, LLM-, and VLM-based methods across three datasets and ICRS scenarios: fashion, movie recommendation, and retail shopping. Our evaluation reveals three important limitations of existing methods: (1) they fail to leverage scenario-specific information modalities (e.g., visual cues for fashion, meta-data for retail), (2) they present redundant information that is visually inferable, and (3) they poorly anticipate users' proactive information needs from explicit dialogue alone. In summary, this work provides both a novel evaluation paradigm for in-situ item labeling in ICRS and highlights key challenges for future work.

analysis.tldr: 提出沉浸式对话推荐系统（ICRS）中场景内物品标签的评估框架，揭示现有方法在信息模态利用、冗余和主动需求预测上的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩展现实（XR）的普及推动对话推荐系统（CRS）向视觉沉浸式体验发展，但如何选择和评估沉浸式标签中的信息呈现仍是一个开放问题。
analysis.problem: 解决沉浸式对话推荐系统（ICRS）中场景内物品标签的信息选择与评估问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法存在三个局限：未能利用场景特定信息模态（如视觉线索、元数据）、呈现视觉可推断的冗余信息、仅从显式对话难以预测用户主动信息需求。
analysis.method: 提出信息需求分类（显式意图满足和主动信息需求），并基于此定义新的评估指标，对IR、LLM和VLM方法进行基准测试。
contributions: 形式化沉浸式对话推荐系统（ICRS）范式并定义场景内物品标签问题。
提出基于信息需求分类的评估指标，并在三个数据集（时尚、电影推荐、零售购物）上基准测试现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集和ICRS场景（时尚、电影推荐、零售购物）上，对IR、LLM和VLM方法进行基准测试，揭示了现有方法的三个主要局限。
limitations: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅指出局限性。
评估框架可能未覆盖所有ICRS场景或标签类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出沉浸式对话推荐系统（ICRS）中场景内物品标签的评估框架，揭示现有方法在信息模态利用、冗余和主动需求预测上的不足。

papers.title: I Can't Believe TTA Is Not Better: When Test-Time Augmentation Hurts Medical Image Classification
papers.abstract: Test-time augmentation (TTA)--aggregating predictions over multiple augmented copies of a test input--is widely assumed to improve classification accuracy, particularly in medical imaging where it is routinely deployed in production systems and competition solutions. We present a systematic empirical study challenging this assumption across three MedMNIST v2 benchmarks and four architectures spanning three orders of magnitude in parameter count (21K to 11M). Our principal finding is that TTA with standard augmentation pipelines consistently degrades accuracy relative to single-pass inference, with drops as severe as 31.6 percentage points for ResNet-18 on pathology images. This degradation affects all architectures, including convolutional models, and worsens with more augmented views. The sole exception is ResNet-18 on dermatology images, which gains a modest +1.6%. We identify the distribution shift between augmented and training-time inputs--amplified by batch normalization statistics mismatch--as the primary mechanism. Our ablation studies show that augmentation strategy matters critically: intensity-only augmentations preserve more performance than geometric transforms, and including the original unaugmented image partially mitigates but does not eliminate the accuracy drop. These findings serve as a cautionary note for practitioners: TTA should not be applied as a default post-hoc improvement but must be validated on the specific model-dataset combination.

analysis.tldr: 测试时增强（TTA）在医学图像分类中可能显著降低准确率，不应默认使用。
analysis.research_motivation: TTA 被广泛认为能提升分类准确率，尤其在医学影像领域被常规部署，但缺乏对其有效性的系统质疑。
analysis.problem: 验证 TTA 在医学图像分类中是否总是有益，并揭示其失效机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TTA 在多数情况下导致准确率下降（最高达 31.6 个百分点），且随增强视图增多而恶化；唯一例外是皮肤病学图像上的 ResNet-18（+1.6%）。
analysis.method: 在 MedMNIST v2 三个基准上，使用四种架构（参数 21K 至 11M）进行系统实证研究，通过消融实验分析增强策略和分布偏移的影响。
contributions: 发现 TTA 在医学图像分类中普遍降低准确率，挑战了其默认有益的观念。
识别出分布偏移（由批归一化统计不匹配放大）是主要失效机制。
提供增强策略选择建议：强度变换优于几何变换，保留原始图像可部分缓解但无法消除下降。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于 MedMNIST v2 基准，可能不涵盖所有医学图像场景。
未探索其他 TTA 变体或自适应方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 测试时增强（TTA）在医学图像分类中可能显著降低准确率，不应默认使用。

papers.title: Coverage Optimization for Camera View Selection
papers.abstract: What makes a good viewpoint? The quality of the data used to learn 3D reconstructions is crucial for enabling efficient and accurate scene modeling. We study the active view selection problem and develop a principled analysis that yields a simple and interpretable criterion for selecting informative camera poses. Our key insight is that informative views can be obtained by minimizing a tractable approximation of the Fisher Information Gain, which reduces to favoring viewpoints that cover geometry that has been insufficiently observed by past cameras. This leads to a lightweight coverage-based view selection metric that avoids expensive transmittance estimation and is robust to noise and training dynamics. We call this metric COVER (Camera Optimization for View Exploration and Reconstruction). We integrate our method into the Nerfstudio framework and evaluate it on real datasets within fixed and embodied data acquisition scenarios. Across multiple datasets and radiance-field baselines, our method consistently improves reconstruction quality compared to state-of-the-art active view selection methods. Additional visualizations and our Nerfstudio package can be found at https://chengine.github.io/nbv_gym/.

analysis.tldr: 提出COVER指标，通过最小化Fisher信息增益的近似来选择信息量大的相机视角，提升3D重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D重建中，相机视角的选择直接影响数据质量和重建效率，现有方法计算复杂或对噪声敏感。
analysis.problem: 如何高效选择信息量大的相机视角以优化3D重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出COVER指标，通过最小化Fisher信息增益的近似，选择覆盖未充分观测几何的视角，避免昂贵的透射率估计。
contributions: 提出基于覆盖的轻量级视角选择指标COVER，无需透射率估计且对噪声鲁棒。
在Nerfstudio框架中集成COVER，并在固定和具身数据采集场景中验证其有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实数据集和辐射场基线上，与最先进方法相比，COVER一致提升了重建质量。
limitations: 可能依赖场景几何的先验知识。
在动态场景中效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COVER指标，通过最小化Fisher信息增益的近似来选择信息量大的相机视角，提升3D重建质量。

papers.title: Extending Tabular Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Time-Series Data Generation
papers.abstract: Diffusion models are increasingly being utilised to create synthetic tabular and time series data for privacy-preserving augmentation. Tabular Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (TabDDPM) generate high-quality synthetic data from heterogeneous tabular datasets but assume independence between samples, limiting their applicability to time-series domains where temporal dependencies are critical. To address this, we propose a temporal extension of TabDDPM, introducing sequence awareness through the use of lightweight temporal adapters and context-aware embedding modules. By reformulating sensor data into windowed sequences and explicitly modeling temporal context via timestep embeddings, conditional activity labels, and observed/missing masks, our approach enables the generation of temporally coherent synthetic sequences. Compared to baseline and interpolation techniques, validation using bigram transition matrices and autocorrelation analysis shows enhanced temporal realism, diversity, and coherence. On the WISDM accelerometer dataset, the suggested system produces synthetic time-series that closely resemble real world sensor patterns and achieves comparable classification performance (macro F1-score 0.64, accuracy 0.71). This is especially advantageous for minority class representation and preserving statistical alignment with real distributions. These developments demonstrate that diffusion based models provide effective and adaptable solutions for sequential data synthesis when they are equipped for temporal reasoning. Future work will explore scaling to longer sequences and integrating stronger temporal architectures.

analysis.tldr: 将TabDDPM扩展到时间序列生成，通过时序适配器和上下文嵌入模块实现时序一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在表格数据生成中表现优异，但TabDDPM假设样本独立，无法处理时间序列中的时序依赖关系，限制了其在传感器数据等领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何使TabDDPM具备时序感知能力，生成具有时间一致性的合成时间序列数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TabDDPM的时序扩展，通过轻量级时序适配器和上下文感知嵌入模块，将传感器数据重构为窗口序列，并利用时间步嵌入、条件活动标签和观测/缺失掩码显式建模时序上下文。
contributions: 首次将TabDDPM扩展到时间序列生成，引入时序适配器和上下文嵌入模块。
在WISDM数据集上验证了生成序列的时序真实性和分类性能，尤其改善了少数类表示。
analysis.experiments: 在WISDM加速度计数据集上，使用二元转移矩阵和自相关分析评估时序真实性，分类任务达到macro F1-score 0.64，accuracy 0.71。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未探索更长序列或更强时序架构的扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将TabDDPM扩展到时间序列生成，通过时序适配器和上下文嵌入模块实现时序一致性。

papers.title: Protecting and Preserving Protest Dynamics for Responsible Analysis
papers.abstract: Protest-related social media data are valuable for understanding collective action but inherently high-risk due to concerns surrounding surveillance, repression, and individual privacy. Contemporary AI systems can identify individuals, infer sensitive attributes, and cross-reference visual information across platforms, enabling surveillance that poses risks to protesters and bystanders. In such contexts, large foundation models trained on protest imagery risk memorizing and disclosing sensitive information, leading to cross-platform identity leakage and retroactive participant identification. Existing approaches to automated protest analysis do not provide a holistic pipeline that integrates privacy risk assessment, downstream analysis, and fairness considerations. To address this gap, we propose a responsible computing framework for analyzing collective protest dynamics while reducing risks to individual privacy. Our framework replaces sensitive protest imagery with well-labeled synthetic reproductions using conditional image synthesis, enabling analysis of collective patterns without direct exposure of identifiable individuals. We demonstrate that our approach produces realistic and diverse synthetic imagery while balancing downstream analytical utility with reductions in privacy risk. We further assess demographic fairness in the generated data, examining whether synthetic representations disproportionately affect specific subgroups. Rather than offering absolute privacy guarantees, our method adopts a pragmatic, harm-mitigating approach that enables socially sensitive analysis while acknowledging residual risks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个负责任的计算框架，用条件图像合成替换敏感抗议图像，在保护隐私的同时分析集体抗议动态。
analysis.research_motivation: 抗议相关的社交媒体数据对理解集体行动有价值，但存在监控、镇压和隐私泄露的高风险，现有方法缺乏整合隐私风险评估、下游分析和公平性考量的完整流程。
analysis.problem: 如何在分析抗议集体动态的同时，降低对个人隐私的风险，并确保生成数据的公平性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个负责任的计算框架，使用条件图像合成生成标注良好的合成图像，替代敏感的真实抗议图像，从而在分析集体模式时避免直接暴露可识别的个体。
contributions: 提出了一个整合隐私风险评估、下游分析和公平性考量的负责任计算框架。
通过条件图像合成生成逼真且多样化的合成抗议图像，平衡下游分析效用与隐私风险降低。
评估了生成数据的人口统计公平性，检查是否对特定子群体产生不成比例的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 不提供绝对隐私保证，仅采用务实的风险缓解方法。
合成图像可能无法完全捕捉真实抗议场景的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个负责任的计算框架，用条件图像合成替换敏感抗议图像，在保护隐私的同时分析集体抗议动态。

papers.title: EAGLE: Edge-Aware Graph Learning for Proactive Delivery Delay Prediction in Smart Logistics Networks
papers.abstract: Modern logistics networks generate rich operational data streams at every warehouse node and transportation lane -- from order timestamps and routing records to shipping manifests -- yet predicting delivery delays remains predominantly reactive. Existing predictive approaches typically treat this problem either as a tabular classification task, ignoring network topology, or as a time-series anomaly detection task, overlooking the spatial dependencies of the supply chain graph. To bridge this gap, we propose a hybrid deep learning framework for proactive supply chain risk management. The proposed method jointly models temporal order-flow dynamics via a lightweight Transformer patch encoder and inter-hub relational dependencies through an Edge-Aware Graph Attention Network (E-GAT), optimized via a multi-task learning objective. Evaluated on the real-world DataCo Smart Supply Chain dataset, our framework achieves consistent improvements over baseline methods, yielding an F1-score of 0.8762 and an AUC-ROC of 0.9773. Across four independent random seeds, the framework exhibits a cross-seed F1 standard deviation of only 0.0089 -- a 3.8 times improvement over the best ablated variant -- achieving the strongest balance of predictive accuracy and training stability among all evaluated models.

analysis.tldr: 提出EAGLE框架，结合轻量Transformer和边感知图注意力网络，用于智慧物流网络中的主动交付延迟预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交付延迟预测方法多为反应式，且要么忽略网络拓扑（表格分类），要么忽略空间依赖（时间序列异常检测），无法充分利用物流网络的图结构信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用物流网络的拓扑结构和时序数据，实现主动、准确的交付延迟预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合深度学习框架，包含轻量Transformer patch编码器建模时序订单流动态，以及边感知图注意力网络（E-GAT）建模枢纽间关系依赖，通过多任务学习目标优化。
contributions: 提出EAGLE框架，首次将边感知图注意力与Transformer结合用于物流延迟预测。
在真实数据集上达到F1=0.8762、AUC-ROC=0.9773，且跨种子稳定性显著优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在DataCo Smart Supply Chain数据集上评估，与基线方法对比，报告了F1、AUC-ROC及跨种子标准差。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性待考。
未讨论模型在极端延迟或冷启动场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EAGLE框架，结合轻量Transformer和边感知图注意力网络，用于智慧物流网络中的主动交付延迟预测。

papers.title: Sharpness-Aware Surrogate Training for On-Sensor Spiking Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are a natural computational model for on-sensor and near-sensor vision, where event driven processors must operate under strict power budgets with hard binary spikes. However, models trained with surrogate gradients often degrade sharply when the smooth surrogate nonlinearity is replaced by a hard threshold at deployment; a surrogate-to-hard transfer gap that directly limits on-sensor accuracy. We study Sharpness-Aware Surrogate Training (SAST), which applies Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) to a surrogate-forward SNN so that the training objective is smooth and the gradient is exact, and position it as one gap-reduction strategy under the tested settings rather than the only viable mechanism. Under explicit contraction assumptions we provide state-stability, input-Lipschitz, and smoothness bounds, together with a corresponding nonconvex convergence result. On two event-camera benchmarks, swap-only hard-spike accuracy improves from 65.7\% to 94.7\% on N-MNIST and from 31.8\% to 63.3\% on DVS Gesture. Under a hardware-aware inference simulation (INT8/INT4 weight quantization, fixed-point membrane potentials, discrete leak factors), SAST remains strong: on N-MNIST, hard-spike accuracy improves from 47.6\% to 96.9\% (INT8) and from 43.2\% to 81.0\% (INT4), while on DVS Gesture it improves from 25.3\% to 47.6\% (INT8) and from 26.0\% to 43.8\% (INT4). SynOps also decrease under the same hardware-aware setting, including 1734k$\rightarrow$1315k (N-MNIST, INT8) and 86221k$\rightarrow$4323k (DVS Gesture, INT8). These results suggest that SAST is a promising component in a broader toolbox for on-sensor spiking inference under the tested settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出锐度感知替代训练（SAST）以缩小SNN部署时替代梯度与硬阈值之间的精度差距，在事件相机基准上显著提升硬脉冲精度。
analysis.research_motivation: SNN在传感器上部署时，训练使用的平滑替代非线性函数在推理时被硬阈值替换，导致精度急剧下降，限制了片上传感精度。
analysis.problem: 解决SNN从训练到部署的替代到硬阈值迁移（surrogate-to-hard transfer gap）导致的精度损失问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到训练时使用平滑替代函数、推理时使用硬阈值会导致精度显著下降，即替代到硬阈值迁移差距。
analysis.method: 将锐度感知最小化（SAM）应用于替代前向SNN，使训练目标平滑且梯度精确，作为缩小迁移差距的一种策略。
contributions: 提出SAST方法，通过SAM优化替代前向SNN以缩小替代到硬阈值迁移差距。
提供状态稳定性、输入Lipschitz和平滑性界限以及非凸收敛性理论分析。
在N-MNIST和DVS Gesture基准上，硬脉冲精度大幅提升，并在硬件感知模拟下保持优势。
analysis.experiments: 在N-MNIST和DVS Gesture两个事件相机基准上评估，包括纯硬脉冲精度和硬件感知推理模拟（INT8/INT4量化），结果显示SAST显著提升精度并降低SynOps。
limitations: 理论分析基于显式收缩假设，可能不适用于所有SNN架构。
实验仅在事件相机基准上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出锐度感知替代训练（SAST）以缩小SNN部署时替代梯度与硬阈值之间的精度差距，在事件相机基准上显著提升硬脉冲精度。

papers.title: Exemplar Retrieval Without Overhypothesis Induction: Limits of Distributional Sequence Learning in Early Word Learning
papers.abstract: Background: Children do not simply learn that balls are round and blocks are square. They learn that shape is the kind of feature that tends to define object categories -- a second-order generalisation known as an overhypothesis [1, 2]. What kind of learning mechanism is sufficient for this inductive leap? Methods: We trained autoregressive transformer language models (3.4M-25.6M parameters) on synthetic corpora in which shape is the stable feature dimension across categories, with eight conditions controlling for alternative explanations. Results: Across 120 pre-registered runs evaluated on a 1,040-item wug test battery, every model achieved perfect first-order exemplar retrieval (100%) while second-order generalisation to novel nouns remained at chance (50-52%), a result confirmed by equivalence testing. A feature-swap diagnostic revealed that models rely on frame-to-feature template matching rather than structured noun-to-domain-to-feature abstraction. Conclusions: These results reveal a clear limitation of autoregressive distributional sequence learning under developmental-scale training conditions.

analysis.tldr: 自回归Transformer在早期词汇学习中能完美检索示例，但无法归纳出类别-特征关联的二级概括（overhypothesis）。
analysis.research_motivation: 儿童能学习到形状是定义物体类别的关键特征（overhypothesis），但何种学习机制足以实现这种归纳飞跃尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 检验自回归分布序列学习是否足以从语料中归纳出类别-特征关联的二级概括（overhypothesis）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在示例检索上达到100%准确率，但在二级概括（新名词的类别-特征关联）上仅50-52%（随机水平），且特征交换诊断表明模型依赖模板匹配而非结构化抽象。
analysis.method: 在合成语料上训练不同规模的自回归Transformer语言模型（3.4M-25.6M参数），通过8种条件控制替代解释，并用1,040项wug测试评估。
contributions: 揭示了自回归分布序列学习在发育规模训练条件下无法实现overhypothesis归纳的局限性。
通过特征交换诊断方法，证明模型依赖帧-特征模板匹配而非结构化抽象。
analysis.experiments: 120次预注册实验，在1,040项wug测试上评估，所有模型示例检索100%准确，二级概括50-52%（随机），并经等价检验确认。
limitations: 仅使用合成语料，未涉及真实语言复杂性。
模型规模较小（最大25.6M参数），可能无法代表更大模型的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自回归Transformer在早期词汇学习中能完美检索示例，但无法归纳出类别-特征关联的二级概括（overhypothesis）。

papers.title: XMark: Reliable Multi-Bit Watermarking for LLM-Generated Texts
papers.abstract: Multi-bit watermarking has emerged as a promising solution for embedding imperceptible binary messages into Large Language Model (LLM)-generated text, enabling reliable attribution and tracing of malicious usage of LLMs. Despite recent progress, existing methods still face key limitations: some become computationally infeasible for large messages, while others suffer from a poor trade-off between text quality and decoding accuracy. Moreover, the decoding accuracy of existing methods drops significantly when the number of tokens in the generated text is limited, a condition that frequently arises in practical usage. To address these challenges, we propose \textsc{XMark}, a novel method for encoding and decoding binary messages in LLM-generated texts. The unique design of \textsc{XMark}'s encoder produces a less distorted logit distribution for watermarked token generation, preserving text quality, and also enables its tailored decoder to reliably recover the encoded message with limited tokens. Extensive experiments across diverse downstream tasks show that \textsc{XMark} significantly improves decoding accuracy while preserving the quality of watermarked text, outperforming prior methods. The code is at https://github.com/JiiahaoXU/XMark.

analysis.tldr: XMark 提出一种多比特水印方法，在保持文本质量的同时显著提升解码准确率，尤其适用于短文本场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 多比特水印技术可用于追踪 LLM 生成文本的恶意使用，但现有方法在大消息时计算不可行，或在文本质量与解码准确率之间难以平衡，且短文本下解码准确率严重下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在 LLM 生成文本中嵌入多比特水印，同时保证高解码准确率和文本质量，尤其是在生成 token 数量有限的场景下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在短文本（token 数少）时解码准确率显著下降，且存在文本质量与解码准确率的权衡问题。
analysis.method: 提出 XMark 方法，其编码器设计产生失真更小的 logit 分布以保持文本质量，并配备定制解码器，能在有限 token 下可靠恢复编码消息。
contributions: 提出 XMark 多比特水印方法，通过改进编码器 logit 分布和定制解码器，在保持文本质量的同时提升解码准确率。
在多种下游任务上实验证明 XMark 优于现有方法，尤其在短文本场景下表现突出。
analysis.experiments: 在多种下游任务上进行实验，结果显示 XMark 显著提升解码准确率并保持水印文本质量，优于先前方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能未考虑对抗性攻击（如文本改写）下的鲁棒性。
水印容量与解码准确率之间的权衡可能仍需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: XMark 提出一种多比特水印方法，在保持文本质量的同时显著提升解码准确率，尤其适用于短文本场景。

papers.title: Curvature-Aware Optimization for High-Accuracy Physics-Informed Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Efficient and robust optimization is essential for neural networks, enabling scientific machine learning models to converge rapidly to very high accuracy -- faithfully capturing complex physical behavior governed by differential equations. In this work, we present advanced optimization strategies to accelerate the convergence of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) for challenging partial (PDEs) and ordinary differential equations (ODEs). Specifically, we provide efficient implementations of the Natural Gradient (NG) optimizer, Self-Scaling BFGS and Broyden optimizers, and demonstrate their performance on problems including the Helmholtz equation, Stokes flow, inviscid Burgers equation, Euler equations for high-speed flows, and stiff ODEs arising in pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics. Beyond optimizer development, we also propose new PINN-based methods for solving the inviscid Burgers and Euler equations, and compare the resulting solutions against high-order numerical methods to provide a rigorous and fair assessment. Finally, we address the challenge of scaling these quasi-Newton optimizers for batched training, enabling efficient and scalable solutions for large data-driven problems.

analysis.tldr: 提出曲率感知优化器（自然梯度、自缩放BFGS等）加速物理信息神经网络收敛，在多种PDE/ODE上实现高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在求解微分方程时收敛慢、精度低，现有优化器难以高效处理复杂PDE/ODE问题，需要更鲁棒和高效的优化策略。
analysis.problem: 加速PINNs收敛到高精度，解决挑战性PDE（如Helmholtz、Euler方程）和刚性ODE的优化难题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 实现自然梯度（NG）优化器、自缩放BFGS和Broyden拟牛顿优化器，并针对批训练扩展准牛顿方法；同时提出基于PINN的Euler方程求解新方法。
contributions: 提供自然梯度、自缩放BFGS和Broyden优化器的高效实现，显著加速PINNs收敛。
提出新的PINN方法求解无粘Burgers和Euler方程，并与高阶数值方法对比验证。
解决准牛顿优化器在批训练中的扩展问题，实现大规模数据驱动问题的高效求解。
analysis.experiments: 在Helmholtz方程、Stokes流、无粘Burgers方程、高速Euler方程以及药代动力学/药效学中的刚性ODE上测试，并与高阶数值方法比较。
limitations: 可能未涉及更复杂的非线性PDE或三维问题。
准牛顿优化器的内存开销在极大规模问题上可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出曲率感知优化器（自然梯度、自缩放BFGS等）加速物理信息神经网络收敛，在多种PDE/ODE上实现高精度。

papers.title: From Governance Norms to Enforceable Controls: A Layered Translation Method for Runtime Guardrails in Agentic AI
papers.abstract: Agentic AI systems plan, use tools, maintain state, and produce multi-step trajectories with external effects. Those properties create a governance problem that differs materially from single-turn generative AI: important risks emerge dur- ing execution, not only at model development or deployment time. Governance standards such as ISO/IEC 42001, ISO/IEC 23894, ISO/IEC 42005, ISO/IEC 5338, ISO/IEC 38507, and the NIST AI Risk Management Framework are therefore highly relevant to agentic AI, but they do not by themselves yield implementable runtime guardrails. This paper proposes a layered translation method that connects standards-derived governance objectives to four control layers: governance objectives, design- time constraints, runtime mediation, and assurance feedback. It distinguishes governance objectives, technical controls, runtime guardrails, and assurance evidence; introduces a control tuple and runtime-enforceability rubric for layer assignment; and demonstrates the method in a procurement-agent case study. The central claim is modest: standards should guide control placement across architecture, runtime policy, human escalation, and audit, while runtime guardrails are reserved for controls that are observable, determinate, and time-sensitive enough to justify execution-time intervention.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种分层翻译方法，将AI治理标准转化为可执行的运行时护栏，并通过采购代理案例验证。
analysis.research_motivation: Agentic AI系统在运行时产生新风险，现有治理标准（如ISO/IEC 42001）缺乏可实施的运行时护栏，导致治理目标与工程实现之间存在鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 如何将抽象的AI治理标准系统地转化为可部署的运行时技术控制（guardrails），确保执行过程中的风险可管理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出分层翻译方法，将治理目标映射到四个控制层（治理目标、设计时约束、运行时调解、保证反馈），并引入控制元组和运行时可执行性评估表进行层分配。
contributions: 提出从治理标准到运行时护栏的分层翻译方法，明确区分治理目标、技术控制、运行时护栏和保证证据。
引入控制元组和运行时可执行性评估表，为控制分配提供结构化准则。
通过采购代理案例展示方法的应用，证明其可行性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法仅在单一案例（采购代理）中演示，泛化性未验证。
运行时可执行性评估表可能依赖专家判断，自动化程度不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种分层翻译方法，将AI治理标准转化为可执行的运行时护栏，并通过采购代理案例验证。

papers.title: Active Measurement of Two-Point Correlations
papers.abstract: Two-point correlation functions (2PCF) are widely used to characterize how points cluster in space. In this work, we study the problem of measuring the 2PCF over a large set of points, restricted to a subset satisfying a property of interest. An example comes from astronomy, where scientists measure the 2PCF of star clusters, which make up only a tiny subset of possible sources within a galaxy. This task typically requires careful labeling of sources to construct catalogs, which is time-consuming. We present a human-in-the-loop framework for efficient estimation of 2PCF of target sources. By leveraging a pre-trained classifier to guide sampling, our approach adaptively selects the most informative points for human annotation. After each annotation, it produces unbiased estimates of pair counts across multiple distance bins simultaneously. Compared to simple Monte Carlo approaches, our method achieves substantially lower variance while significantly reducing annotation effort. We introduce a novel unbiased estimator, sampling strategy, and confidence interval construction that together enable scalable and statistically grounded measurement of two-point correlations in astronomy datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出主动学习框架高效估计两点相关函数，降低标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 天文学中测量星团等目标子集的两点相关函数需要大量人工标注，传统蒙特卡洛方法方差高且标注效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且无偏地估计大规模点集中满足特定属性的子集的两点相关函数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 人机协同框架，利用预训练分类器指导采样，选择信息量最大的点进行人工标注，并设计无偏估计量和置信区间。
contributions: 提出一种无偏估计器用于多距离箱的配对计数估计
设计自适应采样策略和置信区间构建方法，降低方差并减少标注量
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖预训练分类器的质量
可能仅适用于空间点过程场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出主动学习框架高效估计两点相关函数，降低标注成本。

papers.title: RoboPlayground: Democratizing Robotic Evaluation through Structured Physical Domains
papers.abstract: Evaluation of robotic manipulation systems has largely relied on fixed benchmarks authored by a small number of experts, where task instances, constraints, and success criteria are predefined and difficult to extend. This paradigm limits who can shape evaluation and obscures how policies respond to user-authored variations in task intent, constraints, and notions of success. We argue that evaluating modern manipulation policies requires reframing evaluation as a language-driven process over structured physical domains. We present RoboPlayground, a framework that enables users to author executable manipulation tasks using natural language within a structured physical domain. Natural language instructions are compiled into reproducible task specifications with explicit asset definitions, initialization distributions, and success predicates. Each instruction defines a structured family of related tasks, enabling controlled semantic and behavioral variation while preserving executability and comparability. We instantiate RoboPlayground in a structured block manipulation domain and evaluate it along three axes. A user study shows that the language-driven interface is easier to use and imposes lower cognitive workload than programming-based and code-assist baselines. Evaluating learned policies on language-defined task families reveals generalization failures that are not apparent under fixed benchmark evaluations. Finally, we show that task diversity scales with contributor diversity rather than task count alone, enabling evaluation spaces to grow continuously through crowd-authored contributions. Project Page: https://roboplayground.github.io

analysis.tldr: RoboPlayground通过自然语言驱动的结构化物理域框架，让用户能自主编写机器人操作任务，揭示固定基准无法发现的泛化失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人操作评估依赖少数专家编写的固定基准，任务实例、约束和成功标准难以扩展，限制了评估的多样性和用户参与度。
analysis.problem: 如何让非专家用户也能用自然语言定义可执行、可复现、可比较的机器人操作任务，并支持任务族内的语义和行为变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户研究显示语言驱动界面比编程和代码辅助基线更易用、认知负荷更低；语言定义的任务族揭示了学习策略在固定基准下不明显的泛化失败；任务多样性随贡献者多样性而非任务数量增长。
analysis.method: 提出RoboPlayground框架，将自然语言指令编译为可复现的任务规范（含资产定义、初始化分布、成功谓词），每个指令定义结构化任务族，支持受控的语义和行为变化。
contributions: 提出语言驱动的机器人评估框架RoboPlayground，支持用户用自然语言编写可执行任务。
通过用户研究和策略评估证明该框架能揭示固定基准无法发现的泛化失败，并支持众包扩展评估空间。
analysis.experiments: 在结构化积木操作域中进行了用户研究（对比编程和代码辅助基线）和策略评估（分析语言定义任务族上的泛化失败）。
limitations: 当前仅在一个结构化积木域中实例化，未在更复杂或真实场景中验证。
语言指令到任务规范的编译可能受限于自然语言的歧义性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RoboPlayground通过自然语言驱动的结构化物理域框架，让用户能自主编写机器人操作任务，揭示固定基准无法发现的泛化失败。

papers.title: Attribution Bias in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to support search and information retrieval, it is critical that they accurately attribute content to its original authors. In this work, we introduce AttriBench, the first fame- and demographically-balanced quote attribution benchmark dataset. Through explicitly balancing author fame and demographics, AttriBench enables controlled investigation of demographic bias in quote attribution. Using this dataset, we evaluate 11 widely used LLMs across different prompt settings and find that quote attribution remains a challenging task even for frontier models. We observe large and systematic disparities in attribution accuracy between race, gender, and intersectional groups. We further introduce and investigate suppression, a distinct failure mode in which models omit attribution entirely, even when the model has access to authorship information. We find that suppression is widespread and unevenly distributed across demographic groups, revealing systematic biases not captured by standard accuracy metrics. Our results position quote attribution as a benchmark for representational fairness in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: LLM在引用归因上存在系统性的人口统计偏见，且忽视归因的“抑制”现象加剧了不公平。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM越来越多地用于搜索和信息检索，准确归因内容给原作者至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对归因偏见的系统评估。
analysis.problem: LLM在引用归因时存在基于种族、性别等人口统计特征的偏见，且存在忽略归因的“抑制”失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 引用归因对前沿模型也是挑战；2) 归因准确性在种族、性别和交叉群体间存在系统性差异；3) 模型广泛存在“抑制”现象（即使有作者信息也不归因），且该现象在不同人口群体间分布不均，标准准确率指标无法捕捉。
analysis.method: 构建了首个平衡作者知名度和人口统计特征的引用归因基准数据集AttriBench，并评估11个LLM在不同提示设置下的表现。
contributions: 提出AttriBench，首个平衡作者知名度和人口统计特征的引用归因基准数据集。
系统揭示了LLM在引用归因中的种族、性别和交叉群体偏见，并发现“抑制”这一新的失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在AttriBench上评估了11个广泛使用的LLM，发现归因准确性存在系统性人口统计差异，且抑制现象普遍且分布不均。
limitations: 数据集可能无法覆盖所有人口统计群体或归因场景。
未深入探讨偏见产生的机制或缓解方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在引用归因上存在系统性的人口统计偏见，且忽视归因的“抑制”现象加剧了不公平。

papers.title: Spectral Edge Dynamics Reveal Functional Modes of Learning
papers.abstract: Training dynamics during grokking concentrate along a small number of dominant update directions -- the spectral edge -- which reliably distinguishes grokking from non-grokking regimes. We show that standard mechanistic interpretability tools (head attribution, activation probing, sparse autoencoders) fail to capture these directions: their structure is not localized in parameter or feature space. Instead, each direction induces a structured function over the input domain, revealing low-dimensional functional modes invisible to representation-level analysis. For modular addition, all leading directions collapse to a single Fourier mode. For multiplication, the same collapse appears only in the discrete-log basis, yielding a 5.9x improvement in concentration. For subtraction, the edge spans a small multi-mode family. For $x^2+y^2$, no single harmonic basis suffices, but cross-terms of additive and multiplicative features provide a 4x variance boost, consistent with the decomposition (a+b)^2 - 2ab. Multitask training amplifies this compositional structure, with the $x^2+y^2$ spectral edge inheriting the addition circuit's characteristic frequency (2.3x concentration increase). These results suggest that training discovers low-dimensional functional modes over the input domain, whose structure depends on the algebraic symmetry of the task. These results suggest that spectral edge dynamics identify low-dimensional functional subspaces governing learning, whose representation depends on the algebraic structure of the task. Simple harmonic structure emerges only when the task admits a symmetry-adapted basis; more complex tasks require richer functional descriptions.

analysis.tldr: 训练动态在谱边集中，揭示出低维功能模式，其结构依赖于任务的代数对称性。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解神经网络训练动态（如grokking）的底层机制对于可解释性和模型设计至关重要，但现有工具（如机制可解释性方法）难以捕捉主导更新方向的结构。
analysis.problem: 揭示训练动态中谱边（spectral edge）方向的结构和功能意义，并解释其与任务代数对称性的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练动态在grokking期间集中在少数主导更新方向（谱边），这些方向在参数或特征空间中非局部化，但诱导出输入域上的结构化函数，形成低维功能模式。不同任务（模加法、乘法、减法、x²+y²）的谱边结构不同，与代数对称性相关。
analysis.method: 分析训练动态的谱边（dominant update directions），结合任务代数结构（如傅里叶模式、离散对数基）解释其功能模式。
contributions: 发现谱边动态揭示了低维功能子空间，其结构依赖于任务的代数对称性。
展示了标准机制可解释性工具无法捕捉这些方向，而谱边分析能揭示表示级分析不可见的功能模式。
analysis.experiments: 在模加法、乘法、减法、x²+y²等任务上验证，并展示了多任务训练增强组合结构。摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 仅分析了简单算术任务，复杂任务（如自然语言）的适用性未知。
谱边方向的功能解释依赖于任务代数结构，通用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 训练动态在谱边集中，揭示出低维功能模式，其结构依赖于任务的代数对称性。

papers.title: Ollivier-Ricci Curvature of Riemannian Manifolds and Directed Graphs with Applications to Graph Neural Networks
papers.abstract: This thesis is an exposition of Ollivier-Ricci Curvature of metric spaces as introduced by Yann Ollivier, which is based upon the 1-Wasserstein Distance and optimal transport theory. We present some of the major results and proofs that connect Ollivier-Ricci curvature with classical Ricci curvature of Riemannian manifolds, including extensions of various theoretical bounds and theorems such as Bonnet-Myers and Levy-Gromov. Then we shift to results introduced by Lin-Lu-Yau on an extension of Ollivier-Ricci curvature on graphs, as well as the work of Jost-Liu on proving various combinatorial bounds for graph Ollivier-Ricci curvature. At the end of this thesis we present novel ideas and proofs regarding extensions of these results to directed graphs, and finally applications of graph-based Ollivier-Ricci curvature to various algorithms in network science and graph machine learning.

analysis.tldr: 系统阐述Ollivier-Ricci曲率在黎曼流形和有向图上的理论扩展及其在图神经网络中的应用。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典Ricci曲率在离散图上的定义不直接，而Ollivier-Ricci曲率基于最优传输理论，能统一流形和图结构，但现有理论主要针对无向图，有向图的理论和应用尚不充分。
analysis.problem: 将Ollivier-Ricci曲率从无向图扩展到有向图，并探索其在图神经网络等图机器学习算法中的应用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于1-Wasserstein距离和最优传输理论，推广Lin-Lu-Yau和Jost-Liu的图曲率结果到有向图，并应用于网络科学和图机器学习算法。
contributions: 将Ollivier-Ricci曲率及相关理论界（如Bonnet-Myers、Levy-Gromov）从无向图扩展到有向图。
提出有向图曲率的新证明和组合界，并展示其在图神经网络等算法中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论扩展可能仅适用于特定类型的有向图。
应用部分缺乏实验验证和性能比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统阐述Ollivier-Ricci曲率在黎曼流形和有向图上的理论扩展及其在图神经网络中的应用。

papers.title: Hierarchical Mesh Transformers with Topology-Guided Pretraining for Morphometric Analysis of Brain Structures
papers.abstract: Representation learning on large-scale unstructured volumetric and surface meshes poses significant challenges in neuroimaging, especially when models must incorporate diverse vertex-level morphometric descriptors, such as cortical thickness, curvature, sulcal depth, and myelin content, which carry subtle disease-related signals. Current approaches either ignore these clinically informative features or support only a single mesh topology, restricting their use across imaging pipelines. We introduce a hierarchical transformer framework designed for heterogeneous mesh analysis that operates on spatially adaptive tree partitions constructed from simplicial complexes of arbitrary order. This design accommodates both volumetric and surface discretizations within a single architecture, enabling efficient multi-scale attention without topology-specific modifications. A feature projection module maps variable-length per-vertex clinical descriptors into the spatial hierarchy, separating geometric structure from feature dimensionality and allowing seamless integration of different neuroimaging feature sets. Self-supervised pretraining via masked reconstruction of both coordinates and morphometric channels on large unlabeled cohorts yields a transferable encoder backbone applicable to diverse downstream tasks and mesh modalities. We validate our approach on Alzheimer's disease classification and amyloid burden prediction using volumetric brain meshes from ADNI, as well as focal cortical dysplasia detection on cortical surface meshes from the MELD dataset, achieving state-of-the-art results across all benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种层级网格Transformer，通过拓扑引导的预训练实现脑结构形态测量分析，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法要么忽略临床相关的顶点级形态特征（如皮层厚度、曲率等），要么仅支持单一网格拓扑，限制了跨成像管道的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的架构，能够处理异构网格（体积和表面）并整合多样化的顶点级形态描述符，同时通过自监督预训练提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出层级Transformer框架，基于任意阶单纯复形构建空间自适应树分区，支持多尺度注意力；特征投影模块将变长顶点临床描述符映射到空间层级；通过掩码重建坐标和形态通道进行自监督预训练。
contributions: 提出一种层级Transformer架构，统一处理体积和表面网格，无需拓扑特定修改。
设计特征投影模块，分离几何结构与特征维度，实现不同神经影像特征集的无缝集成。
通过掩码重建预训练获得可迁移编码器，在AD分类、淀粉样蛋白负担预测和局灶性皮质发育不良检测上取得SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI数据集（体积网格）上进行阿尔茨海默病分类和淀粉样蛋白负担预测，在MELD数据集（皮层表面网格）上进行局灶性皮质发育不良检测，均达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模无标注数据预训练，数据获取成本高。
树分区构建的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种层级网格Transformer，通过拓扑引导的预训练实现脑结构形态测量分析，在多个基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Boxer: Robust Lifting of Open-World 2D Bounding Boxes to 3D
papers.abstract: Detecting and localizing objects in space is a fundamental computer vision problem. While much progress has been made to solve 2D object detection, 3D object localization is much less explored and far from solved, especially for open-world categories. To address this research challenge, we propose Boxer, an algorithm to estimate static 3D bounding boxes (3DBBs) from 2D open-vocabulary object detections, posed images and optional depth either represented as a sparse point cloud or dense depth. At its core is BoxerNet, a transformer-based network which lifts 2D bounding box (2DBB) proposals into 3D, followed by multi-view fusion and geometric filtering to produce globally consistent de-duplicated 3DBBs in metric world space. Boxer leverages the power of existing 2DBB detection algorithms (e.g. DETIC, OWLv2, SAM3) to localize objects in 2D. This allows the main BoxerNet model to focus on lifting to 3D rather than detecting, ultimately reducing the demand for costly annotated 3DBB training data. Extending the CuTR formulation, we incorporate an aleatoric uncertainty for robust regression, a median depth patch encoding to support sparse depth inputs, and large-scale training with over 1.2 million unique 3DBBs. BoxerNet outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in open-world 3DBB lifting, including CuTR in egocentric settings without dense depth (0.532 vs. 0.010 mAP) and on CA-1M with dense depth available (0.412 vs. 0.250 mAP).

analysis.tldr: Boxer提出一种基于Transformer的2D到3D边界框提升方法，在开放世界3D目标定位中显著超越现有基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D目标定位远未解决，尤其对于开放世界类别，而2D检测已较成熟，利用2D检测结果提升到3D可减少对昂贵3D标注数据的依赖。
analysis.problem: 从开放世界2D目标检测结果、带位姿图像和可选深度（稀疏点云或密集深度）中估计静态3D边界框。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在开放世界3D提升中性能有限，且对密集深度依赖强；稀疏深度输入下性能下降明显。
analysis.method: 提出BoxerNet，一种基于Transformer的网络，将2D边界框提议提升到3D，结合多视图融合和几何滤波生成全局一致的3D边界框；引入异方差不确定性回归、中值深度块编码以支持稀疏深度，并使用120万+3D边界框进行大规模训练。
contributions: 提出BoxerNet，一种新的2D到3D边界框提升网络，在开放世界设定下优于现有方法。
引入异方差不确定性回归和中值深度块编码，增强对稀疏深度输入的鲁棒性。
构建大规模训练数据（120万+3D边界框），并展示在自我中心和CA-1M数据集上的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在自我中心设定（无密集深度）和CA-1M（有密集深度）上评估，BoxerNet的mAP分别为0.532和0.412，优于CuTR的0.010和0.250。
limitations: 依赖2D检测器的质量，可能继承其错误。
仅处理静态3D边界框，未涉及动态场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Boxer提出一种基于Transformer的2D到3D边界框提升方法，在开放世界3D目标定位中显著超越现有基线。

papers.title: Integration of Object Detection and Small VLMs for Construction Safety Hazard Identification
papers.abstract: Accurate and timely identification of construction hazards around workers is essential for preventing workplace accidents. While large vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong contextual reasoning capabilities, their high computational requirements limit their applicability in near real-time construction hazard detection. In contrast, small vision-language models (sVLMs) with fewer than 4 billion parameters offer improved efficiency but often suffer from reduced accuracy and hallucination when analyzing complex construction scenes. To address this trade-off, this study proposes a detection-guided sVLM framework that integrates object detection with multimodal reasoning for contextual hazard identification. The framework first employs a YOLOv11n detector to localize workers and construction machinery within the scene. The detected entities are then embedded into structured prompts to guide the reasoning process of sVLMs, enabling spatially grounded hazard assessment. Within this framework, six sVLMs (Gemma-3 4B, Qwen-3-VL 2B/4B, InternVL-3 1B/2B, and SmolVLM-2B) were evaluated in zero-shot settings on a curated dataset of construction site images with hazard annotations and explanatory rationales. The proposed approach consistently improved hazard detection performance across all models. The best-performing model, Gemma-3 4B, achieved an F1-score of 50.6%, compared to 34.5% in the baseline configuration. Explanation quality also improved significantly, with BERTScore F1 increasing from 0.61 to 0.82. Despite incorporating object detection, the framework introduces minimal overhead, adding only 2.5 ms per image during inference. These results demonstrate that integrating lightweight object detection with small VLM reasoning provides an effective and efficient solution for context-aware construction safety hazard detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出检测引导的小型VLM框架，通过YOLOv11n目标检测增强sVLM在建筑安全危险识别中的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型VLM计算成本高，难以用于近实时建筑危险检测；小型VLM效率高但准确率低且易产生幻觉，需要平衡效率与准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加计算开销的前提下，提升小型VLM在复杂建筑场景中危险识别的准确性和解释质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先使用YOLOv11n检测器定位工人和施工机械，再将检测到的实体嵌入结构化提示中，引导sVLM进行空间关联的危险评估。
contributions: 提出检测引导的sVLM框架，集成目标检测与多模态推理用于建筑安全危险识别。
在零样本设置下评估6种sVLM，证明该方法一致提升危险检测性能和解释质量，且推理开销极小。
analysis.experiments: 在建筑工地图像数据集上评估6种sVLM（Gemma-3 4B等），最佳模型Gemma-3 4B的F1从34.5%提升至50.6%，BERTScore F1从0.61提升至0.82，推理仅增加2.5ms/图。
limitations: 仅在零样本设置下评估，未进行微调或领域适应。
数据集规模可能有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检测引导的小型VLM框架，通过YOLOv11n目标检测增强sVLM在建筑安全危险识别中的性能。

papers.title: Retrieval-Augmented LLMs for Evidence Localization in Clinical Trial Recruitment from Longitudinal EHR Narratives
papers.abstract: Screening patients for enrollment is a well-known, labor-intensive bottleneck that leads to under-enrollment and, ultimately, trial failures. Recent breakthroughs in large language models (LLMs) offer a promising opportunity to use artificial intelligence to improve screening. This study systematically explored both encoder- and decoder-based generative LLMs for screening clinical narratives to facilitate clinical trial recruitment. We examined both general-purpose LLMs and medical-adapted LLMs and explored three strategies to alleviate the "Lost in the Middle" issue when handling long documents, including 1) Original long-context: using the default context windows of LLMs, 2) NER-based extractive summarization: converting the long document into summarizations using named entity recognition, 3) RAG: dynamic evidence retrieval based on eligibility criteria. The 2018 N2C2 Track 1 benchmark dataset is used for evaluation. Our experimental results show that the MedGemma model with the RAG strategy achieved the best micro-F1 score of 89.05%, outperforming other models. Generative LLMs have remarkably improved trial criteria that require long-term reasoning across long documents, whereas trial criteria that span a short piece of context (e.g., lab tests) show incremental improvements. The real-world adoption of LLMs for trial recruitment must consider specific criteria for selecting among rule-based queries, encoder-based LLMs, and generative LLMs to maximize efficiency within reasonable computing costs.

analysis.tldr: 使用检索增强生成（RAG）策略的MedGemma模型在临床试验患者筛选的电子病历文本证据定位任务中达到89.05%的micro-F1，优于其他方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床试验患者筛选是劳动密集型瓶颈，导致入组不足和试验失败，亟需自动化方法提升效率。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型从长程纵向电子病历叙述中定位与临床试验入组标准相关的证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成式LLM在需要长期推理的试验标准上提升显著，而短上下文标准（如实验室检查）改进有限；长文档处理中存在“Lost in the Middle”问题。
analysis.method: 系统比较编码器与解码器生成式LLM，探索三种长文档处理策略：原始长上下文、基于NER的抽取式摘要、基于入组标准的RAG动态证据检索。
contributions: 系统评估了通用与医学适配LLM在临床试验筛选中的表现
验证了RAG策略在缓解长文档“Lost in the Middle”问题上的有效性
揭示了不同试验标准类型（长期推理 vs 短上下文）对LLM性能的影响差异
analysis.experiments: 使用2018 N2C2 Track 1基准数据集，MedGemma+RAG达到最佳micro-F1 89.05%。
limitations: 仅基于单一数据集，泛化性待验证
未讨论计算成本与推理延迟的实际部署问题
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用检索增强生成（RAG）策略的MedGemma模型在临床试验患者筛选的电子病历文本证据定位任务中达到89.05%的micro-F1，优于其他方法。

papers.title: OrthoFuse: Training-free Riemannian Fusion of Orthogonal Style-Concept Adapters for Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: In a rapidly growing field of model training there is a constant practical interest in parameter-efficient fine-tuning and various techniques that use a small amount of training data to adapt the model to a narrow task. However, there is an open question: how to combine several adapters tuned for different tasks into one which is able to yield adequate results on both tasks? Specifically, merging subject and style adapters for generative models remains unresolved. In this paper we seek to show that in the case of orthogonal fine-tuning (OFT), we can use structured orthogonal parametrization and its geometric properties to get the formulas for training-free adapter merging. In particular, we derive the structure of the manifold formed by the recently proposed Group-and-Shuffle ($\mathcal{GS}$) orthogonal matrices, and obtain efficient formulas for the geodesics approximation between two points. Additionally, we propose a $\text{spectra restoration}$ transform that restores spectral properties of the merged adapter for higher-quality fusion. We conduct experiments in subject-driven generation tasks showing that our technique to merge two $\mathcal{GS}$ orthogonal matrices is capable of uniting concept and style features of different adapters. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first training-free method for merging multiplicative orthogonal adapters. Code is available via the $\href{https://github.com/ControlGenAI/OrthoFuse}{link}$.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的黎曼融合方法，将多个正交风格-概念适配器合并，用于扩散模型的多任务生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 参数高效微调中，如何将多个针对不同任务（如主体和风格）的适配器无缝合并，以同时处理多个任务，是一个未解决的问题。
analysis.problem: 合并多个正交微调（OFT）适配器，使其在主体和风格生成任务上均能产生高质量结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用Group-and-Shuffle正交矩阵的流形结构，推导测地线近似公式，并提出谱恢复变换以提升融合质量。
contributions: 推导了Group-and-Shuffle正交矩阵形成的流形结构及测地线近似公式。
提出谱恢复变换，恢复合并适配器的谱特性。
首次实现无需训练的多乘性正交适配器合并方法。
analysis.experiments: 在主体驱动生成任务上验证了方法能融合概念和风格特征。
limitations: 仅适用于正交微调（OFT）适配器，不适用于其他类型适配器。
实验仅在主体驱动生成任务上评估，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的黎曼融合方法，将多个正交风格-概念适配器合并，用于扩散模型的多任务生成。

papers.title: LSRM: High-Fidelity Object-Centric Reconstruction via Scaled Context Windows
papers.abstract: We introduce the Large Sparse Reconstruction Model to study how scaling transformer context windows impacts feed-forward 3D reconstruction. Although recent object-centric feed-forward methods deliver robust, high-quality reconstruction, they still lag behind dense-view optimization in recovering fine-grained texture and appearance. We show that expanding the context window -- by substantially increasing the number of active object and image tokens -- remarkably narrows this gap and enables high-fidelity 3D object reconstruction and inverse rendering. To scale effectively, we adapt native sparse attention in our architecture design, unlocking its capacity for 3D reconstruction with three key contributions: (1) an efficient coarse-to-fine pipeline that focuses computation on informative regions by predicting sparse high-resolution residuals; (2) a 3D-aware spatial routing mechanism that establishes accurate 2D-3D correspondences using explicit geometric distances rather than standard attention scores; and (3) a custom block-aware sequence parallelism strategy utilizing an All-gather-KV protocol to balance dynamic, sparse workloads across GPUs. As a result, LSRM handles 20x more object tokens and >2x more image tokens than prior state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. Extensive evaluations on standard novel-view synthesis benchmarks show substantial gains over the current SOTA, yielding 2.5 dB higher PSNR and 40% lower LPIPS. Furthermore, when extending LSRM to inverse rendering tasks, qualitative and quantitative evaluations on widely-used benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in texture and geometry details, achieving an LPIPS that matches or exceeds that of SOTA dense-view optimization methods. Code and model will be released on our project page.

analysis.tldr: 通过扩大Transformer上下文窗口，大幅提升前馈式3D重建的纹理保真度，达到甚至超越稠密视图优化方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈式3D重建方法在恢复细粒度纹理和外观方面仍落后于稠密视图优化方法，需要弥合这一差距。
analysis.problem: 如何通过扩展Transformer上下文窗口（增加物体和图像token数量）实现高保真3D物体重建和逆渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩大上下文窗口能显著缩小前馈方法与稠密视图优化方法在纹理细节上的差距。
analysis.method: 提出Large Sparse Reconstruction Model (LSRM)，包含：1) 粗到细管线，通过预测稀疏高分辨率残差聚焦计算；2) 3D感知空间路由机制，利用几何距离建立准确2D-3D对应；3) 块感知序列并行策略，使用All-gather-KV协议平衡动态稀疏负载。
contributions: 提出LSRM，通过扩展上下文窗口实现高保真3D重建，处理20倍更多物体token和2倍以上图像token。
设计3D感知空间路由和块感知序列并行，有效支持大规模稀疏注意力。
在新视角合成和逆渲染任务上超越SOTA，PSNR提升2.5 dB，LPIPS降低40%。
analysis.experiments: 在标准新视角合成基准上，LSRM相比当前SOTA取得PSNR提升2.5 dB、LPIPS降低40%；在逆渲染任务上，纹理和几何细节一致提升，LPIPS匹配或超越SOTA稠密视图优化方法。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模GPU资源，部署成本高。
仅针对物体级重建，场景级泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过扩大Transformer上下文窗口，大幅提升前馈式3D重建的纹理保真度，达到甚至超越稠密视图优化方法。

papers.title: MIRAGE: Benchmarking and Aligning Multi-Instance Image Editing
papers.abstract: Instruction-guided image editing has seen remarkable progress with models like FLUX.2 and Qwen-Image-Edit, yet they still struggle with complex scenarios with multiple similar instances each requiring individual edits. We observe that state-of-the-art models suffer from severe over-editing and spatial misalignment when faced with multiple identical instances and composite instructions. To this end, we introduce a comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate fine-grained consistency in multi-instance and multi-instruction settings. To address the failures of existing methods observed in our benchmark, we propose Multi-Instance Regional Alignment via Guided Editing (MIRAGE), a training-free framework that enables precise, localized editing. By leveraging a vision-language model to parse complex instructions into regional subsets, MIRAGE employs a multi-branch parallel denoising strategy. This approach injects latent representations of target regions into the global representation space while maintaining background integrity through a reference trajectory. Extensive evaluations on MIRA-Bench and RefEdit-Bench demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms existing methods in achieving precise instance-level modifications while preserving background consistency. Our benchmark and code are available at https://github.com/ZiqianLiu666/MIRAGE.

analysis.tldr: 提出多实例图像编辑基准MIRA-Bench和训练无关框架MIRAGE，解决多相似实例编辑中的过编辑和空间错位问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有指令引导图像编辑模型在处理多个相似实例且每个实例需要独立编辑的复杂场景时表现不佳，存在严重的过编辑和空间错位问题，缺乏针对性的评测基准和方法。
analysis.problem: 多实例多指令图像编辑中的细粒度一致性控制，即如何对多个相同实例分别进行精确、局部化的编辑而不影响背景和其他实例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到最先进的模型（如FLUX.2和Qwen-Image-Edit）在面对多个相同实例和复合指令时，会出现严重的过编辑和空间错位现象。
analysis.method: MIRAGE：一种训练无关的框架，利用视觉语言模型将复杂指令解析为区域子集，然后采用多分支并行去噪策略，将目标区域的潜在表示注入全局表示空间，并通过参考轨迹保持背景完整性。
contributions: 提出了MIRA-Bench，一个专门用于评估多实例多指令设置下细粒度一致性的综合基准。
提出了MIRAGE，一个训练无关的多实例区域对齐框架，通过多分支并行去噪实现精确的局部编辑。
在MIRA-Bench和RefEdit-Bench上的实验表明，MIRAGE在保持背景一致性的同时显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在MIRA-Bench和RefEdit-Bench上进行了广泛评估，结果显示MIRAGE在精确实例级修改和背景保持方面显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖于视觉语言模型的解析准确性，复杂指令解析错误可能导致编辑失败。
训练无关方法可能在某些极端场景下不如微调方法稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多实例图像编辑基准MIRA-Bench和训练无关框架MIRAGE，解决多相似实例编辑中的过编辑和空间错位问题。

papers.title: ClawsBench: Evaluating Capability and Safety of LLM Productivity Agents in Simulated Workspaces
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed to automate productivity tasks (e.g., email, scheduling, document management), but evaluating them on live services is risky due to potentially irreversible changes. Existing benchmarks rely on simplified environments and fail to capture realistic, stateful, multi-service workflows. We introduce ClawsBench, a benchmark for evaluating and improving LLM agents in realistic productivity settings. It includes five high-fidelity mock services (Gmail, Slack, Google Calendar, Google Docs, Google Drive) with full state management and deterministic snapshot/restore, along with 44 structured tasks covering single-service, cross-service, and safety-critical scenarios. We decompose agent scaffolding into two independent levers (domain skills that inject API knowledge via progressive disclosure, and a meta prompt that coordinates behavior across services) and vary both to measure their separate and combined effects. Experiments across 6 models, 4 agent harnesses, and 33 conditions show that with full scaffolding, agents achieve task success rates of 39-64% but exhibit unsafe action rates of 7-33%. On OpenClaw, the top five models fall within a 10 percentage-point band on task success (53-63%), with unsafe action rates from 7% to 23% and no consistent ordering between the two metrics. We identify eight recurring patterns of unsafe behavior, including multi-step sandbox escalation and silent contract modification. We release the trajectories and future dataset at https://clawsbench.com.

analysis.tldr: ClawsBench 是一个评估 LLM 生产力智能体在模拟工作空间中能力和安全性的基准，包含五个高保真模拟服务和44个任务，实验发现智能体任务成功率39-64%但存在7-33%的不安全行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准依赖简化环境，无法捕捉真实、有状态、多服务工作流，且直接在生产环境中评估存在风险。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个安全、逼真且可复现的基准来评估 LLM 智能体在生产力任务中的能力和安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含五个高保真模拟服务（Gmail、Slack、Google Calendar、Docs、Drive）的基准，设计44个结构化任务，并分解智能体框架为领域技能和元提示两个独立杠杆进行测量。
contributions: 提出了 ClawsBench，一个评估 LLM 生产力智能体在真实模拟工作空间中的能力和安全性的基准。
识别了八种不安全行为模式，包括多步沙箱升级和静默合同修改。
analysis.experiments: 在6个模型、4个智能体框架和33种条件下进行实验，结果显示任务成功率39-64%，不安全行为率7-33%。
limitations: 模拟环境可能无法完全反映真实服务的复杂性和动态性。
任务集可能未覆盖所有生产力场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ClawsBench 是一个评估 LLM 生产力智能体在模拟工作空间中能力和安全性的基准，包含五个高保真模拟服务和44个任务，实验发现智能体任务成功率39-64%但存在7-33%的不安全行为。

papers.title: Modality-Aware and Anatomical Vector-Quantized Autoencoding for Multimodal Brain MRI
papers.abstract: Learning a robust Variational Autoencoder (VAE) is a fundamental step for many deep learning applications in medical image analysis, such as MRI synthesizes. Existing brain VAEs predominantly focus on single-modality data (i.e., T1-weighted MRI), overlooking the complementary diagnostic value of other modalities like T2-weighted MRIs. Here, we propose a modality-aware and anatomically grounded 3D vector-quantized VAE (VQ-VAE) for reconstructing multi-modal brain MRIs. Called NeuroQuant, it first learns a shared latent representation across modalities using factorized multi-axis attention, which can capture relationships between distant brain regions. It then employs a dual-stream 3D encoder that explicitly separates the encoding of modality-invariant anatomical structures from modality-dependent appearance. Next, the anatomical encoding is discretized using a shared codebook and combined with modality-specific appearance features via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) during the decoding phase. This entire approach is trained using a joint 2D/3D strategy in order to account for the slice-based acquisition of 3D MRI data. Extensive experiments on two multi-modal brain MRI datasets demonstrate that NeuroQuant achieves superior reconstruction fidelity compared to existing VAEs, enabling a scalable foundation for downstream generative modeling and cross-modal brain image analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出NeuroQuant，一种模态感知和解剖向量量化的3D VQ-VAE，用于多模态脑MRI重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有脑部VAE主要关注单模态数据（如T1加权MRI），忽略了T2加权等其他模态的互补诊断价值，限制了多模态生成和下游分析。
analysis.problem: 如何学习一个鲁棒的多模态脑MRI变分自编码器，同时分离解剖结构（模态不变）与外观（模态相关）特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NeuroQuant，包含：1) 分解多轴注意力学习共享潜在表示；2) 双流3D编码器分离解剖与外观编码；3) 共享码本量化解剖编码，并通过FiLM融合外观特征；4) 联合2D/3D训练策略。
contributions: 提出模态感知和解剖向量量化的3D VQ-VAE框架NeuroQuant，支持多模态脑MRI重建。
设计双流编码器和FiLM解码机制，显式分离模态不变解剖结构与模态相关外观。
在两个多模态脑MRI数据集上验证了优于现有VAE的重建保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在两个多模态脑MRI数据集上进行实验，NeuroQuant在重建保真度上优于现有VAE。
limitations: 可能仅适用于脑MRI，未验证其他解剖部位或模态。
计算开销可能较大，因使用3D编码器和多轴注意力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NeuroQuant，一种模态感知和解剖向量量化的3D VQ-VAE，用于多模态脑MRI重建。

papers.title: Instruction-Tuned LLMs for Parsing and Mining Unstructured Logs on Leadership HPC Systems
papers.abstract: Leadership-class HPC systems generate massive volumes of heterogeneous, largely unstructured system logs. Because these logs originate from diverse software, hardware, and runtime layers, they exhibit inconsistent formats, making structure extraction and pattern discovery extremely challenging. Therefore, robust log parsing and mining is critical to transform this raw telemetry into actionable insights that reveal operational patterns, diagnose anomalies, and enable reliable, efficient, and scalable system analysis. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) offer a promising new direction for automated log understanding in leadership-class HPC environments. To capitalize on this opportunity, we present a domain-adapted, instruction-following, LLM-driven framework that leverages chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to parse and structure HPC logs with high fidelity. Our approach combines domain-specific log-template data with instruction-tuned examples to fine-tune an 8B-parameter LLaMA model tailored for HPC log analysis. We develop a hybrid fine-tuning methodology that adapts a general-purpose LLM to domain-specific log data, enabling privacy-preserving, locally deployable, fast, and energy-efficient log-mining approach. We conduct experiments on a diverse set of log datasets from the LogHub repository. The evaluation confirms that our approach achieves parsing accuracy on par with significantly larger models, such as LLaMA 70B and Anthropic's Claude. We further validate the practical utility of our fine-tuned LLM model by parsing over 600 million production logs from the Frontier supercomputer over a four-week window, uncovering critical patterns in temporal dynamics, node-level anomalies, and workload-error log correlations.

analysis.tldr: 提出指令微调LLaMA-8B模型，结合思维链推理，用于解析HPC非结构化日志，在LogHub和Frontier超算日志上验证了与70B模型相当的解析精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 领导级HPC系统产生大量异构非结构化日志，格式不一致导致结构提取和模式发现极其困难，亟需鲁棒的日志解析与挖掘方法以转化为可操作洞察。
analysis.problem: 如何利用指令微调LLM高效解析HPC非结构化日志，实现高保真结构提取和模式发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出领域自适应、指令跟随的LLM驱动框架，结合思维链推理，使用领域特定日志模板数据和指令微调示例对8B参数LLaMA模型进行混合微调，实现隐私保护、本地部署、快速且节能的日志挖掘。
contributions: 提出首个针对HPC日志解析的指令微调LLM框架，结合思维链推理。
开发混合微调方法，使通用LLM适应领域特定日志数据，实现与70B模型相当的解析精度。
在Frontier超算上验证了处理6亿条生产日志的实际效用，揭示了时间动态、节点异常和工作负载-错误日志相关性等关键模式。
analysis.experiments: 在LogHub仓库的多种日志数据集上评估，并在Frontier超算上解析超过6亿条生产日志。
limitations: 仅基于LLaMA-8B模型，更大模型可能进一步提升性能。
依赖领域特定日志模板数据，可能限制对新日志类型的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出指令微调LLaMA-8B模型，结合思维链推理，用于解析HPC非结构化日志，在LogHub和Frontier超算日志上验证了与70B模型相当的解析精度。

papers.title: Learning the Stellar Structure Equations via Self-supervised Physics-Informed Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Stellar astrophysics relies critically on accurate descriptions of the physical conditions inside stars. Traditional solvers such as \texttt{MESA} (Modules for Experiments in Stellar Astrophysics), which employ adaptive finite-difference methods, can become computationally expensive and challenging to scale for large stellar population synthesis ($>10^9$ stars). In this work, we present an self-supervised physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework that provides a mesh-free and fully differentiable approach to solving the stellar structure equations under hydrostatic and thermal equilibrium. The model takes as input the stellar boundary conditions (at the center and surface) together with the chemical composition, and learns continuous radial profiles for mass $M_r(r)$, pressure $P(r)$, density $ρ(r)$, temperature $T(r)$, and luminosity $L_r(r)$ by enforcing the governing structure equations through physics-based loss terms. To incorporate realistic microphysics, we introduce auxiliary neural networks that approximate the equation of state and opacity tables as smooth, differentiable functions of the local thermodynamic state. These surrogates replace traditional tabulated inputs and enable end-to-end training. Once trained for a given star, the model produces continuous solutions across the entire radial domain without requiring discretization or interpolation. Validation against benchmark \texttt{MESA} models across a range of stellar masses yields a Mean Relative Absolute Error of $3.06\%$ and an average $R^2$ score of $99.98\%$. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration that the stellar structure equations can be solved in a fully self-supervised and data-free fashion employing PINNs. This work establishes a foundation for scalable, physics-informed emulation of stellar interiors and opens the door to future extensions toward time-dependent stellar evolution.

analysis.tldr: 用自监督物理信息神经网络求解恒星结构方程，实现无网格、可微的恒星内部建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统恒星结构求解器（如MESA）在大规模恒星种群合成（>10^9颗星）时计算成本高且难以扩展，需要更高效的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何以自监督、无数据的方式求解恒星结构方程，获得连续径向剖面。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自监督物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，输入恒星边界条件和化学成分，通过物理损失项强制满足结构方程；并引入辅助神经网络近似状态方程和不透明度表，实现端到端训练。
contributions: 首次证明恒星结构方程可通过自监督、无数据的PINN求解。
提出用辅助神经网络替代传统表格化输入，实现端到端可微训练。
analysis.experiments: 与基准MESA模型在多种恒星质量下验证，平均相对绝对误差3.06%，平均R²分数99.98%。
limitations: 当前仅针对静态平衡，未扩展到时间演化。
可能依赖特定恒星类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用自监督物理信息神经网络求解恒星结构方程，实现无网格、可微的恒星内部建模。

papers.title: From Use to Oversight: How Mental Models Influence User Behavior and Output in AI Writing Assistants
papers.abstract: AI-based writing assistants are ubiquitous, yet little is known about how users' mental models shape their use. We examine two types of mental models -- functional or related to what the system does, and structural or related to how the system works -- and how they affect control behavior -- how users request, accept, or edit AI suggestions as they write -- and writing outcomes. We primed participants ($N = 48$) with different system descriptions to induce these mental models before asking them to complete a cover letter writing task using a writing assistant that occasionally offered preconfigured ungrammatical suggestions to test whether the mental models affected participants' critical oversight. We find that while participants in the structural mental model condition demonstrate a better understanding of the system, this can have a backfiring effect: while these participants judged the system as more usable, they also produced letters with more grammatical errors, highlighting a complex relationship between system understanding, trust, and control in contexts that require user oversight of error-prone AI outputs.

analysis.tldr: 用户对AI写作助手的心理模型（功能vs结构）会影响其控制行为和输出质量，结构模型反而可能导致更多语法错误。
analysis.research_motivation: AI写作助手广泛使用，但用户对系统的理解（心理模型）如何影响其使用行为和输出质量尚不清楚，这对设计更有效的AI交互至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究用户的功能心理模型（系统做什么）和结构心理模型（系统如何工作）如何影响他们对AI写作助手的控制行为（请求、接受或编辑建议）以及最终的写作输出质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到一种反直觉现象：结构心理模型（更了解系统工作原理）的用户虽然认为系统更易用，但写出的信件中语法错误更多，表明系统理解、信任和用户监督之间存在复杂关系。
analysis.method: 通过向48名参与者提供不同的系统描述来诱导功能或结构心理模型，然后让他们使用偶尔提供预置语法错误建议的AI写作助手完成求职信写作任务，测量控制行为和写作输出。
contributions: 首次实证研究心理模型类型（功能vs结构）对AI写作助手用户行为的影响
揭示结构心理模型可能产生反效果，导致用户监督放松和输出质量下降
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及N=48的参与者实验和主要发现。
limitations: 样本量较小（N=48），可能限制统计效力
仅使用求职信写作任务，泛化性有限
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用户对AI写作助手的心理模型（功能vs结构）会影响其控制行为和输出质量，结构模型反而可能导致更多语法错误。

papers.title: Learning to Focus: CSI-Free Hierarchical MARL for Reconfigurable Reflectors
papers.abstract: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) has a potential to engineer smart radio environments for next-generation millimeter-wave (mmWave) networks. However, the prohibitive computational overhead of Channel State Information (CSI) estimation and the dimensionality explosion inherent in centralized optimization severely hinder practical large-scale deployments. To overcome these bottlenecks, we introduce a ``CSI-free" paradigm powered by a Hierarchical Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (HMARL) architecture to control mechanically reconfigurable reflective surfaces. By substituting pilot-based channel estimation with accessible user localization data, our framework leverages spatial intelligence for macro-scale wave propagation management. The control problem is decomposed into a two-tier neural architecture: a high-level controller executes temporally extended, discrete user-to-reflector allocations, while low-level controllers autonomously optimize continuous focal points utilizing Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO) under a Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) scheme. Comprehensive deterministic ray-tracing evaluations demonstrate that this hierarchical framework achieves massive RSSI improvements of up to 7.79 dB over centralized baselines. Furthermore, the system exhibits robust multi-user scalability and maintains highly resilient beam-focusing performance under practical sub-meter localization tracking errors. By eliminating CSI overhead while maintaining high-fidelity signal redirection, this work establishes a scalable and cost-effective blueprint for intelligent wireless environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种免信道状态信息的层次化多智能体强化学习框架，用于控制可重构反射表面，实现大规模毫米波网络中的高效波束聚焦。
analysis.research_motivation: RIS在毫米波网络中潜力巨大，但CSI估计的计算开销和集中式优化的维度爆炸严重阻碍了大规模部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖CSI的情况下，通过层次化多智能体强化学习高效控制可重构反射表面，实现多用户场景下的波束聚焦。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CSI-free的HMARL架构：高层控制器执行用户到反射器的离散分配，低层控制器利用MAPPO在CTDE框架下优化连续焦点。
contributions: 提出CSI-free的层次化多智能体强化学习框架，消除CSI估计开销。
通过确定性射线追踪实验验证，RSSI提升高达7.79 dB，且对定位误差鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在确定性射线追踪仿真中评估，RSSI提升7.79 dB，并验证了多用户可扩展性和对亚米级定位误差的鲁棒性。
limitations: 仅通过仿真验证，未在真实硬件上测试。
可能依赖用户定位数据的精度，极端误差下性能未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种免信道状态信息的层次化多智能体强化学习框架，用于控制可重构反射表面，实现大规模毫米波网络中的高效波束聚焦。

papers.title: Not All Turns Are Equally Hard: Adaptive Thinking Budgets For Efficient Multi-Turn Reasoning
papers.abstract: As LLM reasoning performance plateau, improving inference-time compute efficiency is crucial to mitigate overthinking and long thinking traces even for simple queries. Prior approaches including length regularization, adaptive routing, and difficulty-based budget allocation primarily focus on single-turn settings and fail to address the sequential dependencies inherent in multi-turn reasoning. In this work, we formulate multi-turn reasoning as a sequential compute allocation problem and model it as a multi-objective Markov Decision Process. We propose TAB: Turn-Adaptive Budgets, a budget allocation policy trained via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) that learns to maximize task accuracy while respecting global per-problem token constraints. Consequently, TAB takes as input the conversation history and learns to adaptively allocate smaller budgets to easier turns and save appropriate number of tokens for the crucial harder reasoning steps. Our experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TAB achieves a superior accuracy-tokens tradeoff saving up to 35% tokens while maintaining accuracy over static and off-the-shelf LLM budget baselines. Further, for systems where a plan of all sub-questions is available apriori, we propose TAB All-SubQ, a budget allocation policy that budgets tokens based on the conversation history and all past and future sub-questions saving up to 40% tokens over baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出TAB策略，通过GRPO训练自适应分配多轮推理的token预算，在数学推理任务上节省高达35%的token且保持准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理性能趋于平稳，但存在过度思考（overthinking）和长推理链问题，导致简单查询也消耗大量计算资源。现有方法主要针对单轮推理，无法处理多轮推理中的序列依赖。
analysis.problem: 多轮推理场景中，如何自适应地为不同难度的推理步骤分配token预算，以在保持准确率的同时提高推理效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多轮推理中不同轮次难度不同，简单轮次无需过多推理，而关键步骤需要更多计算。
analysis.method: 将多轮推理建模为多目标马尔可夫决策过程，使用GRPO训练一个预算分配策略TAB，根据对话历史自适应分配token预算，并扩展出TAB All-SubQ利用全局子问题信息。
contributions: 将多轮推理效率问题形式化为序列计算分配问题，并建模为多目标MDP。
提出TAB策略，通过GRPO学习自适应预算分配，在数学推理基准上节省35% token且保持准确率。
提出TAB All-SubQ，利用全局子问题信息进一步节省40% token。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理基准上验证，TAB相比静态和现成LLM预算基线节省高达35% token且保持准确率；TAB All-SubQ节省高达40% token。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务验证，泛化性未知。
TAB All-SubQ需要预先知道所有子问题，实际场景中可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TAB策略，通过GRPO训练自适应分配多轮推理的token预算，在数学推理任务上节省高达35%的token且保持准确率。

papers.title: SE-Enhanced ViT and BiLSTM-Based Intrusion Detection for Secure IIoT and IoMT Environments
papers.abstract: With the rapid growth of interconnected devices in Industrial and Medical Internet of Things (IIoT and MIoT) ecosystems, ensuring timely and accurate detection of cyber threats has become a critical challenge. This study presents an advanced intrusion detection framework based on a hybrid Squeeze-and-Excitation Attention Vision Transformer-Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (SE ViT-BiLSTM) architecture. In this design, the traditional multi-head attention mechanism of the Vision Transformer is replaced with Squeeze-and-Excitation attention, and integrated with BiLSTM layers to enhance detection accuracy and computational efficiency. The proposed model was trained and evaluated on two real-world benchmark datasets; EdgeIIoT and CICIoMT2024; both before and after data balancing using the Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique (SMOTE) and RandomOverSampler. Experimental results demonstrate that the SE ViT-BiLSTM model outperforms existing approaches across multiple metrics. Before balancing, the model achieved accuracies of 99.11% (FPR: 0.0013%, latency: 0.00032 sec/inst) on EdgeIIoT and 96.10% (FPR: 0.0036%, latency: 0.00053 sec/inst) on CICIoMT2024. After balancing, performance further improved, reaching 99.33% accuracy with 0.00035 sec/inst latency on EdgeIIoT and 98.16% accuracy with 0.00014 sec/inst latency on CICIoMT2024.

analysis.tldr: 提出SE-ViT-BiLSTM混合模型用于IIoT和IoMT入侵检测，在EdgeIIoT和CICIoMT2024数据集上达到99.33%和98.16%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业与医疗物联网设备激增，网络威胁检测面临准确性和效率挑战，现有方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高精度、低延迟的入侵检测模型，适用于IIoT和IoMT环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 将Vision Transformer中的多头注意力替换为Squeeze-and-Excitation注意力，并与BiLSTM层集成，形成混合架构。
contributions: 提出SE-ViT-BiLSTM混合架构，提升检测精度和计算效率。
在EdgeIIoT和CICIoMT2024两个真实基准数据集上验证，达到SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在EdgeIIoT和CICIoMT2024数据集上，使用SMOTE和RandomOverSampler进行数据平衡，报告了准确率、FPR和延迟。
limitations: 可能未在更多样化的真实网络环境中验证。
对新型未知攻击的泛化能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SE-ViT-BiLSTM混合模型用于IIoT和IoMT入侵检测，在EdgeIIoT和CICIoMT2024数据集上达到99.33%和98.16%准确率。

papers.title: What Makes a Good Response? An Empirical Analysis of Quality in Qualitative Interviews
papers.abstract: Qualitative interviews provide essential insights into human experiences when they elicit high-quality responses. While qualitative and NLP researchers have proposed various measures of interview quality, these measures lack validation that high-scoring responses actually contribute to the study's goals. In this work, we identify, implement, and evaluate 10 proposed measures of interview response quality to determine which are actually predictive of a response's contribution to the study findings. To conduct our analysis, we introduce the Qualitative Interview Corpus, a newly constructed dataset of 343 interview transcripts with 16,940 participant responses from 14 real research projects. We find that direct relevance to a key research question is the strongest predictor of response quality. We additionally find that two measures commonly used to evaluate NLP interview systems, clarity and surprisal-based informativeness, are not predictive of response quality. Our work provides analytic insights and grounded, scalable metrics to inform the design of qualitative studies and the evaluation of automated interview systems.

analysis.tldr: 在定性访谈中，回答与关键研究问题的直接相关性是预测回答质量的最强指标，而清晰度和基于惊奇度的信息量则无效。
analysis.research_motivation: 定性访谈是理解人类经验的关键方法，但现有回答质量度量缺乏实证验证，无法确定高分回答是否真正有助于研究目标。
analysis.problem: 评估定性访谈中回答质量的现有度量缺乏预测有效性，需要识别哪些度量能实际预测回答对研究发现的贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现直接相关性是回答质量的最强预测因子，而清晰度和基于惊奇度的信息量（常用于评估NLP访谈系统）不具有预测性。
analysis.method: 识别、实现并评估10种提出的访谈回答质量度量，通过构建包含343份访谈记录和16,940个回答的定性访谈语料库进行实证分析。
contributions: 构建了定性访谈语料库，包含来自14个真实研究项目的343份访谈记录和16,940个回答。
通过实证评估10种质量度量，发现直接相关性是回答质量的最强预测因子，并揭示常用NLP度量的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在343份访谈记录和16,940个回答上评估10种质量度量，使用真实研究项目数据。
limitations: 语料库可能未覆盖所有定性访谈类型或领域。
度量的预测性可能依赖于具体研究问题和上下文。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在定性访谈中，回答与关键研究问题的直接相关性是预测回答质量的最强指标，而清晰度和基于惊奇度的信息量则无效。

papers.title: Bypassing the CSI Bottleneck: MARL-Driven Spatial Control for Reflector Arrays
papers.abstract: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) are pivotal for next-generation smart radio environments, yet their practical deployment is severely bottlenecked by the intractable computational overhead of Channel State Information (CSI) estimation. To bypass this fundamental physical-layer barrier, we propose an AI-native, data-driven paradigm that replaces complex channel modeling with spatial intelligence. This paper presents a fully autonomous Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) framework to control mechanically adjustable metallic reflector arrays. By mapping high-dimensional mechanical constraints to a reduced-order virtual focal point space, we deploy a Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) architecture. Using Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO), our decentralized agents learn cooperative beam-focusing strategies relying on user coordinates, achieving CSI-free operation. High-fidelity ray-tracing simulations in dynamic non-line-of-sight (NLOS) environments demonstrate that this multi-agent approach rapidly adapts to user mobility, yielding up to a 26.86 dB enhancement over static flat reflectors and outperforming single-agent and hardware-constrained DRL baselines in both spatial selectivity and temporal stability. Crucially, the learned policies exhibit good deployment resilience, sustaining stable signal coverage even under 1.0-meter localization noise. These results validate the efficacy of MARL-driven spatial abstractions as a scalable, highly practical pathway toward AI-empowered wireless networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出MARL驱动的反射阵列空间控制方法，绕过CSI估计瓶颈，实现免信道信息的波束聚焦。
analysis.research_motivation: RIS实际部署受限于CSI估计的巨大计算开销，传统物理层方法难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖CSI的情况下，通过多智能体强化学习实现反射阵列的协同波束聚焦。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将机械约束映射到低维虚拟焦点空间，采用CTDE架构和MAPPO算法，仅依赖用户坐标学习协作策略。
contributions: 提出AI原生数据驱动范式，绕过CSI瓶颈，实现免信道信息的反射阵列控制。
设计MARL框架，在动态NLOS环境中实现快速自适应波束聚焦，性能优于单智能体和硬件约束基线。
analysis.experiments: 高保真光线追踪仿真显示，该方法在动态NLOS环境下相比静态平面反射器提升26.86 dB，且在1.0米定位噪声下保持稳定覆盖。
limitations: 仿真环境与真实部署可能存在差距。
未讨论多用户干扰或大规模阵列的可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MARL驱动的反射阵列空间控制方法，绕过CSI估计瓶颈，实现免信道信息的波束聚焦。

papers.title: Assessing Privacy Preservation and Utility in Online Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: The increasing use of Online Vision Language Models (OVLMs) for processing images has introduced significant privacy risks, as individuals frequently upload images for various utilities, unaware of the potential for privacy violations. Images contain relationships that relate to Personally Identifiable Information (PII), where even seemingly harmless details can indirectly reveal sensitive information through surrounding clues. This paper explores the critical issue of PII disclosure in images uploaded to OVLMs and its implications for user privacy. We investigate how the extraction of contextual relationships from images can lead to direct (explicit) or indirect (implicit) exposure of PII, significantly compromising personal privacy. Furthermore, we propose methods to protect privacy while preserving the intended utility of the images in Vision Language Model (VLM)-based applications. Our evaluation demonstrates the efficacy of these techniques, highlighting the delicate balance between maintaining utility and protecting privacy in online image processing environments. Index Terms-Personally Identifiable Information (PII), Privacy, Utility, privacy concerns, sensitive information

analysis.tldr: 研究在线视觉语言模型中的隐私保护与效用平衡问题，提出保护PII同时保持图像可用性的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户上传图像到在线视觉语言模型时面临隐私泄露风险，而现有方法往往在保护隐私时牺牲图像效用，亟需平衡两者。
analysis.problem: 如何防止在线视觉语言模型处理图像时泄露个人身份信息（PII），同时保持图像在VLM应用中的原始效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出图像中的上下文关系可导致直接或间接的PII暴露，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出保护隐私的技术，在去除或模糊PII的同时保留图像对VLM任务的可用性。
contributions: 系统分析了在线视觉语言模型中PII泄露的途径（直接与间接）。
提出了兼顾隐私保护与图像效用的方法，并验证了其有效性。
