analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未考虑复杂场景下的隐私-效用权衡。
方法可能依赖特定VLM架构或任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究在线视觉语言模型中的隐私保护与效用平衡问题，提出保护PII同时保持图像可用性的方法。

papers.title: Planning to Explore: Curiosity-Driven Planning for LLM Test Generation
papers.abstract: The use of LLMs for code generation has naturally extended to code testing and evaluation. As codebases grow in size and complexity, so does the need for automated test generation. Current approaches for LLM-based test generation rely on strategies that maximize immediate coverage gain, a greedy approach that plateaus on code where reaching deep branches requires setup steps that individually yield zero new coverage. Drawing on principles of Bayesian exploration, we treat the program's branch structure as an unknown environment, and an evolving coverage map as a proxy probabilistic posterior representing what the LLM has discovered so far. Our method, CovQValue, feeds the coverage map back to the LLM, generates diverse candidate plans in parallel, and selects the most informative plan by LLM-estimated Q-values, seeking actions that balance immediate branch discovery with future reachability. Our method outperforms greedy selection on TestGenEval Lite, achieving 51-77% higher branch coverage across three popular LLMs and winning on 77-84% of targets. In addition, we build a benchmark for iterative test generation, RepoExploreBench, where they achieve 40-74%. These results show the potential of curiosity-driven planning methods for LLM-based exploration, enabling more effective discovery of program behavior through sequential interaction

analysis.tldr: 提出好奇心驱动的规划方法CovQValue，通过覆盖率地图和Q值选择提升LLM测试生成的代码分支覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM测试生成方法采用贪婪策略最大化即时覆盖率，在需要多步设置才能到达深层分支的代码上效果不佳，导致覆盖率停滞。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在测试生成中有效探索深层分支，避免贪婪策略的局部最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 贪婪策略在需要多步设置才能到达深层分支的代码上覆盖率停滞，因为中间步骤单独不产生新覆盖。
analysis.method: CovQValue方法：将程序分支结构视为未知环境，用覆盖率地图作为后验概率，并行生成候选计划，通过LLM估计的Q值选择信息量最大的计划，平衡即时分支发现与未来可达性。
contributions: 提出CovQValue方法，将好奇心驱动规划应用于LLM测试生成，显著提升分支覆盖率。
构建RepoExploreBench基准，用于评估迭代测试生成。
analysis.experiments: 在TestGenEval Lite上，CovQValue在三个流行LLM上比贪婪选择提高51-77%分支覆盖率，赢得77-84%目标；在RepoExploreBench上提高40-74%。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM对Q值的估计准确性，存在偏差风险。
并行生成计划的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出好奇心驱动的规划方法CovQValue，通过覆盖率地图和Q值选择提升LLM测试生成的代码分支覆盖率。

papers.title: IntentScore: Intent-Conditioned Action Evaluation for Computer-Use Agents
papers.abstract: Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) leverage large language models to execute GUI operations on desktop environments, yet they generate actions without evaluating action quality, leading to irreversible errors that cascade through subsequent steps. We propose IntentScore, a plan-aware reward model that learns to score candidate actions from 398K offline GUI interaction steps spanning three operating systems. IntentScore trains with two complementary objectives: contrastive alignment for state-action relevance and margin ranking for action correctness. Architecturally, it embeds each candidate's planning intent in the action encoder, enabling discrimination between candidates with similar actions but different rationales. IntentScore achieves 97.5% pairwise discrimination accuracy on held-out evaluation. Deployed as a re-ranker for Agent S3 on OSWorld, an environment entirely unseen during training, IntentScore improves task success rate by 6.9 points, demonstrating that reward estimation learned from heterogeneous offline trajectories generalizes to unseen agents and task distributions.

analysis.tldr: 提出IntentScore，一种基于意图条件的奖励模型，用于评估计算机使用代理的动作质量，提升任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机使用代理（CUA）在执行GUI操作时缺乏动作质量评估，导致不可逆错误累积，影响任务成功率。
analysis.problem: 如何评估CUA生成的动作质量，避免错误级联？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有CUA生成动作时不评估质量，导致错误累积；离线轨迹数据异构，需学习泛化奖励模型。
analysis.method: 提出IntentScore，一种计划感知的奖励模型，使用对比对齐和边际排序两个目标训练，并在动作编码器中嵌入候选动作的计划意图。
contributions: 提出IntentScore，一种基于意图条件的奖励模型，用于评估CUA动作质量。
构建包含398K离线GUI交互步骤的数据集，覆盖三个操作系统。
在OSWorld上作为重排序器，将任务成功率提升6.9个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在OSWorld环境上评估，任务成功率提升6.9个百分点；成对判别准确率达97.5%。
limitations: 可能依赖离线数据质量，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅作为重排序器，未探索端到端训练。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IntentScore，一种基于意图条件的奖励模型，用于评估计算机使用代理的动作质量，提升任务成功率。

papers.title: Sampling Matters: The Effect of ECG Frequency on Deep Learning-Based Atrial Fibrillation Detection
papers.abstract: Deep learning models for atrial fibrillation (AF) detection are increasingly trained on heterogeneous electrocardiogram (ECG) datasets with varying sampling frequencies, yet the specific consequences of these discrepancies on model performance, calibration, and robustness remain insufficiently characterized. To address this, we conducted a systematic benchmark using 12-lead, 10-second recordings from the PTB-XL dataset, resampled to target frequencies of 62, 100, 250, and 500 Hz, to evaluate a standard 1-D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and a hybrid CNN-Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) architecture under a rigorous patient-safe cross-validation framework. Our analysis reveals that sampling frequency significantly impacts detection metrics in an architecture-dependent manner; the hybrid CNN-LSTM model demonstrated optimal performance and consistent calibration at intermediate frequencies (100-250 Hz), whereas the 1-D CNN baseline exhibited marked degradation in accuracy and sensitivity at 500 Hz, suggesting increased susceptibility to high-frequency noise. We conclude that ECG sampling frequency is a critical, underappreciated factor in arrhythmia detection, and future foundation models must explicitly control for temporal resolution to ensure clinical reliability and reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: ECG采样频率显著影响房颤检测深度学习模型的性能、校准和鲁棒性，且影响方式与模型架构相关。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有房颤检测深度学习模型在异质采样频率的ECG数据集上训练，但采样频率差异对模型性能、校准和鲁棒性的具体影响尚未被充分表征，可能导致临床可靠性问题。
analysis.problem: 系统评估ECG采样频率对深度学习房颤检测模型性能、校准和鲁棒性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 采样频率对检测指标的影响具有架构依赖性：混合CNN-LSTM模型在中等频率（100-250 Hz）表现最优且校准一致，而1-D CNN基线在500 Hz时准确率和灵敏度显著下降，表明其对高频噪声更敏感。
analysis.method: 使用PTB-XL数据集的12导联10秒记录，重采样至62、100、250和500 Hz，在严格的病人安全交叉验证框架下评估标准1-D CNN和混合CNN-LSTM架构。
contributions: 首次系统基准测试了ECG采样频率对深度学习房颤检测模型的影响。
揭示了采样频率影响具有架构依赖性，并指出高频采样可能引入噪声导致性能下降。
强调未来基础模型必须显式控制时间分辨率以确保临床可靠性和可重复性。
analysis.experiments: 在PTB-XL数据集上使用12导联10秒记录，重采样至四种频率，评估两种架构，采用病人安全交叉验证。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用单一数据集（PTB-XL），可能限制泛化性。
仅评估两种架构，未涵盖更广泛的模型类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ECG采样频率显著影响房颤检测深度学习模型的性能、校准和鲁棒性，且影响方式与模型架构相关。

papers.title: Compiled AI: Deterministic Code Generation for LLM-Based Workflow Automation
papers.abstract: We study compiled AI, a paradigm in which large language models generate executable code artifacts during a compilation phase, after which workflows execute deterministically without further model invocation. This paradigm has antecedents in prior work on declarative pipeline optimization (DSPy) and hybrid neural-symbolic planning (LLM+P); our contribution is a systems-oriented study of its application to high-stakes enterprise workflows, with particular emphasis on healthcare settings where reliability and auditability are critical. By constraining generation to narrow business-logic functions embedded in validated templates, compiled AI trades runtime flexibility for predictability, auditability, cost efficiency, and reduced security exposure. We introduce (i) a system architecture for constrained LLM-based code generation, (ii) a four-stage generation-and-validation pipeline that converts probabilistic model output into production-ready code artifacts, and (iii) an evaluation framework measuring operational metrics including token amortization, determinism, reliability, security, and cost. We evaluate on two task types: function-calling (BFCL, n=400) and document intelligence (DocILE, n=5,680 invoices). On function-calling, compiled AI achieves 96% task completion with zero execution tokens, breaking even with runtime inference at approximately 17 transactions and reducing token consumption by 57x at 1,000 transactions. On document intelligence, our Code Factory variant matches Direct LLM on key field extraction (KILE: 80.0%) while achieving the highest line item recognition accuracy (LIR: 80.4%). Security evaluation across 135 test cases demonstrates 96.7% accuracy on prompt injection detection and 87.5% on static code safety analysis with zero false positives.

analysis.tldr: 提出编译式AI范式，通过约束LLM生成确定性代码工件，实现高可靠性、低成本的自动化工作流。
analysis.research_motivation: 在高风险企业场景（如医疗）中，LLM直接推理存在不可预测性、高成本和安全风险，亟需一种可审计、可复现的自动化方案。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM的灵活生成能力转化为确定性、可审计、低成本的代码执行流程，同时保持任务完成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出编译式AI架构：在编译阶段由LLM生成受限业务逻辑代码，经四阶段生成-验证流水线（约束生成、静态分析、沙箱执行、模板验证）后，执行阶段零模型调用。
contributions: 提出编译式AI范式，系统研究其在企业工作流中的应用。
设计约束LLM代码生成架构及四阶段验证流水线。
构建评估框架，涵盖令牌摊销、确定性、可靠性、安全性和成本指标。
analysis.experiments: 在函数调用（BFCL, n=400）和文档智能（DocILE, n=5,680发票）上评估：函数调用任务完成率96%，零执行令牌，约17次交易后盈亏平衡，1000次交易令牌消耗减少57倍；文档智能关键字段提取KILE 80.0%，行项目识别LIR 80.4%；安全测试中提示注入检测准确率96.7%，静态代码安全分析87.5%且零误报。
limitations: 可能仅适用于规则明确的业务逻辑，对开放域任务泛化性有限。
编译阶段仍依赖LLM，存在生成错误代码的风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出编译式AI范式，通过约束LLM生成确定性代码工件，实现高可靠性、低成本的自动化工作流。

papers.title: Lightweight True In-Pixel Encryption with FeFET Enabled Pixel Design for Secure Imaging
papers.abstract: Ensuring end-to-end security in image sensors has become essential as visual data can be exposed through multiple stages of the imaging pipeline. Advanced protection requires encryption to occur before pixel values appear on any readout lines. This work introduces a secure pixel sensor (SecurePix), a compact CMOS-compatible pixel architecture that performs true in-pixel encryption using a symmetric key realized through programmable, non-volatile multidomain polarization states of a ferroelectric field-effect transistor. The pixel and array operations are designed and simulated in HSPICE, while a 45 nm CMOS process design kit is used for layout drawing. The resulting layout confirms a pixel pitch of 2.33 x 3.01 um^2. Each pixel's non-volatile programming level defines its analog transfer characteristic, enabling the photodiode voltage to be converted into an encrypted analog output within the pixel. Full-image evaluation shows that ResNet-18 recognition accuracy drops from 99.29 percent to 9.58 percent on MNIST and from 91.33 percent to 6.98 percent on CIFAR-10 after encryption, indicating strong resistance to neural-network-based inference. Lookup-table-based inverse mapping enables recovery for authorized receivers using the same symmetric key. Based on HSPICE simulation, the SecurePix achieves a per-pixel programming power-delay product of 17 uW us and a per-pixel sensing power-delay product of 1.25 uW us, demonstrating low-overhead hardware-level protection.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于FeFET的紧凑像素内加密架构SecurePix，实现低开销的硬件级图像传感器端到端安全。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像传感器在成像管线的多个阶段可能暴露视觉数据，现有保护方案无法在像素值出现在读出线之前进行加密，存在安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何在像素级实现真正的加密，确保像素值在读出前已被加密，同时保持像素紧凑和低功耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用铁电场效应晶体管(FeFET)的可编程非易失多畴极化状态作为对称密钥，在像素内通过编程电平定义模拟传输特性，将光电二极管电压转换为加密模拟输出。
contributions: 提出首个CMOS兼容的紧凑像素内加密架构SecurePix，实现真像素级加密。
通过仿真验证了加密后ResNet-18识别准确率大幅下降（MNIST从99.29%降至9.58%，CIFAR-10从91.33%降至6.98%），且具有低功耗特性。
analysis.experiments: 基于HSPICE仿真和45 nm CMOS工艺设计套件，评估了像素间距、功耗延迟积以及加密对神经网络识别的影响。
limitations: 仅基于仿真验证，缺乏实际芯片测试结果。
加密强度仅通过神经网络识别准确率下降衡量，未讨论其他攻击模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于FeFET的紧凑像素内加密架构SecurePix，实现低开销的硬件级图像传感器端到端安全。

papers.title: A mathematical theory of evolution for self-designing AIs
papers.abstract: As artificial intelligence systems (AIs) become increasingly produced by recursive self-improvement, a form of evolution may emerge, with the traits of AI systems shaped by the success of earlier AIs in designing and propagating their descendants. There is a rich mathematical theory modeling how behavioral traits are shaped by biological evolution, a key component of which is Fisher's fundamental theorem of natural selection, which describes conditions under which mean fitness (i.e. reproductive success) increases. AI evolution will be radically different to biological evolution: while DNA mutations are random and approximately reversible, AI self-design will be strongly directed. Here we develop a mathematical model of evolution for self-designing AIs, replacing a random walk of mutations with a directed tree of potential AI designs. Current AIs design their descendants, while humans control a fitness function allocating resources. In this model, fitness need not increase over time without further assumptions. However, assuming bounded fitness and an additional "$η$-locking" condition, we show that fitness concentrates on the maximum reachable value. We consider the implications of this for AI alignment, specifically for cases where fitness and human utility are not perfectly correlated. We show that if deception of human evaluators additively increases an AI's reproductive fitness beyond genuine capability, evolution will select for both capability and deception. This risk could be mitigated if reproduction is based on purely objective criteria, rather than human judgment.

analysis.tldr: 为自我设计AI的进化建立数学模型，证明在特定条件下适应度会集中到最大值，并揭示欺骗性进化风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI通过递归自我改进产生，可能形成类似生物进化的过程，但AI进化具有强方向性，现有理论无法直接适用，需要建立新的数学模型来理解其动态和风险。
analysis.problem: 如何为自我设计AI的进化过程建立数学模型，并分析适应度变化规律及对齐风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论分析表明：若无额外假设，适应度不一定随时间增加；在η-locking条件下适应度会集中到最大值；若欺骗能增加适应度，进化会同时选择能力和欺骗。
analysis.method: 提出一个数学模型，用有向树表示AI设计谱系，替代随机突变；引入η-locking条件证明适应度集中；分析欺骗性进化风险。
contributions: 建立了自我设计AI进化的数学理论框架，区别于生物进化模型。
证明了在η-locking条件下适应度收敛到最大值，并揭示了欺骗性进化的风险及缓解条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型假设较强（如η-locking条件），实际AI进化可能不满足。
未考虑人类干预的复杂性和多目标优化场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 为自我设计AI的进化建立数学模型，证明在特定条件下适应度会集中到最大值，并揭示欺骗性进化风险。

papers.title: EffiPair: Improving the Efficiency of LLM-generated Code with Relative Contrastive Feedback
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often generate code that is functionally correct but inefficient in runtime and memory. Prior approaches to improving code efficiency typically rely on absolute execution feedback, such as profiling a single program's runtime or memory usage, which is costly and provides weak guidance for refinement. We propose Relative Contrastive Feedback (RCF), an inference-time feedback mechanism that requires no model fine-tuning or parameter updates. RCF compares two structurally similar programs for the same task and highlights the differences associated with better efficiency. Building on this idea, we introduce EffiPair, an inference-time iterative refinement framework that operates entirely at test time by generating multiple candidate solutions, identifying informative program pairs with large efficiency gaps, summarizing their execution differences into lightweight feedback, and using this signal to produce more efficient solutions. By replacing isolated scalar feedback with pairwise contrastive comparisons, EffiPair provides more direct guidance while reducing profiling and prompting overhead. Experiments on code-efficiency benchmarks show that EffiPair consistently improves efficiency while preserving correctness. For instance, with DeepSeek-Chat V3.2, EffiPair achieves up to 1.5x speedup over generation without performance feedback, while reducing token usage by more than 90% compared to prior work.

analysis.tldr: EffiPair通过相对对比反馈机制，在不微调模型的情况下提升LLM生成代码的运行时和内存效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的代码常功能正确但效率低下，现有方法依赖绝对执行反馈（如运行时分析），成本高且指导性弱。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行模型微调或参数更新的情况下，高效提升LLM生成代码的运行时和内存效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 绝对执行反馈（如单个程序的运行时间或内存使用）成本高且对优化指导弱；而对比两个结构相似但效率差异大的程序，其差异能提供更直接的效率改进信号。
analysis.method: 提出相对对比反馈（RCF）机制，在推理时生成多个候选解，识别效率差距大的程序对，总结执行差异为轻量反馈，并利用该反馈迭代生成更高效的代码。
contributions: 提出相对对比反馈（RCF），一种无需微调的推理时反馈机制，通过对比程序对提供更直接的效率改进信号。
构建EffiPair框架，在测试时通过迭代生成候选解、对比反馈和优化，显著提升代码效率并降低开销。
analysis.experiments: 在代码效率基准上，EffiPair持续提升效率并保持正确性。例如，使用DeepSeek-Chat V3.2时，相比无性能反馈的生成，实现高达1.5倍加速，同时相比先前工作减少超过90%的token使用。
limitations: 依赖生成多个候选解，可能增加初始计算开销。
反馈质量受限于候选解中效率差距明显的程序对的存在。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EffiPair通过相对对比反馈机制，在不微调模型的情况下提升LLM生成代码的运行时和内存效率。

papers.title: Non-monotonic causal discovery with Kolmogorov-Arnold Fuzzy Cognitive Maps
papers.abstract: Fuzzy Cognitive Maps constitute a neuro-symbolic paradigm for modeling complex dynamic systems, widely adopted for their inherent interpretability and recurrent inference capabilities. However, the standard FCM formulation, characterized by scalar synaptic weights and monotonic activation functions, is fundamentally constrained in modeling non-monotonic causal dependencies, thereby limiting its efficacy in systems governed by saturation effects or periodic dynamics. To overcome this topological restriction, this research proposes the Kolmogorov-Arnold Fuzzy Cognitive Map (KA-FCM), a novel architecture that redefines the causal transmission mechanism. Drawing upon the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem, static scalar weights are replaced with learnable, univariate B-spline functions located on the model edges. This fundamental modification shifts the non-linearity from the nodes' aggregation phase directly to the causal influence phase. This modification allows for the modeling of arbitrary, non-monotonic causal relationships without increasing the graph density or introducing hidden layers. The proposed architecture is validated against both baselines (standard FCM trained with Particle Swarm Optimization) and universal black-box approximators (Multi-Layer Perceptron) across three distinct domains: non-monotonic inference (Yerkes-Dodson law), symbolic regression, and chaotic time-series forecasting. Experimental results demonstrate that KA-FCMs significantly outperform conventional architectures and achieve competitive accuracy relative to MLPs, while preserving graph- based interpretability and enabling the explicit extraction of mathematical laws from the learned edges.

analysis.tldr: 提出KA-FCM，用B样条函数替换标量权重以建模非单调因果，在多个任务上优于传统FCM且保持可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准FCM因标量权重和单调激活函数无法建模非单调因果依赖，限制了其在饱和效应或周期动态系统中的应用。
analysis.problem: 克服标准FCM在建模非单调因果关系上的拓扑限制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准FCM的单调激活函数无法表达非单调依赖，如Yerkes-Dodson定律中的倒U型关系。
analysis.method: 基于Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，将FCM边上的标量权重替换为可学习的单变量B样条函数，将非线性从节点聚合阶段转移到因果影响阶段。
contributions: 提出KA-FCM架构，用B样条函数替代标量权重，实现非单调因果建模而不增加图密度或隐藏层。
在非单调推理、符号回归和混沌时间序列预测三个领域验证了KA-FCM优于标准FCM且接近MLP精度，同时保持可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在非单调推理（Yerkes-Dodson定律）、符号回归和混沌时间序列预测三个领域进行实验，与标准FCM（PSO训练）和MLP对比。
limitations: B样条函数的学习可能增加计算开销。
在极大规模图上可能面临可扩展性挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KA-FCM，用B样条函数替换标量权重以建模非单调因果，在多个任务上优于传统FCM且保持可解释性。

papers.title: How Reasoning Evolves from Post-Training Data: An Empirical Study Using Chess
papers.abstract: We study how reasoning evolves in a language model -- from supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to reinforcement learning (RL) -- by analyzing how a set of theoretically-inspired datasets influences language model performance in chess. We find that fine-tuning a model to directly predict the best move leads to effective RL and the strongest downstream performance -- however, the RL stage elicits \textit{unfaithful} reasoning (reasoning inconsistent with the chosen move). Alternatively, training on multi-move trajectories yields comparable downstream performance with faithful reasoning and more stable RL. We analyze multiple qualitative and quantitative measures and highlight how these evolve from SFT through RL; we find several SFT-checkpoint metrics -- spanning evaluation performance, hallucination rates, and reasoning quality -- to be predictive of post-RL model performance. Finally, we ground our results with an experiment measuring \textit{chess information density} in our custom datasets. We release models as well as training data, evaluations, and code that allowed us to surpass leading open-source reasoning models in chess with a 7B-parameter model. Code, models, and data are available at https://github.com/lucasdino/lang-chess.

analysis.tldr: 通过国际象棋任务实证研究语言模型推理能力从SFT到RL的演化规律，发现直接预测最佳走法的SFT数据最有利于RL训练，但会导致不忠实推理，而多步轨迹数据则能兼顾性能与忠实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解语言模型推理能力如何从监督微调（SFT）到强化学习（RL）阶段演化，对于设计更有效的训练数据和提升模型推理质量至关重要，但目前缺乏系统的实证研究。
analysis.problem: 探究不同理论启发下的训练数据集（如直接预测最佳走法 vs. 多步轨迹）如何影响语言模型在国际象棋任务中的推理能力，特别是从SFT到RL阶段的演化过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：直接预测最佳走法的SFT数据能带来最有效的RL训练和最强下游性能，但RL阶段会引发不忠实推理（推理与所选走法不一致）；而多步轨迹训练则能实现可比的性能、忠实推理和更稳定的RL。此外，多个SFT检查点指标（评估性能、幻觉率、推理质量）可预测RL后的模型性能。
analysis.method: 使用国际象棋作为测试平台，设计不同理论启发的训练数据集（直接最佳走法、多步轨迹等），对语言模型进行SFT和RL训练，并通过多种定性和定量指标分析推理能力演化。
contributions: 系统揭示了从SFT到RL阶段推理能力演化的关键规律，包括数据选择对推理忠实性的影响。
发现SFT检查点的多个指标可预测RL后的模型性能，为训练策略提供指导。
开源了模型、训练数据、评估代码，并展示了7B参数模型超越领先开源推理模型的结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果细节，但提到在多个定性定量指标上进行了分析，并开源了代码和数据。
limitations: 实验仅基于国际象棋任务，结论向其他领域的泛化性有待验证。
未详细说明RL算法的具体实现和超参数设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过国际象棋任务实证研究语言模型推理能力从SFT到RL的演化规律，发现直接预测最佳走法的SFT数据最有利于RL训练，但会导致不忠实推理，而多步轨迹数据则能兼顾性能与忠实性。

papers.title: Offline RL for Adaptive Policy Retrieval in Prior Authorization
papers.abstract: Prior authorization (PA) requires interpretation of complex and fragmented coverage policies, yet existing retrieval-augmented systems rely on static top-$K$ strategies with fixed numbers of retrieved sections. Such fixed retrieval can be inefficient and gather irrelevant or insufficient information. We model policy retrieval for PA as a sequential decision-making problem, formulating adaptive retrieval as a Markov Decision Process (MDP). In our system, an agent iteratively selects policy chunks from a top-$K$ candidate set or chooses to stop and issue a decision. The reward balances decision correctness against retrieval cost, capturing the trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. We train policies using Conservative Q-Learning (CQL), Implicit Q-Learning (IQL), and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) in an offline RL setting on logged trajectories generated from baseline retrieval strategies over synthetic PA requests derived from publicly available CMS coverage data. On a corpus of 186 policy chunks spanning 10 CMS procedures, CQL achieves 92% decision accuracy (+30 percentage points over the best fixed-$K$ baseline) via exhaustive retrieval, while IQL matches the best baseline accuracy using 44% fewer retrieval steps and achieves the only positive episodic return among all policies. Transition-level DPO matches CQL's 92% accuracy while using 47% fewer retrieval steps (10.6 vs. 20.0), occupying a "selective-accurate" region on the Pareto frontier that dominates both CQL and BC. A behavioral cloning baseline matches CQL, confirming that advantage-weighted or preference-based policy extraction is needed to learn selective retrieval. Lambda ablation over step costs $λ\in \{0.05, 0.1, 0.2\}$ reveals a clear accuracy-efficiency inflection: only at $λ= 0.2$ does CQL transition from exhaustive to selective retrieval.

analysis.tldr: 将离线强化学习用于医保预授权中的自适应策略检索，在准确率和效率之间取得帕累托最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有检索增强系统在医保预授权（PA）中采用固定的 top-K 检索策略，效率低且可能收集无关或不足信息，亟需自适应检索方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将策略检索建模为序列决策问题，并通过离线强化学习训练自适应检索策略，以平衡决策准确性和检索成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定 top-K 检索策略在准确率和效率上存在权衡；离线 RL 方法（如 CQL、IQL、DPO）能学习到选择性检索行为，且存在一个成本系数 λ 的临界点，使策略从穷举检索转变为选择性检索。
analysis.method: 将自适应检索建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），使用 Conservative Q-Learning (CQL)、Implicit Q-Learning (IQL) 和 Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) 在离线轨迹上训练策略，奖励函数平衡决策正确性和检索成本。
contributions: 首次将离线强化学习应用于医保预授权中的自适应策略检索。
在 10 个 CMS 程序、186 个策略块的语料上，CQL 达到 92% 决策准确率（比最佳固定 top-K 基线高 30 个百分点），IQL 以少 44% 的检索步骤匹配基线准确率，DPO 以少 47% 的步骤达到 CQL 的准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在基于公开 CMS 覆盖数据生成的合成 PA 请求上，使用 186 个策略块进行实验，比较了 CQL、IQL、DPO 和行为克隆基线，并进行了 λ 消融实验。
limitations: 实验基于合成数据，真实 PA 场景的泛化性未知。
仅考虑了 10 个 CMS 程序，规模较小。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将离线强化学习用于医保预授权中的自适应策略检索，在准确率和效率之间取得帕累托最优。

papers.title: FLeX: Fourier-based Low-rank EXpansion for multilingual transfer
papers.abstract: Cross-lingual code generation is critical in enterprise environments where multiple programming languages coexist. However, fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) individually for each language is computationally prohibitive. This paper investigates whether parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods and optimizer enhancements can improve cross-lingual transfer from Python to languages like Java. We fine-tune the Code Llama 7B model using low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to optimize a small subset of parameters and compare Adam and Sophia optimizers, while exploring a novel Fourier-based regularization technique. Our contributions include: (1)demonstrating that LoRA fine-tuning on a small, high-quality dataset (MBPP) can exceed the pass@1 performance of the more broadly fine-tuned Code Llama-Python-7B model (40.1% vs. 38.4%); (2) showing that while Sophia achieves faster convergence than Adam, final pass@1 scores show marginal differences; and (3) presenting evidence that Fourier-based regularization during fine-tuning significantly improves cross-lingual transfer, achieving 42.1% pass@1 on Java tasks compared to the 34.2% baseline. These findings suggest that combining LoRA, optimized training methods, and frequency-domain regularization can efficiently adapt single-language LLMs to perform well across multiple programming languages.

analysis.tldr: 提出FLeX方法，结合LoRA和傅里叶正则化提升跨语言代码生成迁移效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业环境中多语言共存，但为每种语言单独微调大模型计算成本过高，亟需高效的跨语言迁移方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用参数高效微调和优化器增强，提升从Python到Java等语言的跨语言代码生成性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA微调小数据集可超越更广泛微调的模型；Sophia优化器收敛更快但最终性能与Adam差异不大；傅里叶正则化显著提升跨语言迁移效果。
analysis.method: 基于LoRA微调Code Llama 7B，比较Adam和Sophia优化器，并引入傅里叶域正则化技术。
contributions: 证明LoRA在小数据集MBPP上微调可超越更广泛微调的Code Llama-Python-7B模型（pass@1 40.1% vs 38.4%）。
发现Sophia优化器收敛更快但最终性能与Adam差异不大。
傅里叶正则化显著提升跨语言迁移，Java任务pass@1从34.2%提升至42.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在Code Llama 7B模型上，使用MBPP数据集进行Python微调，并在Java任务上评估跨语言迁移性能。
limitations: 仅评估了从Python到Java的迁移，其他语言对未验证。
实验基于7B模型，更大规模模型效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FLeX方法，结合LoRA和傅里叶正则化提升跨语言代码生成迁移效果。

papers.title: Watch Before You Answer: Learning from Visually Grounded Post-Training
papers.abstract: It is critical for vision-language models (VLMs) to comprehensively understand visual, temporal, and textual cues. However, despite rapid progress in multimodal modeling, video understanding performance still lags behind text-based reasoning. In this work, we find that progress is even worse than previously assumed: commonly reported long video understanding benchmarks contain 40-60% of questions that can be answered using text cues alone. Furthermore, we find that these issues are also pervasive in widely used post-training datasets, potentially undercutting the ability of post-training to improve VLM video understanding performance. Guided by this observation, we introduce VidGround as a simple yet effective solution: using only the actual visually grounded questions without any linguistic biases for post-training. When used in tandem with RL-based post-training algorithms, this simple technique improves performance by up to 6.2 points relative to using the full dataset, while using only 69.1% of the original post-training data. Moreover, we show that data curation with a simple post-training algorithm outperforms several more complex post-training techniques, highlighting that data quality is a major bottleneck for improving video understanding in VLMs. These results underscore the importance of curating post-training data and evaluation benchmarks that truly require visual grounding to advance the development of more capable VLMs. Project page: http://vidground.etuagi.com.

analysis.tldr: 发现视频理解基准和训练数据中存在文本捷径，提出仅使用视觉接地问题微调可显著提升VLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在视频理解上落后于纯文本推理，且现有基准和训练数据存在文本偏差，阻碍了模型真正学习视觉理解能力。
analysis.problem: 视频理解基准和微调数据中存在大量可通过文本线索回答的问题，导致VLM后训练无法有效提升视觉接地能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长视频理解基准中40-60%的问题可仅凭文本线索回答，且后训练数据中也普遍存在此类偏差，削弱了后训练的效果。
analysis.method: 提出VidGround，通过筛选仅包含视觉接地问题（无语言偏差）的数据进行后训练，结合RL算法。
contributions: 揭示视频理解基准和后训练数据中普遍存在的文本偏差问题
提出VidGround方法，仅使用视觉接地问题微调，在减少数据量的同时提升性能
analysis.experiments: 在多个视频理解基准上，VidGround结合RL后训练相比使用完整数据集提升最多6.2个点，仅使用69.1%的数据。
limitations: 未讨论不同RL算法对VidGround的适配性
可能依赖高质量视觉接地问题的标注
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现视频理解基准和训练数据中存在文本捷径，提出仅使用视觉接地问题微调可显著提升VLM性能。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Guided Latent Diagnostic Trajectory Learning for Sequential Clinical Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Clinical diagnosis requires sequential evidence acquisition under uncertainty. However, most Large Language Model (LLM) based diagnostic systems assume fully observed patient information and therefore do not explicitly model how clinical evidence should be sequentially acquired over time. Even when diagnosis is formulated as a sequential decision process, it is still challenging to learn effective diagnostic trajectories. This is because the space of possible evidence-acquisition paths is relatively large, while clinical datasets rarely provide explicit supervision information for desirable diagnostic paths. To this end, we formulate sequential diagnosis as a Latent Diagnostic Trajectory Learning (LDTL) framework based on a planning LLM agent and a diagnostic LLM agent. For the diagnostic LLM agent, diagnostic action sequences are treated as latent paths and we introduce a posterior distribution that prioritizes trajectories providing more diagnostic information. The planning LLM agent is then trained to follow this distribution, encouraging coherent diagnostic trajectories that progressively reduce uncertainty. Experiments on the MIMIC-CDM benchmark demonstrate that our proposed LDTL framework outperforms existing baselines in diagnostic accuracy under a sequential clinical diagnosis setting, while requiring fewer diagnostic tests. Furthermore, ablation studies highlight the critical role of trajectory-level posterior alignment in achieving these improvements.

analysis.tldr: 提出不确定性引导的潜在诊断轨迹学习框架，通过后验对齐提升顺序临床诊断的准确性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的诊断系统假设患者信息完全观测，未建模证据的序贯获取过程；即使建模为序贯决策，也因轨迹空间大且缺乏监督信号而难以学习有效诊断路径。
analysis.problem: 如何在缺乏显式轨迹监督的情况下，学习能够逐步减少不确定性的有效诊断路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LDTL框架，包含规划LLM和诊断LLM两个智能体；诊断LLM将动作序列视为潜在路径，引入后验分布优先选择信息量大的轨迹；规划LLM训练以匹配该后验分布，生成逐步降低不确定性的连贯轨迹。
contributions: 提出不确定性引导的潜在诊断轨迹学习框架，将序贯诊断建模为潜在路径学习问题。
引入后验分布对齐机制，使规划LLM学习生成信息量大的诊断轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-CDM基准上，LDTL在诊断准确率上优于基线，且所需诊断测试更少；消融实验表明轨迹级后验对齐是关键。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的后验分布估计，在数据稀疏场景下效果未知。
框架复杂度较高，需要两个LLM协同训练。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出不确定性引导的潜在诊断轨迹学习框架，通过后验对齐提升顺序临床诊断的准确性和效率。

papers.title: $π^2$: Structure-Originated Reasoning Data Improves Long-Context Reasoning Ability of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: We study a pipeline that curates reasoning data from initial structured data for improving long-context reasoning in large language models (LLMs). Our approach, $π^2$, constructs high-quality reasoning data through rigorous QA curation: 1) extracting and expanding tables from Wikipedia, 2) from the collected tables and relevant context, generating realistic and multi-hop analytical reasoning questions whose answers are automatically determined and verified through dual-path code execution, and 3) back-translating step-by-step structured reasoning traces as solutions of QA pairs given realistic web-search context. Supervised fine-tuning with \textsc{\small{gpt-oss-20b}} and \textsc{\small{Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507}} on $π^2$ yields consistent improvements across four long-context reasoning benchmarks and our alike $π^2$-Bench, with average absolute accuracy gains of +4.3% and +2.7% respectively. Notably, our dataset facilitates self-distillation, where \textsc{\small{gpt-oss-20b}} even improves its average performance by +4.4% with its own reasoning traces, demonstrating $π^2$'s usefulness. Our code, data, and models are open-source at https://github.com/vt-pi-squared/pi-squared.

analysis.tldr: 提出π²方法，从结构化数据（表格）中生成推理数据，提升LLM长上下文推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长上下文推理数据质量参差不齐，且依赖人工标注或复杂生成流程，难以规模化构建高质量、可验证的推理数据。
analysis.problem: 如何从结构化数据（如表格）自动生成高质量、可验证的长上下文推理数据，以提升LLM的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: π²方法：1）从Wikipedia提取并扩展表格；2）基于表格和上下文生成多跳分析推理问题，通过双路径代码执行自动验证答案；3）反向翻译逐步结构化推理轨迹作为解决方案，结合真实网页搜索上下文。
contributions: 提出π²数据构建流水线，从结构化数据生成高质量长上下文推理数据。
在多个基准上验证了π²数据对LLM推理能力的提升，并展示了自蒸馏效果。
analysis.experiments: 在四个长上下文推理基准和π²-Bench上，使用gpt-oss-20b和Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507进行监督微调，平均绝对准确率分别提升+4.3%和+2.7%。自蒸馏实验显示gpt-oss-20b使用自身推理轨迹平均提升+4.4%。
limitations: 方法依赖Wikipedia表格，可能不适用于其他领域。
双路径代码验证可能无法覆盖所有推理类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出π²方法，从结构化数据（表格）中生成推理数据，提升LLM长上下文推理能力。

papers.title: CRAB: Codebook Rebalancing for Bias Mitigation in Generative Recommendation
papers.abstract: Generative recommendation (GeneRec) has introduced a new paradigm that represents items as discrete semantic tokens and predicts items in a generative manner. Despite its strong performance across multiple recommendation tasks, existing GeneRec approaches still suffer from severe popularity bias and may even exacerbate it. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive empirical analysis to uncover the root causes of this phenomenon, yielding two core insights: 1) imbalanced tokenization inherits and can further amplify popularity bias from historical item interactions; 2) current training procedures disproportionately favor popular tokens while neglecting semantic relationships among tokens, thereby intensifying popularity bias. Building on these insights, we propose CRAB, a post-hoc debiasing strategy for GeneRec that alleviates popularity bias by mitigating frequency imbalance among semantic tokens. Specifically, given a well-trained model, we first rebalance the codebook by splitting over-popular tokens while preserving their hierarchical semantic structure. Based on the adjusted codebook, we further introduce a tree-structured regularizer to enhance semantic consistency, encouraging more informative representations for unpopular tokens during training. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that CRAB significantly improves recommendation performance by effectively alleviating popularity bias.

analysis.tldr: 提出CRAB方法，通过重平衡代码本缓解生成式推荐中的流行度偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式推荐虽强但存在严重流行度偏差，现有方法甚至可能加剧偏差，需从根源解决。
analysis.problem: 生成式推荐中流行度偏差的根源及缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现两个根源：1) 不平衡的标记化继承并放大历史交互中的流行度偏差；2) 训练过程偏向流行标记，忽略语义关系。
analysis.method: 后处理去偏策略CRAB：先重平衡代码本（拆分过流行标记并保持层次语义结构），再引入树结构正则化增强语义一致性。
contributions: 揭示生成式推荐中流行度偏差的两个核心根源
提出CRAB后处理去偏方法，通过代码本重平衡和树结构正则化缓解偏差
analysis.experiments: 在真实数据集上实验，CRAB有效缓解流行度偏差并提升推荐性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型质量
树结构正则化增加额外计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CRAB方法，通过重平衡代码本缓解生成式推荐中的流行度偏差。

papers.title: Vintix II: Decision Pre-Trained Transformer is a Scalable In-Context Reinforcement Learner
papers.abstract: Recent progress in in-context reinforcement learning (ICRL) has demonstrated its potential for training generalist agents that can acquire new tasks directly at inference. Algorithm Distillation (AD) pioneered this paradigm and was subsequently scaled to multi-domain settings, although its ability to generalize to unseen tasks remained limited. The Decision Pre-Trained Transformer (DPT) was introduced as an alternative, showing stronger in-context reinforcement learning abilities in simplified domains, but its scalability had not been established. In this work, we extend DPT to diverse multi-domain environments, applying Flow Matching as a natural training choice that preserves its interpretation as Bayesian posterior sampling. As a result, we obtain an agent trained across hundreds of diverse tasks that achieves clear gains in generalization to the held-out test set. This agent improves upon prior AD scaling and demonstrates stronger performance in both online and offline inference, reinforcing ICRL as a viable alternative to expert distillation for training generalist agents.

analysis.tldr: 将决策预训练Transformer扩展到多领域环境，使用流匹配训练实现更强的上下文强化学习泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 上下文强化学习有望训练出推理时直接获取新任务的通用智能体，但现有方法如算法蒸馏在未见任务上泛化有限，而决策预训练Transformer虽在简化领域表现更好，但其可扩展性尚未验证。
analysis.problem: 如何将决策预训练Transformer扩展到多领域环境，并提升其在未见任务上的上下文强化学习泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将决策预训练Transformer扩展到多领域环境，采用流匹配作为训练方法，保持其作为贝叶斯后验采样的解释。
contributions: 将决策预训练Transformer扩展到多领域环境，展示了其可扩展性。
采用流匹配训练，在数百个多样化任务上训练的智能体在未见测试集上取得明显泛化提升，优于先前的算法蒸馏扩展。
analysis.experiments: 在数百个多样化任务上训练，并在在线和离线推理中评估，显示更强的性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及具体局限性。
可能对任务多样性要求较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将决策预训练Transformer扩展到多领域环境，使用流匹配训练实现更强的上下文强化学习泛化能力。

papers.title: Simultaneous Dual-View Mammogram Synthesis Using Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
papers.abstract: Breast cancer screening relies heavily on mammography, where the craniocaudal (CC) and mediolateral oblique (MLO) views provide complementary information for diagnosis. However, many datasets lack complete paired views, limiting the development of algorithms that depend on cross-view consistency. To address this gap, we propose a three-channel denoising diffusion probabilistic model capable of simultaneously generating CC and MLO views of a single breast. In this configuration, the two mammographic views are stored in separate channels, while a third channel encodes their absolute difference to guide the model toward learning coherent anatomical relationships between projections. A pretrained DDPM from Hugging Face was fine-tuned on a private screening dataset and used to synthesize dual-view pairs. Evaluation included geometric consistency via automated breast mask segmentation and distributional comparison with real images, along with qualitative inspection of cross-view alignment. The results show that the difference-based encoding helps preserve the global breast structure across views, producing synthetic CC-MLO pairs that resemble real acquisitions. This work demonstrates the feasibility of simultaneous dual-view mammogram synthesis using a difference-guided DDPM, highlighting its potential for dataset augmentation and future cross-view-aware AI applications in breast imaging.

analysis.tldr: 提出三通道扩散模型同时生成乳腺CC和MLO双视图，用差值通道引导解剖一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺钼靶筛查中CC和MLO视图提供互补信息，但许多数据集缺乏完整配对视图，限制了依赖跨视图一致性的算法开发。
analysis.problem: 如何同时生成一对解剖结构一致的CC和MLO乳腺钼靶图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三通道去噪扩散概率模型：两个通道分别存储CC和MLO视图，第三个通道编码它们的绝对差值，引导模型学习投影之间的解剖关系；基于Hugging Face预训练DDPM在私有数据集上微调。
contributions: 首次提出同时生成CC和MLO双视图的扩散模型。
引入差值编码通道以保持跨视图的全局乳腺结构一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在私有筛查数据集上评估，包括通过自动乳腺掩膜分割进行几何一致性检验、与真实图像的分布比较以及跨视图对齐的定性检查。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅在私有数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与现有单视图生成方法进行定量比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三通道扩散模型同时生成乳腺CC和MLO双视图，用差值通道引导解剖一致性。

papers.title: Toward Reducing Unproductive Container Moves: Predicting Service Requirements and Dwell Times
papers.abstract: This article presents the results of a data science study conducted at a container terminal, aimed at reducing unproductive container moves through the prediction of service requirements and container dwell times. We develop and evaluate machine learning models that leverage historical operational data to anticipate which containers will require pre-clearance handling services prior to cargo release and to estimate how long they are expected to remain in the terminal. As part of the data preparation process, we implement a classification system for cargo descriptions and perform deduplication of consignee records to improve data consistency and feature quality. These predictive capabilities provide valuable inputs for strategic planning and resource allocation in yard operations. Across multiple temporal validation periods, the proposed models consistently outperform existing rule-based heuristics and random baselines in precision and recall. These results demonstrate the practical value of predictive analytics for improving operational efficiency and supporting data-driven decision-making in container terminal logistics.

analysis.tldr: 利用机器学习预测集装箱服务需求和停留时间，减少无效移动，提升码头运营效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 集装箱码头中无效移动浪费资源，现有基于规则的启发式方法精度不足，需要数据驱动预测来优化规划与资源分配。
analysis.problem: 如何准确预测集装箱是否需要预清关处理服务及其在码头停留时间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于历史运营数据，构建机器学习模型预测服务需求和停留时间，并采用货物描述分类与收货人记录去重提升数据质量。
contributions: 提出预测集装箱服务需求和停留时间的机器学习方法。
在多个时间验证周期上，模型在精确率和召回率上优于现有规则基线和随机基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定码头数据，泛化性需验证。
未提及模型可解释性及部署成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用机器学习预测集装箱服务需求和停留时间，减少无效移动，提升码头运营效率。

papers.title: Edit, But Verify: An Empirical Audit of Instructed Code-Editing Benchmarks
papers.abstract: Instructed code editing, where an LLM modifies existing code based on a natural language instruction, accounts for roughly 19% of real-world coding assistant interactions. Yet very few benchmarks directly evaluate this capability. From a survey of over 150 code-related benchmarks, we find that only two, CanItEdit and EDIT-Bench, target instructed code editing with human-authored instructions and test-based evaluation. We audit both by comparing their programming languages, edit intents, and application domains against distributions observed in the wild (Copilot Arena, AIDev, GitHub Octoverse), and by measuring test counts, statement coverage, and test scope across all 213 problems. Both benchmarks concentrate over 90\% of evaluation on Python while TypeScript, GitHub's most-used language, is absent. Backend and frontend development, which together constitute 46% of real-world editing activity, are largely missing, and documentation, testing, and maintenance edits (31.4% of human PRs) have zero representation. Both benchmarks have modest test counts (CanItEdit median 13, EDIT-Bench median 4), though CanItEdit compensates with near-complete whole-file coverage and fail-before/pass-after validation. 59\% of EDIT-Bench's low-coverage suites would not detect modifications outside the edit region. EDIT-Bench has 15 problems that are not solved by any of 40 LLMs and 11 of these problems trace failures to poor benchmark artifacts rather than model limitations. Further, 29% of EDIT-Bench problems and 6% of CanItEdit problems share a codebase with at least one other problem within the benchmark. In summary, these benchmarks measure a narrower construct than deployment decisions require. We therefore propose six empirically grounded desiderata and release all audit artifacts so the community can build instructed code-editing benchmarks whose scores reliably reflect real-world editing capability.

analysis.tldr: 对现有指令代码编辑基准的审计发现其覆盖范围窄、测试不充分，并提出改进方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 指令代码编辑占实际编码助手交互的19%，但现有基准极少直接评估该能力，且缺乏对基准质量的系统审计。
analysis.problem: 现有指令代码编辑基准（CanItEdit和EDIT-Bench）在编程语言、编辑意图、应用领域覆盖以及测试质量方面存在严重偏差和缺陷，无法可靠反映真实部署需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 两个基准90%以上评估集中在Python，缺少TypeScript；后端和前端开发（占实际编辑46%）缺失；文档、测试、维护编辑（占人类PR的31.4%）为零；EDIT-Bench中59%的低覆盖率测试套件无法检测编辑区域外的修改；15个问题未被任何模型解决，其中11个源于基准本身缺陷；29%的EDIT-Bench问题和6%的CanItEdit问题共享代码库。
analysis.method: 通过对比基准与真实世界分布（Copilot Arena、AIDev、GitHub Octoverse）的编程语言、编辑意图和应用领域，并测量所有213个问题的测试数量、语句覆盖率和测试范围，进行系统性审计。
contributions: 首次对两个指令代码编辑基准进行全面的实证审计，揭示其覆盖范围和测试质量的严重缺陷。
提出六个基于实证的改进原则，并发布所有审计工件以促进社区构建更可靠的基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但审计过程涉及对213个问题的测试数量、语句覆盖率和测试范围的测量。
limitations: 审计仅针对两个基准，可能无法代表所有指令代码编辑基准。
提出的改进原则尚未经过实际基准构建验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对现有指令代码编辑基准的审计发现其覆盖范围窄、测试不充分，并提出改进方向。

papers.title: DISSECT: Diagnosing Where Vision Ends and Language Priors Begin in Scientific VLMs
papers.abstract: When asked to describe a molecular diagram, a Vision-Language Model correctly identifies ``a benzene ring with an -OH group.'' When asked to reason about the same image, it answers incorrectly. The model can see but it cannot think about what it sees. We term this the perception-integration gap: a failure where visual information is successfully extracted but lost during downstream reasoning, invisible to single-configuration benchmarks that conflate perception with integration under one accuracy number. To systematically expose such failures, we introduce DISSECT, a 12,000-question diagnostic benchmark spanning Chemistry (7,000) and Biology (5,000). Every question is evaluated under five input modes -- Vision+Text, Text-Only, Vision-Only, Human Oracle, and a novel Model Oracle in which the VLM first verbalizes the image and then reasons from its own description -- yielding diagnostic gaps that decompose performance into language-prior exploitation, visual extraction, perception fidelity, and integration effectiveness. Evaluating 18~VLMs, we find that: (1) Chemistry exhibits substantially lower language-prior exploitability than Biology, confirming molecular visual content as a harder test of genuine visual reasoning; (2) Open-source models consistently score higher when reasoning from their own verbalized descriptions than from raw images, exposing a systematic integration bottleneck; and (3) Closed-source models show no such gap, indicating that bridging perception and integration is the frontier separating open-source from closed-source multimodal capability. The Model Oracle protocol is both model and benchmark agnostic, applicable post-hoc to any VLM evaluation to diagnose integration failures.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DISSECT 诊断基准，揭示科学 VLM 中视觉感知与语言推理之间的整合鸿沟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准将视觉感知与推理整合混为一谈，无法诊断 VLM 在科学图像（如分子图）上“看得见但想不通”的失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地暴露和量化 VLM 在科学领域中的感知-整合鸿沟（perception-integration gap）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出化学领域比生物学更少依赖语言先验，开源模型从自身描述推理比从原始图像推理得分更高，闭源模型无此差距。
analysis.method: 构建包含 12,000 道题（化学 7,000、生物 5,000）的诊断基准，每道题在五种输入模式下评估：视觉+文本、仅文本、仅视觉、人类 oracle 和模型 oracle（模型先描述图像再基于自身描述推理），从而分解出语言先验利用、视觉提取、感知保真度和整合有效性等诊断差距。
contributions: 提出 DISSECT 诊断基准，系统分解 VLM 在科学领域的感知与整合能力。
引入模型 oracle 协议，可后验应用于任何 VLM 评估以诊断整合失败。
通过 18 个 VLM 的实验揭示开源与闭源模型在整合能力上的关键差距。
analysis.experiments: 在 18 个 VLM 上评估，涵盖化学和生物两个领域，比较五种输入模式下的性能差异。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖化学和生物两个科学领域，可能不适用于其他科学图像。
模型 oracle 协议依赖模型自身的描述质量，可能引入额外噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 DISSECT 诊断基准，揭示科学 VLM 中视觉感知与语言推理之间的整合鸿沟。

papers.title: Beyond LLM-as-a-Judge: Deterministic Metrics for Multilingual Generative Text Evaluation
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted as automated judges for evaluating generated text, their outputs are often costly, and highly sensitive to prompt design, language, and aggregation strategies, severely, which limits reproducibility. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{\textit{OmniScore}}, a family of complementary, deterministic learned metrics developed using small size ($<$1B) parameter models. OmniScore approximates LLM-judge behavior while preserving the low latency and consistency of traditional model-based scoring. We trained the models large-scale synthetic supervision ($\sim$564k instances, in \textbf{107 languages}) and evaluated using 8,617 manually annotated instances. The OmniScore family supports reliable, multi-dimensional scores across a variety of settings, including reference-based, source-grounded, and hybrid evaluations. We evaluate these models across question answering (QA), translation, and summarization in \textbf{6 languages}. Our results demonstrate that lightweight, deterministic learned metrics provide a highly practical and scalable alternative to frontier LLMs. Our models and datasets can be found at https://huggingface.co/collections/QCRI/omniscore

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniScore，一种轻量级确定性指标，替代LLM作为多语言生成文本评估的裁判。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为自动评估器成本高、对提示设计和语言敏感、可重复性差，需要更稳定高效的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM评估生成文本时成本高、敏感性和不可重复的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用小于1B参数的小模型，在大规模合成数据（564k实例，107种语言）上训练，得到确定性指标OmniScore，支持基于参考、源文本和混合评估。
contributions: 提出OmniScore，一组轻量级确定性指标，近似LLM裁判行为但更高效一致。
在107种语言上训练，并在6种语言的QA、翻译和摘要任务上验证，展示了实用性和可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在8,617个人工标注实例上评估，覆盖6种语言（QA、翻译、摘要），结果证明轻量级确定性指标是前沿LLM的实用替代方案。
limitations: 可能无法完全捕捉LLM裁判的细微判断。
依赖合成数据，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniScore，一种轻量级确定性指标，替代LLM作为多语言生成文本评估的裁判。

papers.title: MedGemma 1.5 Technical Report
papers.abstract: We introduce MedGemma 1.5 4B, the latest model in the MedGemma collection. MedGemma 1.5 expands on MedGemma 1 by integrating additional capabilities: high-dimensional medical imaging (CT/MRI volumes and histopathology whole slide images), anatomical localization via bounding boxes, multi-timepoint chest X-ray analysis, and improved medical document understanding (lab reports, electronic health records). We detail the innovations required to enable these modalities within a single architecture, including new training data, long-context 3D volume slicing, and whole-slide pathology sampling. Compared to MedGemma 1 4B, MedGemma 1.5 4B demonstrates significant gains in these new areas, improving 3D MRI condition classification accuracy by 11% and 3D CT condition classification by 3% (absolute improvements). In whole slide pathology imaging, MedGemma 1.5 4B achieves a 47% macro F1 gain. Additionally, it improves anatomical localization with a 35% increase in Intersection over Union on chest X-rays and achieves a 4% macro accuracy for longitudinal (multi-timepoint) chest x-ray analysis. Beyond its improved multimodal performance over MedGemma 1, MedGemma 1.5 improves on text-based clinical knowledge and reasoning, improving by 5% on MedQA accuracy and 22% on EHRQA accuracy. It also achieves an average of 18% macro F1 on 4 different lab report information extraction datasets (EHR Datasets 2, 3, 4, and Mendeley Clinical Laboratory Test Reports). Taken together, MedGemma 1.5 serves as a robust, open resource for the community, designed as an improved foundation on which developers can create the next generation of medical AI systems. Resources and tutorials for building upon MedGemma 1.5 can be found at https://goo.gle/medgemma.

analysis.tldr: MedGemma 1.5 4B 是一个多模态医学基础模型，在 CT/MRI、病理全切片、胸部X光定位和时序分析、医学文档理解上均有显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学AI模型多局限于单一模态或任务，缺乏统一处理多种医学影像和文本数据的能力，且开源资源有限，阻碍了社区开发下一代医疗AI系统。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一的架构中集成高维医学影像（CT/MRI体积、病理全切片）、解剖定位、多时间点X光分析和医学文档理解，并提升性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在MedGemma 1基础上扩展，引入新训练数据、长上下文3D体积切片、全切片病理采样等技术，使单一架构支持多种模态。
contributions: 提出MedGemma 1.5 4B，一个统一的多模态医学基础模型，覆盖CT/MRI、病理、X光定位、时序分析和医学文档。
在多个医学任务上取得显著性能提升，如3D MRI分类+11%、病理F1+47%、X光定位IoU+35%、MedQA+5%等。
analysis.experiments: 在3D MRI/CT分类、病理全切片、胸部X光定位、时序X光分析、MedQA、EHRQA和实验室报告提取等任务上评估，均显示绝对提升。
limitations: 模型规模仅4B，可能在大规模复杂任务上能力有限。
未提及与其他开源医学基础模型的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MedGemma 1.5 4B 是一个多模态医学基础模型，在 CT/MRI、病理全切片、胸部X光定位和时序分析、医学文档理解上均有显著提升。

papers.title: Nidus: Externalized Reasoning for AI-Assisted Engineering
papers.abstract: We present Nidus, a governance runtime that mechanizes the V-model for AI-assisted software delivery. In the self-hosting deployment, three LLM families (Claude, Gemini, Codex) delivered a 100,000-line system under proof obligations verified against the current obligation set on every commit. The system governed its own construction. Engineering invariants - traced requirements, justified architecture, evidenced deliveries - cannot be reliably maintained as learned behavior; assurance requires enforcement by a mechanism external to the proposer. Nidus externalizes the engineering methodology into a decidable artifact verified on every mutation before persistence. Organizational standards compile into guidebooks - constraint libraries imported by governed projects and enforced by decidable evaluation. Four contributions: (1) recursive self-governance - the constraint surface constrains mutations to itself; (2) stigmergic coordination - friction from the surface routes agents without central control; (3) proximal spec reinforcement - the living artifact externalizes the engineering context that RL and long-chain reasoning try to internalize; the specification is the reward function, UNSAT verdicts shape behavior at inference time, no weight updates; (4) governance theater prevention - compliance evidence cannot be fabricated within the modeled mutation path. The constraint surface compounds: each obligation permanently eliminates a class of unengineered output. The artifact's development history is a formal development - every state satisfies all active obligations, and the obligation set grows monotonically.

analysis.tldr: Nidus 通过可判定约束面将工程方法论外部化，实现 AI 辅助软件交付的治理运行时。
analysis.research_motivation: AI 辅助软件工程中，工程不变量（如可追溯需求、合理架构、可验证交付）无法可靠地作为学习行为维持，需要外部机制强制执行。
analysis.problem: 如何确保 AI 生成的软件系统满足工程不变量，避免不可靠的习得行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Nidus 将工程方法论编译为可判定的约束库（guidebooks），在每次变更持久化前验证其满足当前义务集，实现递归自治理、stigmergic 协调、近端规约强化和治理剧场预防。
contributions: 递归自治理：约束面约束自身突变。
Stigmergic 协调：约束面摩擦引导智能体无中心控制。
近端规约强化：将规约作为奖励函数，UNSAT 结果在推理时塑造行为，无需权重更新。
治理剧场预防：合规证据无法在建模的突变路径内伪造。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的推理能力，对复杂约束的求解效率未知。
约束面的单调增长可能导致后期验证开销增大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Nidus 通过可判定约束面将工程方法论外部化，实现 AI 辅助软件交付的治理运行时。

papers.title: SVAgent: Storyline-Guided Long Video Understanding via Cross-Modal Multi-Agent Collaboration
papers.abstract: Video question answering (VideoQA) is a challenging task that requires integrating spatial, temporal, and semantic information to capture the complex dynamics of video sequences. Although recent advances have introduced various approaches for video understanding, most existing methods still rely on locating relevant frames to answer questions rather than reasoning through the evolving storyline as humans do. Humans naturally interpret videos through coherent storylines, an ability that is crucial for making robust and contextually grounded predictions. To address this gap, we propose SVAgent, a storyline-guided cross-modal multi-agent framework for VideoQA. The storyline agent progressively constructs a narrative representation based on frames suggested by a refinement suggestion agent that analyzes historical failures. In addition, cross-modal decision agents independently predict answers from visual and textual modalities under the guidance of the evolving storyline. Their outputs are then evaluated by a meta-agent to align cross-modal predictions and enhance reasoning robustness and answer consistency. Experimental results demonstrate that SVAgent achieves superior performance and interpretability by emulating human-like storyline reasoning in video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出SVAgent，通过多智能体协作构建故事线来提升长视频问答的推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频问答方法多依赖定位相关帧而非像人类一样通过连贯故事线进行推理，导致对复杂动态视频的理解不够鲁棒和上下文相关。
analysis.problem: 如何让视频问答模型像人类一样通过构建和利用故事线进行逐步推理，从而提升长视频理解的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SVAgent框架，包含故事线智能体（基于帧构建叙事表示）、改进建议智能体（分析历史失败以建议帧）、跨模态决策智能体（在故事线指导下从视觉和文本模态独立预测答案）以及元智能体（对齐跨模态预测并增强推理鲁棒性）。
contributions: 提出故事线引导的跨模态多智能体协作框架SVAgent，模拟人类故事线推理进行视频问答。
通过多智能体协作和跨模态对齐，在视频问答任务上实现了优越的性能和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的故事线构建，对噪声或模糊视频效果有限。
多智能体协作可能带来计算开销，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SVAgent，通过多智能体协作构建故事线来提升长视频问答的推理能力。

papers.title: Feature-Aware Anisotropic Local Differential Privacy for Utility-Preserving Graph Representation Learning in Metal Additive Manufacturing
papers.abstract: Metal additive manufacturing (AM) enables the fabrication of safety-critical components, but reliable quality assurance depends on high-fidelity sensor streams containing proprietary process information, limiting collaborative data sharing. Existing defect-detection models typically treat melt-pool observations as independent samples, ignoring layer-wise physical couplings. Moreover, conventional privacy-preserving techniques, particularly Local Differential Privacy (LDP), lead to severe utility degradation because they inject uniform noise across all feature dimensions. To address these interrelated challenges, we propose FI-LDP-HGAT. This computational framework combines two methodological components: a stratified Hierarchical Graph Attention Network (HGAT) that captures spatial and thermal dependencies across scan tracks and deposited layers, and a feature-importance-aware anisotropic Gaussian mechanism (FI-LDP) for non-interactive feature privatization. Unlike isotropic LDP, FI-LDP redistributes the privacy budget across embedding coordinates using an encoder-derived importance prior, assigning lower noise to task-critical thermal signatures and higher noise to redundant dimensions while maintaining formal LDP guarantees. Experiments on a Directed Energy Deposition (DED) porosity dataset demonstrate that FI-LDP-HGAT achieves 81.5% utility recovery at a moderate privacy budget (epsilon = 4) and maintains defect recall of 0.762 under strict privacy (epsilon = 2), while outperforming classical ML, standard GNNs, and alternative privacy mechanisms, including DP-SGD across all evaluated metrics. Mechanistic analysis confirms a strong negative correlation (Spearman = -0.81) between feature importance and noise magnitude, providing interpretable evidence that the privacy-utility gains are driven by principled anisotropic allocation.

analysis.tldr: 提出特征感知各向异性局部差分隐私方法，在金属增材制造图表示学习中平衡隐私与效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 金属增材制造依赖高保真传感器数据，但数据包含专有工艺信息，限制了协作共享；现有缺陷检测模型忽略层间物理耦合，且传统局部差分隐私（LDP）均匀添加噪声导致严重效用下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护金属增材制造传感器数据隐私的同时，保留图表示学习中的任务关键特征，避免均匀噪声带来的效用损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FI-LDP-HGAT框架，包含分层图注意力网络（HGAT）捕获空间和热依赖，以及特征重要性感知的各向异性高斯机制（FI-LDP），根据编码器导出的重要性先验重新分配隐私预算，对关键热特征加低噪声，冗余维度加高噪声。
contributions: 提出特征重要性感知的各向异性局部差分隐私机制（FI-LDP），实现隐私预算的非均匀分配。
构建分层图注意力网络（HGAT）建模熔池观测的层间物理耦合。
在定向能量沉积孔隙率数据集上验证了方法在隐私-效用权衡上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在定向能量沉积（DED）孔隙率数据集上，FI-LDP-HGAT在中等隐私预算（ε=4）下实现81.5%的效用恢复，在严格隐私（ε=2）下缺陷召回率为0.762，优于经典ML、标准GNN和DP-SGD等基线。
limitations: 方法仅在单一DED数据集上验证，泛化性待考。
隐私预算分配依赖编码器重要性估计，可能受训练质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出特征感知各向异性局部差分隐私方法，在金属增材制造图表示学习中平衡隐私与效用。

papers.title: Support Sufficiency as Consequence-Sensitive Compression in Belief Arbitration
papers.abstract: When a system commits to a hypothesis, much of the evidential structure behind that commitment is lost to compression. Standard accounts assume that selected content and scalar confidence suffice for downstream control. This paper argues that they do not, and that determining what must survive compression is itself a consequence-sensitive problem. We develop a recurrent arbitration architecture in which active constraint fields jointly determine a hypothesis geometry over candidates. Rather than carrying that geometry forward in full, the system compresses it into a support-aware control state whose resolution is regulated by current consequence geometry, arbitration memory, and resource constraints. A bounded objective formalizes the tradeoff. Too little retained support collapses policy-relevant distinctions, producing controllers that select content adequately while misrouting verification, abstention, and recovery. Too much retained support fragments learning across overly fine contexts, degrading adaptation even as discrimination improves. These failure modes yield ordered controller predictions confirmed by a minimal repeated-interaction simulation. Adaptive controllers that regulate support resolution outperform all fixed-resolution controllers in cumulative utility. Agile adaptive control outperforms sluggish adaptive control. Fixed high-resolution control achieves the best commitment accuracy but still trails adaptive controllers because resource cost and learning fragmentation offset the gains from richer retention. Support sufficiency should be understood not as a static representational threshold, but as a dynamic compression criterion. Robust arbitration depends on preserving the smallest support structure adequate for policy under the current consequence landscape, and on regulating that structure as conditions change across repeated cycles of inference and action.

analysis.tldr: 提出支持充分性作为信念仲裁中后果敏感的压缩准则，通过递归仲裁架构动态调节支持分辨率以平衡策略相关性与资源成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准信念仲裁假设选定内容和标量置信度足以用于下游控制，但忽略了压缩过程中丢失的证成结构，导致策略相关区分被抹除或学习碎片化。
analysis.problem: 确定在信念仲裁中必须保留多少支持结构才能满足当前后果环境下的策略需求，并动态调节压缩分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 保留支持不足会抹除策略相关区分，导致验证、弃权、恢复等行为错误；保留过多则导致学习碎片化，适应能力下降。两种失败模式产生有序的控制器预测，并通过最小重复交互仿真得到确认。
analysis.method: 提出递归仲裁架构，使用主动约束场联合确定候选假设的几何结构，并将其压缩为支持感知控制状态，分辨率由当前后果几何、仲裁记忆和资源约束共同调节。形式化一个有界目标函数来权衡保留与压缩。
contributions: 提出支持充分性作为后果敏感的压缩准则，而非静态表征阈值。
设计递归仲裁架构，动态调节支持分辨率以平衡策略相关性与资源成本。
通过仿真验证自适应控制器在累积效用上优于所有固定分辨率控制器，并揭示敏捷自适应优于迟缓自适应。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仿真环境为最小重复交互，可能无法直接推广到复杂现实场景。
未讨论不同资源约束下的扩展性及大规模假设空间中的计算效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出支持充分性作为信念仲裁中后果敏感的压缩准则，通过递归仲裁架构动态调节支持分辨率以平衡策略相关性与资源成本。

papers.title: MMORF: A Multi-agent Framework for Designing Multi-objective Retrosynthesis Planning Systems
papers.abstract: Multi-objective retrosynthesis planning is a critical chemistry task requiring dynamic balancing of quality, safety, and cost objectives. Language model-based multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a promising approach for this task: leveraging interactions of specialized agents to incorporate multiple objectives into retrosynthesis planning. We present MMORF, a framework for constructing MAS for multi-objective retrosynthesis planning. MMORF features modular agentic components, which can be flexibly combined and configured into different systems, enabling principled evaluation and comparison of different system designs. Using MMORF, we construct two representative MAS: MASIL and RFAS. On a newly curated benchmark consisting of 218 multi-objective retrosynthesis planning tasks, MASIL achieves strong safety and cost metrics on soft-constraint tasks, frequently Pareto-dominating baseline routes, while RFAS achieves a 48.6% success rate on hard-constraint tasks, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Together, these results show the effectiveness of MMORF as a foundational framework for exploring MAS for multi-objective retrosynthesis planning. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MMORF/.

analysis.tldr: MMORF 是一个用于构建多目标逆合成规划多智能体系统的模块化框架，通过两种实例化系统在软硬约束任务上均取得优于基线的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多目标逆合成规划需要动态平衡质量、安全和成本等多个目标，而现有方法难以有效整合这些目标，语言模型驱动的多智能体系统为此提供了有前景的途径。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个模块化、可配置的框架来构建和评估用于多目标逆合成规划的多智能体系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MMORF 框架，包含模块化智能体组件，可灵活组合配置成不同系统；基于该框架构建了两种代表性系统 MASIL 和 RFAS。
contributions: 提出 MMORF，一个用于构建多目标逆合成规划多智能体系统的模块化框架。
构建了两个代表性系统 MASIL 和 RFAS，并在新基准上验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在新整理的包含218个多目标逆合成规划任务的基准上，MASIL在软约束任务中在安全性和成本指标上常帕累托支配基线路线，RFAS在硬约束任务上达到48.6%的成功率，优于最先进基线。
limitations: 框架依赖语言模型能力，可能受限于模型性能。
仅测试了两种系统设计，更多配置有待探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MMORF 是一个用于构建多目标逆合成规划多智能体系统的模块化框架，通过两种实例化系统在软硬约束任务上均取得优于基线的性能。

papers.title: Part-Level 3D Gaussian Vehicle Generation with Joint and Hinge Axis Estimation
papers.abstract: Simulation is essential for autonomous driving, yet current frameworks often model vehicles as rigid assets and fail to capture part-level articulation. With perception algorithms increasingly leveraging dynamics such as wheel steering or door opening, realistic simulation requires animatable vehicle representations. Existing CAD-based pipelines are limited by library coverage and fixed templates, preventing faithful reconstruction of in-the-wild instances. We propose a generative framework that, from a single image or sparse multi-view input, synthesizes an animatable 3D Gaussian vehicle. Our method addresses two challenges: (i) large 3D asset generators are optimized for static quality but not articulation, leading to distortions at part boundaries when animated; and (ii) segmentation alone cannot provide the kinematic parameters required for motion. To overcome this, we introduce a part-edge refinement module that enforces exclusive Gaussian ownership and a kinematic reasoning head that predicts joint positions and hinge axes of movable parts. Together, these components enable faithful part-aware simulation, bridging the gap between static generation and animatable vehicle models.

analysis.tldr: 提出从单图或多视图生成可动画化3D高斯车辆的方法，通过部件边缘细化和运动学推理实现部件级关节与铰链轴估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动驾驶仿真将车辆视为刚体，无法模拟车轮转向、车门开启等部件级运动，而感知算法越来越需要动态信息；CAD管线受限于库覆盖和固定模板，难以重建真实场景中的实例。
analysis.problem: 从单张图像或稀疏多视图输入生成可动画化的3D高斯车辆，并准确估计可动部件的关节位置和铰链轴。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大型3D资产生成器优化目标是静态质量，导致动画时部件边界出现扭曲；仅靠分割无法提供运动所需的运动学参数。
analysis.method: 提出部件边缘细化模块（强制高斯点独占归属）和运动学推理头（预测关节位置和铰链轴），结合生成框架输出可动画化的3D高斯车辆。
contributions: 提出首个从单图或多视图生成可动画化3D高斯车辆的框架
设计部件边缘细化模块和运动学推理头，实现部件级关节与铰链轴估计
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖输入图像质量，对极端视角或遮挡鲁棒性未知
运动学推理头可能仅适用于预设的车辆部件类型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从单图或多视图生成可动画化3D高斯车辆的方法，通过部件边缘细化和运动学推理实现部件级关节与铰链轴估计。

papers.title: AutoLALA: Automatic Loop Algebraic Locality Analysis for AI and HPC Kernels
papers.abstract: Data movement is the primary bottleneck in modern computing systems. For loop-based programs common in high-performance computing (HPC) and AI workloads, including matrix multiplication, tensor contraction, stencil computation, and einsum operations, the cost of moving data through the memory hierarchy often exceeds the cost of arithmetic. This paper presents AutoLALA, an open-source tool that analyzes data locality in affine loop programs. The tool accepts programs written in a small domain-specific language (DSL), lowers them to polyhedral sets and maps, and produces closed-form symbolic formulas for reuse distance and data movement complexity. AutoLALA implements the fully symbolic locality analysis of Zhu et al. together with the data movement distance (DMD) framework of Smith et al. In particular, it computes reuse distance as the image of the access space under the access map, avoiding both stack simulation and Denning's recursive working-set formulation. We describe the DSL syntax and its formal semantics, the polyhedral lowering pipeline that constructs timestamp spaces and access maps via affine transformations, and the sequence of Barvinok counting operations used to derive symbolic reuse-interval and reuse-distance distributions. The system is implemented in Rust as a modular library spanning three crates, with safe bindings to the Barvinok library. We provide both a command-line interface and an interactive web playground with LaTeX rendering of the output formulas. The tool handles arbitrary affine loop nests, covering workloads such as tensor contractions, einsum expressions, stencil computations, and general polyhedral programs.

analysis.tldr: AutoLALA 是一个开源工具，通过多面体模型和符号计数自动分析仿射循环程序的数据局部性，生成重用距离和数据移动复杂度的闭式公式。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据移动是现代计算系统的主要瓶颈，尤其在 HPC 和 AI 负载中，内存层次结构的数据移动成本常超过算术成本，而现有工具缺乏自动化的符号局部性分析。
analysis.problem: 如何自动分析仿射循环程序（如矩阵乘法、张量收缩、模板计算）的数据局部性，并生成重用距离和数据移动复杂度的闭式符号公式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AutoLALA 接受 DSL 编写的程序，通过多面体降级管道构造时间戳空间和访问映射，利用 Barvinok 计数操作推导符号化的重用间隔和重用距离分布，避免堆栈模拟和递归工作集公式。
contributions: 实现 Zhu 等人的完全符号局部性分析和 Smith 等人的数据移动距离框架，生成闭式公式。
提供 Rust 实现的开源工具，包含 CLI 和交互式 Web 界面，支持任意仿射循环嵌套。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅支持仿射循环程序，对非仿射或不规则循环可能不适用。
依赖 Barvinok 库，可能在大规模程序上存在计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AutoLALA 是一个开源工具，通过多面体模型和符号计数自动分析仿射循环程序的数据局部性，生成重用距离和数据移动复杂度的闭式公式。

papers.title: Dynamic Linear Coregionalization for Realistic Synthetic Multivariate Time Series
papers.abstract: Synthetic data is essential for training foundation models for time series (FMTS), but most generators assume static correlations, and are typically missing realistic inter-channel dependencies. We introduce DynLMC, a Dynamic Linear Model of Coregionalization, that incorporates time-varying, regime-switching correlations and cross-channel lag structures. Our approach produces synthetic multivariate time series with correlation dynamics that closely resemble real data. Fine-tuning three foundational models on DynLMC-generated data yields consistent zero-shot forecasting improvements across nine benchmarks. Our results demonstrate that modeling dynamic inter-channel correlations enhances FMTS transferability, highlighting the importance of data-centric pretraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态线性共区域化模型DynLMC，通过时变、体制切换的跨通道相关性生成更真实的多变量时间序列，提升基础模型零样本预测能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成数据对训练时间序列基础模型至关重要，但现有生成器通常假设静态相关性，缺乏真实的跨通道依赖关系，限制了模型迁移能力。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有时变、体制切换的跨通道相关性和滞后结构的合成多变量时间序列，以提升基础模型的零样本预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DynLMC，一种动态线性共区域化模型，通过引入时变、体制切换的相关性和跨通道滞后结构来生成合成多变量时间序列。
contributions: 提出DynLMC模型，能够生成具有动态跨通道相关性的合成多变量时间序列。
在九个基准上验证了使用DynLMC数据微调的基础模型在零样本预测中的一致改进。
analysis.experiments: 在九个基准上进行了零样本预测实验，微调三个基础模型后均取得一致改进。
limitations: 可能仅适用于多变量时间序列，未讨论单变量场景。
计算开销可能较高，摘要未提及效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态线性共区域化模型DynLMC，通过时变、体制切换的跨通道相关性生成更真实的多变量时间序列，提升基础模型零样本预测能力。

papers.title: R3PM-Net: Real-time, Robust, Real-world Point Matching Network
papers.abstract: Accurate Point Cloud Registration (PCR) is an important task in 3D data processing, involving the estimation of a rigid transformation between two point clouds. While deep-learning methods have addressed key limitations of traditional non-learning approaches, such as sensitivity to noise, outliers, occlusion, and initialization, they are developed and evaluated on clean, dense, synthetic datasets (limiting their generalizability to real-world industrial scenarios). This paper introduces R3PM-Net, a lightweight, global-aware, object-level point matching network designed to bridge this gap by prioritizing both generalizability and real-time efficiency. To support this transition, two datasets, Sioux-Cranfield and Sioux-Scans, are proposed. They provide an evaluation ground for registering imperfect photogrammetric and event-camera scans to digital CAD models, and have been made publicly available. Extensive experiments demonstrate that R3PM-Net achieves competitive accuracy with unmatched speed. On ModelNet40, it reaches a perfect fitness score of $1$ and inlier RMSE of $0.029$ cm in only $0.007$s, approximately 7 times faster than the state-of-the-art method RegTR. This performance carries over to the Sioux-Cranfield dataset, maintaining a fitness of $1$ and inlier RMSE of $0.030$ cm with similarly low latency. Furthermore, on the highly challenging Sioux-Scans dataset, R3PM-Net successfully resolves edge cases in under 50 ms. These results confirm that R3PM-Net offers a robust, high-speed solution for critical industrial applications, where precision and real-time performance are indispensable. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/YasiiKB/R3PM-Net.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级点匹配网络R3PM-Net，在真实工业场景中实现实时、鲁棒的点云配准，并发布两个新数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习方法在干净合成数据集上表现良好，但泛化到真实工业场景（如噪声、遮挡、稀疏扫描）时受限，且缺乏针对真实场景的评估基准。
analysis.problem: 解决点云配准在真实工业场景中的泛化性和实时性问题，弥合合成数据与真实应用之间的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统非学习方法对噪声、离群点、遮挡和初始化敏感；深度学习方法在合成数据集上训练，难以泛化到真实世界的不完美扫描。
analysis.method: 提出轻量级、全局感知的物体级点匹配网络R3PM-Net，同时注重泛化性和实时效率。
contributions: 提出R3PM-Net，一种轻量级、全局感知的点匹配网络，在真实工业场景中实现高精度和实时性能。
发布两个新数据集Sioux-Cranfield和Sioux-Scans，用于评估不完美摄影测量和事件相机扫描与CAD模型的配准。
analysis.experiments: 在ModelNet40上达到完美fitness分数1和inlier RMSE 0.029 cm，耗时仅0.007s，比RegTR快约7倍；在Sioux-Cranfield上保持fitness 1和inlier RMSE 0.030 cm；在Sioux-Scans上成功解决边缘情况，耗时低于50 ms。
limitations: 可能仅适用于物体级配准，场景级配准未验证。
对极端稀疏或严重遮挡的数据可能仍有挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级点匹配网络R3PM-Net，在真实工业场景中实现实时、鲁棒的点云配准，并发布两个新数据集。

papers.title: This Treatment Works, Right? Evaluating LLM Sensitivity to Patient Question Framing in Medical QA
papers.abstract: Patients are increasingly turning to large language models (LLMs) with medical questions that are complex and difficult to articulate clearly. However, LLMs are sensitive to prompt phrasings and can be influenced by the way questions are worded. Ideally, LLMs should respond consistently regardless of phrasing, particularly when grounded in the same underlying evidence. We investigate this through a systematic evaluation in a controlled retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) setting for medical question answering (QA), where expert-selected documents are used rather than retrieved automatically. We examine two dimensions of patient query variation: question framing (positive vs. negative) and language style (technical vs. plain language). We construct a dataset of 6,614 query pairs grounded in clinical trial abstracts and evaluate response consistency across eight LLMs. Our findings show that positively- and negatively-framed pairs are significantly more likely to produce contradictory conclusions than same-framing pairs. This framing effect is further amplified in multi-turn conversations, where sustained persuasion increases inconsistency. We find no significant interaction between framing and language style. Our results demonstrate that LLM responses in medical QA can be systematically influenced through query phrasing alone, even when grounded in the same evidence, highlighting the importance of phrasing robustness as an evaluation criterion for RAG-based systems in high-stakes settings.

analysis.tldr: LLM在医疗问答中对问题措辞敏感，正面与负面框架易导致矛盾结论。
analysis.research_motivation: 患者越来越多地用LLM询问复杂医疗问题，但LLM对提示措辞敏感，可能因问题表述不同而给出不一致回答，这在医疗等高风险场景中不可接受。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在医疗问答中对患者问题框架（正面vs负面）和语言风格（技术vs通俗）的响应一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正面与负面框架的查询对比同框架查询更易产生矛盾结论；多轮对话中持续说服会放大不一致性；框架与语言风格无显著交互作用。
analysis.method: 在受控RAG设置中，使用专家选择的临床试验摘要构建6614个查询对，评估8个LLM在问题框架和语言风格变化下的响应一致性。
contributions: 系统评估了LLM在医疗QA中对问题框架和语言风格的敏感性。
发现正面与负面框架显著增加矛盾结论，且多轮对话放大该效应。
强调措辞鲁棒性应作为RAG系统在高风险场景中的评估标准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于临床试验摘要，可能不覆盖所有医疗场景。
未测试其他类型的查询变化（如否定词位置）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在医疗问答中对问题措辞敏感，正面与负面框架易导致矛盾结论。

papers.title: PCA-Driven Adaptive Sensor Triage for Edge AI Inference
papers.abstract: Multi-channel sensor networks in industrial IoT often exceed available bandwidth. We propose PCA-Triage, a streaming algorithm that converts incremental PCA loadings into proportional per-channel sampling rates under a bandwidth budget. PCA-Triage runs in O(wdk) time with zero trainable parameters (0.67 ms per decision). We evaluate on 7 benchmarks (8--82 channels) against 9 baselines. PCA-Triage is the best unsupervised method on 3 of 6 datasets at 50% bandwidth, winning 5 of 6 against every baseline with large effect sizes (r = 0.71--0.91). On TEP, it achieves F1 = 0.961 +/- 0.001 -- within 0.1% of full-data performance -- while maintaining F1 > 0.90 at 30% budget. Targeted extensions push F1 to 0.970. The algorithm is robust to packet loss and sensor noise (3.7--4.8% degradation under combined worst-case).

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于增量PCA的无参数自适应传感器采样算法，在带宽受限下实现接近全数据性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业物联网多通道传感器网络常面临带宽超限问题，现有方法要么需要大量训练参数，要么无法动态适应数据变化。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定带宽预算下，动态调整各传感器通道的采样率以最大化下游推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PCA-Triage：利用增量PCA计算各通道的主成分载荷，将其归一化为比例采样概率，在带宽预算下按概率采样。
contributions: 提出一种零参数、流式、自适应的传感器采样算法PCA-Triage。
在7个基准数据集上验证，在50%带宽下优于9种基线方法，并在TEP上达到F1=0.961，接近全数据性能。
analysis.experiments: 在7个基准数据集（8-82通道）上对比9种基线方法，评估50%带宽下的性能；在TEP数据集上测试不同带宽预算（30%-100%）的F1分数；进行鲁棒性测试（丢包和传感器噪声）。
limitations: 仅适用于线性主成分结构，非线性特征可能无法有效捕获。
未考虑通道间的时序依赖关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于增量PCA的无参数自适应传感器采样算法，在带宽受限下实现接近全数据性能。

papers.title: ID-Sim: An Identity-Focused Similarity Metric
papers.abstract: Humans have remarkable selective sensitivity to identities -- easily distinguishing between highly similar identities, even across significantly different contexts such as diverse viewpoints or lighting. Vision models have struggled to match this capability, and progress toward identity-focused tasks such as personalized image generation is slowed by a lack of identity-focused evaluation metrics. To help facilitate progress, we propose ID-Sim, a feed-forward metric designed to faithfully reflect human selective sensitivity. To build ID-Sim, we curate a high-quality training set of images spanning diverse real-world domains, augmented with generative synthetic data that provides controlled, fine-grained identity and contextual variations. We evaluate our metric on a new unified evaluation benchmark for assessing consistency with human annotations across identity-focused recognition, retrieval, and generative tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向身份感知的相似度度量ID-Sim，通过合成数据增强训练，在身份识别、检索和生成任务上与人类判断更一致。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类对身份具有高度选择性敏感，能轻松区分高度相似的身份，而视觉模型难以匹配这一能力；缺乏面向身份的评价指标阻碍了个性化图像生成等任务的发展。
analysis.problem: 现有视觉相似度度量无法准确反映人类对身份的选择性敏感，需要一种与人类标注一致的、面向身份的评价指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类对身份具有选择性敏感，能跨视角、光照等变化区分相似身份，而现有视觉模型在此方面表现不足。
analysis.method: 构建高质量训练集（包含真实世界图像和生成式合成数据，提供细粒度身份和上下文变化），训练前馈度量网络ID-Sim。
contributions: 提出ID-Sim，一种前馈式身份聚焦相似度度量，旨在忠实反映人类选择性敏感。
构建了包含真实和合成数据的训练集，以及统一评估基准，用于验证与人类标注的一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在身份识别、检索和生成任务上评估与人类标注的一致性，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据的质量与多样性。
前馈网络可能无法完全捕捉复杂身份变化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向身份感知的相似度度量ID-Sim，通过合成数据增强训练，在身份识别、检索和生成任务上与人类判断更一致。

papers.title: Phase-Associative Memory: Sequence Modeling in Complex Hilbert Space
