papers.abstract: Experiments probing natural language processing by both humans and LLMs suggest that the meaning of a semantic expression is indeterminate prior to the act of interpretation rather than being specifiable simply as the sum of its parts (i.e. compositionality). This observer-dependent act dynamically actualizes meaning under genuine contextuality more consistent with quantum logical mechanisms than with classical Boolean approaches that assume separability, motivating an approach to language modeling that utilizes a Hilbert space formalism. In this work, we introduce Phase-Associative Memory (PAM) -- a complex-valued sequence model whose state S_t \in \mathbb{C}^{d \times d} accumulates outer products of complex token embeddings retrieved through the conjugate inner product $\mathrm{Re}\langle K \mid Q\rangle / \sqrt{d}$ -- and evaluate it against a structurally matched real-valued ablation. Both architectures train stably across a 5M--100M parameter sweep on WikiText-103 under identical conditions; PAM sits at higher absolute loss at every measured scale but improves more rapidly with parameter count, with power-law exponents of $-0.15$ vs.\ $-0.12$ in loss and $-0.65$ vs.\ $-0.49$ in perplexity that narrow the gap between the two architectures monotonically. Further investigation of complex-valued sequence modeling at larger scales could reveal that the loss plateau characteristic of real-valued state-of-the-art language models (e.g. transformers) is reachable with PAM-style architectures with an order of magnitude fewer parameters than the current frontier ($\sim$1T), implying that similar capabilities are achievable at sizes runnable on consumer-grade hardware.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在复希尔伯特空间中建模序列的相位联想记忆（PAM）模型，在语言建模中展现出更快的损失下降趋势，有望以更少参数达到SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言理解具有语境依赖性和不确定性，经典布尔组合方法难以捕捉这种量子逻辑式的动态意义生成，需要探索基于希尔伯特空间的形式化建模方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种利用复值表示和量子逻辑机制的序列模型，以更高效地捕捉语言中的语境依赖性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PAM在相同条件下绝对损失更高，但随参数增长损失下降更快（幂律指数-0.15 vs -0.12），与实值模型的差距单调缩小，暗示复值建模可能突破实值模型的损失平台。
analysis.method: Phase-Associative Memory (PAM)：复值序列模型，状态S_t∈ℂ^{d×d}通过共轭内积Re⟨K|Q⟩/√d累积复值token嵌入的外积。
contributions: 提出PAM，一种在复希尔伯特空间中工作的序列模型，利用量子逻辑机制建模语言。
在WikiText-103上系统比较PAM与实值消融模型，发现PAM具有更优的缩放律（损失和困惑度幂律指数更优）。
推测PAM架构可能以数量级更少的参数达到当前SOTA实值语言模型的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在WikiText-103上对5M-100M参数范围的PAM和实值消融模型进行训练，两者均稳定收敛；PAM绝对损失更高但缩放律更优。摘要未提供其他数据集或下游任务实验。
limitations: 仅在WikiText-103一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
PAM在较小规模下绝对性能低于实值基线，实际优势需要更大规模实验确认。
未与当前SOTA模型（如Transformer）直接比较，仅基于缩放律推测。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在复希尔伯特空间中建模序列的相位联想记忆（PAM）模型，在语言建模中展现出更快的损失下降趋势，有望以更少参数达到SOTA性能。

papers.title: PaperOrchestra: A Multi-Agent Framework for Automated AI Research Paper Writing
papers.abstract: Synthesizing unstructured research materials into manuscripts is an essential yet under-explored challenge in AI-driven scientific discovery. Existing autonomous writers are rigidly coupled to specific experimental pipelines, and produce superficial literature reviews. We introduce PaperOrchestra, a multi-agent framework for automated AI research paper writing. It flexibly transforms unconstrained pre-writing materials into submission-ready LaTeX manuscripts, including comprehensive literature synthesis and generated visuals, such as plots and conceptual diagrams. To evaluate performance, we present PaperWritingBench, the first standardized benchmark of reverse-engineered raw materials from 200 top-tier AI conference papers, alongside a comprehensive suite of automated evaluators. In side-by-side human evaluations, PaperOrchestra significantly outperforms autonomous baselines, achieving an absolute win rate margin of 50%-68% in literature review quality, and 14%-38% in overall manuscript quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体框架PaperOrchestra，将非结构化研究材料自动转化为可提交的LaTeX论文，并在新基准PaperWritingBench上显著优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI论文写作工具与特定实验流程强耦合，且生成的文献综述质量浅薄，缺乏灵活性和通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何将非结构化的研究材料自动转化为高质量的、可提交的LaTeX论文，包括全面的文献综述和可视化图表。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PaperOrchestra多智能体框架，灵活处理非结构化输入，生成包含文献综述和图表的LaTeX稿件。
contributions: 提出PaperOrchestra多智能体框架，实现从非结构化材料到可提交论文的自动生成。
构建PaperWritingBench基准，包含200篇顶级AI会议论文的反向工程原始材料及自动评估工具。
analysis.experiments: 在PaperWritingBench上进行人类评估，PaperOrchestra在文献综述质量上绝对胜率50%-68%，整体稿件质量胜率14%-38%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量输入材料，对噪声或缺失信息敏感。
自动评估工具可能无法完全捕捉人类评审标准。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体框架PaperOrchestra，将非结构化研究材料自动转化为可提交的LaTeX论文，并在新基准PaperWritingBench上显著优于基线。

papers.title: Vanast: Virtual Try-On with Human Image Animation via Synthetic Triplet Supervision
papers.abstract: We present Vanast, a unified framework that generates garment-transferred human animation videos directly from a single human image, garment images, and a pose guidance video. Conventional two-stage pipelines treat image-based virtual try-on and pose-driven animation as separate processes, which often results in identity drift, garment distortion, and front-back inconsistency. Our model addresses these issues by performing the entire process in a single unified step to achieve coherent synthesis. To enable this setting, we construct large-scale triplet supervision. Our data generation pipeline includes generating identity-preserving human images in alternative outfits that differ from garment catalog images, capturing full upper and lower garment triplets to overcome the single-garment-posed video pair limitation, and assembling diverse in-the-wild triplets without requiring garment catalog images. We further introduce a Dual Module architecture for video diffusion transformers to stabilize training, preserve pretrained generative quality, and improve garment accuracy, pose adherence, and identity preservation while supporting zero-shot garment interpolation. Together, these contributions allow Vanast to produce high-fidelity, identity-consistent animation across a wide range of garment types.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一框架Vanast，通过合成三元组监督直接从单张人物图像生成服装迁移动画视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有两阶段流水线将虚拟试穿和姿态驱动动画分离，导致身份漂移、服装变形和前后不一致等问题，亟需统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张人物图像、服装图像和姿态引导视频直接生成连贯的服装迁移动画视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 两阶段方法存在身份漂移、服装变形和前后不一致等失败模式。
analysis.method: 构建大规模三元组监督（身份保持人物图像、服装目录图像、姿态视频），并设计双模块视频扩散Transformer架构。
contributions: 提出统一框架Vanast，实现单步服装迁移动画生成。
构建大规模三元组数据生成流水线，克服单服装-姿态视频对限制。
引入双模块架构稳定训练，提升服装精度、姿态一致性和身份保持。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量三元组数据生成。
零样本服装插值效果可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一框架Vanast，通过合成三元组监督直接从单张人物图像生成服装迁移动画视频。

papers.title: PointTPA: Dynamic Network Parameter Adaptation for 3D Scene Understanding
papers.abstract: Scene-level point cloud understanding remains challenging due to diverse geometries, imbalanced category distributions, and highly varied spatial layouts. Existing methods improve object-level performance but rely on static network parameters during inference, limiting their adaptability to dynamic scene data. We propose PointTPA, a Test-time Parameter Adaptation framework that generates input-aware network parameters for scene-level point clouds. PointTPA adopts a Serialization-based Neighborhood Grouping (SNG) to form locally coherent patches and a Dynamic Parameter Projector (DPP) to produce patch-wise adaptive weights, enabling the backbone to adjust its behavior according to scene-specific variations while maintaining a low parameter overhead. Integrated into the PTv3 structure, PointTPA demonstrates strong parameter efficiency by introducing two lightweight modules of less than 2% of the backbone's parameters. Despite this minimal parameter overhead, PointTPA achieves 78.4% mIoU on ScanNet validation, surpassing existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods across multiple benchmarks, highlighting the efficacy of our test-time dynamic network parameter adaptation mechanism in enhancing 3D scene understanding. The code is available at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/PointTPA.

analysis.tldr: 提出测试时动态参数适应框架PointTPA，通过轻量模块提升3D场景理解性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D场景理解方法依赖静态网络参数，难以适应推理时动态场景数据的变化，且类别分布不均和几何多样性带来挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加参数量的前提下，使网络在测试时根据输入场景动态调整参数以提升场景级点云理解性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PointTPA框架，包含序列化邻域分组（SNG）形成局部连贯块，以及动态参数投影器（DPP）生成块自适应权重，集成到PTv3骨干中。
contributions: 提出测试时动态参数适应机制，使网络根据输入场景调整行为。
设计轻量模块（SNG和DPP），参数量少于骨干的2%，在ScanNet上达到78.4% mIoU，超越现有PEFT方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNet验证集上评估mIoU，并与多种参数高效微调方法比较，未提供其他数据集或消融实验细节。
limitations: 仅在ScanNet一个数据集上报告结果，泛化性待验证。
未讨论动态参数适应机制的计算开销对推理速度的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出测试时动态参数适应框架PointTPA，通过轻量模块提升3D场景理解性能。

papers.title: Video-MME-v2: Towards the Next Stage in Benchmarks for Comprehensive Video Understanding
papers.abstract: With the rapid advancement of video understanding, existing benchmarks are becoming increasingly saturated, exposing a critical discrepancy between inflated leaderboard scores and real-world model capabilities. To address this widening gap, we introduce Video-MME-v2, a comprehensive benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the robustness and faithfulness of video understanding. To systematically evaluate model capabilities, we design a \textbf{progressive tri-level hierarchy} that incrementally increases the complexity of video comprehension, ranging from multi-point visual information aggregation, to temporal dynamics modeling, and ultimately to complex multimodal reasoning. Besides, in contrast to conventional per-question accuracy, we propose a \textbf{group-based non-linear evaluation} strategy that enforces both consistency across related queries and coherence in multi-step reasoning. It penalizes fragmented or guess-based correctness and assigns credit only to answers supported by valid reasoning. To guarantee data quality, Video-MME-v2 is constructed through a rigorously controlled human annotation pipeline, involving 12 annotators and 50 independent reviewers. Backed by \textbf{3,300 human-hours} and up to \textbf{5 rounds} of quality assurance, Video-MME-v2 aims to serve as one of the most authoritative video benchmarks. Extensive experiments reveal a substantial gap between current best model Gemini-3-Pro and human experts, and uncover a clear hierarchical bottleneck where errors in visual information aggregation and temporal modeling propagate to limit high-level reasoning. We further find that thinking-based reasoning is highly dependent on textual cues, improving performance with subtitles but sometimes degrading it in purely visual settings. By exposing these limitations, Video-MME-v2 establishes a demanding new testbed for the development of next-generation video MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出视频理解基准Video-MME-v2，通过渐进式三级层次和分组非线性评估揭示当前模型与人类专家的显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频理解基准趋于饱和，排行榜分数虚高，无法反映真实模型能力，亟需更严格的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能系统评估视频理解鲁棒性和忠实性、并暴露模型真实瓶颈的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前最佳模型Gemini-3-Pro与人类专家存在显著差距；视觉信息聚合和时间建模中的错误会传播并限制高层推理；基于思考的推理高度依赖文本线索，添加字幕可提升性能，但在纯视觉设置下有时会降低性能。
analysis.method: 提出渐进式三级层次（多点视觉信息聚合、时间动态建模、复杂多模态推理）和分组非线性评估策略（强制相关查询一致性和多步推理连贯性，惩罚碎片化或猜测式正确）。
contributions: 设计渐进式三级层次结构，逐步增加视频理解复杂度。
提出分组非线性评估策略，更准确地衡量模型推理能力。
通过严格人工标注流程构建高质量基准，揭示当前模型瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在Video-MME-v2上评估多个模型，发现最佳模型Gemini-3-Pro与人类专家差距大，并观察到层次化瓶颈和文本依赖现象。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖特定视频理解维度，可能未涵盖所有实际场景。
分组非线性评估策略的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视频理解基准Video-MME-v2，通过渐进式三级层次和分组非线性评估揭示当前模型与人类专家的显著差距。

papers.title: LoMa: Local Feature Matching Revisited
papers.abstract: Local feature matching has long been a fundamental component of 3D vision systems such as Structure-from-Motion (SfM), yet progress has lagged behind the rapid advances of modern data-driven approaches. The newer approaches, such as feed-forward reconstruction models, have benefited extensively from scaling dataset sizes, whereas local feature matching models are still only trained on a few mid-sized datasets. In this paper, we revisit local feature matching from a data-driven perspective. In our approach, which we call LoMa, we combine large and diverse data mixtures, modern training recipes, scaled model capacity, and scaled compute, resulting in remarkable gains in performance. Since current standard benchmarks mainly rely on collecting sparse views from successful 3D reconstructions, the evaluation of progress in feature matching has been limited to relatively easy image pairs. To address the resulting saturation of benchmarks, we collect 1000 highly challenging image pairs from internet data into a new dataset called HardMatch. Ground truth correspondences for HardMatch are obtained via manual annotation by the authors. In our extensive benchmarking suite, we find that LoMa makes outstanding progress across the board, outperforming the state-of-the-art method ALIKED+LightGlue by +18.6 mAA on HardMatch, +29.5 mAA on WxBS, +21.4 (1m, 10$^\circ$) on InLoc, +24.2 AUC on RUBIK, and +12.4 mAA on IMC 2022. We release our code and models publicly at https://github.com/davnords/LoMa.

analysis.tldr: LoMa通过数据混合、现代训练策略、扩大模型和计算量，显著提升局部特征匹配性能，并构建了高难度基准HardMatch。
analysis.research_motivation: 局部特征匹配在3D视觉中至关重要，但数据驱动方法进展缓慢，训练数据规模远落后于其他视觉任务，且现有基准趋于饱和，难以区分方法优劣。
analysis.problem: 局部特征匹配模型训练数据规模小、基准难度不足，导致性能提升受限且评估不充分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基准主要依赖成功3D重建的稀疏视图，导致评估局限于简单图像对，性能饱和。
analysis.method: LoMa：结合大规模多样化数据混合、现代训练策略、扩大模型容量和计算量，并构建包含1000个高难度图像对的HardMatch数据集。
contributions: 提出LoMa方法，通过数据、训练、模型和计算的多维度扩展显著提升局部特征匹配性能。
构建HardMatch高难度基准数据集，推动更严格的评估。
在多个基准上超越SOTA，如HardMatch上mAA提升18.6。
analysis.experiments: 在HardMatch、WxBS、InLoc、RUBIK、IMC 2022等基准上评估，LoMa均取得显著提升，具体数值如HardMatch mAA +18.6。
limitations: HardMatch数据集规模较小（1000对），可能不足以覆盖所有困难场景。
方法依赖大规模数据和计算资源，可能限制可复现性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoMa通过数据混合、现代训练策略、扩大模型和计算量，显著提升局部特征匹配性能，并构建了高难度基准HardMatch。

papers.title: Early Stopping for Large Reasoning Models via Confidence Dynamics
papers.abstract: Large reasoning models rely on long chain-of-thought generation to solve complex problems, but extended reasoning often incurs substantial computational cost and can even degrade performance due to overthinking. A key challenge is determining when the model should stop reasoning and produce the final answer. In this work, we study the confidence of intermediate answers during reasoning and observe two characteristic behaviors: correct reasoning trajectories often reach high-confidence answers early, while incorrect rollouts tend to produce long, unproductive reasoning traces and exhibit less reliable confidence dynamics. Motivated by these observations, we propose CoDE-Stop (Confidence Dynamics Early Stop), an early stopping method that leverages the dynamics of intermediate answer confidence to decide when to terminate reasoning, requiring no additional training and easily integrating into existing models. We evaluate CoDE-Stop on diverse reasoning and science benchmarks across multiple models. Compared to prior early stopping methods, it achieves a more favorable accuracy-compute tradeoff and reduces total token usage by 25-50% compared to standard full-length reasoning. In addition, we provide analyses of confidence dynamics during reasoning, offering insights into how confidence changes in both correct and incorrect trajectories.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于置信度动态的早停方法CoDE-Stop，在不额外训练的情况下减少大推理模型的计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 大推理模型通过长思维链解决复杂问题，但过度推理导致计算成本高且可能降低性能，需要确定何时停止推理。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲准确率的前提下，自动决定大推理模型何时终止推理过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正确推理轨迹早期达到高置信度答案，错误轨迹产生长且不可靠的置信度动态。
analysis.method: CoDE-Stop：利用中间答案置信度动态决定终止时机，无需额外训练，可集成到现有模型。
contributions: 提出基于置信度动态的早停方法CoDE-Stop，实现更优的准确率-计算权衡。
在多个推理和科学基准上验证，相比标准全长度推理减少25-50%的token使用。
提供推理过程中置信度动态的分析，揭示正确与错误轨迹的置信度变化规律。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理和科学基准上评估，使用多种模型，与先前早停方法比较，显示更优的准确率-计算权衡。
limitations: 可能依赖置信度校准质量，未在未校准模型上验证。
早停阈值可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于置信度动态的早停方法CoDE-Stop，在不额外训练的情况下减少大推理模型的计算开销。

papers.title: Rethinking Model Efficiency: Multi-Agent Inference with Large Models
papers.abstract: Most vision-language models (VLMs) apply a large language model (LLM) as the decoder, where the response tokens are generated sequentially through autoregression. Therefore, the number of output tokens can be the bottleneck of the end-to-end latency. However, different models may require vastly different numbers of output tokens to achieve comparable performance. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of the latency across different components of VLMs on simulated data. The experiment shows that a large model with fewer output tokens can be more efficient than a small model with a long output sequence. The empirical study on diverse real-world benchmarks confirms the observation that a large model can achieve better or comparable performance as a small model with significantly fewer output tokens. To leverage the efficiency of large models, we propose a multi-agent inference framework that keeps large models with short responses but transfers the key reasoning tokens from the small model when necessary. The comparison on benchmark tasks demonstrates that by reusing the reasoning tokens from small models, it can help approach the performance of a large model with its own reasoning, which confirms the effectiveness of our proposal.

analysis.tldr: 大模型通过减少输出token数可提升效率，多智能体推理框架复用小模型推理token来逼近大模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM中LLM自回归生成响应token是端到端延迟的瓶颈，不同模型输出token数差异大，需探索效率与性能的平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大模型输出token少的优势，同时保持或接近其原有性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大模型用更少输出token即可达到与小模型长序列相当甚至更好的性能。
analysis.method: 多智能体推理框架：保留大模型短响应，必要时从小模型迁移关键推理token。
contributions: 系统分析VLM各组件延迟，发现输出token数是延迟瓶颈。
提出多智能体推理框架，通过复用推理token提升效率。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟数据和真实世界基准上验证了观察，并在基准任务上比较了所提框架的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖小模型推理token的质量。
框架在复杂任务上的泛化性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 大模型通过减少输出token数可提升效率，多智能体推理框架复用小模型推理token来逼近大模型性能。

papers.title: StarVLA: A Lego-like Codebase for Vision-Language-Action Model Developing
papers.abstract: Building generalist embodied agents requires integrating perception, language understanding, and action, which are core capabilities addressed by Vision-Language-Action (VLA) approaches based on multimodal foundation models, including recent advances in vision-language models and world models. Despite rapid progress, VLA methods remain fragmented across incompatible architectures, codebases, and evaluation protocols, hindering principled comparison and reproducibility. We present StarVLA, an open-source codebase for VLA research. StarVLA addresses these challenges in three aspects. First, it provides a modular backbone--action-head architecture that supports both VLM backbones (e.g., Qwen-VL) and world-model backbones (e.g., Cosmos) alongside representative action-decoding paradigms, all under a shared abstraction in which backbone and action head can each be swapped independently. Second, it provides reusable training strategies, including cross-embodiment learning and multimodal co-training, that apply consistently across supported paradigms. Third, it integrates major benchmarks, including LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin~2.0, RoboCasa-GR1, and BEHAVIOR-1K, through a unified evaluation interface that supports both simulation and real-robot deployment. StarVLA also ships simple, fully reproducible single-benchmark training recipes that, despite minimal data engineering, already match or surpass prior methods on multiple benchmarks with both VLM and world-model backbones. To our best knowledge, StarVLA is one of the most comprehensive open-source VLA frameworks available, and we expect it to lower the barrier for reproducing existing methods and prototyping new ones. StarVLA is being actively maintained and expanded; we will update this report as the project evolves. The code and documentation are available at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

analysis.tldr: StarVLA 是一个模块化、开源的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型开发代码库，支持多种骨干网络和动作解码范式，并集成多个基准测试。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA 方法在架构、代码库和评估协议上碎片化严重，阻碍了公平比较和可复现性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一、模块化且可复现的 VLA 研究框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有 VLA 方法不兼容，导致难以进行原则性比较和复现。
analysis.method: 提出 StarVLA 开源代码库，采用模块化的骨干-动作头架构，支持多种 VLM 和世界模型骨干，提供可复用的训练策略和统一评估接口。
contributions: 提供模块化骨干-动作头架构，支持独立替换骨干和动作头。
集成多个主流基准测试，提供统一评估接口和可复现的训练方案。
analysis.experiments: 在 LIBERO、SimplerEnv、RoboTwin 2.0、RoboCasa-GR1 和 BEHAVIOR-1K 等基准上，使用最小数据工程即可匹配或超越先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定骨干网络和动作头组合的兼容性。
基准测试覆盖有限，实际机器人部署场景可能更复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StarVLA 是一个模块化、开源的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型开发代码库，支持多种骨干网络和动作解码范式，并集成多个基准测试。

papers.title: SimpleProc: Fully Procedural Synthetic Data from Simple Rules for Multi-View Stereo
papers.abstract: In this paper, we explore the design space of procedural rules for multi-view stereo (MVS). We demonstrate that we can generate effective training data using SimpleProc: a new, fully procedural generator driven by a very small set of rules using Non-Uniform Rational Basis Splines (NURBS), as well as basic displacement and texture patterns. At a modest scale of 8,000 images, our approach achieves superior results compared to manually curated images (at the same scale) sourced from games and real-world objects. When scaled to 352,000 images, our method yields performance comparable to--and in several benchmarks, exceeding--models trained on over 692,000 manually curated images. The source code and the data are available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/SimpleProc.

analysis.tldr: SimpleProc 用极简 NURBS 规则生成合成数据，在 MVS 任务上超越大规模人工精选数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 多视图立体视觉（MVS）依赖大量训练数据，但人工采集和标注成本高，现有合成数据生成器规则复杂且效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何用最少的规则生成高质量合成数据，使 MVS 模型训练效果媲美甚至超越大规模人工精选数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SimpleProc，一种完全程序化的数据生成器，仅使用 NURBS、基本位移和纹理图案等极简规则生成合成图像。
contributions: 证明极简程序化规则可生成有效 MVS 训练数据，8000 张图像即优于同规模人工精选数据。
将数据规模扩展至 352,000 张图像，性能可比甚至超越 692,000 张人工精选数据训练的模型。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 MVS 基准上评估，与游戏和真实物体来源的人工精选数据对比，显示 SimpleProc 数据在相同规模下更优，大规模下达到或超越 SOTA。
limitations: 仅验证了 MVS 任务，其他视觉任务泛化性未知。
程序化规则可能无法覆盖所有真实场景的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SimpleProc 用极简 NURBS 规则生成合成数据，在 MVS 任务上超越大规模人工精选数据。

papers.title: Your Pre-trained Diffusion Model Secretly Knows Restoration
papers.abstract: Pre-trained diffusion models have enabled significant advancements in All-in-One Restoration (AiOR), offering improved perceptual quality and generalization. However, diffusion-based restoration methods primarily rely on fine-tuning or Control-Net style modules to leverage the pre-trained diffusion model's priors for AiOR. In this work, we show that these pre-trained diffusion models inherently possess restoration behavior, which can be unlocked by directly learning prompt embeddings at the output of the text encoder. Interestingly, this behavior is largely inaccessible through text prompts and text-token embedding optimization. Furthermore, we observe that naive prompt learning is unstable because the forward noising process using degraded images is misaligned with the reverse sampling trajectory. To resolve this, we train prompts within a diffusion bridge formulation that aligns training and inference dynamics, enforcing a coherent denoising path from noisy degraded states to clean images. Building on these insights, we introduce our lightweight learned prompts on the pre-trained WAN video model and FLUX image models, converting them into high-performing restoration models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive performance and generalization across diverse degradations, while avoiding fine-tuning and restoration-specific control modules.

analysis.tldr: 预训练扩散模型本身具备恢复能力，通过轻量级提示学习即可解锁，无需微调或控制模块。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全合一图像恢复方法依赖微调或Control-Net等模块来利用预训练扩散模型的先验，计算成本高且泛化受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调或添加专用控制模块的情况下，高效利用预训练扩散模型的内在恢复能力进行全合一图像恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练扩散模型在文本编码器输出端通过提示学习可解锁恢复行为，但该行为无法通过文本提示或文本token嵌入优化获得；此外，使用退化图像的加噪过程与反向采样轨迹不匹配，导致提示学习不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出在扩散桥公式中训练提示，使训练和推理动态对齐，确保从噪声退化状态到干净图像的一致去噪路径；在预训练WAN视频模型和FLUX图像模型上应用轻量级学习提示。
contributions: 发现预训练扩散模型本身具有恢复行为，可通过提示学习解锁。
提出扩散桥提示学习方法，解决加噪与去噪轨迹不匹配问题。
在视频和图像模型上实现无需微调或专用控制模块的高性能全合一恢复。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定预训练模型架构。
提示学习的泛化性可能受限于训练数据中的退化类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 预训练扩散模型本身具备恢复能力，通过轻量级提示学习即可解锁，无需微调或控制模块。

papers.title: TriAttention: Efficient Long Reasoning with Trigonometric KV Compression
papers.abstract: Extended reasoning in large language models (LLMs) creates severe KV cache memory bottlenecks. Leading KV cache compression methods estimate KV importance using attention scores from recent post-RoPE queries. However, queries rotate with position during RoPE, making representative queries very few, leading to poor top-key selection and unstable reasoning. To avoid this issue, we turn to the pre-RoPE space, where we observe that Q and K vectors are highly concentrated around fixed non-zero centers and remain stable across positions -- Q/K concentration. We show that this concentration causes queries to preferentially attend to keys at specific distances (e.g., nearest keys), with the centers determining which distances are preferred via a trigonometric series. Based on this, we propose TriAttention to estimate key importance by leveraging these centers. Via the trigonometric series, we use the distance preference characterized by these centers to score keys according to their positions, and also leverage Q/K norms as an additional signal for importance estimation. On AIME25 with 32K-token generation, TriAttention matches Full Attention reasoning accuracy while achieving 2.5x higher throughput or 10.7x KV memory reduction, whereas leading baselines achieve only about half the accuracy at the same efficiency. TriAttention enables OpenClaw deployment on a single consumer GPU, where long context would otherwise cause out-of-memory with Full Attention.

analysis.tldr: 提出TriAttention，利用预RoPE空间中Q/K向量的中心集中性，通过三角级数估计键重要性，实现高效长推理KV缓存压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM长推理导致KV缓存内存瓶颈，现有压缩方法依赖后RoPE查询的注意力分数，但RoPE旋转使代表性查询极少，导致键选择不佳和推理不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲推理准确性的前提下，高效压缩KV缓存以支持长上下文推理？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到预RoPE空间中Q和K向量高度集中在固定非零中心附近，且跨位置稳定（Q/K集中性），导致查询优先关注特定距离的键，中心通过三角级数决定偏好距离。
analysis.method: TriAttention利用预RoPE空间中的Q/K中心，通过三角级数根据键位置评分，并结合Q/K范数作为重要性估计的额外信号，实现KV压缩。
contributions: 发现预RoPE空间中Q/K向量的集中性现象，并揭示其与距离偏好的三角级数关系。
提出TriAttention方法，利用中心集中性和三角级数进行高效KV重要性估计。
在AIME25上验证，TriAttention匹配全注意力推理精度，同时实现2.5倍吞吐量提升或10.7倍KV内存减少。
analysis.experiments: 在AIME25数据集上，32K token生成任务，TriAttention与全注意力对比，实现2.5倍吞吐量或10.7倍KV内存减少，而基线方法在相同效率下仅达到约一半精度。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定模型架构（如RoPE），泛化性需进一步验证。
摘要未提及在更短上下文或不同任务上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TriAttention，利用预RoPE空间中Q/K向量的中心集中性，通过三角级数估计键重要性，实现高效长推理KV缓存压缩。

papers.title: Vero: An Open RL Recipe for General Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: What does it take to build a visual reasoner that works across charts, science, spatial understanding, and open-ended tasks? The strongest vision-language models (VLMs) show such broad visual reasoning is within reach, but the recipe behind them remains unclear, locked behind proprietary reinforcement learning (RL) pipelines with non-public data. We introduce Vero, a family of fully open VLMs that matches or exceeds existing open-weight models across diverse visual reasoning tasks. We scale RL data and rewards across six broad task categories, constructing Vero-600K, a 600K-sample dataset from 59 datasets, and designing task-routed rewards that handle heterogeneous answer formats. Vero achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving over four base models by 3.6-5.3 points on average across VeroEval, our suite of 30 challenging benchmarks. Starting from Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct, Vero outperforms Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking on 23 of 30 benchmarks without additional proprietary thinking data. When trained from the same base model, Vero-600K exceeds existing RL datasets across task categories. Systematic ablations reveal that different task categories elicit qualitatively distinct reasoning patterns that transfer poorly in isolation, suggesting that broad data coverage is the primary driver of strong RL scaling. All data, code, and models are released.

analysis.tldr: Vero 通过开源强化学习配方和 600K 数据集，在多种视觉推理任务上达到开源 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有最强视觉推理模型依赖私有强化学习管道和非公开数据，导致配方不透明，阻碍社区复现和进步。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个在图表、科学、空间理解和开放任务上均有效的通用视觉推理器，并公开其完整配方。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同任务类别会引发定性不同的推理模式，且孤立训练时迁移性差，表明广泛的数据覆盖是强化学习扩展的主要驱动力。
analysis.method: 提出 Vero 系列开源 VLM，构建包含 59 个数据集、60 万样本的 Vero-600K 数据集，并设计任务路由奖励以处理异构答案格式，通过强化学习训练。
contributions: 开源了完整的视觉推理强化学习配方，包括数据、代码和模型。
构建了 Vero-600K 数据集和 VeroEval 评测套件（30 个基准）。
在多个基线上取得平均 3.6-5.3 点的提升，并超越 Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking 在 30 个基准中的 23 个。
analysis.experiments: 在 VeroEval 套件（30 个基准）上评测，Vero 相比四个基模型平均提升 3.6-5.3 点；从 Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct 出发，在 23/30 基准上超越 Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking；消融实验表明广泛数据覆盖是关键。
limitations: 未提及在极端低资源或长尾任务上的表现。
可能依赖特定基模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Vero 通过开源强化学习配方和 600K 数据集，在多种视觉推理任务上达到开源 SOTA。

papers.title: Analyzing Symbolic Properties for DRL Agents in Systems and Networking
papers.abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has shown remarkable performance on complex control problems in systems and networking, including adaptive video streaming, wireless resource management, and congestion control. For safe deployment, however, it is critical to reason about how agents behave across the range of system states they encounter in practice. Existing verification-based methods in this domain primarily focus on point properties, defined around fixed input states, which offer limited coverage and require substantial manual effort to identify relevant input-output pairs for analysis. In this paper, we study symbolic properties, that specify expected behavior over ranges of input states, for DRL agents in systems and networking. We present a generic formulation for symbolic properties, with monotonicity and robustness as concrete examples, and show how they can be analyzed using existing DNN verification engines. Our approach encodes symbolic properties as comparisons between related executions of the same policy and decomposes them into practically tractable sub-properties. These techniques serve as practical enablers for applying existing verification tools to symbolic analysis. Using our framework, diffRL, we conduct an extensive empirical study across three DRL-based control systems, adaptive video streaming, wireless resource management, and congestion control. Through these case studies, we analyze symbolic properties over broad input ranges, examine how property satisfaction evolves during training, study the impact of model size on verifiability, and compare multiple verification backends. Our results show that symbolic properties provide substantially broader coverage than point properties and can uncover non-obvious, operationally meaningful counterexamples, while also revealing practical solver trade-offs and limitations.

analysis.tldr: 提出符号属性分析框架diffRL，用于验证DRL智能体在系统和网络中的单调性与鲁棒性，覆盖范围远超点属性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有验证方法主要针对固定输入状态的点属性，覆盖有限且需要大量人工标注，难以保障DRL在系统和网络中的安全部署。
analysis.problem: 如何高效分析DRL智能体在连续输入状态范围上的符号属性（如单调性、鲁棒性）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 符号属性比点属性提供更广的覆盖范围，能发现非直观、有操作意义的反例，并揭示求解器的权衡与局限。
analysis.method: 将符号属性编码为同一策略下相关执行之间的比较，并分解为可处理的子属性，利用现有DNN验证引擎进行分析。
contributions: 提出DRL智能体符号属性的通用形式化定义（以单调性和鲁棒性为例）。
开发diffRL框架，将符号属性分解为可验证的子属性，兼容现有DNN验证工具。
在自适应视频流、无线资源管理、拥塞控制三个系统中进行实证研究，展示符号属性的覆盖优势与实用价值。
analysis.experiments: 在三个DRL控制系统（自适应视频流、无线资源管理、拥塞控制）上评估符号属性，分析属性满足度随训练的变化、模型大小对可验证性的影响，并比较多个验证后端。
limitations: 符号属性分析仍依赖现有DNN验证引擎的可扩展性。
仅研究了单调性和鲁棒性两种符号属性，其他属性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出符号属性分析框架diffRL，用于验证DRL智能体在系统和网络中的单调性与鲁棒性，覆盖范围远超点属性。

papers.title: A Frame is Worth One Token: Efficient Generative World Modeling with Delta Tokens
papers.abstract: Anticipating diverse future states is a central challenge in video world modeling. Discriminative world models produce a deterministic prediction that implicitly averages over possible futures, while existing generative world models remain computationally expensive. Recent work demonstrates that predicting the future in the feature space of a vision foundation model (VFM), rather than a latent space optimized for pixel reconstruction, requires significantly fewer world model parameters. However, most such approaches remain discriminative. In this work, we introduce DeltaTok, a tokenizer that encodes the VFM feature difference between consecutive frames into a single continuous "delta" token, and DeltaWorld, a generative world model operating on these tokens to efficiently generate diverse plausible futures. Delta tokens reduce video from a three-dimensional spatio-temporal representation to a one-dimensional temporal sequence, for example yielding a 1,024x token reduction with 512x512 frames. This compact representation enables tractable multi-hypothesis training, where many futures are generated in parallel and only the best is supervised. At inference, this leads to diverse predictions in a single forward pass. Experiments on dense forecasting tasks demonstrate that DeltaWorld forecasts futures that more closely align with real-world outcomes, while having over 35x fewer parameters and using 2,000x fewer FLOPs than existing generative world models. Code and weights: https://deltatok.github.io.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeltaTok将帧间VFM特征差异编码为单个连续token，实现高效生成式世界建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式世界模型计算成本高，而判别式模型无法生成多样化的未来预测。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地生成多样且准确的视频未来帧预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DeltaTok将相邻帧的VFM特征差异编码为单个连续token，将视频压缩为一维时间序列；DeltaWorld基于这些token进行生成式建模，通过多假设训练并行生成多个未来并监督最佳结果。
contributions: 提出DeltaTok tokenizer，将帧间VFM特征差异编码为单个token，实现极大压缩。
提出DeltaWorld生成式世界模型，在压缩token上高效生成多样未来预测。
analysis.experiments: 在密集预测任务上，DeltaWorld参数减少35倍以上，FLOPs减少2000倍，预测更接近真实结果。
limitations: 可能依赖VFM特征质量。
仅验证了密集预测任务，其他场景未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DeltaTok将帧间VFM特征差异编码为单个连续token，实现高效生成式世界建模。

papers.title: SpatialEdit: Benchmarking Fine-Grained Image Spatial Editing
papers.abstract: Image spatial editing performs geometry-driven transformations, allowing precise control over object layout and camera viewpoints. Current models are insufficient for fine-grained spatial manipulations, motivating a dedicated assessment suite. Our contributions are listed: (i) We introduce SpatialEdit-Bench, a complete benchmark that evaluates spatial editing by jointly measuring perceptual plausibility and geometric fidelity via viewpoint reconstruction and framing analysis. (ii) To address the data bottleneck for scalable training, we construct SpatialEdit-500k, a synthetic dataset generated with a controllable Blender pipeline that renders objects across diverse backgrounds and systematic camera trajectories, providing precise ground-truth transformations for both object- and camera-centric operations. (iii) Building on this data, we develop SpatialEdit-16B, a baseline model for fine-grained spatial editing. Our method achieves competitive performance on general editing while substantially outperforming prior methods on spatial manipulation tasks. All resources will be made public at https://github.com/EasonXiao-888/SpatialEdit.

analysis.tldr: 提出图像空间编辑基准、合成数据集和基线模型，显著提升细粒度空间操控性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像编辑模型在细粒度空间操控（如物体布局和相机视角）方面能力不足，缺乏专门的评估基准和高质量训练数据。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和提升图像空间编辑的几何变换精度与感知合理性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前模型难以实现精确的物体级和相机级空间操作，需要专门的基准和训练数据来推动进展。
analysis.method: 构建包含感知合理性和几何保真度联合评估的基准 SpatialEdit-Bench，利用可控 Blender 管线生成合成数据集 SpatialEdit-500k，并基于此训练基线模型 SpatialEdit-16B。
contributions: 提出 SpatialEdit-Bench，首个联合评估感知合理性和几何保真度的图像空间编辑基准。
构建 SpatialEdit-500k 合成数据集，提供精确的物体和相机变换真值。
开发 SpatialEdit-16B 基线模型，在空间操控任务上显著优于先前方法。
analysis.experiments: 在通用编辑和空间操控任务上评估，SpatialEdit-16B 在空间操控上大幅超越先前方法，通用编辑性能具有竞争力。
limitations: 合成数据与真实场景可能存在域差异。
模型在极端几何变换或复杂背景下的泛化能力未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图像空间编辑基准、合成数据集和基线模型，显著提升细粒度空间操控性能。

papers.title: How AI Aggregation Affects Knowledge
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) changes social learning when aggregated outputs become training data for future predictions. To study this, we extend the DeGroot model by introducing an AI aggregator that trains on population beliefs and feeds synthesized signals back to agents. We define the learning gap as the deviation of long-run beliefs from the efficient benchmark, allowing us to capture how AI aggregation affects learning. Our main result identifies a threshold in the speed of updating: when the aggregator updates too quickly, there is no positive-measure set of training weights that robustly improves learning across a broad class of environments, whereas such weights exist when updating is sufficiently slow. We then compare global and local architectures. Local aggregators trained on proximate or topic-specific data robustly improve learning in all environments. Consequently, replacing specialized local aggregators with a single global aggregator worsens learning in at least one dimension of the state.

analysis.tldr: AI聚合器更新速度过快会阻碍社会学习，局部聚合器优于全局聚合器。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成的聚合输出被用作训练数据，可能改变社会学习动态，但现有模型未充分研究这种反馈机制的影响。
analysis.problem: 研究AI聚合器如何影响群体长期信念与有效基准之间的学习差距，并识别改善学习的条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论分析表明：聚合器更新速度存在阈值，过快时无法找到稳健改善学习的训练权重，而慢速更新则存在；局部聚合器在所有环境下稳健改善学习，全局聚合器则至少在一个维度上恶化学习。
analysis.method: 扩展DeGroot模型，引入AI聚合器，该聚合器基于群体信念训练并反馈合成信号；定义学习差距为长期信念与有效基准的偏差；分析更新速度阈值和聚合器架构（全局vs局部）的影响。
contributions: 识别出聚合器更新速度的阈值，区分了能否稳健改善学习的条件。
比较全局与局部聚合器架构，证明局部聚合器在所有环境下稳健改善学习，而全局聚合器存在缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于简化模型，可能未考虑现实中的复杂因素。
未讨论不同环境参数下的具体数值结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI聚合器更新速度过快会阻碍社会学习，局部聚合器优于全局聚合器。

papers.title: ClickAIXR: On-Device Multimodal Vision-Language Interaction with Real-World Objects in Extended Reality
papers.abstract: We present ClickAIXR, a novel on-device framework for multimodal vision-language interaction with objects in extended reality (XR). Unlike prior systems that rely on cloud-based AI (e.g., ChatGPT) or gaze-based selection (e.g., GazePointAR), ClickAIXR integrates an on-device vision-language model (VLM) with a controller-based object selection paradigm, enabling users to precisely click on real-world objects in XR. Once selected, the object image is processed locally by the VLM to answer natural language questions through both text and speech. This object-centered interaction reduces ambiguity inherent in gaze- or voice-only interfaces and improves transparency by performing all inference on-device, addressing concerns around privacy and latency. We implemented ClickAIXR in the Magic Leap SDK (C API) with ONNX-based local VLM inference. We conducted a user study comparing ClickAIXR with Gemini 2.5 Flash and ChatGPT 5, evaluating usability, trust, and user satisfaction. Results show that latency is moderate and user experience is acceptable. Our findings demonstrate the potential of click-based object selection combined with on-device AI to advance trustworthy, privacy-preserving XR interactions. The source code and supplementary materials are available at: nanovis.org/ClickAIXR.html

analysis.tldr: 提出ClickAIXR，一种在扩展现实中通过点击真实物体实现本地VLM问答的框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有XR交互依赖云端AI或视线选择，存在隐私、延迟和歧义问题，需要一种本地化、精准的物体交互方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在XR中实现低延迟、高隐私、低歧义的实时物体问答交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成本地VLM与控制器点击选择，用户点击真实物体后由本地VLM处理图像并回答自然语言问题。
contributions: 提出ClickAIXR框架，结合点击选择与本地VLM实现隐私保护的XR交互。
在Magic Leap SDK上实现并开源，用户研究显示延迟可接受、用户体验良好。
analysis.experiments: 用户研究对比ClickAIXR与Gemini 2.5 Flash和ChatGPT 5，评估可用性、信任和满意度。
limitations: 用户研究规模可能有限，未提及具体样本量。
仅支持Magic Leap平台，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ClickAIXR，一种在扩展现实中通过点击真实物体实现本地VLM问答的框架。

papers.title: FileGram: Grounding Agent Personalization in File-System Behavioral Traces
papers.abstract: Coworking AI agents operating within local file systems are rapidly emerging as a paradigm in human-AI interaction; however, effective personalization remains limited by severe data constraints, as strict privacy barriers and the difficulty of jointly collecting multimodal real-world traces prevent scalable training and evaluation, and existing methods remain interaction-centric while overlooking dense behavioral traces in file-system operations; to address this gap, we propose FileGram, a comprehensive framework that grounds agent memory and personalization in file-system behavioral traces, comprising three core components: (1) FileGramEngine, a scalable persona-driven data engine that simulates realistic workflows and generates fine-grained multimodal action sequences at scale; (2) FileGramBench, a diagnostic benchmark grounded in file-system behavioral traces for evaluating memory systems on profile reconstruction, trace disentanglement, persona drift detection, and multimodal grounding; and (3) FileGramOS, a bottom-up memory architecture that builds user profiles directly from atomic actions and content deltas rather than dialogue summaries, encoding these traces into procedural, semantic, and episodic channels with query-time abstraction; extensive experiments show that FileGramBench remains challenging for state-of-the-art memory systems and that FileGramEngine and FileGramOS are effective, and by open-sourcing the framework, we hope to support future research on personalized memory-centric file-system agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出FileGram框架，利用文件系统行为轨迹实现AI代理的个性化记忆与评测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI代理个性化受限于隐私屏障和缺乏多模态真实轨迹数据，且方法集中于交互层面，忽略了文件系统操作中的密集行为轨迹。
analysis.problem: 如何利用文件系统行为轨迹实现代理的个性化记忆与评测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FileGram框架，包含三个组件：FileGramEngine（可扩展人物驱动数据引擎）、FileGramBench（诊断基准）、FileGramOS（自底向上记忆架构）。
contributions: 提出FileGram框架，将代理记忆和个性化建立在文件系统行为轨迹上。
开源框架以支持未来个性化记忆中心文件系统代理研究。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明FileGramBench对现有记忆系统具有挑战性，且FileGramEngine和FileGramOS有效。
limitations: 可能依赖模拟数据，真实场景泛化性待验证。
记忆架构的扩展性和隐私保护细节未充分说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FileGram框架，利用文件系统行为轨迹实现AI代理的个性化记忆与评测。

papers.title: QED-Nano: Teaching a Tiny Model to Prove Hard Theorems
papers.abstract: Proprietary AI systems have recently demonstrated impressive capabilities on complex proof-based problems, with gold-level performance reported at the 2025 International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO). However, the training pipelines behind these systems remain largely undisclosed, and their reliance on large "internal" models and scaffolds makes them expensive to run, difficult to reproduce, and hard to study or improve upon. This raises a central question: can small, open models also be trained to achieve competitive reasoning performance on difficult Olympiad-level math? In this paper, we answer this question by building QED-Nano, a 4B model post-trained for Olympiad-level proofs. Our training recipe has three stages: (1) supervised fine-tuning to imbue good proof-writing styles by distilling from DeepSeek-Math-V2, (2) reinforcement learning (RL) with rubric-based rewards, and (3) expanding RL with a reasoning cache, which decomposes long proofs into iterative summarize-and-refine cycles and enables stronger test-time reasoning. QED-Nano surpasses the proof-generation performance of much larger open models, including Nomos-1 and GPT-OSS-120B, and approaches the performance of proprietary models like Gemini 3 Pro, at a fraction of the inference cost. To support further research on open mathematical reasoning, we release the full QED-Nano pipeline, including the QED-Nano and QED-Nano-SFT models, the FineProofs-SFT and FineProofs-RL datasets, and the training and evaluation code.

analysis.tldr: 通过三阶段训练（SFT+RL+推理缓存），4B小模型QED-Nano在IMO级定理证明上超越大模型，接近闭源模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 闭源AI系统在复杂证明问题上表现优异，但训练流程不公开、依赖大模型和脚手架导致成本高、难以复现和研究；因此探索小模型能否通过开放训练达到竞赛级推理性能。
analysis.problem: 如何训练一个参数规模小（4B）且完全开源的语言模型，使其在奥林匹克数学定理证明任务上具备与大型闭源模型竞争的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段训练：1) 从DeepSeek-Math-V2蒸馏进行SFT以学习良好证明风格；2) 基于评分规则的强化学习（RL）；3) 引入推理缓存（reasoning cache），将长证明分解为迭代的总结-精炼循环，增强测试时推理能力。
contributions: 提出QED-Nano，一个4B参数的开源模型，在IMO级定理证明上超越更大开源模型并接近闭源模型。
开源完整训练流程，包括模型、数据集（FineProofs-SFT和FineProofs-RL）以及训练和评估代码。
analysis.experiments: 在奥林匹克数学定理证明任务上评估，QED-Nano超越Nomos-1和GPT-OSS-120B等大模型，性能接近Gemini 3 Pro，且推理成本显著降低。
limitations: 模型规模仍为4B，可能无法处理更复杂的数学领域或超长证明。
依赖DeepSeek-Math-V2蒸馏，可能继承其偏见或错误。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过三阶段训练（SFT+RL+推理缓存），4B小模型QED-Nano在IMO级定理证明上超越大模型，接近闭源模型性能。

papers.title: Agentic Federated Learning: The Future of Distributed Training Orchestration
papers.abstract: Although Federated Learning (FL) promises privacy and distributed collaboration, its effectiveness in real-world scenarios is often hampered by the stochastic heterogeneity of clients and unpredictable system dynamics. Existing static optimization approaches fail to adapt to these fluctuations, resulting in resource underutilization and systemic bias. In this work, we propose a paradigm shift towards Agentic-FL, a framework where Language Model-based Agents (LMagents) assume autonomous orchestration roles. Unlike rigid protocols, we demonstrate how server-side agents can mitigate selection bias through contextual reasoning, while client-side agents act as local guardians, dynamically managing privacy budgets and adapting model complexity to hardware constraints. More than just resolving technical inefficiencies, this integration signals the evolution of FL towards decentralized ecosystems, where collaboration is negotiated autonomously, paving the way for future markets of incentive-based models and algorithmic justice. We discuss the reliability (hallucinations) and security challenges of this approach, outlining a roadmap for resilient multi-agent systems in federated environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于语言模型智能体的联邦学习框架Agentic-FL，通过服务器端和客户端智能体自适应解决客户端异质性与系统动态问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习在实际部署中受客户端随机异质性和系统动态波动影响，现有静态优化方法无法适应，导致资源利用不足和系统性偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自适应联邦学习框架以应对客户端异质性和系统动态变化，同时保障隐私和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出客户端随机异质性和系统动态波动是联邦学习实际应用的主要障碍，现有静态方法无法适应。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic-FL框架，服务器端语言模型智能体通过上下文推理缓解选择偏差，客户端智能体动态管理隐私预算并调整模型复杂度以适应硬件约束。
contributions: 提出Agentic-FL范式，将语言模型智能体引入联邦学习实现自主编排。
设计服务器端和客户端智能体分别解决选择偏差和资源自适应问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 语言模型智能体的幻觉问题可能影响决策可靠性。
多智能体系统的安全性和鲁棒性仍需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于语言模型智能体的联邦学习框架Agentic-FL，通过服务器端和客户端智能体自适应解决客户端异质性与系统动态问题。

papers.title: Rethinking Exploration in RLVR: From Entropy Regularization to Refinement via Bidirectional Entropy Modulation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, it faces a fundamental limitation termed \textit{restricted exploration}, where the policy rapidly converges to a narrow set of solutions. While entropy regularization is a popular approach used to sustain exploration, it often proves unreliable for LLMs, suffering from high hyperparameter sensitivity and yielding only marginal performance gains. Motivated by these inefficiencies, we propose to rethink the relationship between policy entropy and exploration. By deriving a parametric formulation of group-relative advantage estimation and analyzing entropy dynamics, we conceptually decompose policy entropy into \textit{informative entropy}, which preserves diverse solution paths, and \textit{spurious entropy}, which erodes reasoning patterns. Our analysis reveals that, in contrast to blind maximization, effective exploration requires \textit{entropy refinement}-a mechanism implicitly embedded in group-relative advantage estimation that sustains informative entropy on positive rollouts while suppressing spurious entropy on negative ones. Guided by this insight, we propose \textbf{AsymGRPO}, an exploratory framework that explicitly decouples the modulation of positive and negative rollouts. This allows for independent control over the preservation of informative entropy and the suppression of spurious noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsymGRPO achieves superior performance compared to strong baselines and exhibits the potential to synergize with existing entropy regularization methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出AsymGRPO框架，通过解耦正负轨迹的熵调制来提升RLVR中的探索效率。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR中策略快速收敛到狭窄解集，熵正则化在LLM中不可靠且超参数敏感，需要更有效的探索机制。
analysis.problem: RLVR中受限探索问题，即策略快速收敛到狭窄解集，现有熵正则化方法效果有限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 将策略熵分解为信息熵（保留多样化解路径）和虚假熵（侵蚀推理模式），发现有效探索需要熵精炼而非盲目最大化。
analysis.method: 提出AsymGRPO框架，显式解耦正负轨迹的熵调制，独立控制信息熵保留和虚假熵抑制。
contributions: 从理论上将策略熵分解为信息熵和虚假熵，揭示有效探索需要熵精炼。
提出AsymGRPO框架，通过解耦正负轨迹的熵调制实现独立控制。
实验证明AsymGRPO优于强基线，并能与现有熵正则化方法协同。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理任务上进行了实验，与强基线对比，AsymGRPO取得更优性能，并能与现有熵正则化方法协同。
limitations: 可能对超参数设置敏感，尽管声称解耦了控制。
未在更大规模模型或更多样化任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AsymGRPO框架，通过解耦正负轨迹的熵调制来提升RLVR中的探索效率。

papers.title: Muon Dynamics as a Spectral Wasserstein Flow
papers.abstract: Gradient normalization stabilizes deep-learning optimization, and spectral normalizations are especially natural for matrix-shaped parameter blocks; Muon is the motivating example. We study an idealized deterministic, continuous-time, vanishing-momentum version of this idea in the mean-field regime, where wide models are represented by probability measures on parameter space. Starting from normalized matrix flows, we introduce Spectral Wasserstein distances indexed by norms $γ$ on positive semidefinite matrices: the trace norm gives classical $W_2$, the operator norm gives the Muon geometry, and Schatten norms interpolate between them. We develop the static Kantorovich formulation, a max-min robust-cost representation, Gaussian reductions extending the Bures formula, and for monotone norms, prove equivalence with a Benamou--Brenier formulation. This yields a gradient-flow interpretation of the mean-field normalized training dynamics. We illustrate these findings by numerical experiments on MMD flows, Gaussian reductions, two-layer ReLU models, and shallow attention.

analysis.tldr: 将Muon优化器中的梯度归一化解释为谱Wasserstein流，建立其平均场梯度流框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 梯度归一化对深度学习优化至关重要，但Muon等谱归一化方法的理论理解不足，缺乏几何视角。
analysis.problem: 为Muon优化器中的谱归一化梯度流提供严格的数学理论框架，揭示其作为谱Wasserstein流的本质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入由正半定矩阵上的范数γ索引的谱Wasserstein距离，建立静态Kantorovich公式、最大最小鲁棒代价表示、高斯约化（推广Bures公式）以及Benamou-Brenier公式的等价性，从而将平均场归一化训练动力学解释为梯度流。
contributions: 定义了谱Wasserstein距离族，统一了经典W_2和Muon几何。
建立了平均场归一化训练动力学的梯度流解释。
analysis.experiments: 在MMD流、高斯约化、两层ReLU模型和浅层注意力上进行了数值实验。
limitations: 理论分析限于理想化的确定性连续时间零动量版本。
实际Muon优化器的离散时间、随机动量等细节未涵盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将Muon优化器中的梯度归一化解释为谱Wasserstein流，建立其平均场梯度流框架。

papers.title: HorizonWeaver: Generalizable Multi-Level Semantic Editing for Driving Scenes
papers.abstract: Ensuring safety in autonomous driving requires scalable generation of realistic, controllable driving scenes beyond what real-world testing provides. Yet existing instruction guided image editors, trained on object-centric or artistic data, struggle with dense, safety-critical driving layouts. We propose HorizonWeaver, which tackles three fundamental challenges in driving scene editing: (1) multi-level granularity, requiring coherent object- and scene-level edits in dense environments; (2) rich high-level semantics, preserving diverse objects while following detailed instructions; and (3) ubiquitous domain shifts, handling changes in climate, layout, and traffic across unseen environments. The core of HorizonWeaver is a set of complementary contributions across data, model, and training: (1) Data: Large-scale dataset generation, where we build a paired real/synthetic dataset from Boreas, nuScenes, and Argoverse2 to improve generalization; (2) Model: Language-Guided Masks for fine-grained editing, where semantics-enriched masks and prompts enable precise, language-guided edits; and (3) Training: Content preservation and instruction alignment, where joint losses enforce scene consistency and instruction fidelity. Together, HorizonWeaver provides a scalable framework for photorealistic, instruction-driven editing of complex driving scenes, collecting 255K images across 13 editing categories and outperforming prior methods in L1, CLIP, and DINO metrics, achieving +46.4% user preference and improving BEV segmentation IoU by +33%. Project page: https://msoroco.github.io/horizonweaver/

analysis.tldr: HorizonWeaver 提出多层级语义编辑框架，通过数据、模型和训练三方面创新，实现自动驾驶场景的可控编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶安全需要可扩展的真实可控场景生成，但现有指令引导图像编辑器在密集、安全关键的驾驶布局中表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 解决驾驶场景编辑中的多层级粒度、丰富高层语义保持和跨域泛化三大挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在密集驾驶场景中难以同时实现对象级和场景级编辑，且对气候、布局等域偏移鲁棒性差。
analysis.method: 构建大规模配对真实/合成数据集，提出语言引导掩码实现细粒度编辑，并通过联合损失保证内容保持和指令对齐。
contributions: 提出 HorizonWeaver 框架，实现驾驶场景的多层级语义编辑。
构建包含 255K 图像、13 类编辑的大规模数据集。
在 L1、CLIP、DINO 指标上超越先前方法，用户偏好提升 46.4%，BEV 分割 IoU 提升 33%。
analysis.experiments: 在 Boreas、nuScenes、Argoverse2 数据集上评估，使用 L1、CLIP、DINO 指标，并进行了用户偏好和 BEV 分割实验。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据质量，真实场景泛化能力需进一步验证。
编辑类别有限，可能无法覆盖所有驾驶场景需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HorizonWeaver 提出多层级语义编辑框架，通过数据、模型和训练三方面创新，实现自动驾驶场景的可控编辑。

papers.title: Learning, Potential, and Retention: An Approach for Evaluating Adaptive AI-Enabled Medical Devices
papers.abstract: This work addresses challenges in evaluating adaptive artificial intelligence (AI) models for medical devices, where iterative updates to both models and evaluation datasets complicate performance assessment. We introduce a novel approach with three complementary measurements: learning (model improvement on current data), potential (dataset-driven performance shifts), and retention (knowledge preservation across modification steps), to disentangle performance changes caused by model adaptations versus dynamic environments. Case studies using simulated population shifts demonstrate the approach's utility: gradual transitions enable stable learning and retention, while rapid shifts reveal trade-offs between plasticity and stability. These measurements provide practical insights for regulatory science, enabling rigorous assessment of the safety and effectiveness of adaptive AI systems over sequential modifications.

analysis.tldr: 提出学习、潜力和保留三个指标，用于评估自适应AI医疗设备在迭代更新中的性能变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 自适应AI医疗设备在迭代更新中，模型和数据集同时变化，传统评估方法难以区分性能变化是由模型适应还是环境动态引起，亟需新的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦自适应AI医疗设备在连续修改过程中，由模型更新和数据集变化共同导致的性能变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过模拟人群转移的案例研究发现：渐进式转移下模型能保持稳定学习和保留，而快速转移则暴露出可塑性与稳定性之间的权衡。
analysis.method: 提出三个互补指标：学习（模型在当前数据上的改进）、潜力（数据集驱动的性能变化）、保留（跨修改步骤的知识保留），以分离模型适应和环境动态的影响。
contributions: 提出一种新的评估框架，包含学习、潜力和保留三个指标，用于自适应AI医疗设备的性能评估。
通过模拟人群转移案例验证了该方法的有效性，揭示了不同转移速度下的性能权衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及使用模拟人群转移的案例研究。
limitations: 仅通过模拟数据验证，缺乏真实医疗设备数据或临床场景的评估。
未讨论指标计算的具体实现细节或计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出学习、潜力和保留三个指标，用于评估自适应AI医疗设备在迭代更新中的性能变化。

papers.title: Incompleteness of AI Safety Verification via Kolmogorov Complexity
papers.abstract: Ensuring that artificial intelligence (AI) systems satisfy formal safety and policy constraints is a central challenge in safety-critical domains. While limitations of verification are often attributed to combinatorial complexity and model expressiveness, we show that they arise from intrinsic information-theoretic limits. We formalize policy compliance as a verification problem over encoded system behaviors and analyze it using Kolmogorov complexity. We prove an incompleteness result: for any fixed sound computably enumerable verifier, there exists a threshold beyond which true policy-compliant instances cannot be certified once their complexity exceeds that threshold. Consequently, no finite formal verifier can certify all policy-compliant instances of arbitrarily high complexity. This reveals a fundamental limitation of AI safety verification independent of computational resources, and motivates proof-carrying approaches that provide instance-level correctness guarantees.

analysis.tldr: AI安全验证存在基于Kolmogorov复杂度的不完备性，任何有限形式验证器都无法认证所有高复杂度合规实例。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统在安全关键领域需要满足形式化安全约束，但现有验证方法受限于组合复杂性和模型表达能力，需要探索更根本的限制。
analysis.problem: 证明AI安全验证存在内在的信息论极限，即任何固定的可计算枚举验证器都无法认证所有复杂度超过某阈值的策略合规实例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论分析表明验证不完备性源于信息论极限而非计算资源。
analysis.method: 使用Kolmogorov复杂度将策略合规性形式化为编码系统行为的验证问题，并证明不完备性定理。
contributions: 证明了AI安全验证存在基于Kolmogorov复杂度的不完备性结果
揭示了独立于计算资源的根本限制，并激励了提供实例级正确性保证的证明携带方法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能不直接适用于实际验证系统
未讨论如何在实际中实现证明携带方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI安全验证存在基于Kolmogorov复杂度的不完备性，任何有限形式验证器都无法认证所有高复杂度合规实例。

papers.title: DIRECT: Video Mashup Creation via Hierarchical Multi-Agent Planning and Intent-Guided Editing
papers.abstract: Video mashup creation represents a complex video editing paradigm that recomposes existing footage to craft engaging audio-visual experiences, demanding intricate orchestration across semantic, visual, and auditory dimensions and multiple levels. However, existing automated editing frameworks often overlook the cross-level multimodal orchestration to achieve professional-grade fluidity, resulting in disjointed sequences with abrupt visual transitions and musical misalignment. To address this, we formulate video mashup creation as a Multimodal Coherency Satisfaction Problem (MMCSP) and propose the DIRECT framework. Simulating a professional production pipeline, our hierarchical multi-agent framework decomposes the challenge into three cascade levels: the Screenwriter for source-aware global structural anchoring, the Director for instantiating adaptive editing intent and guidance, and the Editor for intent-guided shot sequence editing with fine-grained optimization. We further introduce Mashup-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark with tailored metrics for visual continuity and auditory alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DIRECT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both objective metrics and human subjective evaluation. Project page and code: https://github.com/AK-DREAM/DIRECT

analysis.tldr: 提出分层多智能体框架DIRECT，将视频混剪创建建模为多模态一致性满足问题，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动化视频编辑框架缺乏跨层次的多模态编排能力，导致生成序列存在视觉突变和音乐错位，无法达到专业级流畅度。
analysis.problem: 如何实现视频混剪中语义、视觉和听觉维度的跨层次协调，以生成连贯且音画对齐的专业级视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法生成的视频序列存在不连贯的视觉过渡和音乐对齐问题，缺乏跨层次的多模态编排。
analysis.method: 提出DIRECT框架，将视频混剪创建建模为多模态一致性满足问题（MMCSP），采用分层多智能体架构：编剧（Screenwriter）负责全局结构锚定，导演（Director）实例化自适应编辑意图和指导，编辑（Editor）进行意图引导的镜头序列编辑与细粒度优化。
contributions: 将视频混剪创建形式化为多模态一致性满足问题（MMCSP）
提出分层多智能体框架DIRECT，模拟专业制作流水线
构建Mashup-Bench基准，包含视觉连续性和听觉对齐的定制指标
analysis.experiments: 在Mashup-Bench上进行了大量实验，DIRECT在客观指标和人类主观评价上均显著优于最先进基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量源素材，对低质量输入效果有限
多智能体协作可能带来计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层多智能体框架DIRECT，将视频混剪创建建模为多模态一致性满足问题，显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: Free-Range Gaussians: Non-Grid-Aligned Generative 3D Gaussian Reconstruction
papers.abstract: We present Free-Range Gaussians, a multi-view reconstruction method that predicts non-pixel, non-voxel-aligned 3D Gaussians from as few as four images. This is done through flow matching over Gaussian parameters. Our generative formulation of reconstruction allows the model to be supervised with non-grid-aligned 3D data, and enables it to synthesize plausible content in unobserved regions. Thus, it improves on prior methods that produce highly redundant grid-aligned Gaussians, and suffer from holes or blurry conditional means in unobserved regions. To handle the number of Gaussians needed for high-quality results, we introduce a hierarchical patching scheme to group spatially related Gaussians into joint transformer tokens, halving the sequence length while preserving structure. We further propose a timestep-weighted rendering loss during training, and photometric gradient guidance and classifier-free guidance at inference to improve fidelity. Experiments on Objaverse and Google Scanned Objects show consistent improvements over pixel and voxel-aligned methods while using significantly fewer Gaussians, with large gains when input views leave parts of the object unobserved.

analysis.tldr: 提出Free-Range Gaussians，通过流匹配从少量图像生成非网格对齐的3D高斯，减少冗余并改善未观测区域的生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法生成高度冗余的网格对齐高斯，且在未观测区域出现空洞或模糊，需要更高效、生成式的3D重建方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量多视图图像生成非网格对齐的3D高斯，并处理未观测区域的生成和序列长度问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 网格对齐高斯产生冗余，未观测区域出现空洞或模糊；非网格对齐高斯可减少冗余并生成合理内容。
analysis.method: 基于流匹配预测高斯参数，引入分层分块方案将空间相关高斯分组为联合transformer token，训练时使用时间步加权渲染损失，推理时使用光度梯度引导和无分类器引导。
contributions: 提出非网格对齐的生成式3D高斯重建方法，从少量图像预测高斯参数。
引入分层分块方案减少序列长度，以及时间步加权渲染损失和推理引导策略提升保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在Objaverse和Google Scanned Objects数据集上，与像素/体素对齐方法相比，使用更少高斯数取得一致改进，尤其在输入视图未覆盖部分时提升显著。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量多视图输入，极端稀疏视图下效果未知。
分层分块方案可能引入额外超参数调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Free-Range Gaussians，通过流匹配从少量图像生成非网格对齐的3D高斯，减少冗余并改善未观测区域的生成质量。

papers.title: Noise Immunity in In-Context Tabular Learning: An Empirical Robustness Analysis of TabPFN's Attention Mechanisms
papers.abstract: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) such as TabPFN (Tabular Prior-Data Fitted Network) are designed to generalize across heterogeneous tabular datasets through in-context learning (ICL). They perform prediction in a single forward pass conditioned on labeled examples without dataset-specific parameter updates. This paradigm is particularly attractive in industrial domains (e.g., finance and healthcare) where tabular prediction is pervasive. Retraining a bespoke model for each new table can be costly or infeasible in these settings, while data quality issues such as irrelevant predictors, correlated feature groups, and label noise are common. In this paper, we provide strong empirical evidence that TabPFN is highly robust under these sub-optimal conditions. We study TabPFN and its attention mechanisms for binary classification problems with controlled synthetic perturbations that vary: (i) dataset width by injecting random uncorrelated features and by introducing nonlinearly correlated features, (ii) dataset size by increasing the number of training rows, and (iii) label quality by increasing the fraction of mislabeled targets. Beyond predictive performance, we analyze internal signals including attention concentration and attention-based feature ranking metrics. Across these parametric tests, TabPFN is remarkably resilient: ROC-AUC remains high, attention stays structured and sharp, and informative features are highly ranked by attention-based metrics. Qualitative visualizations with attention heatmaps, feature-token embeddings, and SHAP plots further support a consistent pattern across layers in which TabPFN increasingly concentrates on useful features while separating their signals from noise. Together, these findings suggest that TabPFN is a robust TFM capable of maintaining both predictive performance and coherent internal behavior under various scenarios of data imperfections.

analysis.tldr: TabPFN在表格数据噪声条件下表现出强鲁棒性，注意力机制能有效聚焦有用特征。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业场景中表格数据预测普遍，但数据质量问题（无关特征、标签噪声等）常见，重新训练模型成本高，亟需鲁棒的预训练模型。
analysis.problem: 评估TabPFN在表格分类任务中面对无关特征、相关特征组、标签噪声等数据不完美情况下的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TabPFN在噪声注入下ROC-AUC保持高值，注意力结构保持清晰，基于注意力的特征排序能有效识别有用特征。
analysis.method: 通过控制合成扰动（注入随机无关特征、非线性相关特征、增加训练行数、增加错误标签比例）进行二元分类实验，分析预测性能及注意力集中度、特征排序等内部信号。
contributions: 系统实证了TabPFN在多种数据不完美条件下的强鲁棒性
揭示了注意力机制在噪声环境下保持结构化并聚焦有用特征的行为模式
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据上进行了宽度、大小、标签质量三类扰动实验，使用ROC-AUC、注意力集中度、特征排序指标，并辅以注意力热图、特征token嵌入和SHAP可视化。
limitations: 仅针对二元分类问题，未涉及多分类或回归
合成扰动可能无法完全模拟真实数据噪声的复杂性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TabPFN在表格数据噪声条件下表现出强鲁棒性，注意力机制能有效聚焦有用特征。

papers.title: Beyond the Global Scores: Fine-Grained Token Grounding as a Robust Detector of LVLM Hallucinations
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on visual reasoning tasks but remain highly susceptible to hallucination. Existing detection methods predominantly rely on coarse, whole-image measures of how an object token relates to the input image. This global strategy is limited: hallucinated tokens may exhibit weak but widely scattered correlations across many local regions, which aggregate into deceptively high overall relevance, thus evading the current global hallucination detectors. We begin with a simple yet critical observation: a faithful object token must be strongly grounded in a specific image region. Building on this insight, we introduce a patch-level hallucination detection framework that examines fine-grained token-level interactions across model layers. Our analysis uncovers two characteristic signatures of hallucinated tokens: (i) they yield diffuse, non-localized attention patterns, in contrast to the compact, well-focused attention seen in faithful tokens; and (ii) they fail to exhibit meaningful semantic alignment with any visual region. Guided by these findings, we develop a lightweight and interpretable detection method that leverages patch-level statistical features, combined with hidden-layer representations. Our approach achieves up to 90% accuracy in token-level hallucination detection, demonstrating the superiority of fine-grained structural analysis for detecting hallucinations.

analysis.tldr: 通过细粒度token接地分析检测LVLM幻觉，提出基于补丁级统计特征和隐藏层表示的轻量检测方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LVLM幻觉检测方法依赖粗粒度的全局图像相关性度量，无法捕捉幻觉token在局部区域弥散但整体相关性高的模式，导致漏检。
analysis.problem: 如何准确检测LVLM中幻觉token，克服全局检测方法的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 幻觉token表现出两种特征：注意力模式弥散而非聚焦，且与任何视觉区域缺乏有意义的语义对齐。
analysis.method: 提出补丁级幻觉检测框架，利用跨层的细粒度token交互，提取补丁级统计特征和隐藏层表示进行检测。
contributions: 揭示幻觉token的弥散注意力和缺乏语义对齐两种特征
提出轻量、可解释的补丁级幻觉检测方法，达到90% token级检测准确率
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构
未讨论对多轮对话或长视频的适用性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过细粒度token接地分析检测LVLM幻觉，提出基于补丁级统计特征和隐藏层表示的轻量检测方法。

papers.title: Unified Vector Floorplan Generation via Markup Representation
papers.abstract: Automatic residential floorplan generation has long been a central challenge bridging architecture and computer graphics, aiming to make spatial design more efficient and accessible. While early methods based on constraint satisfaction or combinatorial optimization ensure feasibility, they lack diversity and flexibility. Recent generative models achieve promising results but struggle to generalize across heterogeneous conditional tasks, such as generation from site boundaries, room adjacency graphs, or partial layouts, due to their suboptimal representations. To address this gap, we introduce Floorplan Markup Language (FML), a general representation that encodes floorplan information within a single structured grammar, which casts the entire floorplan generation problem into a next token prediction task. Leveraging FML, we develop a transformer-based generative model, FMLM, capable of producing high-fidelity and functional floorplans under diverse conditions. Comprehensive experiments on the RPLAN dataset demonstrate that FMLM, despite being a single model, surpasses the previous task-specific state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种统一的矢量户型图生成方法，通过标记语言将多种条件生成任务统一为下一个标记预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动户型图生成是建筑与计算机图形学的核心挑战，早期方法缺乏多样性和灵活性，现有生成模型因表示方式不佳难以泛化到异构条件任务。
analysis.problem: 现有户型图生成方法无法在单一模型下统一处理多种条件（如地块边界、房间邻接图、部分布局）的生成任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出户型图标记语言（FML），将户型信息编码为结构化语法，将生成问题转化为下一个标记预测任务，并基于Transformer构建FMLM模型。
contributions: 提出FML，一种统一的户型图表示方法，支持多种条件生成。
开发FMLM，一个基于Transformer的生成模型，在RPLAN数据集上超越任务特定方法。
analysis.experiments: 在RPLAN数据集上进行综合实验，FMLM作为单一模型超越了之前任务特定的最先进方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于住宅户型图，未验证其他建筑类型。
依赖RPLAN数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种统一的矢量户型图生成方法，通过标记语言将多种条件生成任务统一为下一个标记预测。

papers.title: The Blind Spot of Adaptation: Quantifying and Mitigating Forgetting in Fine-tuned Driving Models
papers.abstract: The integration of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) into autonomous driving promises to solve long-tail scenarios, but this paradigm faces the critical and unaddressed challenge of catastrophic forgetting. The very fine-tuning process used to adapt these models to driving-specific data simultaneously erodes their invaluable pre-trained world knowledge, creating a self-defeating paradox that undermines the core reason for their use. This paper provides the first systematic investigation into this phenomenon. We introduce a new large-scale dataset of 180K scenes, which enables the first-ever benchmark specifically designed to quantify catastrophic forgetting in autonomous driving. Our analysis reveals that existing methods suffer from significant knowledge degradation. To address this, we propose the Drive Expert Adapter (DEA), a novel framework that circumvents this trade-off by shifting adaptation from the weight space to the prompt space. DEA dynamically routes inference through different knowledge experts based on scene-specific cues, enhancing driving-task performance without corrupting the model's foundational parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach not only achieves state-of-the-art results on driving tasks but also effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting, preserving the essential generalization capabilities that make VLMs a transformative force for autonomous systems. Data and model are released at FidelityDrivingBench.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统研究自动驾驶VLM微调中的灾难性遗忘，提出Drive Expert Adapter通过提示空间适应缓解遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 将VLM集成到自动驾驶中可解决长尾场景，但微调过程会破坏其预训练的通用世界知识，形成自我矛盾的困境，这一问题尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 自动驾驶VLM微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，即适应驾驶任务时丢失预训练知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有微调方法在适应驾驶数据时，模型预训练的世界知识显著退化，导致性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出Drive Expert Adapter (DEA)，将适应从权重空间转移到提示空间，通过场景特定线索动态路由推理到不同知识专家，避免修改基础参数。
contributions: 首次系统研究自动驾驶VLM微调中的灾难性遗忘现象。
构建包含18万场景的大规模数据集和首个量化遗忘的基准。
提出DEA框架，在不破坏基础参数的前提下提升驾驶任务性能并缓解遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在驾驶任务上达到SOTA结果，并有效缓解灾难性遗忘，保持泛化能力。数据与模型已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖场景特定线索的质量和多样性。
提示空间适应可能增加推理复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统研究自动驾驶VLM微调中的灾难性遗忘，提出Drive Expert Adapter通过提示空间适应缓解遗忘。

papers.title: MemMachine: A Ground-Truth-Preserving Memory System for Personalized AI Agents
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents require persistent memory to maintain personalization, factual continuity, and long-horizon reasoning, yet standard context-window and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines degrade over multi-session interactions. We present MemMachine, an open-source memory system that integrates short-term, long-term episodic, and profile memory within a ground-truth-preserving architecture that stores entire conversational episodes and reduces lossy LLM-based extraction. MemMachine uses contextualized retrieval that expands nucleus matches with surrounding context, improving recall when relevant evidence spans multiple dialogue turns. Across benchmarks, MemMachine achieves strong accuracy-efficiency tradeoffs: on LoCoMo it reaches 0.9169 using gpt4.1-mini; on LongMemEvalS (ICLR 2025), a six-dimension ablation yields 93.0 percent accuracy, with retrieval-stage optimizations -- retrieval depth tuning (+4.2 percent), context formatting (+2.0 percent), search prompt design (+1.8 percent), and query bias correction (+1.4 percent) -- outperforming ingestion-stage gains such as sentence chunking (+0.8 percent). GPT-5-mini exceeds GPT-5 by 2.6 percent when paired with optimized prompts, making it the most cost-efficient setup. Compared to Mem0, MemMachine uses roughly 80 percent fewer input tokens under matched conditions. A companion Retrieval Agent adaptively routes queries among direct retrieval, parallel decomposition, or iterative chain-of-query strategies, achieving 93.2 percent on HotpotQA-hard and 92.6 percent on WikiMultiHop under randomized-noise conditions. These results show that preserving episodic ground truth while layering adaptive retrieval yields robust, efficient long-term memory for personalized LLM agents.

analysis.tldr: MemMachine 是一个开源记忆系统，通过保留完整对话片段和自适应检索，在个性化 AI 代理中实现高精度与高效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 代理的上下文窗口和 RAG 管道在多轮交互中会退化，无法维持个性化、事实连续性和长程推理，需要更可靠的记忆系统。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能保留对话真实信息又能高效检索的长时记忆系统，以支持个性化 AI 代理的持久交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检索阶段优化（如深度调优、上下文格式化）比摄入阶段优化（如句子分块）带来更大精度提升；GPT-5-mini 配合优化提示可超越 GPT-5。
analysis.method: MemMachine 结合短期、长期情景和档案记忆，采用保留完整对话片段的真实保持架构，并使用上下文检索（扩展核心匹配的周围上下文）以及自适应检索代理（直接检索、并行分解、迭代链式查询）。
contributions: 提出一种真实保持的记忆系统，存储完整对话片段以减少有损提取。
设计上下文检索和自适应检索代理，显著提升多轮交互中的召回率和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在 LoCoMo 上达到 0.9169 准确率（使用 gpt4.1-mini）；在 LongMemEvalS 上六维消融实验达到 93.0% 准确率，检索阶段优化带来显著提升；与 Mem0 相比，输入 token 减少约 80%；在 HotpotQA-hard 和 WikiMultiHop 上分别达到 93.2% 和 92.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定 LLM 后端，泛化性需进一步验证。
自适应检索策略的复杂度可能增加延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MemMachine 是一个开源记忆系统，通过保留完整对话片段和自适应检索，在个性化 AI 代理中实现高精度与高效率。

papers.title: Strengthening Human-Centric Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Integrity in LLMs via a Structured Prompt Framework
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has been used to enhance the reasoning capability of LLMs. However, its reliability in security-sensitive analytical tasks remains insufficiently examined, particularly under structured human evaluation. Alternative approaches, such as model scaling and fine-tuning can be used to help improve performance. These methods are also often costly, computationally intensive, or difficult to audit. In contrast, prompt engineering provides a lightweight, transparent, and controllable mechanism for guiding LLM reasoning. This study proposes a structured prompt engineering framework designed to strengthen CoT reasoning integrity while improving security threat and attack detection reliability in local LLM deployments. The framework includes 16 factors grouped into four core dimensions: (1) Context and Scope Control, (2) Evidence Grounding and Traceability, (3) Reasoning Structure and Cognitive Control, and (4) Security-Specific Analytical Constraints. Rather than optimizing the wording of the prompt heuristically, the framework introduces explicit reasoning controls to mitigate hallucination and prevent reasoning drift, as well as strengthening interpretability in security-sensitive contexts. Using DDoS attack detection in SDN traffic as a case study, multiple model families were evaluated under structured and unstructured prompting conditions. Pareto frontier analysis and ablation experiments demonstrate consistent reasoning improvements (up to 40% in smaller models) and stable accuracy gains across scales. Human evaluation with strong inter-rater agreement (Cohen's k > 0.80) confirms robustness. The results establish structured prompting as an effective and practical approach for reliable and explainable AI-driven cybersecurity analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化提示框架，通过显式推理控制增强LLM在安全敏感任务中的CoT推理完整性，在DDoS检测任务中提升小模型推理性能达40%。
analysis.research_motivation: CoT提示在安全敏感分析任务中的可靠性尚未充分检验，而模型缩放和微调等方法成本高、计算密集且难以审计，提示工程提供了一种轻量、透明、可控的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何通过结构化提示工程增强LLM在安全敏感任务中的CoT推理完整性，减少幻觉和推理漂移，提高可解释性和检测可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出现有CoT提示在安全敏感任务中可靠性不足，且模型缩放和微调方法存在成本与可审计性问题。
analysis.method: 提出包含16个因素、四个核心维度的结构化提示框架：上下文与范围控制、证据基础与可追溯性、推理结构与认知控制、安全特定分析约束，通过显式推理控制而非启发式措辞优化来增强CoT推理。
contributions: 提出一个结构化提示工程框架，包含四个维度16个因素，用于增强LLM在安全敏感任务中的CoT推理完整性。
通过SDN中DDoS检测案例，在多个模型家族上验证了框架的有效性，小模型推理性能提升达40%，且人类评估一致性高（Cohen's k > 0.80）。
analysis.experiments: 以SDN流量中的DDoS攻击检测为案例，评估多个模型家族在结构化和非结构化提示条件下的表现，进行了帕累托前沿分析和消融实验，并进行了人类评估（Cohen's k > 0.80）。
limitations: 仅以DDoS检测为案例，泛化性需在其他安全任务中验证。
框架包含16个因素，实际应用时可能需要针对特定任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化提示框架，通过显式推理控制增强LLM在安全敏感任务中的CoT推理完整性，在DDoS检测任务中提升小模型推理性能达40%。

papers.title: InfBaGel: Human-Object-Scene Interaction Generation with Dynamic Perception and Iterative Refinement
papers.abstract: Human-object-scene interactions (HOSI) generation has broad applications in embodied AI, simulation, and animation. Unlike human-object interaction (HOI) and human-scene interaction (HSI), HOSI generation requires reasoning over dynamic object-scene changes, yet suffers from limited annotated data. To address these issues, we propose a coarse-to-fine instruction-conditioned interaction generation framework that is explicitly aligned with the iterative denoising process of a consistency model. In particular, we adopt a dynamic perception strategy that leverages trajectories from the preceding refinement to update scene context and condition subsequent refinement at each denoising step of consistency model, yielding consistent interactions. To further reduce physical artifacts, we introduce a bump-aware guidance that mitigates collisions and penetrations during sampling without requiring fine-grained scene geometry, enabling real-time generation. To overcome data scarcity, we design a hybrid training startegy that synthesizes pseudo-HOSI samples by injecting voxelized scene occupancy into HOI datasets and jointly trains with high-fidelity HSI data, allowing interaction learning while preserving realistic scene awareness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both HOSI and HOI generation, and strong generalization to unseen scenes. Project page: https://yudezou.github.io/InfBaGel-page/

analysis.tldr: 提出粗到细的指令驱动人-物-场景交互生成框架，结合动态感知与碰撞引导，实现一致且无穿透的交互生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 人-物-场景交互生成在具身AI、仿真和动画中应用广泛，但现有方法难以处理动态物体-场景变化，且标注数据稀缺。
analysis.problem: 如何生成与动态场景变化一致、无物理穿透的人-物-场景交互，并克服数据不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
