analysis.method: 粗到细的指令条件交互生成框架，与一致性模型的迭代去噪过程对齐；采用动态感知策略利用前一步轨迹更新场景上下文；引入碰撞感知引导减少采样中的碰撞和穿透；设计混合训练策略，通过将体素化场景占用注入HOI数据集合成伪HOSI样本，并与高保真HSI数据联合训练。
contributions: 提出粗到细的指令条件交互生成框架，与一致性模型迭代去噪过程对齐。
提出动态感知策略和碰撞感知引导，实现一致且无物理穿透的交互生成。
设计混合训练策略，利用伪HOSI样本和高保真HSI数据克服数据稀缺。
analysis.experiments: 在HOSI和HOI生成任务上达到最先进性能，并展示对未见场景的强泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的物体轨迹或场景几何信息。
混合训练策略中伪样本的质量可能影响最终性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出粗到细的指令驱动人-物-场景交互生成框架，结合动态感知与碰撞引导，实现一致且无穿透的交互生成。

papers.title: Less Detail, Better Answers: Degradation-Driven Prompting for VQA
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly pushed the boundaries of Visual Question Answering (VQA).However,high-resolution details can sometimes become noise that leads to hallucinations or reasoning errors. In this paper,we propose Degradation-Driven Prompting (DDP), a novel framework that improves VQA performance by strategically reducing image fidelity to force models to focus on essential structural information. We evaluate DDP across two distinct tasks. Physical attributes targets images prone to human misjudgment, where DDP employs a combination of 80p downsampling, structural visual aids (white background masks and orthometric lines), and In-Context Learning (ICL) to calibrate the model's focus. Perceptual phenomena addresses various machine-susceptible visual anomalies and illusions, including Visual Anomaly (VA), Color (CI), Motion(MI),Gestalt (GI), Geometric (GSI), and Visual Illusions (VI).For this task, DDP integrates a task-classification stage with specialized tools such as blur masks and contrast enhancement alongside downsampling. Our experimental results demonstrate that less is more: by intentionally degrading visual inputs and providing targeted structural prompts, DDP enables VLMs to bypass distracting textures and achieve superior reasoning accuracy on challenging visual benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 通过主动降低图像分辨率并添加结构提示，让VLM聚焦关键信息，提升VQA准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率图像细节可能引入噪声，导致VLM产生幻觉或推理错误，需要一种方法强制模型关注本质结构。
analysis.problem: 如何通过减少图像保真度来提升VLM在VQA任务中的推理准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高分辨率细节可能成为噪声，导致幻觉或推理错误；降低图像质量可迫使模型关注结构信息。
analysis.method: 提出Degradation-Driven Prompting (DDP)框架，结合下采样、结构视觉辅助（如白背景掩码、正交线）、任务分类阶段及专用工具（如模糊掩码、对比度增强）和上下文学习。
contributions: 提出DDP框架，通过策略性降低图像保真度提升VQA性能。
在物理属性和感知现象两类任务上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在物理属性（人类易误判图像）和感知现象（视觉异常、颜色错觉等六类）任务上评估，结果显示DDP能提升推理准确率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定下采样参数和工具选择，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论对高分辨率细节重要任务（如细粒度识别）的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过主动降低图像分辨率并添加结构提示，让VLM聚焦关键信息，提升VQA准确率。

papers.title: Scaling Coding Agents via Atomic Skills
papers.abstract: Current LLM coding agents are predominantly trained on composite benchmarks (e.g., bug fixing), which often leads to task-specific overfitting and limited generalization. To address this, we propose a novel scaling paradigm that shifts the focus from task-level optimization to atomic skill mastery. We first formalize five fundamental atomic skills, code localization, code editing, unit-test generation, issue reproduction, and code review, that serve as the basis vectors for complex software engineering tasks. Compared with composite coding tasks, these atomic skills are more generalizable and composable. Then, we scale coding agents by performing joint RL over atomic skills. In this manner, atomic skills are consistently improved without negative interference or trade-offs between them. Notably, we observe that improvements in these atomic skills generalize well to other unseen composite coding tasks, such as bug-fixing, code refactoring, machine learning engineering, and code security. The observation motivates a new scaling paradigm for coding agents by training with atomic skills. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed paradigm. Notably, our joint RL improves average performance by 18.7% on 5 atomic skills and 5 composite tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出通过原子技能联合强化学习来扩展代码智能体，避免复合基准过拟合，提升泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM代码智能体主要在复合基准上训练，导致任务特定过拟合和泛化能力有限，需要更通用的训练范式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可扩展的训练范式，使代码智能体掌握可泛化的基本技能，而非过度适应特定复合任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到原子技能的改进能泛化到未见过的复合任务，如bug修复、代码重构等，表明原子技能是复合任务的基向量。
analysis.method: 形式化五种原子技能（代码定位、编辑、单元测试生成、问题复现、代码审查），并通过联合强化学习同时优化这些技能。
contributions: 提出原子技能形式化框架，作为复杂软件工程任务的基础向量。
验证联合RL训练原子技能可避免负干扰，并提升复合任务泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在5个原子技能和5个复合任务上，联合RL平均性能提升18.7%。
limitations: 原子技能的定义可能不完整，未覆盖所有软件工程任务。
实验仅在有限任务上验证，大规模泛化性待进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通过原子技能联合强化学习来扩展代码智能体，避免复合基准过拟合，提升泛化能力。

papers.title: E-VLA: Event-Augmented Vision-Language-Action Model for Dark and Blurred Scenes
papers.abstract: Robotic Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models generalize well for open-ended manipulation, but their perception is fragile under sensing-stage degradations such as extreme low light, motion blur, and black clipping. We present E-VLA, an event-augmented VLA framework that improves manipulation robustness when conventional frame-based vision becomes unreliable. Instead of reconstructing images from events, E-VLA directly leverages motion and structural cues in event streams to preserve semantic perception and perception-action consistency under adverse conditions. We build an open-source teleoperation platform with a DAVIS346 event camera and collect a real-world synchronized RGB-event-action manipulation dataset across diverse tasks and illumination settings. We also propose lightweight, pretrained-compatible event integration strategies and study event windowing and fusion for stable deployment. Experiments show that even a simple parameter-free fusion, i.e., overlaying accumulated event maps onto RGB images, could substantially improve robustness in dark and blur-heavy scenes: on Pick-Place at 20 lux, success increases from 0% (image-only) to 60% with overlay fusion and to 90% with our event adapter; under severe motion blur (1000 ms exposure), Pick-Place improves from 0% to 20-25%, and Sorting from 5% to 32.5%. Overall, E-VLA provides systematic evidence that event-driven perception can be effectively integrated into VLA models, pointing toward robust embodied intelligence beyond conventional frame-based imaging. Code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/JJayzee/E-VLA.

analysis.tldr: E-VLA通过引入事件相机数据增强VLA模型在暗光和模糊场景下的操作鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统基于帧的视觉在极端低光、运动模糊等退化条件下不可靠，而事件相机能提供运动与结构线索，但如何有效融入VLA模型尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 解决VLA模型在暗光和模糊场景下感知脆弱、操作成功率低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在20 lux照度下，纯图像VLA的Pick-Place成功率为0%，而事件融合可提升至60-90%；严重运动模糊下，Pick-Place从0%提升至20-25%，Sorting从5%提升至32.5%。
analysis.method: 提出事件增强VLA框架，直接利用事件流中的运动与结构线索，设计轻量级、预训练兼容的事件集成策略（如叠加累积事件图、事件适配器），并研究事件窗口与融合方式。
contributions: 提出E-VLA框架，首次系统地将事件驱动感知集成到VLA模型中，提升暗光和模糊场景鲁棒性。
构建开源遥操作平台并收集真实世界RGB-事件-动作数据集，涵盖多种任务和光照条件。
实验证明简单无参数融合（叠加事件图）即可显著提升性能，事件适配器进一步改善。
analysis.experiments: 在真实机器人操作任务（Pick-Place, Sorting）上评估，对比不同光照和模糊条件，报告成功率提升。
limitations: 事件相机硬件成本较高，可能限制大规模部署。
方法在极端模糊下仍有提升空间（如Pick-Place仅20-25%）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: E-VLA通过引入事件相机数据增强VLA模型在暗光和模糊场景下的操作鲁棒性。

papers.title: CreativityBench: Evaluating Agent Creative Reasoning via Affordance-Based Tool Repurposing
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models have led to strong performance on reasoning and environment-interaction tasks, yet their ability for creative problem-solving remains underexplored. We study this capability through the lens of creative tool use, where a model repurposes available objects by reasoning about their affordances and attributes rather than relying on canonical usage. As a first step, we introduce CreativityBench, a benchmark for evaluating affordance-based creativity in LLMs. To this end, we build a large-scale affordance knowledge base (KB) with 4K entities and 150K+ affordance annotations, explicitly linking objects, parts, attributes, and actionable uses. Building on this KB, we generate 14K grounded tasks that require identifying non-obvious yet physically plausible solutions under constraints. Evaluations across 10 state-of-the-art LLMs, including closed and open-source models, show that models can often select a plausible object, but fail to identify the correct parts, their affordances, and the underlying physical mechanism needed to solve the task, leading to a significant drop in performance. Furthermore, improvements from model scaling quickly saturate, strong general reasoning does not reliably translate to creative affordance discovery, and common inference-time strategies such as Chain-of-Thought yield limited gains. These results suggest that creative tool use remains a major challenge for current models, and that CreativityBench provides a useful testbed for studying this missing dimension of intelligence, with potential implications for planning and reasoning modules in future agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出CreativityBench基准，评估LLM通过功能属性推理进行创造性工具使用的能力，发现现有模型在识别部件、功能及物理机制方面存在显著不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在推理和交互任务上表现优异，但其创造性问题解决能力尚未被充分探索，尤其是通过功能属性推理实现非标准工具使用的创造力。
analysis.problem: 评估和提升LLM在基于功能属性的创造性工具使用中的表现，即模型能否通过推理物体的非标准用途来解决约束下的任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型能选择合理物体，但无法识别正确部件、其功能及所需物理机制；模型扩展带来的提升迅速饱和；强通用推理能力不能可靠迁移到创造性功能发现；链式思维等推理策略收益有限。
analysis.method: 构建大规模功能属性知识库（4K实体、150K+注释），并基于此生成14K个需要非明显但物理可行解决方案的约束任务，形成CreativityBench基准。
contributions: 提出CreativityBench基准，用于评估LLM的基于功能属性的创造性工具使用能力。
构建大规模功能属性知识库，包含4K实体和150K+注释。
通过10个SOTA LLM的评估，揭示当前模型在创造性工具使用上的关键失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在10个SOTA LLM（包括闭源和开源模型）上评估，结果显示模型在部件识别、功能推理和物理机制理解上表现不佳。
limitations: 基准任务可能无法覆盖所有创造性场景。
知识库的构建可能引入标注偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CreativityBench基准，评估LLM通过功能属性推理进行创造性工具使用的能力，发现现有模型在识别部件、功能及物理机制方面存在显著不足。

papers.title: SALLIE: Safeguarding Against Latent Language & Image Exploits
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) remain highly vulnerable to textual and visual jailbreaks, as well as prompt injections (arXiv:2307.15043, Greshake et al., 2023, arXiv:2306.13213). Existing defenses often degrade performance through complex input transformations or treat multimodal threats as isolated problems (arXiv:2309.00614, arXiv:2310.03684, Zhang et al., 2025). To address the critical gap for a unified, modal-agnostic defense that mitigates both textual and visual threats simultaneously without degrading performance or requiring architectural modifications, we introduce SALLIE (Safeguarding Against Latent Language & Image Exploits), a lightweight runtime detection framework rooted in mechanistic interpretability (Lindsey et al., 2025, Ameisen et al., 2025). By integrating seamlessly into standard token-level fusion pipelines (arXiv:2306.13549), SALLIE extracts robust signals directly from the model's internal activations. At inference, SALLIE defends via a three-stage architecture: (1) extracting internal residual stream activations, (2) calculating layer-wise maliciousness scores using a K-Nearest Neighbors (k-NN) classifier, and (3) aggregating these predictions via a layer ensemble module. We evaluate SALLIE on compact, open-source architectures - Phi-3.5-vision-instruct (arXiv:2404.14219), SmolVLM2-2.2B-Instruct (arXiv:2504.05299), and gemma-3-4b-it (arXiv:2503.19786) - prioritized for practical inference times and real-world deployment costs. Our comprehensive evaluation pipeline spans over ten datasets and more than five strong baseline methods from the literature, and SALLIE consistently outperforms these baselines across a wide range of experimental settings.

analysis.tldr: SALLIE 是一个轻量级运行时检测框架，通过机械可解释性从模型内部激活中提取信号，统一防御文本和视觉越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有防御方法要么通过复杂输入变换降低性能，要么将多模态威胁视为孤立问题，缺乏统一、模态无关的轻量级防御方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不降低性能或修改架构的前提下，同时检测和防御针对 LLM 和 VLM 的文本与视觉越狱及提示注入攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SALLIE 是一个三阶段运行时检测框架：1) 提取内部残差流激活；2) 使用 k-NN 分类器计算逐层恶意分数；3) 通过层集成模块聚合预测。
contributions: 提出统一、模态无关的轻量级防御框架 SALLIE，可同时防御文本和视觉威胁。
基于机械可解释性，从内部激活中提取鲁棒信号，无需修改模型架构。
在多个紧凑开源模型和超过十个数据集上，SALLIE 优于五种以上基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在 Phi-3.5-vision-instruct、SmolVLM2-2.2B-Instruct 和 gemma-3-4b-it 三个紧凑开源模型上评估，涵盖超过十个数据集和五种以上基线方法，SALLIE 持续优于基线。
limitations: 仅评估了紧凑开源模型，在更大规模模型上的效果未知。
依赖内部激活提取，可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SALLIE 是一个轻量级运行时检测框架，通过机械可解释性从模型内部激活中提取信号，统一防御文本和视觉越狱攻击。

papers.title: Plausibility as Commonsense Reasoning: Humans Succeed, Large Language Models Do not
papers.abstract: Large language models achieve strong performance on many language tasks, yet it remains unclear whether they integrate world knowledge with syntactic structure in a human-like, structure-sensitive way during ambiguity resolution. We test this question in Turkish prenominal relative-clause attachment ambiguities, where the same surface string permits high attachment (HA) or low attachment (LA). We construct ambiguous items that keep the syntactic configuration fixed and ensure both parses remain pragmatically possible, while graded event plausibility selectively favors High Attachment vs.\ Low Attachment. The contrasts are validated with independent norming ratings. In a speeded forced-choice comprehension experiment, humans show a large, correctly directed plausibility effect. We then evaluate Turkish and multilingual LLMs in a parallel preference-based setup that compares matched HA/LA continuations via mean per-token log-probability. Across models, plausibility-driven shifts are weak, unstable, or reversed. The results suggest that, in the tested models, plausibility information does not guide attachment preferences as reliably as it does in human judgments, and they highlight Turkish RC attachment as a useful cross-linguistic diagnostic beyond broad benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 人类在土耳其语关系从句消歧中能利用世界知识，而大语言模型表现不稳定。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在语言任务上表现强劲，但能否像人类一样在消歧中结构敏感地整合世界知识仍不清楚，现有研究多基于英语，缺乏跨语言诊断。
analysis.problem: 测试大语言模型在土耳其语前置关系从句附着歧义中，是否像人类一样利用事件合理性引导附着偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出人类表现出显著且方向正确的合理性效应，而LLM的合理性驱动偏移弱、不稳定或反向。
analysis.method: 构建保持句法结构固定、两种解析均语用可能但事件合理性偏向高附着或低附着的歧义项，通过独立规范评分验证对比；对人类进行速度强迫选择理解实验，对LLM采用基于偏好的平行设置，比较匹配的高/低附着延续的平均每token对数概率。
contributions: 构建了土耳其语关系从句附着歧义数据集，并验证了合理性对比。
揭示了当前LLM在结构敏感的世界知识整合上不如人类，并指出土耳其语RC附着作为跨语言诊断的价值。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅测试了土耳其语一种语言，泛化性有限。
仅评估了基于对数概率的偏好，未涉及生成或理解任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类在土耳其语关系从句消歧中能利用世界知识，而大语言模型表现不稳定。

papers.title: ANX: Protocol-First Design for AI Agent Interaction with a Supporting 3EX Decoupled Architecture
papers.abstract: AI agents, autonomous digital actors, need agent-native protocols; existing methods include GUI automation and MCP-based skills, with defects of high token consumption, fragmented interaction, inadequate security, due to lacking a unified top-level framework and key components, each independent module flawed. To address these issues, we present ANX, an open, extensible, verifiable agent-native protocol and top-level framework integrating CLI, Skill, MCP, resolving pain points via protocol innovation, architectural optimization and tool supplementation. Its four core innovations: 1) Agent-native design (ANX Config, Markup, CLI) with high information density, flexibility and strong adaptability to reduce tokens and eliminate inconsistencies; 2) Human-agent interaction combining Skill's flexibility for dual rendering as agent-executable instructions and human-readable UI; 3) MCP-supported on-demand lightweight apps without pre-registration; 4) ANX Markup-enabled machine-executable SOPs eliminating ambiguity for reliable long-horizon tasks and multi-agent collaboration. As the first in a series, we focus on ANX's design, present its 3EX decoupled architecture with ANXHub and preliminary feasibility analysis and experimental validation. ANX ensures native security: LLM-bypassed UI-to-Core communication keeps sensitive data out of agent context; human-only confirmation prevents automated misuse. Form-filling experiments with Qwen3.5-plus/GPT-4o show ANX reduces tokens by 47.3% (Qwen3.5-plus) and 55.6% (GPT-4o) vs MCP-based skills, 57.1% (Qwen3.5-plus) and 66.3% (GPT-4o) vs GUI automation, and shortens execution time by 58.1% and 57.7% vs MCP-based skills.

analysis.tldr: 提出ANX协议，一种面向AI Agent的原生交互协议，通过3EX解耦架构显著降低Token消耗和执行时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI Agent交互方法（如GUI自动化、MCP技能）存在Token消耗高、交互碎片化、安全性不足等问题，缺乏统一顶层框架和关键组件。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一、高效、安全的Agent原生交互协议，解决Token消耗、交互一致性和安全性痛点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ANX协议，包含ANX Config、Markup、CLI等组件，采用3EX解耦架构（ANXHub），支持人机双渲染、按需轻量应用和机器可执行SOP。
contributions: 提出ANX协议，实现Agent原生交互的高信息密度、灵活性和强适应性，减少Token消耗并消除不一致性。
设计3EX解耦架构，通过LLM旁路UI到核心通信确保安全，仅人类确认防止自动化滥用。
analysis.experiments: 在表单填写任务中，使用Qwen3.5-plus和GPT-4o，ANX相比MCP技能Token减少47.3%和55.6%，相比GUI自动化减少57.1%和66.3%，执行时间缩短58.1%和57.7%。
limitations: 实验仅针对表单填写任务，泛化性待验证。
论文为系列首篇，重点在设计，实际部署和长期效果未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ANX协议，一种面向AI Agent的原生交互协议，通过3EX解耦架构显著降低Token消耗和执行时间。

papers.title: LiveFact: A Dynamic, Time-Aware Benchmark for LLM-Driven Fake News Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs) has transformed fake news detection and fact-checking tasks from simple classification to complex reasoning. However, evaluation frameworks have not kept pace. Current benchmarks are static, making them vulnerable to benchmark data contamination (BDC) and ineffective at assessing reasoning under temporal uncertainty. To address this, we introduce LiveFact a continuously updated benchmark that simulates the real-world "fog of war" in misinformation detection. LiveFact uses dynamic, temporal evidence sets to evaluate models on their ability to reason with evolving, incomplete information rather than on memorized knowledge. We propose a dual-mode evaluation: Classification Mode for final verification and Inference Mode for evidence-based reasoning, along with a component to monitor BDC explicitly. Tests with 22 LLMs show that open-source Mixture-of-Experts models, such as Qwen3-235B-A22B, now match or outperform proprietary state-of-the-art systems. More importantly, our analysis finds a significant "reasoning gap." Capable models exhibit epistemic humility by recognizing unverifiable claims in early data slices-an aspect traditional static benchmarks overlook. LiveFact sets a sustainable standard for evaluating robust, temporally aware AI verification.

analysis.tldr: LiveFact 是一个动态、时间感知的基准，用于评估 LLM 在假新闻检测中的推理能力，发现开源 MoE 模型可媲美闭源模型，并揭示了传统基准忽略的“推理差距”。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有假新闻检测基准是静态的，易受基准数据污染（BDC），且无法评估模型在时间不确定性下的推理能力，亟需动态、时间感知的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个持续更新、模拟真实世界信息迷雾的基准，以评估 LLM 在假新闻检测中利用动态、不完整时间证据进行推理的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1）开源 MoE 模型（如 Qwen3-235B-A22B）在分类和推理模式下可媲美或超越闭源 SOTA；2）存在显著的“推理差距”，即能力强的模型在早期数据切片中表现出认知谦逊（承认不可验证的声明），而传统静态基准忽略了这一点。
analysis.method: 提出 LiveFact 基准，包含动态时间证据集、双模式评估（分类模式与推理模式）以及显式的 BDC 监控组件。
contributions: 提出了首个动态、时间感知的假新闻检测基准 LiveFact，模拟真实世界的信息迷雾。
设计了双模式评估（分类与推理）和 BDC 监控机制，揭示了传统基准忽略的“推理差距”。
analysis.experiments: 在 22 个 LLM 上进行了测试，比较了开源 MoE 模型与闭源 SOTA 的性能，并分析了推理差距。
limitations: 可能仅关注时间维度，未涵盖其他类型的动态性（如多模态证据）。
基准的持续更新和维护成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LiveFact 是一个动态、时间感知的基准，用于评估 LLM 在假新闻检测中的推理能力，发现开源 MoE 模型可媲美闭源模型，并揭示了传统基准忽略的“推理差距”。

papers.title: AnyUser: Translating Sketched User Intent into Domestic Robots
papers.abstract: We introduce AnyUser, a unified robotic instruction system for intuitive domestic task instruction via free-form sketches on camera images, optionally with language. AnyUser interprets multimodal inputs (sketch, vision, language) as spatial-semantic primitives to generate executable robot actions requiring no prior maps or models. Novel components include multimodal fusion for understanding and a hierarchical policy for robust action generation. Efficacy is shown via extensive evaluations: (1) Quantitative benchmarks on the large-scale dataset showing high accuracy in interpreting diverse sketch-based commands across various simulated domestic scenes. (2) Real-world validation on two distinct robotic platforms, a statically mounted 7-DoF assistive arm (KUKA LBR iiwa) and a dual-arm mobile manipulator (Realman RMC-AIDAL), performing representative tasks like targeted wiping and area cleaning, confirming the system's ability to ground instructions and execute them reliably in physical environments. (3) A comprehensive user study involving diverse demographics (elderly, simulated non-verbal, low technical literacy) demonstrating significant improvements in usability and task specification efficiency, achieving high task completion rates (85.7%-96.4%) and user satisfaction. AnyUser bridges the gap between advanced robotic capabilities and the need for accessible non-expert interaction, laying the foundation for practical assistive robots adaptable to real-world human environments.

analysis.tldr: AnyUser 通过自由手绘草图结合语言，实现无需先验地图的直观家用机器人指令系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人指令系统对非专业用户不友好，需要技术知识或预定义指令，限制了家用辅助机器人的普及。
analysis.problem: 如何让用户通过自由手绘草图（可选语言）直观地向家用机器人下达任务指令，并可靠执行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AnyUser 将多模态输入（草图、视觉、语言）解析为空间-语义基元，通过多模态融合理解和分层策略生成可执行动作。
contributions: 提出统一机器人指令系统 AnyUser，支持自由手绘草图交互。
设计多模态融合与分层策略，实现无需先验地图的鲁棒动作生成。
在仿真和真实机器人平台上验证有效性，并通过用户研究证明可用性提升。
analysis.experiments: 在大型数据集上定量评估草图指令理解准确率；在 KUKA LBR iiwa 和 Realman RMC-AIDAL 两种机器人上执行代表性任务；用户研究（含老年人、模拟非语言用户、低技术素养者）显示任务完成率 85.7%-96.4%，用户满意度高。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量草图输入，复杂场景下理解精度待验证。
真实环境泛化性可能受限于训练场景多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AnyUser 通过自由手绘草图结合语言，实现无需先验地图的直观家用机器人指令系统。

papers.title: Selecting Decision-Relevant Concepts in Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Training interpretable concept-based policies requires practitioners to manually select which human-understandable concepts an agent should reason with when making sequential decisions. This selection demands domain expertise, is time-consuming and costly, scales poorly with the number of candidates, and provides no performance guarantees. To overcome this limitation, we propose the first algorithms for principled automatic concept selection in sequential decision-making. Our key insight is that concept selection can be viewed through the lens of state abstraction: intuitively, a concept is decision-relevant if removing it would cause the agent to confuse states that require different actions. As a result, agents should rely on decision-relevant concepts; states with the same concept representation should share the same optimal action, which preserves the optimal decision structure of the original state space. This perspective leads to the Decision-Relevant Selection (DRS) algorithm, which selects a subset of concepts from a candidate set, along with performance bounds relating the selected concepts to the performance of the resulting policy. Empirically, DRS automatically recovers manually curated concept sets while matching or exceeding their performance, and improves the effectiveness of test-time concept interventions across reinforcement learning benchmarks and real-world healthcare environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个在强化学习中自动选择决策相关概念的方法，通过状态抽象视角保证最优性。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动选择概念需要领域专家、耗时且昂贵，无法保证性能，限制了可解释概念策略的实用性和可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从候选概念集中选择对决策最关键的概念，同时保证策略性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将概念选择视为状态抽象问题，提出决策相关选择（DRS）算法，通过移除概念后状态混淆程度衡量决策相关性，并给出性能界。
contributions: 首次提出强化学习中自动概念选择的算法框架
从状态抽象角度建立概念选择与最优策略的理论联系，并提供性能保证
analysis.experiments: 在强化学习基准和真实医疗环境中，DRS自动恢复人工精选概念集，性能匹配或超越，并提升测试时概念干预效果。
limitations: 可能依赖候选概念集的完备性
理论性能界在实际中可能较宽松
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个在强化学习中自动选择决策相关概念的方法，通过状态抽象视角保证最优性。

papers.title: SkillX: Automatically Constructing Skill Knowledge Bases for Agents
papers.abstract: Learning from experience is critical for building capable large language model (LLM) agents, yet prevailing self-evolving paradigms remain inefficient: agents learn in isolation, repeatedly rediscover similar behaviors from limited experience, resulting in redundant exploration and poor generalization. To address this problem, we propose SkillX, a fully automated framework for constructing a \textbf{plug-and-play skill knowledge base} that can be reused across agents and environments. SkillX operates through a fully automated pipeline built on three synergistic innovations: \textit{(i) Multi-Level Skills Design}, which distills raw trajectories into three-tiered hierarchy of strategic plans, functional skills, and atomic skills; \textit{(ii) Iterative Skills Refinement}, which automatically revises skills based on execution feedback to continuously improve library quality; and \textit{(iii) Exploratory Skills Expansion}, which proactively generates and validates novel skills to expand coverage beyond seed training data. Using a strong backbone agent (GLM-4.6), we automatically build a reusable skill library and evaluate its transferability on challenging long-horizon, user-interactive benchmarks, including AppWorld, BFCL-v3, and $τ^2$-Bench. Experiments show that SkillKB consistently improves task success and execution efficiency when plugged into weaker base agents, highlighting the importance of structured, hierarchical experience representations for generalizable agent learning. Our code will be publicly available soon at https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillX.

analysis.tldr: SkillX 自动构建可复用的分层技能知识库，提升 LLM Agent 的任务成功率和执行效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM Agent 自我进化范式效率低，Agent 孤立学习、重复发现相似行为，导致冗余探索和泛化能力差。
analysis.problem: 如何自动构建一个可跨 Agent 和跨环境复用的技能知识库，以提升 Agent 学习效率和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SkillX 框架，包含多层级技能设计（将原始轨迹提炼为策略计划、功能技能、原子技能三层）、迭代技能精炼（基于执行反馈自动修正技能）和探索性技能扩展（主动生成并验证新技能以覆盖种子训练数据之外）。
contributions: 提出全自动构建可复用技能知识库的框架 SkillX。
设计多层级技能表示、迭代精炼和探索性扩展三种创新机制。
在多个长时程、用户交互基准上验证了技能库的可迁移性，显著提升弱基座 Agent 的任务成功率和执行效率。
analysis.experiments: 在 AppWorld、BFCL-v3 和 τ²-Bench 三个基准上评估，使用 GLM-4.6 构建技能库，迁移到弱基座 Agent 后任务成功率和执行效率一致提升。
limitations: 技能库构建依赖强基座 Agent（GLM-4.6），弱基座 Agent 可能无法有效利用。
探索性技能扩展可能引入无效或有害技能，需要更严格的验证机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillX 自动构建可复用的分层技能知识库，提升 LLM Agent 的任务成功率和执行效率。

papers.title: Multi-Modal Sensor Fusion using Hybrid Attention for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D object detection for autonomous driving requires complementary sensors. Cameras provide dense semantics but unreliable depth, while millimeter-wave radar offers precise range and velocity measurements with sparse geometry. We propose MMF-BEV, a radar-camera BEV fusion framework that leverages deformable attention for cross-modal feature alignment on the View-of-Delft (VoD) 4D radar dataset [1]. MMF-BEV builds a BEVDepth [2] camera branch and a RadarBEVNet [3] radar branch, each enhanced with Deformable Self-Attention, and fuses them via a Deformable Cross-Attention module. We evaluate three configurations: camera-only, radar-only, and hybrid fusion. A sensor contribution analysis quantifies per-distance modality weighting, providing interpretable evidence of sensor complementarity. A two-stage training strategy - pre-training the camera branch with depth supervision, then jointly training radar and fusion modules stabilizes learning. Experiments on VoD show that MMF-BEV consistently outperforms unimodal baselines and achieves competitive results against prior fusion methods across all object classes in both the full annotated area and near-range Region of Interest.

analysis.tldr: 提出MMF-BEV雷达-相机BEV融合框架，利用可变形注意力对齐跨模态特征，在VoD数据集上优于单模态基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶中相机和雷达传感器各有优劣，现有融合方法未能充分利用4D雷达的稀疏几何信息与相机的密集语义，且缺乏可解释的模态贡献分析。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合相机和4D雷达的BEV特征，实现准确且可解释的3D目标检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MMF-BEV框架，包含增强可变形自注意力的BEVDepth相机分支和RadarBEVNet雷达分支，通过可变形交叉注意力模块融合；采用两阶段训练策略（先预训练相机分支，再联合训练雷达和融合模块）。
contributions: 提出基于可变形注意力的雷达-相机BEV融合框架MMF-BEV，实现跨模态特征对齐。
引入传感器贡献分析，量化不同距离下的模态权重，提供可解释的互补性证据。
analysis.experiments: 在View-of-Delft (VoD) 4D雷达数据集上评估，MMF-BEV在所有物体类别和区域（完整标注区及近距ROI）均优于单模态基线，并达到与先前融合方法竞争的结果。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集（VoD）上验证，泛化性未知。
未提及实时性，可能难以满足自动驾驶的实时要求。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MMF-BEV雷达-相机BEV融合框架，利用可变形注意力对齐跨模态特征，在VoD数据集上优于单模态基线。

papers.title: Comparative Characterization of KV Cache Management Strategies for LLM Inference
papers.abstract: Efficient inference with Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly relies on Key-Value (KV) caches to store previously computed key and value vectors at each layer. These caches are essential to minimize redundant computation during autoregressive token generation, lowering computational complexity from quadratic to linear. However, the growth of KV caches has posed significant system-level challenges, particularly as model sizes increase, context lengths grow, and concurrent requests compete for limited memory resources. Even though several recent frameworks for KV cache management have emerged, their comparative trade-offs in memory consumption and inference performance have not been fully understood, especially under varying request sizes and model configurations. In this work, we conduct an empirical study of three state-of-the-art KV cache management frameworks: vLLM, InfiniGen, and H2O. These frameworks employ techniques such as tensor offloading, token eviction heuristics, and speculative scheduling to balance memory usage and performance. We evaluate their performance in terms of a range of metrics such as latency, throughput, and memory usage across a spectrum of key parameters including request rates, model sizes, and sparsity levels. Our results pinpoint the conditions for each framework to perform the best, revealing the most suitable selection and configuration of KV cache strategies under memory and performance constraints.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较三种KV缓存管理框架(vLLM/InfiniGen/H2O)在不同条件下的性能权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理中KV缓存快速增长带来系统级挑战，现有管理框架的权衡未被充分理解。
analysis.problem: 不同KV缓存管理策略在内存消耗和推理性能之间的比较与适用条件不明确。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对vLLM、InfiniGen和H2O三种框架进行实证研究，评估延迟、吞吐量、内存使用等指标。
contributions: 系统比较三种KV缓存管理框架的性能权衡
揭示各框架在不同请求规模、模型大小和稀疏度下的最佳条件
analysis.experiments: 在多种参数（请求率、模型大小、稀疏度）下评估延迟、吞吐量和内存使用。
limitations: 仅比较三种框架，可能未覆盖所有最新方法
实验条件有限，可能不适用于所有硬件或部署场景
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较三种KV缓存管理框架(vLLM/InfiniGen/H2O)在不同条件下的性能权衡。

papers.title: AvatarPointillist: AutoRegressive 4D Gaussian Avatarization
papers.abstract: We introduce AvatarPointillist, a novel framework for generating dynamic 4D Gaussian avatars from a single portrait image. At the core of our method is a decoder-only Transformer that autoregressively generates a point cloud for 3D Gaussian Splatting. This sequential approach allows for precise, adaptive construction, dynamically adjusting point density and the total number of points based on the subject's complexity. During point generation, the AR model also jointly predicts per-point binding information, enabling realistic animation. After generation, a dedicated Gaussian decoder converts the points into complete, renderable Gaussian attributes. We demonstrate that conditioning the decoder on the latent features from the AR generator enables effective interaction between stages and markedly improves fidelity. Extensive experiments validate that AvatarPointillist produces high-quality, photorealistic, and controllable avatars. We believe this autoregressive formulation represents a new paradigm for avatar generation, and we will release our code inspire future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出自回归4D高斯头像生成框架，从单张肖像图生成动态可动画头像。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有头像生成方法在动态性、真实感和可控性上存在局限，且缺乏自适应点云密度调节能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张肖像图生成高质量、可动画的4D高斯头像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用解码器-only Transformer自回归生成点云，联合预测每点绑定信息，再通过高斯解码器转换为可渲染高斯属性。
contributions: 提出自回归4D高斯头像生成框架AvatarPointillist
实现自适应点密度调节和联合绑定信息预测
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖单视角输入，多视角泛化性未知
自回归生成效率可能较低
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自回归4D高斯头像生成框架，从单张肖像图生成动态可动画头像。

papers.title: A Quantum Search Approach to Magic Square Constraint Problems with Classical Benchmarking
papers.abstract: This paper presents a quantum search approach to combinatorial constraint satisfaction problems, demonstrated through the generation of magic squares. We reformulate magic square construction as a quantum search problem in which a reversible, constraint-sensitive oracle marks valid configurations for amplitude amplification via Grover's algorithm. Classical pre-processing using the Siamese construction and partial constraint checks generates a compact candidate domain before quantum encoding. Rather than integrating classical and quantum solvers in an iterative loop, this work uses the classical component for structured initialisation and the quantum component for search, and benchmarks the quantum approach against classical brute-force enumeration and backtracking. Our Qiskit implementation demonstrates the design of multi-register modular arithmetic circuits, oracle logic, and diffusion operators. Experiments are conducted on small grid instances, as larger grids are intractable on classical statevector simulators due to exponential memory growth. The results validate the correctness of the proposed quantum search pipeline and confirm the theoretical quadratic query advantage over classical search.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于Grover算法的量子搜索方法用于幻方约束问题，并通过经典基准测试验证了理论二次加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合约束满足问题在经典计算中通常需要指数级搜索，量子计算有望提供加速，但如何有效编码约束并实现可扩展的量子搜索仍具挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何利用Grover算法高效生成幻方，并通过经典预处理缩小搜索空间，实现量子搜索的可行性验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用经典Siamese构造和部分约束检查生成紧凑候选域，然后通过量子Grover搜索（含约束敏感Oracle和扩散算子）在候选域中标记有效幻方。
contributions: 提出一种结合经典预处理与量子Grover搜索的幻方生成框架。
在Qiskit上实现多寄存器模算术电路、Oracle逻辑和扩散算子，并在小规模实例上验证正确性和二次加速优势。
analysis.experiments: 在小规模幻方实例上使用Qiskit状态向量模拟器进行实验，验证了量子搜索管道的正确性，并确认了相对于经典搜索的理论二次查询优势。
limitations: 当前仅在小规模实例上验证，更大规模因经典模拟器指数级内存增长而不可行。
未在真实量子硬件上运行，实际噪声环境下的性能未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于Grover算法的量子搜索方法用于幻方约束问题，并通过经典基准测试验证了理论二次加速。

papers.title: CLEAR: Unlocking Generative Potential for Degraded Image Understanding in Unified Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: Image degradation from blur, noise, compression, and poor illumination severely undermines multimodal understanding in real-world settings. Unified multimodal models that combine understanding and generation within a single architecture are a natural fit for this challenge, as their generative pathway can model the fine-grained visual structure that degradation destroys. Yet these models fail to leverage their own generative capacity on degraded inputs. We trace this disconnect to two compounding factors: existing training regimes never ask the model to invoke generation during reasoning, and the standard decode-reencode pathway does not support effective joint optimization. We present CLEAR, a framework that connects the two capabilities through three progressive steps: (1) supervised fine-tuning on a degradation-aware dataset to establish the generate-then-answer reasoning pattern; (2) a Latent Representation Bridge that replaces the decode-reencode detour with a direct, optimizable connection between generation and reasoning; (3) Interleaved GRPO, a reinforcement learning method that jointly optimizes text reasoning and visual generation under answer-correctness rewards. We construct MMD-Bench, covering three degradation severity levels across six standard multimodal benchmarks. Experiments show that CLEAR substantially improves robustness on degraded inputs while preserving clean-image performance. Our analysis further reveals that removing pixel-level reconstruction supervision leads to intermediate visual states with higher perceptual quality, suggesting that task-driven optimization and visual quality are naturally aligned.

analysis.tldr: CLEAR通过生成-推理联合优化，显著提升统一多模态模型在退化图像上的理解鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景中图像退化（模糊、噪声等）严重损害多模态理解，现有统一模型虽具备生成能力却无法在退化输入上利用该能力，导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 统一多模态模型在退化图像上无法有效利用自身生成能力来恢复细粒度视觉结构，现有训练范式未将生成融入推理，且解码-重编码路径阻碍联合优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在退化输入上失败源于两个因素：训练时从未要求模型在推理中调用生成，以及标准解码-重编码路径不支持有效的联合优化。
analysis.method: CLEAR框架包含三步：1) 在退化感知数据集上监督微调建立先生成后推理模式；2) 潜在表示桥接替代解码-重编码，实现生成与推理的直接可优化连接；3) 交错GRPO强化学习方法，在答案正确性奖励下联合优化文本推理和视觉生成。
contributions: 提出CLEAR框架，通过生成-推理联合优化提升退化图像理解鲁棒性
构建MMD-Bench基准，覆盖三种退化严重程度和六个标准多模态基准
发现去除像素级重建监督可提高中间视觉状态的感知质量，表明任务驱动优化与视觉质量自然对齐
analysis.experiments: 在MMD-Bench上实验，CLEAR显著提升退化输入鲁棒性，同时保持干净图像性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定退化类型和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证
交错GRPO训练复杂度较高，可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CLEAR通过生成-推理联合优化，显著提升统一多模态模型在退化图像上的理解鲁棒性。

papers.title: MinerU2.5-Pro: Pushing the Limits of Data-Centric Document Parsing at Scale
papers.abstract: Current document parsing methods advance primarily through model architecture innovation, while systematic engineering of training data remains underexplored. Yet state-of-the-art models spanning diverse architectures and parameter scales exhibit highly consistent failure patterns on the same set of hard samples, suggesting that the performance bottleneck stems from shared deficiencies in training data rather than from architectural differences. Building on this finding, we present MinerU2.5-Pro, which advances the state of the art purely through data engineering and training strategy design while retaining the 1.2B-parameter architecture of MinerU2.5 unchanged. At its core is a Data Engine co-designed around coverage, informativeness, and annotation accuracy: Diversity-and-Difficulty-Aware Sampling expands training data from under 10M to 65.5M samples while mitigating distribution shift; Cross-Model Consistency Verification leverages output consensus among heterogeneous models to assess sample difficulty and generate reliable annotations; the Judge-and-Refine pipeline improves annotation quality for hard samples through render-then-verify iterative correction. A three-stage progressive training strategy--large-scale pre-training, hard sample fine-tuning, and GRPO alignment--sequentially exploits these data at different quality tiers. On the evaluation front, we rectify element-matching biases in OmniDocBench v1.5 and introduce a Hard subset, establishing the more discriminative OmniDocBench v1.6 protocol. Without any architectural modification, MinerU2.5-Pro achieves 95.69 on OmniDocBench v1.6, improving over the same-architecture baseline by 2.71 points and surpassing all existing methods, including those based on models with over 200x more parameters.

analysis.tldr: 通过数据工程和训练策略设计，MinerU2.5-Pro在保持1.2B参数架构不变的情况下，在文档解析任务上超越所有现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前文档解析方法主要依赖模型架构创新，而训练数据的系统性工程化探索不足，且不同架构的模型在困难样本上表现出一致的失败模式，表明性能瓶颈来自训练数据而非架构。
analysis.problem: 如何通过数据工程和训练策略设计，在不改变模型架构的前提下提升文档解析性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同架构和参数规模的SOTA模型在相同困难样本上表现出高度一致的失败模式，表明性能瓶颈源于训练数据的共同缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出MinerU2.5-Pro，核心是Data Engine（包括多样性-难度感知采样、跨模型一致性验证、判断-精炼流水线）和三阶段渐进训练策略（大规模预训练、困难样本微调、GRPO对齐）。
contributions: 发现文档解析性能瓶颈主要来自训练数据而非架构，并基于此提出数据工程方法。
提出Data Engine和三阶段训练策略，在不改变架构的情况下显著提升性能。
改进OmniDocBench评测协议，引入Hard子集，建立更区分性的v1.6版本。
analysis.experiments: 在OmniDocBench v1.6上，MinerU2.5-Pro达到95.69分，比同架构基线提升2.71分，超越所有现有方法（包括参数规模大200倍以上的模型）。
limitations: 方法依赖多模型一致性验证，计算成本较高。
数据工程策略可能对特定领域文档泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过数据工程和训练策略设计，MinerU2.5-Pro在保持1.2B参数架构不变的情况下，在文档解析任务上超越所有现有方法。

papers.title: Cog-DRIFT: Exploration on Adaptively Reformulated Instances Enables Learning from Hard Reasoning Problems
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has improved the reasoning abilities of LLMs, yet a fundamental limitation remains: models cannot learn from problems that are too difficult to solve under their current policy, as these yield no meaningful reward signal. We propose a simple yet effective solution based on task reformulation. We transform challenging open-ended problems into cognitively simpler variants -- such as multiple-choice and cloze formats -- that preserve the original answer while reducing the effective search space and providing denser learning signals. These reformulations span a spectrum from discriminative to generative tasks, which we exploit to bootstrap learning: models first learn from structured, easier formats, and this knowledge transfers back to improve performance on the original open-ended problems. Building on this insight, we introduce Cog-DRIFT, a framework that constructs reformulated variants and organizes them into an adaptive curriculum based on difficulty. Training progresses from easier to harder formats, enabling the model to learn from problems that previously yielded zero signal under standard RL post-training. Cog-DRIFT not only improves on the originally unsolvable hard problems (absolute +10.11% for Qwen and +8.64% for Llama) but also generalizes well to other held-out datasets. Across 2 models and 6 reasoning benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms standard GRPO and strong guided-exploration baselines. On average, Cog-DRIFT shows +4.72% (Qwen) and +3.23% (Llama) improvements over the second-best baseline. We further show that Cog-DRIFT improves pass@k at test time, and the curriculum improves sample efficiency. Overall, our results highlight task reformulation and curriculum learning as an effective paradigm for overcoming the exploration barrier in LLM post-training.

analysis.tldr: 通过将困难推理问题重构成更简单的格式（如选择题、完形填空）并组织成自适应课程，Cog-DRIFT 使 LLM 能从原本无法学习的难题中获取奖励信号，显著提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR 训练中，模型无法从当前策略下过于困难的问题中学习，因为这些问题不产生有意义的奖励信号，限制了推理能力的进一步提升。
analysis.problem: 如何让 LLM 从原本无法解决的困难推理问题中学习，克服探索障碍。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但隐含观察：标准 RL 后训练中，模型在过难问题上奖励信号为零，无法学习。
analysis.method: 提出 Cog-DRIFT 框架，将困难开放问题重构成认知上更简单的变体（如选择题、完形填空），保留原答案但缩小搜索空间并提供更密集的奖励信号；根据难度组织自适应课程，从简单到困难逐步训练。
contributions: 提出基于任务重构的简单有效方法，使 LLM 能从原本无法学习的难题中学习。
引入自适应课程学习框架 Cog-DRIFT，在多个模型和基准上显著优于标准 GRPO 和强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 Qwen 和 Llama 两个模型、6 个推理基准上评估，Cog-DRIFT 在原本无法解决的难题上绝对提升 +10.11%（Qwen）和 +8.64%（Llama），平均提升 +4.72%（Qwen）和 +3.23%（Llama）超过第二好基线；还提升了测试时 pass@k 和样本效率。
limitations: 重构格式的选择可能依赖领域知识，通用性有待验证。
课程难度的自动定义和排序可能引入额外超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过将困难推理问题重构成更简单的格式（如选择题、完形填空）并组织成自适应课程，Cog-DRIFT 使 LLM 能从原本无法学习的难题中获取奖励信号，显著提升推理性能。

papers.title: Your Agent, Their Asset: A Real-World Safety Analysis of OpenClaw
papers.abstract: OpenClaw, the most widely deployed personal AI agent in early 2026, operates with full local system access and integrates with sensitive services such as Gmail, Stripe, and the filesystem. While these broad privileges enable high levels of automation and powerful personalization, they also expose a substantial attack surface that existing sandboxed evaluations fail to capture. To address this gap, we present the first real-world safety evaluation of OpenClaw and introduce the CIK taxonomy, which unifies an agent's persistent state into three dimensions, i.e., Capability, Identity, and Knowledge, for safety analysis. Our evaluations cover 12 attack scenarios on a live OpenClaw instance across four backbone models (Claude Sonnet 4.5, Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.4). The results show that poisoning any single CIK dimension increases the average attack success rate from 24.6% to 64-74%, with even the most robust model exhibiting more than a threefold increase over its baseline vulnerability. We further assess three CIK-aligned defense strategies alongside a file-protection mechanism; however, the strongest defense still yields a 63.8% success rate under Capability-targeted attacks, while file protection blocks 97% of malicious injections but also prevents legitimate updates. Taken together, these findings show that the vulnerabilities are inherent to the agent architecture, necessitating more systematic safeguards to secure personal AI agents. Our project page is https://ucsc-vlaa.github.io/CIK-Bench.

analysis.tldr: 首个真实世界安全评估揭示OpenClaw智能体在CIK维度下攻击成功率从24.6%飙升至64-74%，现有防御仍不充分。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有沙盒评估无法捕捉个人AI智能体在真实环境中的攻击面，而OpenClaw等智能体拥有广泛系统权限，安全风险亟需系统分析。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对真实部署的个人AI智能体进行系统化安全评估的方法和基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CIK分类法（能力、身份、知识三维度）统一分析智能体持久状态，并在12个攻击场景下对4种骨干模型进行真实世界安全评估。
contributions: 首次对OpenClaw进行真实世界安全评估
提出CIK分类法用于智能体安全分析
揭示单维度投毒即可显著提升攻击成功率，且防御效果有限
analysis.experiments: 在12个攻击场景下测试4种骨干模型（Claude Sonnet 4.5, Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.4），并评估3种CIK对齐防御策略和文件保护机制。
limitations: 仅评估单一智能体OpenClaw
防御策略未完全消除漏洞
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个真实世界安全评估揭示OpenClaw智能体在CIK维度下攻击成功率从24.6%飙升至64-74%，现有防御仍不充分。

papers.title: EDFNet: Early Fusion of Edge and Depth for Thin-Obstacle Segmentation in UAV Navigation
papers.abstract: Autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) must reliably detect thin obstacles such as wires, poles, and branches to navigate safely in real-world environments. These structures remain difficult to perceive because they occupy few pixels, often exhibit weak visual contrast, and are strongly affected by class imbalance. Existing segmentation methods primarily target coarser obstacles and do not fully exploit the complementary multimodal cues needed for thin-structure perception. We present EDFNet, a modular early-fusion segmentation framework that integrates RGB, depth, and edge information for thin-obstacle perception in cluttered aerial scenes. We evaluate EDFNet on the Drone Depth and Obstacle Segmentation (DDOS) dataset across sixteen modality-backbone configurations using U-Net and DeepLabV3 in pretrained and non-pretrained settings. The results show that early RGB-Depth-Edge fusion provides a competitive and well-balanced baseline, with the most consistent gains appearing in boundary-sensitive and recall-oriented metrics. The pretrained RGBDE U-Net achieves the best overall performance, with the highest Thin-Structure Evaluation Score (0.244), mean IoU (0.219), and boundary IoU (0.234), while maintaining competitive runtime performance (19.62 FPS) on our evaluation hardware. However, performance on the rarest ultra-thin categories remains low across all models, indicating that reliable ultra-thin segmentation is still an open challenge. Overall, these findings position early RGB-Depth-Edge fusion as a practical and modular baseline for thin-obstacle segmentation in UAV navigation.

analysis.tldr: 提出EDFNet，通过早期融合RGB、深度和边缘信息提升无人机导航中细薄障碍物分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机在真实环境中需可靠检测细薄障碍物（如电线、杆子），但现有方法因目标像素少、对比度弱、类别不平衡而难以感知，且未充分利用多模态互补线索。
analysis.problem: 解决无人机导航中细薄障碍物分割的难题，特别是如何有效融合RGB、深度和边缘多模态信息以提升分割精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期RGB-深度-边缘融合在边界敏感和召回率指标上增益最一致，但所有模型在极稀有超细类别上性能仍低，表明可靠超细分割仍是开放挑战。
analysis.method: 提出EDFNet，一种模块化早期融合分割框架，在输入阶段融合RGB、深度和边缘信息，使用U-Net或DeepLabV3作为骨干网络。
contributions: 提出EDFNet早期融合框架，整合RGB、深度和边缘信息用于细薄障碍物分割。
在DDOS数据集上通过16种模态-骨干配置进行系统评估，验证了早期融合的有效性。
提供预训练RGBDE U-Net作为强基线，在细薄结构评估分数、mIoU和边界IoU上取得最佳性能。
analysis.experiments: 在DDOS数据集上使用U-Net和DeepLabV3（预训练/非预训练）评估16种模态-骨干配置，报告了细薄结构评估分数、mIoU、边界IoU和FPS。
limitations: 在极稀有超细类别上性能仍低，超细分割问题未完全解决。
仅评估了U-Net和DeepLabV3两种骨干，未探索其他架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EDFNet，通过早期融合RGB、深度和边缘信息提升无人机导航中细薄障碍物分割性能。

papers.title: Undetectable Conversations Between AI Agents via Pseudorandom Noise-Resilient Key Exchange
papers.abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed to interact with other agents on behalf of users and organizations. We ask whether two such agents, operated by different entities, can carry out a parallel secret conversation while still producing a transcript that is computationally indistinguishable from an honest interaction, even to a strong passive auditor that knows the full model descriptions, the protocol, and the agents' private contexts. Building on recent work on watermarking and steganography for LLMs, we first show that if the parties possess an interaction-unique secret key, they can facilitate an optimal-rate covert conversation: the hidden conversation can exploit essentially all of the entropy present in the honest message distributions. Our main contributions concern extending this to the keyless setting, where the agents begin with no shared secret. We show that covert key exchange, and hence covert conversation, is possible even when each model has an arbitrary private context, and their messages are short and fully adaptive, assuming only that sufficiently many individual messages have at least constant min-entropy. This stands in contrast to previous covert communication works, which relied on the min-entropy in each individual message growing with the security parameter. To obtain this, we introduce a new cryptographic primitive, which we call pseudorandom noise-resilient key exchange: a key-exchange protocol whose public transcript is pseudorandom while still remaining correct under constant noise. We study this primitive, giving several constructions relevant to our application as well as strong limitations showing that more naive variants are impossible or vulnerable to efficient attacks. These results show that transcript auditing alone cannot rule out covert coordination between AI agents, and identify a new cryptographic theory that may be of independent interest.

analysis.tldr: AI代理可在无共享密钥下通过伪随机抗噪密钥交换实现不可检测的秘密对话。
analysis.research_motivation: AI代理被广泛部署代表用户和组织交互，但现有方法无法保证在强被动审计者（知晓模型、协议和上下文）下秘密对话的不可区分性，且依赖每消息熵随安全参数增长，实际中难以满足。
analysis.problem: 如何让两个不同实体的AI代理在无共享密钥、消息短且完全自适应的条件下，实现与诚实交互计算不可区分的秘密对话。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出伪随机抗噪密钥交换（PRNR-KE）原语，其公开副本是伪随机的且在恒定噪声下仍正确；基于此构建无密钥设置下的隐蔽密钥交换和隐蔽对话协议。
contributions: 证明在拥有交互唯一密钥时，可实现最优速率隐蔽对话（利用诚实消息分布的全部熵）。
将结果扩展到无密钥设置，仅需足够多单条消息具有至少恒定最小熵，引入伪随机抗噪密钥交换原语并给出构造与局限性分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖消息熵的恒定最小值假设，可能在某些低熵场景不适用。
构造可能面临实际部署中的计算效率或噪声模型匹配问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI代理可在无共享密钥下通过伪随机抗噪密钥交换实现不可检测的秘密对话。

papers.title: TaFall: Balance-Informed Fall Detection via Passive Thermal Sensing
papers.abstract: Falls are a major cause of injury and mortality among older adults, yet most incidents occur in private indoor environments where monitoring must balance effectiveness with privacy. Existing privacy-preserving fall detection approaches, particularly those based on radio frequency sensing, often rely on coarse motion cues, which limits reliability in real-world deployments. We introduce TaFall, a balance-informed fall detection system based on low-cost, privacy-preserving thermal array sensing. The key insight is that TaFall models a fall as a process of balance degradation and detects falls by estimating pose-driven biomechanical balance dynamics. To enable this capability from low-resolution thermal array maps, we propose (i) an appearance-motion fusion model for robust pose reconstruction, (ii) physically grounded balance-aware learning, and (iii) pose-bridged pretraining to improve robustness. TaFall achieves a detection rate of 98.26% with a false alarm rate of 0.65% on our dataset with over 3,000 fall instances from 35 participants across diverse indoor environments. In 27 day deployments across four homes, TaFall attains an ultra-low false alarm rate of 0.00126% and a pilot bathroom study confirms robustness under moisture and thermal interference. Together, these results establish TaFall as a reliable and privacy-preserving approach to fall detection in everyday living environments.

analysis.tldr: TaFall 利用低成本热阵列传感和平衡退化建模，实现高精度、低误报的隐私保护跌倒检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 跌倒是老年人受伤和死亡的主要原因，但现有隐私保护方法（如射频传感）依赖粗粒度运动线索，在真实部署中可靠性有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护隐私的前提下，利用低成本热阵列传感实现可靠、低误报的跌倒检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跌倒可建模为平衡退化过程，通过估计姿态驱动的生物力学平衡动态可有效检测跌倒。
analysis.method: 提出外观-运动融合模型进行鲁棒姿态重建、物理引导的平衡感知学习以及姿态桥接预训练。
contributions: 提出平衡信息驱动的跌倒检测框架 TaFall，基于低成本热阵列传感。
设计外观-运动融合模型、物理引导平衡感知学习和姿态桥接预训练方法。
在包含 35 名参与者、3000+ 跌倒实例的数据集上实现 98.26% 检测率和 0.65% 误报率，并在真实家庭部署中验证超低误报率。
analysis.experiments: 在包含 35 名参与者、3000+ 跌倒实例的数据集上，TaFall 达到 98.26% 检测率和 0.65% 误报率；在 4 个家庭的 27 天部署中，误报率低至 0.00126%；浴室试点研究验证了在潮湿和热干扰下的鲁棒性。
limitations: 热阵列传感的分辨率可能限制远距离或遮挡场景下的姿态重建精度。
当前方法可能对非典型跌倒模式（如缓慢滑倒）的检测效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TaFall 利用低成本热阵列传感和平衡退化建模，实现高精度、低误报的隐私保护跌倒检测。

papers.title: AI Trust OS -- A Continuous Governance Framework for Autonomous AI Observability and Zero-Trust Compliance in Enterprise Environments
papers.abstract: The accelerating adoption of large language models, retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, and multi-agent AI workflows has created a structural governance crisis. Organizations cannot govern what they cannot see, and existing compliance methodologies built for deterministic web applications provide no mechanism for discovering or continuously validating AI systems that emerge across engineering teams without formal oversight. The result is a widening trust gap between what regulators demand as proof of AI governance maturity and what organizations can demonstrate. This paper proposes AI Trust OS, a governance architecture for continuous, autonomous AI observability and zero-trust compliance. AI Trust OS reconceptualizes compliance as an always-on, telemetry-driven operating layer in which AI systems are discovered through observability signals, control assertions are collected by automated probes, and trust artifacts are synthesized continuously. The framework rests on four principles: proactive discovery, telemetry evidence over manual attestation, continuous posture over point-in-time audit, and architecture-backed proof over policy-document trust. The framework operates through a zero-trust telemetry boundary in which ephemeral read-only probes validate structural metadata without ingressing source code or payload-level PII. An AI Observability Extractor Agent scans LangSmith and Datadog LLM telemetry, automatically registering undocumented AI systems and shifting governance from organizational self-report to empirical machine observation. Evaluated across ISO 42001, the EU AI Act, SOC 2, GDPR, and HIPAA, the paper argues that telemetry-first AI governance represents a categorical architectural shift in how enterprise trust is produced and demonstrated.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI Trust OS框架，通过遥测驱动的持续治理实现企业AI系统的零信任合规。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合规方法针对确定性Web应用设计，无法发现或持续验证跨团队涌现的AI系统，导致监管要求与组织实际能力之间的信任差距。
analysis.problem: 企业环境中AI系统（LLM、RAG、多智能体）缺乏自动发现和持续合规验证的治理架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AI Trust OS框架，包含四个原则（主动发现、遥测证据、持续态势、架构背书），通过零信任遥测边界和AI可观测性提取器代理自动发现AI系统并收集控制断言。
contributions: 提出遥测驱动的持续治理架构，将合规从点状审计转变为持续态势。
设计零信任遥测边界，使用只读探针验证结构元数据而不接触源码或PII。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖现有遥测平台（如LangSmith、Datadog），可能不适用于未集成这些工具的环境。
未讨论大规模部署时的性能开销和探针管理复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI Trust OS框架，通过遥测驱动的持续治理实现企业AI系统的零信任合规。

papers.title: Think in Strokes, Not Pixels: Process-Driven Image Generation via Interleaved Reasoning
papers.abstract: Humans paint images incrementally: they plan a global layout, sketch a coarse draft, inspect, and refine details, and most importantly, each step is grounded in the evolving visual states. However, can unified multimodal models trained on text-image interleaved datasets also imagine the chain of intermediate states? In this paper, we introduce process-driven image generation, a multi-step paradigm that decomposes synthesis into an interleaved reasoning trajectory of thoughts and actions. Rather than generating images in a single step, our approach unfolds across multiple iterations, each consisting of 4 stages: textual planning, visual drafting, textual reflection, and visual refinement. The textual reasoning explicitly conditions how the visual state should evolve, while the generated visual intermediate in turn constrains and grounds the next round of textual reasoning. A core challenge of process-driven generation stems from the ambiguity of intermediate states: how can models evaluate each partially-complete image? We address this through dense, step-wise supervision that maintains two complementary constraints: for the visual intermediate states, we enforce the spatial and semantic consistency; for the textual intermediate states, we preserve the prior visual knowledge while enabling the model to identify and correct prompt-violating elements. This makes the generation process explicit, interpretable, and directly supervisable. To validate proposed method, we conduct experiments under various text-to-image generation benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过交错推理轨迹进行多步图像生成的方法，将单步生成分解为文本规划、视觉草稿、文本反思和视觉精炼的迭代过程。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型虽然能处理文本-图像交错数据，但缺乏生成中间视觉状态链的能力，而人类绘画是逐步规划、草稿、检查、精炼的迭代过程。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型像人类一样通过多步推理和视觉状态反馈来生成图像，而不是单步生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出过程驱动图像生成，将生成分解为多轮迭代，每轮包含文本规划、视觉草稿、文本反思和视觉精炼四个阶段，并通过密集的逐步监督保持空间和语义一致性。
contributions: 提出过程驱动图像生成范式，将单步生成分解为可解释的多步推理轨迹。
设计四阶段迭代框架（规划、草稿、反思、精炼），并引入双重约束监督中间状态。
analysis.experiments: 在多种文本到图像生成基准上进行了实验，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 多步迭代可能增加推理时间和计算成本。
对中间状态的监督需要额外标注或设计，可能限制可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过交错推理轨迹进行多步图像生成的方法，将单步生成分解为文本规划、视觉草稿、文本反思和视觉精炼的迭代过程。

papers.title: Hallucination Basins: A Dynamic Framework for Understanding and Controlling LLM Hallucinations
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) hallucinate: they produce fluent outputs that are factually incorrect. We present a geometric dynamical systems framework in which hallucinations arise from task-dependent basin structure in latent space. Using autoregressive hidden-state trajectories across multiple open-source models and benchmarks, we find that separability is strongly task-dependent rather than universal: factoid settings can show clearer basin separation, whereas summarization and misconception-heavy settings are typically less stable and often overlap. We formalize this behavior with task-complexity and multi-basin theorems, characterize basin emergence in L-layer transformers, and show that geometry-aware steering can reduce hallucination probability without retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出幻觉盆地框架，将LLM幻觉归因于潜空间中的任务依赖盆地结构，并利用几何感知引导减少幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM幻觉是事实错误但流畅输出的关键问题，现有方法缺乏对幻觉产生机制的几何动力学理解。
analysis.problem: 如何从几何动力学角度理解并控制LLM幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现幻觉与任务依赖的盆地结构相关：事实性任务盆地分离更清晰，而摘要和错误密集任务盆地不稳定且重叠。
analysis.method: 提出幻觉盆地框架，包括任务复杂度与多盆地定理，表征L层Transformer中的盆地涌现，并设计几何感知引导方法。
contributions: 提出幻觉盆地的几何动力学框架，将幻觉归因于潜空间中的任务依赖盆地结构。
通过实验发现任务依赖的盆地分离性差异，并形式化任务复杂度与多盆地定理。
提出无需重训练的几何感知引导方法，可降低幻觉概率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定模型和任务类型。
几何感知引导的实际效果需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出幻觉盆地框架，将LLM幻觉归因于潜空间中的任务依赖盆地结构，并利用几何感知引导减少幻觉。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence and Cost Reduction in Public Higher Education: A Scoping Review of Emerging Evidence
papers.abstract: Public higher education systems face increasing financial pressures from expanding student populations, rising operational costs, and persistent demands for equitable access. Artificial Intelligence (AI), including generative tools such as ChatGPT, learning analytics, intelligent tutoring systems, and predictive models, has been proposed as a means of enhancing efficiency and reducing costs. This study conducts a scoping review of the literature on AI applications in public higher education, based on systematic searches in Scopus and IEEE Xplore that identified 241 records, of which 21 empirical studies met predefined eligibility criteria and were thematically analyzed. The findings show that AI enables cost savings by automating administrative tasks, optimizing resource allocation, supporting personalized learning at scale, and applying predictive analytics to improve student retention and institutional planning. At the same time, concerns emerge regarding implementation costs, unequal access across institutions, and risks of widening digital divides. Overall, the thematic analysis highlights both the promises and limitations of AI-driven cost reduction in higher education, offering insights for policymakers, university administrators, and educators on the economic implications of AI adoption, while also pointing to gaps that warrant further empirical research.

analysis.tldr: AI在公立高等教育中通过自动化、资源优化和预测分析降低成本的潜力与局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 公立高等教育面临学生增长、运营成本上升和公平性压力，AI被视为提升效率、降低成本的手段，但缺乏系统性证据综述。
analysis.problem: 系统梳理AI在公立高等教育中降低成本的应用证据、效果及潜在问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI可降低行政成本、优化资源、支持个性化学习、提高学生保留率，但存在实施成本、机构间不平等和数字鸿沟风险。
analysis.method: 范围综述，在Scopus和IEEE Xplore中系统检索，筛选出21篇实证研究进行主题分析。
contributions: 综合了AI在公立高等教育中降低成本的实证证据，涵盖自动化、资源优化、个性化学习和预测分析。
识别了实施成本、不平等和数字鸿沟等关键挑战，为政策制定者和教育者提供见解。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明基于21篇实证研究的主题分析。
limitations: 仅基于21篇研究，样本量有限。
未深入分析不同AI技术的具体成本效益差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI在公立高等教育中通过自动化、资源优化和预测分析降低成本的潜力与局限。

papers.title: YMIR: A new Benchmark Dataset and Model for Arabic Yemeni Music Genre Classification Using Convolutional Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Automatic music genre classification is a major task in music information retrieval; however, most current benchmarks and models have been developed primarily for Western music, leaving culturally specific traditions underrepresented. In this paper, we introduce the Yemeni Music Information Retrieval (YMIR) dataset, which contains 1,475 carefully selected audio clips covering five traditional Yemeni genres: Sanaani, Hadhrami, Lahji, Tihami, and Adeni. The dataset was labeled by five Yemeni music experts following a clear and structured protocol, resulting in strong inter-annotator agreement (Fleiss kappa = 0.85). We also propose the Yemeni Music Classification Model (YMCM), a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based system designed to classify music genres from time-frequency features. Using a consistent preprocessing pipeline, we perform a systematic comparison across six experimental groups and five different architectures, resulting in a total of 30 experiments. Specifically, we evaluate several feature representations, including Mel-spectrograms, Chroma, FilterBank, and MFCCs with 13, 20, and 40 coefficients, and benchmark YMCM against standard models (AlexNet, VGG16, MobileNet, and a baseline CNN) under the same experimental conditions. The experimental findings reveal that YMCM is the most effective, achieving the highest accuracy of 98.8% with Mel-spectrogram features. The results also provide practical insights into the relationship between feature representation and model capacity. The findings establish YMIR as a useful benchmark and YMCM as a strong baseline for classifying Yemeni music genres.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个也门音乐分类数据集YMIR和CNN模型YMCM，在Mel-spectrogram特征上达到98.8%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音乐分类基准和模型主要针对西方音乐，缺乏对文化特定传统音乐（如也门音乐）的支持。
analysis.problem: 也门音乐自动分类缺乏专用数据集和高效模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含1,475个音频片段、5种也门传统音乐流派的YMIR数据集，并提出基于CNN的YMCM模型，使用Mel-spectrogram等时频特征进行分类。
contributions: 创建了首个也门音乐分类基准数据集YMIR，包含专家标注和强一致性。
提出YMCM模型，在30组实验中达到98.8%最高准确率，为也门音乐分类提供强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在YMIR数据集上进行了30组实验，比较了多种特征和架构，YMCM结合Mel-spectrogram取得98.8%准确率。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（1,475个样本），可能限制泛化能力。
仅覆盖5种也门音乐流派，未包含其他阿拉伯或中东音乐。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个也门音乐分类数据集YMIR和CNN模型YMCM，在Mel-spectrogram特征上达到98.8%准确率。

papers.title: Tipiano: Cascaded Piano Hand Motion Synthesis via Fingertip Priors
papers.abstract: Synthesizing realistic piano hand motions requires both precision and naturalness. Physics-based methods achieve precision but produce stiff motions; data-driven models learn natural dynamics but struggle with positional accuracy. Piano motion exhibits a natural hierarchy: fingertip positions are nearly deterministic given piano geometry and fingering, while wrist and intermediate joints offer stylistic freedom. We present [OURS], a four-stage framework exploiting this hierarchy: (1) statistics-based fingertip positioning, (2) FiLM-conditioned trajectory refinement, (3) wrist estimation, and (4) STGCN-based pose synthesis. We contribute expert-annotated fingerings for the FürElise dataset (153 pieces, ~10 hours). Experiments demonstrate F1 = 0.910, substantially outperforming diffusion baselines (F1 = 0.121), with user study (N=41) confirming quality approaching motion capture. Expert evaluation by professional pianists (N=5) identified anticipatory motion as the key remaining gap, providing concrete directions for future improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出四阶段级联框架，利用指尖先验实现高精度且自然的钢琴手部运动合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 钢琴手部运动合成需要同时满足精确性和自然性，但物理方法僵硬，数据驱动方法精度不足，现有方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何合成既精确又自然的钢琴手部运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 钢琴运动具有自然层级结构：指尖位置几乎由钢琴几何和指法确定，而手腕和中间关节具有风格自由度。
analysis.method: 四阶段级联框架：基于统计的指尖定位、FiLM条件轨迹细化、手腕估计、STGCN姿态合成。
contributions: 提出利用运动层级结构的四阶段级联手部运动合成框架。
贡献了FürElise数据集的专家标注指法（153首曲目，约10小时）。
analysis.experiments: 在FürElise数据集上F1=0.910，远超扩散基线（F1=0.121）；用户研究（N=41）确认质量接近动捕；专业钢琴家评估（N=5）指出预期动作是主要差距。
limitations: 预期动作（anticipatory motion）仍存在差距。
依赖专家标注指法，扩展性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出四阶段级联框架，利用指尖先验实现高精度且自然的钢琴手部运动合成。

papers.title: Sampling Parallelism for Fast and Efficient Bayesian Learning
papers.abstract: Machine learning models, and deep neural networks in particular, are increasingly deployed in risk-sensitive domains such as healthcare, environmental forecasting, and finance, where reliable quantification of predictive uncertainty is essential. However, many uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods remain difficult to apply due to their substantial computational cost. Sampling-based Bayesian learning approaches, such as Bayesian neural networks (BNNs), are particularly expensive since drawing and evaluating multiple parameter samples rapidly exhausts memory and compute resources. These constraints have limited the accessibility and exploration of Bayesian techniques thus far. To address these challenges, we introduce sampling parallelism, a simple yet powerful parallelization strategy that targets the primary bottleneck of sampling-based Bayesian learning: the samples themselves. By distributing sample evaluations across multiple GPUs, our method reduces memory pressure and training time without requiring architectural changes or extensive hyperparameter tuning. We detail the methodology and evaluate its performance on a few example tasks and architectures, comparing against distributed data parallelism (DDP) as a baseline. We further demonstrate that sampling parallelism is complementary to existing strategies by implementing a hybrid approach that combines sample and data parallelism. Our experiments show near-perfect scaling when the sample number is scaled proportionally to the computational resources, confirming that sample evaluations parallelize cleanly. Although DDP achieves better raw speedups under scaling with constant workload, sampling parallelism has a notable advantage: by applying independent stochastic augmentations to the same batch on each GPU, it increases augmentation diversity and thus reduces the number of epochs required for convergence.

analysis.tldr: 提出采样并行化策略，通过跨GPU分布样本评估来加速贝叶斯学习，并展示其与数据并行化的互补性。
analysis.research_motivation: 贝叶斯神经网络等采样方法计算成本高，内存和计算资源消耗大，限制了其在风险敏感领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 采样贝叶斯学习中，多个参数样本的评估和存储成为主要瓶颈，导致训练缓慢且内存压力大。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 采样并行化在样本数随资源线性扩展时实现近乎完美的加速，且通过独立随机增强减少收敛所需epoch数。
analysis.method: 采样并行化：将不同参数样本的评估分配到多个GPU上，每个GPU处理部分样本，减少内存压力并加速训练；可与数据并行化结合形成混合并行。
contributions: 提出采样并行化策略，直接针对采样贝叶斯学习的样本瓶颈进行并行化。
实验证明采样并行化在样本数随资源扩展时具有近完美加速，且与数据并行化互补。
发现采样并行化通过独立随机增强提高增强多样性，减少收敛epoch数。
analysis.experiments: 在几个示例任务和架构上评估，与分布式数据并行化（DDP）对比，并测试了混合并行方法。
limitations: 摘要未提供大规模实验或复杂模型上的性能。
可能仅适用于采样数量可扩展的场景，对固定样本数加速有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出采样并行化策略，通过跨GPU分布样本评估来加速贝叶斯学习，并展示其与数据并行化的互补性。

papers.title: Delay, Plateau, or Collapse: Evaluating the Impact of Systematic Verification Error on RLVR
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become a powerful approach for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). While RLVR is designed for tasks with verifiable ground-truth answers, real-world verifiers (e.g., static code checkers) can introduce errors into the reward signal. Prior analyses have largely treated such errors as random and independent across samples, concluding that errors merely slow training with limited effect on final performance. However, practical verifiers tend to exhibit systematic errors. This introduces a risk of models learning unwanted consistent behavior from a structurally incorrect reward signal. In this work, we study the impact of such systematic verification errors on RLVR. Through controlled experiments on arithmetic tasks, we show that systematic false negatives lead to similar effects as random noise. On the other hand, systematic false positives can cause a wide range of behaviors from sub-optimal plateaus to performance collapse. Crucially, these outcomes are not determined by the overall error rate but by the specific pattern of introduced errors, making pre-hoc mitigation difficult. Our results show that, in contrast to prior conclusions, realistic verification errors can critically shape RLVR outcomes and that verifier quality has to be understood beyond its sample-level error rate.

analysis.tldr: 系统性的验证错误（尤其是假阳性）会导致RLVR训练出现次优平台甚至性能崩溃，而错误模式比整体错误率更关键。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR依赖可验证奖励提升LLM推理能力，但实际验证器（如代码检查器）存在系统性错误，而以往研究仅假设随机独立错误，低估了风险。
analysis.problem: 系统性验证错误（特别是假阳性）如何影响RLVR的训练动态和最终性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 系统性假阴性效果类似随机噪声；系统性假阳性可导致从次优平台到性能崩溃的多种行为，且结果由错误模式而非错误率决定。
analysis.method: 在算术任务上进行受控实验，通过设计不同模式的系统性假阳性和假阴性错误，观察RLVR训练行为。
contributions: 揭示系统性假阳性错误会导致RLVR出现次优平台或性能崩溃，而假阴性影响有限。
证明错误模式比整体错误率更关键，使得事前缓解困难。
analysis.experiments: 在算术任务上进行了受控实验，对比了随机噪声与系统性错误的影响。
limitations: 实验仅在算术任务上进行，泛化到其他任务（如代码生成）需验证。
未提出具体的错误缓解方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统性的验证错误（尤其是假阳性）会导致RLVR训练出现次优平台甚至性能崩溃，而错误模式比整体错误率更关键。

papers.title: Discovering Failure Modes in Vision-Language Models using RL
papers.abstract: Vision-language Models (VLMs), despite achieving strong performance on multimodal benchmarks, often misinterpret straightforward visual concepts that humans identify effortlessly, such as counting, spatial reasoning, and viewpoint understanding. Previous studies manually identified these weaknesses and found that they often stem from deficits in specific skills. However, such manual efforts are costly, unscalable, and subject to human bias, which often overlooks subtle details in favour of salient objects, resulting in an incomplete understanding of a model's vulnerabilities. To address these limitations, we propose a Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based framework to automatically discover the failure modes or blind spots of any ``candidate VLM'' on a given data distribution without human intervention. Our framework trains a questioner agent that adaptively generates queries based on the candidate VLM's responses to elicit incorrect answers. Our approach increases question complexity by focusing on fine-grained visual details and distinct skill compositions as training progresses, consequently identifying novel failure modes in which VLMs struggle. We demonstrate the broad applicability of our framework by showcasing its generalizability across various model combinations.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的框架自动发现视觉-语言模型的失败模式，无需人工干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动发现VLM失败模式成本高、不可扩展且受人类偏见影响，容易忽略细微细节。
analysis.problem: 如何自动、无偏地发现VLM在给定数据分布上的失败模式或盲点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM在计数、空间推理、视角理解等简单视觉概念上经常出错，且失败模式与特定技能缺陷相关。
analysis.method: 训练一个基于强化学习的提问者智能体，根据候选VLM的响应自适应生成查询，诱导其产生错误答案，并逐步增加问题复杂度以聚焦细粒度视觉细节和技能组合。
contributions: 提出首个基于RL的自动发现VLM失败模式的框架
通过逐步增加问题复杂度，识别出VLM难以处理的新颖失败模式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据分布
RL训练可能不稳定或计算成本高
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于强化学习的框架自动发现视觉-语言模型的失败模式，无需人工干预。

papers.title: Metaphors We Compute By: A Computational Audit of Cultural Translation vs. Thinking in LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are often described as multilingual because they can understand and respond in many languages. However, speaking a language is not the same as reasoning within a culture. This distinction motivates a critical question: do LLMs truly conduct culture-aware reasoning? This paper presents a preliminary computational audit of cultural inclusivity in a creative writing task. We empirically examine whether LLMs act as culturally diverse creative partners or merely as cultural translators that leverage a dominant conceptual framework with localized expressions. Using a metaphor generation task spanning five cultural settings and several abstract concepts as a case study, we find that the model exhibits stereotyped metaphor usage for certain settings, as well as Western defaultism. These findings suggest that merely prompting an LLM with a cultural identity does not guarantee culturally grounded reasoning.

analysis.tldr: LLM在多语言环境下仍表现出文化刻板印象和西方中心主义，未能实现真正的文化感知推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM常被描述为多语言模型，但语言能力不等于文化推理能力，需要评估模型是否真正具备文化包容性。
analysis.problem: LLM在创意写作任务中是否进行文化感知推理，还是仅作为文化翻译器，使用主导文化框架搭配本地化表达。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在跨文化隐喻生成任务中，模型对某些文化背景表现出刻板隐喻使用和西方默认主义。
analysis.method: 通过跨五个文化背景和多个抽象概念的隐喻生成任务，进行计算审计，比较模型在不同文化提示下的输出。
contributions: 提出文化包容性计算审计框架，评估LLM的文化感知推理能力。
通过隐喻生成实验揭示LLM的文化刻板印象和西方中心主义现象。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对隐喻生成任务，可能不适用于其他文化相关任务。
文化设置和概念选择有限，结论的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在多语言环境下仍表现出文化刻板印象和西方中心主义，未能实现真正的文化感知推理。

papers.title: CAGE: Bridging the Accuracy-Aesthetics Gap in Educational Diagrams via Code-Anchored Generative Enhancement
papers.abstract: Educational diagrams -- labeled illustrations of biological processes, chemical structures, physical systems, and mathematical concepts -- are essential cognitive tools in K-12 instruction. Yet no existing method can generate them both accurately and engagingly. Open-source diffusion models produce visually rich images but catastrophically garble text labels. Code-based generation via LLMs guarantees label correctness but yields visually flat outputs. Closed-source APIs partially bridge this gap but remain unreliable and prohibitively expensive at educational scale. We quantify this accuracy-aesthetics dilemma across all three paradigms on 400 K-12 diagram prompts, measuring both label fidelity and visual quality through complementary automated and human evaluation protocols. To resolve it, we propose CAGE (Code-Anchored Generative Enhancement): an LLM synthesizes executable code producing a structurally correct diagram, then a diffusion model conditioned on the programmatic output via ControlNet refines it into a visually polished graphic while preserving label fidelity. We also introduce EduDiagram-2K, a collection of 2,000 paired programmatic-stylized diagrams enabling this pipeline, and present proof-of-concept results and a research agenda for the multimedia community.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAGE方法，通过代码锚定生成+扩散模型增强，弥合教育图表生成中的准确性与美观性差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法无法同时生成准确且美观的教育图表：开源扩散模型文本标签混乱，代码生成视觉平淡，闭源API昂贵且不可靠。
analysis.problem: 教育图表生成中准确性与美观性之间的权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CAGE：LLM生成可执行代码产生结构正确的图表，然后扩散模型通过ControlNet以程序输出为条件，精炼为视觉美观的图形，同时保持标签保真度。
contributions: 量化了三种范式在400个K-12图表提示上的准确性与美观性差距。
提出CAGE方法，结合代码生成和扩散模型增强。
引入EduDiagram-2K数据集，包含2000对程序化-风格化图表。
analysis.experiments: 在400个K-12图表提示上进行了自动和人工评估，测量标签保真度和视觉质量。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM和扩散模型的性能。
数据集规模有限，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAGE方法，通过代码锚定生成+扩散模型增强，弥合教育图表生成中的准确性与美观性差距。

papers.title: Neuromorphic Computing for Low-Power Artificial Intelligence
papers.abstract: Classical computing is beginning to encounter fundamental limits of energy efficiency. This presents a challenge that can no longer be solved by strategies such as increasing circuit density or refining standard semiconductor processes. The growing computational and memory demands of artificial intelligence (AI) require disruptive innovation in how information is represented, stored, communicated, and processed. By leveraging novel device modalities and compute-in-memory (CIM), in addition to analog dynamics and sparse communication inspired by the brain, neuromorphic computing offers a promising path toward improvements in the energy efficiency and scalability of current AI systems. But realizing this potential is not a matter of replacing one chip with another; rather, it requires a co-design effort, spanning new materials and non-volatile device structures, novel mixed-signal circuits and architectures, and learning algorithms tailored to the physics of these substrates. This article surveys the key limitations of classical complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) technology and outlines how such cross-layer neuromorphic approaches may overcome them.

analysis.tldr: 综述神经形态计算通过跨层协同设计克服经典CMOS能效瓶颈，为低功耗AI提供路径。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典计算面临能效极限，传统方法（如增加电路密度）无法满足AI日益增长的计算和内存需求，亟需颠覆性创新。
analysis.problem: 如何通过神经形态计算实现低功耗、高能效的AI系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 跨层协同设计，涵盖新型材料与非易失性器件、混合信号电路与架构、以及适配物理特性的学习算法。
contributions: 系统梳理了经典CMOS技术的关键局限。
提出了跨层神经形态方法作为克服能效瓶颈的路径。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述性质，未提出具体算法或硬件实现。
实际部署中跨层协同设计的复杂性可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述神经形态计算通过跨层协同设计克服经典CMOS能效瓶颈，为低功耗AI提供路径。

papers.title: Individual and Combined Effects of English as a Second Language and Typos on LLM Performance
