analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多目标控制（MOC）方法，通过单模型实现用户偏好可控的LLM生成。

papers.title: The Indra Representation Hypothesis for Multimodal Alignment
papers.abstract: Recent studies have uncovered an interesting phenomenon: unimodal foundation models tend to learn convergent representations, regardless of differences in architecture, training objectives, or data modalities. However, these representations are essentially internal abstractions of samples that characterize samples independently, leading to limited expressiveness. In this paper, we propose The Indra Representation Hypothesis, inspired by the philosophical metaphor of Indra's Net. We argue that representations from unimodal foundation models are converging to implicitly reflect a shared relational structure underlying reality, akin to the relational ontology of Indra's Net. We formalize this hypothesis using the V-enriched Yoneda embedding from category theory, defining the Indra representation as a relational profile of each sample with respect to others. This formulation is shown to be unique, complete, and structure-preserving under a given cost function. We instantiate the Indra representation using angular distance and evaluate it in cross-model and cross-modal scenarios involving vision, language, and audio. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Indra representations consistently enhance robustness and alignment across architectures and modalities, providing a theoretically grounded and practical framework for training-free alignment of unimodal foundation models. Our code is available at https://github.com/Jianglin954/Indra.

analysis.tldr: 提出Indra表示假说，用范畴论形式化多模态对齐，无需训练即可提升跨模型/模态的鲁棒性与对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 单模态基础模型虽能学习收敛表示，但本质上是独立于样本的内部抽象，表达能力有限，且现有对齐方法通常需要额外训练或微调。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练的情况下，实现单模态基础模型之间的跨模型和跨模态对齐，并提升表示的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 受Indra网哲学隐喻启发，利用范畴论中的V-enriched Yoneda嵌入，将每个样本的表示定义为与其他样本的关系剖面（Indra表示），并用角距离实例化。
contributions: 提出Indra表示假说，认为单模态基础模型的表示收敛于共享的关系结构。
用范畴论形式化Indra表示，证明其唯一性、完整性和结构保持性。
在视觉、语言和音频的跨模型和跨模态场景中验证，Indra表示无需训练即可增强鲁棒性和对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉、语言和音频的跨模型和跨模态场景中进行实验，结果表明Indra表示一致地增强了鲁棒性和对齐。
limitations: 可能依赖于角距离的选择，其他距离度量未探索。
大规模模型上的计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Indra表示假说，用范畴论形式化多模态对齐，无需训练即可提升跨模型/模态的鲁棒性与对齐。

papers.title: SLaB: Sparse-Lowrank-Binary Decomposition for Efficient Large Language Models
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of large language models (LLMs) presents significant deployment challenges due to their massive computational and memory demands. While model compression, such as network pruning, offers potential solutions, most existing methods often fail to maintain good performance at high compression ratios. To address this, we propose SLaB, a novel framework that decomposes each linear layer weight into three complementary components: a sparse matrix, a low-rank matrix, and a binary matrix. SLaB eliminates the need for retraining and leverages activation-aware pruning scores to guide the decomposition process. Experiments on Llama-family models demonstrate that SLaB achieves state-of-the-art performance, reducing perplexity by up to 36% compared to existing methods at 50% compression and improving accuracy by up to 8.98% over the baseline on zero-shot tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出SLaB框架，将LLM权重分解为稀疏、低秩和二进制矩阵，无需重训练即可高效压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署面临巨大的计算和内存挑战，现有压缩方法在高压缩比下性能下降严重。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重训练的情况下实现LLM的高压缩比且保持良好性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有剪枝方法在高压缩比时性能损失大，而SLaB通过三成分分解能更好地保留信息。
analysis.method: 将每个线性层权重分解为稀疏矩阵、低秩矩阵和二进制矩阵，利用激活感知剪枝分数指导分解，无需重训练。
contributions: 提出SLaB框架，实现无需重训练的LLM高效压缩。
在Llama系列模型上达到SOTA，困惑度降低36%，零样本任务准确率提升8.98%。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama系列模型上评估，与现有方法对比，报告了困惑度和零样本准确率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于线性层，对其他层类型效果未知。
二进制矩阵的表示能力有限，可能影响极端压缩比下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SLaB框架，将LLM权重分解为稀疏、低秩和二进制矩阵，无需重训练即可高效压缩。

papers.title: RAVEN: Radar Adaptive Vision Encoders for Efficient Chirp-wise Object Detection and Segmentation
papers.abstract: This paper presents RAVEN, a computationally efficient deep learning architecture for FMCW radar perception. The method processes raw ADC data in a chirp-wise streaming manner, preserves MIMO structure through independent receiver state-space encoders, and uses a learnable cross-antenna mixing module to recover compact virtual-array features. It also introduces an early-exit mechanism so the model can make decisions using only a subset of chirps when the latent state has stabilized. Across automotive radar benchmarks, the approach reports strong object detection and BEV free-space segmentation performance while substantially reducing computation and end-to-end latency compared with conventional frame-based radar pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于流式处理的FMCW雷达感知架构，通过逐chirp处理、独立接收机编码和跨天线混合模块，在保持检测精度的同时大幅降低计算和延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统帧级雷达处理需要累积完整帧数据，导致高延迟和计算开销，难以满足实时自动驾驶需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种计算高效的雷达感知架构，能够以流式方式处理原始ADC数据，在低延迟下实现目标检测和分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RAVEN架构：逐chirp流式处理原始ADC数据，每个接收机使用独立状态空间编码器保持MIMO结构，通过可学习的跨天线混合模块恢复紧凑虚拟阵列特征，并引入早退机制在潜在状态稳定后仅用部分chirp做出决策。
contributions: 提出一种逐chirp流式处理的雷达感知架构，显著降低计算和端到端延迟。
引入独立接收机状态空间编码器和可学习跨天线混合模块，有效保持MIMO结构并恢复虚拟阵列特征。
设计早退机制，允许模型在潜在状态稳定后提前退出，进一步减少计算量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个汽车雷达基准上评估，报告了强目标检测和BEV自由空间分割性能，同时大幅减少计算和延迟。
limitations: 可能对早退阈值敏感，需要调参。
跨天线混合模块的可学习性可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于流式处理的FMCW雷达感知架构，通过逐chirp处理、独立接收机编码和跨天线混合模块，在保持检测精度的同时大幅降低计算和延迟。

papers.title: A Patch-based Cross-view Regularized Framework for Backdoor Defense in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models have become an important infrastructure for unified processing of visual and linguistic tasks. However, such models are highly susceptible to backdoor implantation during supervised fine-tuning and will steadily output the attacker's predefined harmful responses once a specific trigger pattern is activated. The core challenge of backdoor defense lies in suppressing attack success under low poisoning ratios while preserving the model's normal generation ability. These two objectives are inherently conflicting. Strong suppression often degrades benign performance, whereas weak regularization fails to mitigate backdoor behaviors. To this end, we propose a unified defense framework based on patch augmentation and cross-view regularity, which simultaneously constrains the model's anomalous behaviors in response to triggered patterns from both the feature representation and output distribution levels. Specifically, patch-level data augmentation is combined with cross-view output difference regularization to exploit the fact that backdoor responses are abnormally invariant to non-semantic perturbations and to proactively pull apart the output distributions of the original and perturbed views, thereby significantly suppressing the success rate of backdoor triggering. At the same time, we avoid over-suppression of the model during defense by imposing output entropy constraints, ensuring the quality of normal command generation. Experimental results across three models, two tasks, and six attacks show that our proposed defense method effectively reduces the attack success rate while maintaining a high level of normal text generation capability. Our work enables the secure, controlled deployment of large-scale multimodal models in realistic low-frequency poisoning and covert triggering scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于补丁增强和交叉视图正则化的后门防御框架，在抑制攻击成功率的同时保持多模态大模型的正常生成能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在微调时易被植入后门，低毒率下防御与正常性能存在冲突，现有方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何在低投毒率场景下有效抑制后门攻击成功率，同时不显著降低模型的正常文本生成能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 后门响应在非语义扰动下异常不变，而正常响应会变化；输出熵约束可避免过度抑制。
analysis.method: 结合补丁级数据增强与交叉视图输出差异正则化，利用后门响应对非语义扰动的不变性，拉大原始与扰动视图的输出分布，同时施加输出熵约束以维持正常生成质量。
contributions: 提出统一的补丁增强与交叉视图正则化防御框架，同时从特征表示和输出分布层面约束后门行为。
通过输出熵约束避免过度抑制，在多个模型、任务和攻击下验证了有效性与正常性能保持。
analysis.experiments: 在三个模型、两个任务和六种攻击下进行实验，结果表明所提方法有效降低攻击成功率并保持高水平的正常文本生成能力。
limitations: 可能对高毒率或复杂触发模式效果有限。
补丁增强策略可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于补丁增强和交叉视图正则化的后门防御框架，在抑制攻击成功率的同时保持多模态大模型的正常生成能力。

papers.title: Training-Free Image Editing with Visual Context Integration and Concept Alignment
papers.abstract: In image editing, it is essential to incorporate a context image to convey the user's precise requirements, such as subject appearance or image style. Existing training-based visual context-aware editing methods incur data collection effort and training cost. On the other hand, the training-free alternatives are typically established on diffusion inversion, which struggles with consistency and flexibility. In this work, we propose VicoEdit, a training-free and inversion-free method to inject the visual context into the pretrained text-prompted editing model. More specifically, VicoEdit directly transforms the source image into the target one based on the visual context, thereby eliminating the need for inversion that can lead to deviated trajectories. Moreover, we design a posterior sampling approach guided by concept alignment to enhance the editing consistency. Empirical results demonstrate that our training-free method achieves even better editing performance than the state-of-the-art training-based models.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练和反转的图像编辑方法VicoEdit，通过视觉上下文注入和概念对齐后验采样提升编辑一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于训练的视觉上下文感知编辑方法需要大量数据收集和训练成本，而无需训练的方法依赖扩散反转，在一致性和灵活性上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行训练和反转的情况下，将视觉上下文注入预训练的文本提示编辑模型，实现高质量且一致的图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散反转方法会导致轨迹偏离，影响编辑一致性。
analysis.method: 提出VicoEdit，一种无需训练和反转的方法，通过直接基于视觉上下文将源图像转换为目标图像，并设计概念对齐引导的后验采样方法增强编辑一致性。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练和反转的视觉上下文注入方法，避免了反转导致的轨迹偏离。
设计概念对齐引导的后验采样方法，提升编辑一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在编辑性能上优于现有最先进的基于训练的方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的能力，对复杂场景编辑效果有限。
概念对齐方法可能对某些抽象概念不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练和反转的图像编辑方法VicoEdit，通过视觉上下文注入和概念对齐后验采样提升编辑一致性。

papers.title: ECG Biometrics with ArcFace-Inception: External Validation on MIMIC and HEEDB
papers.abstract: ECG biometrics has been studied mainly on small cohorts and short inter-session intervals, leaving open how identification behaves under large galleries, external domain shift, and multi-year temporal gaps. We evaluated a 1D Inception-v1 model trained with ArcFace on an internal clinical corpus of 164,440 12-lead ECGs from 53,079 patients and tested it on larger cohorts derived from MIMIC-IV-ECG and HEEDB. The study used a unified closed-set leave-one-out protocol with Rank@K and TAR@FAR metrics, together with scale, temporal-stress, reranking, and confidence analyses. Under general comparability, the system achieved Rank@1 of 0.9506 on ASUGI-DB, 0.8291 on MIMIC-GC, and 0.6884 on HEEDB-GC. In the temporal stress test at constant gallery size, Rank@1 declined from 0.7853 to 0.6433 on MIMIC and from 0.6864 to 0.5560 on HEEDB from 1 to 5 years. Scale analysis on HEEDB showed monotonic degradation as gallery size increased and recovery as more examinations per patient became available. On HEEDB-RR, post-hoc reranking further improved retrieval, with AS-norm reaching Rank@1 = 0.8005 from a 0.7765 baseline. ECG identity information therefore remains measurable under externally validated large-scale closed-set conditions, but its operational quality is strongly affected by domain heterogeneity, longitudinal drift, gallery size, and second-stage score processing.

analysis.tldr: 使用ArcFace-Inception模型在MIMIC和HEEDB上验证ECG生物识别，发现大规模闭集条件下识别性能受域偏移、时间漂移和库大小影响。
analysis.research_motivation: ECG生物识别研究多在小规模、短间隔数据集上进行，缺乏在大规模库、外部域偏移和多年时间间隔下的验证，实际部署面临挑战。
analysis.problem: 评估ECG生物识别在大规模闭集、外部域偏移和多时间跨度下的识别性能及其影响因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别性能随库规模增大而单调下降，随每个患者可用检查次数增加而恢复；时间跨度从1年到5年导致Rank@1下降；后处理重排序可提升检索性能。
analysis.method: 使用1D Inception-v1模型结合ArcFace损失训练，在内部临床数据集上训练，在MIMIC-IV-ECG和HEEDB上测试，采用闭集留一法评估，并进行尺度、时间压力、重排序和置信度分析。
contributions: 在最大规模的ECG生物识别外部验证中，使用MIMIC和HEEDB数据集，展示了大规模闭集条件下的性能。
系统分析了域偏移、时间漂移、库规模和重排序对识别性能的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在ASUGI-DB、MIMIC-GC和HEEDB-GC上评估，Rank@1分别为0.9506、0.8291和0.6884；时间压力测试显示Rank@1随年份下降；尺度分析显示性能随库大小单调下降；重排序将HEEDB-RR的Rank@1从0.7765提升至0.8005。
limitations: 仅评估闭集场景，未涉及开集识别。
外部验证数据集可能仍存在域偏移，影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用ArcFace-Inception模型在MIMIC和HEEDB上验证ECG生物识别，发现大规模闭集条件下识别性能受域偏移、时间漂移和库大小影响。

papers.title: TM-BSN: Triangular-Masked Blind-Spot Network for Real-World Self-Supervised Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Blind-spot networks (BSNs) enable self-supervised image denoising by preventing access to the target pixel, allowing clean signal estimation without ground-truth supervision. However, this approach assumes pixel-wise noise independence, which is violated in real-world sRGB images due to spatially correlated noise from the camera's image signal processing (ISP) pipeline. While several methods employ downsampling to decorrelate noise, they alter noise statistics and limit the network's ability to utilize full contextual information. In this paper, we propose the Triangular-Masked Blind-Spot Network (TM-BSN), a novel blind-spot architecture that accurately models the spatial correlation of real sRGB noise. This correlation originates from demosaicing, where each pixel is reconstructed from neighboring samples with spatially decaying weights, resulting in a diamond-shaped pattern. To align the receptive field with this geometry, we introduce a triangular-masked convolution that restricts the kernel to its upper-triangular region, creating a diamond-shaped blind spot at the original resolution. This design excludes correlated pixels while fully leveraging uncorrelated context, eliminating the need for downsampling or post-processing. Furthermore, we use knowledge distillation to transfer complementary knowledge from multiple blind-spot predictions into a lightweight U-Net, improving both accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing self-supervised approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/parkjun210/TM-BSN.

analysis.tldr: 提出三角掩码盲点网络(TM-BSN)，通过设计三角掩码卷积来建模真实sRGB噪声的空间相关性，实现无需下采样的自监督图像去噪。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实sRGB图像中的噪声因相机ISP流程而具有空间相关性，违反盲点网络(BSN)的像素级噪声独立性假设，现有下采样方法会改变噪声统计并限制上下文利用。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持原始分辨率下，准确建模真实sRGB噪声的空间相关性，实现有效的自监督图像去噪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实sRGB噪声的空间相关性源于去马赛克过程，每个像素由相邻样本以空间衰减权重重建，形成菱形模式。
analysis.method: 提出三角掩码卷积，将卷积核限制在上三角区域，在原始分辨率下形成菱形盲点，排除相关像素同时利用不相关上下文；并通过知识蒸馏将多个盲点预测的互补知识迁移到轻量U-Net。
contributions: 提出三角掩码盲点网络(TM-BSN)，首次在原始分辨率下建模真实sRGB噪声的菱形空间相关性。
设计三角掩码卷积，无需下采样或后处理即可实现有效自监督去噪。
利用知识蒸馏提升轻量U-Net的精度和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界基准上达到最先进性能，显著优于现有自监督方法。
limitations: 可能对非菱形噪声模式适应性有限。
知识蒸馏的教师模型选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三角掩码盲点网络(TM-BSN)，通过设计三角掩码卷积来建模真实sRGB噪声的空间相关性，实现无需下采样的自监督图像去噪。

papers.title: Scalable and Explainable Learner-Video Interaction Prediction using Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Learners' use of video controls in educational videos provides implicit signals of cognitive processing and instructional design quality, yet the lack of scalable and explainable predictive models limits instructors' ability to anticipate such behavior before deployment. We propose a scalable, interpretable pipeline for predicting population-level watching, pausing, skipping, and rewinding behavior as proxies for cognitive load from video content alone. Our approach leverages multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to compute embeddings of short video segments and trains a neural classifier to identify temporally fine-grained interaction peaks. Drawing from multimedia learning theory on instructional design for optimal cognitive load, we code features of the video segments using GPT-5 and employ them as a basis for interpreting model predictions via concept activation vectors. We evaluate our pipeline on 77 million video control events from 66 online courses. Our findings demonstrate that classifiers based on MLLM embeddings reliably predict interaction peaks, generalize to unseen academic fields, and encode interpretable, theory-relevant instructional concepts. Overall, our results show the feasibility of cost-efficient, interpretable pre-screening of educational video design and open new opportunities to empirically examine multimedia learning theory at scale.

analysis.tldr: 利用多模态大语言模型预测学习者与教育视频的交互行为，实现可扩展且可解释的预筛选。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育视频中学习者的控制行为（如暂停、快进）隐含认知处理信号，但缺乏可扩展且可解释的预测模型来帮助教师提前评估视频设计质量。
analysis.problem: 如何从视频内容本身预测学习者群体层面的观看、暂停、跳过和回放行为，作为认知负荷的代理指标，并确保模型可解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）计算短片段嵌入，训练神经分类器识别细粒度交互峰值；利用GPT-5编码视频片段特征，并通过概念激活向量解释预测。
contributions: 提出可扩展且可解释的流水线，从视频内容预测学习者交互行为。
在66门在线课程的7700万视频控制事件上验证了MLLM嵌入分类器的有效性、泛化性和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在66门在线课程的7700万视频控制事件上评估，分类器能可靠预测交互峰值，泛化到未见学术领域，并编码可解释的教学概念。
limitations: 可能依赖特定MLLM（如GPT-5）的嵌入质量。
预测为群体水平，个体差异未考虑。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用多模态大语言模型预测学习者与教育视频的交互行为，实现可扩展且可解释的预筛选。

papers.title: MVis-Fold: A Three-Dimensional Microvascular Structure Inference Model for Super-Resolution Ultrasound
papers.abstract: Super-resolution ultrasound (SRUS) technology has overcome the resolution limitations of conventional ultrasound, enabling micrometer-scale imaging of microvasculature. However, due to the nature of imaging principles, three-dimensional reconstruction of microvasculature from SRUS remains an open challenge. We developed microvascular visualization fold (MVis-Fold), an innovative three-dimensional microvascular reconstruction model that integrates a cross-scale network architecture. This model can perform high-fidelity inference and reconstruction of three-dimensional microvascular networks from two-dimensional SRUS images. It precisely calculates key parameters in three-dimensional space that traditional two-dimensional SRUS cannot readily obtain. We validated the model's accuracy and reliability in three-dimensional microvascular reconstruction of solid tumors. This study establishes a foundation for three-dimensional quantitative analysis of microvasculature. It provides new tools and methods for diagnosis and monitoring of various diseases.

analysis.tldr: 提出MVis-Fold模型，从2D超分辨率超声图像高保真推断3D微血管结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 超分辨率超声虽能实现微米级成像，但受成像原理限制，从2D图像重建3D微血管网络仍是开放挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何从二维超分辨率超声图像高保真地推断和重建三维微血管网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MVis-Fold，一种集成跨尺度网络架构的三维微血管重建模型。
contributions: 提出MVis-Fold模型，实现从2D SRUS图像到3D微血管网络的高保真推断与重建。
在实体肿瘤三维微血管重建中验证了模型的准确性和可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在实体肿瘤三维微血管重建任务上验证了模型的准确性和可靠性，但摘要未提供具体实验指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定成像条件或肿瘤类型。
未提及与其他方法的定量比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MVis-Fold模型，从2D超分辨率超声图像高保真推断3D微血管结构。

papers.title: Discrete Prototypical Memories for Federated Time Series Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) as federated learning (FL)-based time series foundation models offers a promising way to transfer the generalization capabilities of LLMs to time series data while preserving access to private data. However, the semantic misalignment between time-series data and the text-centric latent space of existing LLMs often leads to degraded performance. Meanwhile, the parameter-sharing mechanism in existing FL methods model heterogeneous cross-domain time-series data into a unified continuous latent space, which contradicts the fact that time-series semantics frequently manifest as discrete and recurring regimes. To address these limitations, we propose \textsc{FeDPM}, a federated framework for time-series foundation models based on discrete prototypical memories. Specifically, we learn local prototypical memory priors for intra-domain time-series data. We then align cross-domain memories to promote a unified discrete latent space and introduce a domain-specific memory update mechanism to balance shared and personalized prototypical knowledge. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of \textsc{FeDPM}. The code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/FedUnit-64D1.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于离散原型记忆的联邦时间序列基础模型框架FeDPM，解决语义对齐和跨域异质性难题。
analysis.research_motivation: 将LLM作为联邦时间序列基础模型可结合泛化能力与隐私保护，但时间序列与文本语义空间错位，且现有联邦方法将异质数据映射到统一连续空间，忽略了时间序列的离散和重复模式。
analysis.problem: 联邦学习中时间序列基础模型的语义对齐和跨域异质性建模问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时间序列语义常表现为离散和重复的机制，而现有联邦方法使用统一连续潜在空间，导致性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出FeDPM框架：学习局部原型记忆先验，对齐跨域记忆以形成统一离散潜在空间，并引入域特定记忆更新机制平衡共享与个性化知识。
contributions: 提出基于离散原型记忆的联邦时间序列基础模型框架FeDPM
设计跨域记忆对齐和域特定记忆更新机制
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及大量实验证明效率和有效性，代码已公开。
limitations: 可能依赖原型数量等超参数
跨域对齐的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于离散原型记忆的联邦时间序列基础模型框架FeDPM，解决语义对齐和跨域异质性难题。

papers.title: MAVEN: A Mesh-Aware Volumetric Encoding Network for Simulating 3D Flexible Deformation
papers.abstract: Deep learning-based approaches, particularly graph neural networks (GNNs), have gained prominence in simulating flexible deformations and contacts of solids, due to their ability to handle unstructured physical fields and nonlinear regression on graph structures. However, existing GNNs commonly represent meshes with graphs built solely from vertices and edges. These approaches tend to overlook higher-dimensional spatial features, e.g., 2D facets and 3D cells, from the original geometry. As a result, it is challenging to accurately capture boundary representations and volumetric characteristics, though this information is critically important for modeling contact interactions and internal physical quantity propagation, particularly under sparse mesh discretization. In this paper, we introduce MAVEN, a mesh-aware volumetric encoding network for simulating 3D flexible deformation, which explicitly models geometric mesh elements of higher dimension to achieve a more accurate and natural physical simulation. MAVEN establishes learnable mappings among 3D cells, 2D facets, and vertices, enabling flexible mutual transformations. Explicit geometric features are incorporated into the model to alleviate the burden of implicitly learning geometric patterns. Experimental results show that MAVEN consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance across established datasets and a novel metal stretch-bending task featuring large deformations and prolonged contacts.

analysis.tldr: MAVEN通过显式建模高维网格单元（3D单元、2D面片）提升柔性变形模拟的精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GNN仅用顶点和边构建图，忽略高维空间特征（如面片、单元），导致稀疏网格下边界表示和体积特性捕捉困难，影响接触交互和物理量传播的模拟精度。
analysis.problem: 如何利用网格的高维几何特征（2D面片、3D单元）改进柔性变形模拟的准确性和自然性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出仅用顶点和边的图结构难以准确捕捉边界表示和体积特性，尤其在稀疏网格下，这限制了接触交互和内部物理量传播的建模。
analysis.method: 提出MAVEN，一种网格感知的体积编码网络，显式建模3D单元、2D面片和顶点，建立三者间的可学习映射，并融入显式几何特征以减轻隐式学习负担。
contributions: 提出MAVEN，显式利用高维网格单元（3D单元、2D面片）进行物理模拟。
建立顶点、面片、单元间的可学习映射，实现灵活互转。
在多个数据集和新任务上取得SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个已有数据集和一个新的大变形长接触金属拉伸弯曲任务上评估，MAVEN持续达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖网格质量，对不规则网格的泛化性未知。
计算开销可能高于纯顶点图方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MAVEN通过显式建模高维网格单元（3D单元、2D面片）提升柔性变形模拟的精度。

papers.title: Beyond Standard Benchmarks: A Systematic Audit of Vision-Language Model's Robustness to Natural Semantic Variation Across Diverse Tasks
papers.abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) trained on web-scale image-text pairs have enabled impressive zero-shot transfer across a diverse range of visual tasks. However, comprehensive and independent evaluation beyond standard benchmarks is essential to understand their robustness, limitations, and real-world applicability. This paper presents a systematic evaluation framework for VLMs under natural adversarial scenarios for diverse downstream tasks, which has been overlooked in previous evaluation works. We evaluate a wide range of VLMs (CLIP, robust CLIP, BLIP2, and SigLIP2) on curated adversarial datasets (typographic attacks, ImageNet-A, and natural language-induced adversarial examples). We measure the natural adversarial performance of selected VLMs for zero-shot image classification, semantic segmentation, and visual question answering. Our analysis reveals that robust CLIP models can amplify natural adversarial vulnerabilities, and CLIP models significantly reduce performance for natural language-induced adversarial examples. Additionally, we provide interpretable analyses to identify failure modes. We hope our findings inspire future research in robust and fair multimodal pattern recognition.

analysis.tldr: 系统审计VLM在自然语义变化下的鲁棒性，发现鲁棒CLIP可能放大对抗脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM评估依赖标准基准，忽略了自然对抗场景下的鲁棒性，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: VLM在自然语义变化（如拼写攻击、自然语言诱导对抗样本）下的鲁棒性缺乏系统评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 鲁棒CLIP模型可能放大自然对抗脆弱性；CLIP模型在自然语言诱导对抗样本上性能显著下降。
analysis.method: 提出系统评估框架，在多种下游任务（零样本分类、语义分割、VQA）上测试CLIP、鲁棒CLIP、BLIP2、SigLIP2，使用typographic attacks、ImageNet-A和自然语言诱导对抗样本。
contributions: 提出VLM在自然对抗场景下的系统评估框架
揭示鲁棒CLIP放大对抗脆弱性等新发现
analysis.experiments: 在零样本图像分类、语义分割和VQA任务上评估CLIP、鲁棒CLIP、BLIP2、SigLIP2，使用typographic attacks、ImageNet-A和自然语言诱导对抗样本。
limitations: 未覆盖所有VLM架构
对抗样本类型有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统审计VLM在自然语义变化下的鲁棒性，发现鲁棒CLIP可能放大对抗脆弱性。

papers.title: MC-GenRef: Annotation-free mammography microcalcification segmentation with generative posterior refinement
papers.abstract: Microcalcification (MC) analysis is clinically important in screening mammography because clustered puncta can be an early sign of malignancy, yet dense MC segmentation remains challenging: targets are extremely small and sparse, dense pixel-level labels are expensive and ambiguous, and cross-site shift often induces texture-driven false positives and missed puncta in dense tissue. We propose MC-GenRef, a real dense-label-free framework that combines high-fidelity synthetic supervision with test-time generative posterior refinement (TT-GPR). During training, real negative mammogram patches are used as backgrounds, and physically plausible MC patterns are injected through a lightweight image formation model with local contrast modulation and blur, yielding exact image-mask pairs without real dense annotation. Using only these synthetic labeled pairs, MC-GenRef trains a base segmentor and a seed-conditioned rectified-flow (RF) generator that serves as a controllable generative prior. During inference, TT-GPR treats segmentation as approximate posterior inference: it derives a sparse seed from the current prediction, forms seed-consistent RF projections, converts them into case-specific surrogate targets through the frozen segmentor, and iteratively refines the logits with overlap-consistent and edge-aware regularization. On INbreast, the synthetic-only initializer achieved the best Dice without real dense annotations, while TT-GPR improved miss-sensitive performance to Recall and FNR, with strong class-balanced behavior (Bal.Acc., G-Mean). On an external private Yonsei cohort ( n=50 ), TT-GPR consistently improved the synthetic-only initializer under cross-site shift, increasing Dice and Recall while reducing FNR. These results suggest that test-time generative posterior refinement is a practical route to reduce MC misses and improve robustness without additional real dense labeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出无真实密集标注的乳腺微钙化分割方法，利用合成监督和测试时生成后验细化提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺微钙化分割在临床筛查中重要但困难：目标极小且稀疏，密集像素级标注昂贵且存在歧义，跨站点偏移导致假阳性和漏检。
analysis.problem: 如何在无真实密集标注的情况下实现鲁棒的乳腺微钙化分割，并减少跨站点偏移导致的假阳性和漏检。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MC-GenRef框架，包含两个阶段：训练时使用合成监督（真实阴性背景+物理合理MC模式注入）训练基础分割器和种子条件整流流生成器；测试时通过测试时生成后验细化（TT-GPR）迭代优化分割logits。
contributions: 提出无真实密集标注的微钙化分割框架，结合合成监督和测试时生成后验细化。
在INbreast和外部Yonsei数据集上验证了TT-GPR对召回率和Dice的改进，尤其在跨站点偏移下。
analysis.experiments: 在INbreast数据集上，合成初始化器在无真实密集标注下达到最佳Dice，TT-GPR进一步改善召回率和FNR；在外部Yonsei队列（n=50）上，TT-GPR在跨站点偏移下持续提升Dice和召回率，降低FNR。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据的真实性，极端病例下合成模式可能不充分。
测试时细化增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无真实密集标注的乳腺微钙化分割方法，利用合成监督和测试时生成后验细化提升性能。

papers.title: What Makes a Sale? Rethinking End-to-End Seller--Buyer Retail Dynamics with LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Evaluating retail strategies before deployment is difficult, as outcomes are determined across multiple stages, from seller-side persuasion through buyer-seller interaction to purchase decisions. However, existing retail simulators capture only partial aspects of this process and do not model cross-stage dependencies, making it difficult to assess how early decisions affect downstream outcomes. We present RetailSim, an end-to-end retail simulation framework that models this pipeline in a unified environment, explicitly designed for simulation fidelity through diverse product spaces, persona-driven agents, and multi-turn interactions. We evaluate RetailSim with a dual protocol comprising human evaluation of behavioral fidelity and meta-evaluation against real-world economic regularities, showing that it successfully reproduces key patterns such as demographic purchasing behavior, the price-demand relationship, and heterogeneous price elasticity. We further demonstrate its practical utility via decision-oriented use cases, including persona inference, seller-buyer interaction analysis, and sales strategy evaluation, showing RetailSim's potential as a controlled testbed for exploring retail strategies.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端零售模拟框架RetailSim，用LLM Agent建模卖家-买家多阶段交互，验证了行为真实性与经济规律复现能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有零售模拟器仅捕获部分环节，无法建模跨阶段依赖关系，导致难以评估早期决策对下游结果的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个端到端、高保真的零售模拟框架，以统一建模从卖家策略到买家购买决策的完整流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出模拟需复现人口统计购买行为、价格-需求关系、异质性价格弹性等经济规律。
analysis.method: 提出RetailSim框架，包含多样化产品空间、角色驱动Agent和多轮交互，通过双协议评估（人类行为保真度评估+真实经济规律元评估）验证模拟保真度。
contributions: 提出首个端到端零售模拟框架RetailSim，统一建模卖家-买家多阶段交互。
设计双协议评估方法，验证模拟在行为保真度和经济规律复现上的有效性。
展示框架在人物推断、交互分析和销售策略评估等决策导向用例中的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及通过人类评估和元评估验证了模拟保真度，并展示了三个决策用例。
limitations: 可能未涵盖真实零售中的复杂外部因素（如广告、库存管理）。
Agent行为可能无法完全模拟人类非理性决策。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端零售模拟框架RetailSim，用LLM Agent建模卖家-买家多阶段交互，验证了行为真实性与经济规律复现能力。

papers.title: Group-DINOmics: Incorporating People Dynamics into DINO for Self-supervised Group Activity Feature Learning
papers.abstract: This paper proposes Group Activity Feature (GAF) learning without group activity annotations. Unlike prior work, which uses low-level static local features to learn GAFs, we propose leveraging dynamics-aware and group-aware pretext tasks, along with local and global features provided by DINO, for group-dynamics-aware GAF learning. To adapt DINO and GAF learning to local dynamics and global group features, our pretext tasks use person flow estimation and group-relevant object location estimation, respectively. Person flow estimation is used to represent the local motion of each person, which is an important cue for understanding group activities. In contrast, group-relevant object location estimation encourages GAFs to learn scene context (e.g., spatial relations of people and objects) as global features. Comprehensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method in group activity retrieval and recognition. Our ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each component in our method. Code: https://github.com/tezuka0001/Group-DINOmics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自监督方法，利用DINO和人群动态先验任务学习群体活动特征，无需群体活动标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖低级静态局部特征学习群体活动特征，忽略了人群动态和群体感知信息，且需要大量标注数据。
analysis.problem: 如何在无群体活动标注的情况下，学习包含动态和全局场景上下文的群体活动特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于DINO模型，设计两个预文本任务：人员流估计（捕捉局部动态）和群体相关物体位置估计（捕捉全局场景上下文），进行自监督群体活动特征学习。
contributions: 提出一种自监督群体活动特征学习方法，无需群体活动标注。
设计动态感知和群体感知的预文本任务，结合DINO的局部和全局特征。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上，方法在群体活动检索和识别任务中达到最先进性能，消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖DINO预训练模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
预文本任务设计可能不适用于所有群体活动场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自监督方法，利用DINO和人群动态先验任务学习群体活动特征，无需群体活动标注。

papers.title: Grid2Matrix: Revealing Digital Agnosia in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel on many multimodal reasoning benchmarks, but these evaluations often do not require an exhaustive readout of the image and can therefore obscure failures in faithfully capturing all visual details. We introduce Grid2Matrix (G2M), a controlled benchmark in which a model is shown a color grid and a color-to-number mapping, and must output the corresponding matrix. By varying grid size and the number of colors, G2M provides a simple way to increase visual complexity while minimizing semantic confounds. We find that VLMs exhibit a sharp early collapse in zero-shot end-to-end evaluation, failing on surprisingly small grids rather than degrading gradually as the task becomes denser. We probe the visual encoders of VLMs from two representative families and find that they preserve substantially more of the grid information than the corresponding end-to-end outputs. This suggests that the failure is not explained by visual encoding alone, but also reflects a gap between what remains recoverable from visual features and what is ultimately expressed in language. We term this gap \textit{Digital Agnosia}. Further analyses show that these errors are highly structured and depend strongly on how grid cells overlap with visual patch boundaries. We also find that common strategies such as model scaling and multimodal alignment do not fully eliminate this failure mode. We expect G2M to serve as a useful testbed for understanding where and how VLMs lose fine visual details, and for evaluating tasks where missing even small visual details can matter, such as tables, charts, forms, and GUIs.

analysis.tldr: VLMs在细粒度视觉细节提取上存在“数字失认症”，Grid2Matrix基准揭示了其从视觉编码到语言输出的信息丢失。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM基准不要求穷尽读取图像，可能掩盖模型在忠实捕捉所有视觉细节上的失败，而表格、图表等应用场景对细粒度视觉信息要求很高。
analysis.problem: VLM在需要精确读取并转换视觉细节（如颜色网格到矩阵）的任务中表现不佳，且失败模式未被系统研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLMs在零样本端到端评估中表现出急剧的早期崩溃，在网格很小时就失败，而非随复杂度逐渐退化；视觉编码器保留了更多信息，但语言输出丢失严重，形成“数字失认症”；错误高度结构化，与网格单元和视觉块边界的重叠方式强相关；模型缩放和多模态对齐不能完全消除该失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出Grid2Matrix（G2M）基准，通过变化网格大小和颜色数量控制视觉复杂度，要求模型根据颜色-数字映射输出对应矩阵。
contributions: 设计Grid2Matrix基准，系统评估VLM的细粒度视觉细节提取能力。
发现并定义“数字失认症”，即视觉编码保留信息但语言输出丢失的差距。
揭示错误的结构化特性及其与视觉块边界的依赖关系，并指出常见策略（缩放、对齐）的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个VLM系列上进行零样本端到端评估，并探针视觉编码器分析信息保留情况。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅涉及颜色网格到矩阵的转换，可能无法完全代表所有细粒度视觉任务。
未提供具体模型规模或训练数据对结果影响的详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs在细粒度视觉细节提取上存在“数字失认症”，Grid2Matrix基准揭示了其从视觉编码到语言输出的信息丢失。

papers.title: The Topology of Multimodal Fusion: Why Current Architectures Fail at Creative Cognition
papers.abstract: This paper identifies a structural limitation in current multimodal AI architectures that is topological rather than parametric. Contrastive alignment (CLIP), cross-attention fusion (GPT-4V/Gemini), and diffusion-based generation share a common geometric prior -- modal separability -- which we term contact topology. The argument rests on three pillars with philosophy as the generative center. The philosophical pillar reinterprets Wittgenstein's saying/showing distinction as a problem rather than a conclusion: where Wittgenstein chose silence, the Chinese craft epistemology tradition responded with xiang (operative schema) -- the third state emerging when saying and showing interpenetrate. A cruciform framework (dao/qi x saying/showing) positions xiang at the intersection, executing dual huacai (transformation-and-cutting) along both axes. This generates a dual-layer dynamics: chuanghua (creative transformation as spontaneous event) and huacai (its institutionalization into repeatable form). The cognitive science pillar reinterprets DMN/ECN/SN tripartite co-activation through the pathological mirror: overlap isomorphism vs. superimposition collapse in a 2D parameter space (coupling intensity x regulatory capacity). The mathematical pillar formalizes these via fiber bundles and Yang-Mills curvature, with the cruciform structure mapped to fiber bundle language. We propose UOO implementation via Neural ODEs with topological regularization, the ANALOGY-MM benchmark with error-type-ratio metric, and the META-TOP three-tier benchmark testing cross-civilizational topological isomorphism across seven archetypes. A phased experimental roadmap with explicit termination criteria ensures clean exit if falsified.

analysis.tldr: 论文指出当前多模态融合架构存在拓扑结构缺陷，并提出基于纤维丛和Yang-Mills曲率的理论框架与新型基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态AI架构（如CLIP、GPT-4V、扩散模型）在创造性认知任务上表现不佳，其根本原因被认为是拓扑结构而非参数层面的限制，即模态可分离性（接触拓扑）这一几何先验。
analysis.problem: 多模态融合架构的拓扑结构缺陷导致无法实现真正的创造性认知，需要从拓扑学角度重新设计融合机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，但指出对比对齐、交叉注意力融合和扩散生成共享模态可分离性的几何先验。
analysis.method: 提出基于纤维丛和Yang-Mills曲率的理论框架，将十字形结构映射到纤维丛语言，并通过神经ODE结合拓扑正则化实现UOO（未明确说明全称）。同时提出ANALOGY-MM基准（含错误类型比率指标）和META-TOP三层次基准（测试跨文明拓扑同构性）。
contributions: 识别多模态融合架构的拓扑结构缺陷（接触拓扑），并给出哲学、认知科学和数学三方面的理论论证。
提出基于纤维丛和Yang-Mills曲率的理论框架，以及UOO实现方案（神经ODE+拓扑正则化）。
设计ANALOGY-MM和META-TOP两个新型基准，用于评估创造性认知和跨文明拓扑同构性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了实验路线图（分阶段实验，含终止条件）。
limitations: 理论框架高度抽象，可能难以直接转化为实用算法。
基准测试的可行性和有效性尚未通过实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文指出当前多模态融合架构存在拓扑结构缺陷，并提出基于纤维丛和Yang-Mills曲率的理论框架与新型基准。

papers.title: DP-OPD: Differentially Private On-Policy Distillation for Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly adapted to proprietary and domain-specific corpora that contain sensitive information, creating a tension between formal privacy guarantees and efficient deployment through model compression. Differential privacy (DP), typically enforced via DP-SGD, provides record-level protection but often incurs substantial utility loss in autoregressive generation, where optimization noise can amplify exposure bias and compounding errors along long rollouts. Existing approaches to private distillation either apply DP-SGD to both teacher and student, worsening computation and the privacy--utility tradeoff, or rely on DP synthetic text generation from a DP-trained teacher, avoiding DP on the student at the cost of DP-optimizing a large teacher and introducing an offline generation pipeline. We propose \textbf{Differentially Private On-Policy Distillation (DP-OPD)}, a synthesis-free framework that enforces privacy solely through DP-SGD on the student while leveraging a frozen teacher to provide dense token-level targets on \emph{student-generated} trajectories. DP-OPD instantiates this idea via \emph{private generalized knowledge distillation} on continuation tokens. Under a strict privacy budget ($\varepsilon=2.0$), DP-OPD improves perplexity over DP fine-tuning and off-policy DP distillation, and outperforms synthesis-based DP distillation (Yelp: 44.15$\rightarrow$41.68; BigPatent: 32.43$\rightarrow$30.63), while substantially simplifying the training pipeline. In particular, \textbf{DP-OPD collapses private compression into a single DP student-training loop} by eliminating DP teacher training and offline synthetic text generation. Code will be released upon publication at https://github.com/khademfatemeh/dp_opd.

analysis.tldr: 提出DP-OPD，一种仅对学生模型施加差分隐私的在线蒸馏框架，在严格隐私预算下提升语言模型压缩效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在敏感数据上微调时需平衡隐私保护与模型压缩效率，现有DP蒸馏方法或导致高计算成本与隐私-效用权衡恶化，或依赖离线合成数据生成，流程复杂。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证差分隐私的同时，高效地将大模型知识蒸馏到小模型，避免DP-SGD在自回归生成中的效用损失和复杂训练流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DP-SGD在自回归生成中会放大曝光偏差和累积误差，导致效用损失；现有离线蒸馏方法需要DP训练教师模型并生成合成文本，流程繁琐。
analysis.method: DP-OPD：仅对学生模型使用DP-SGD，冻结的教师模型在学生生成的轨迹上提供密集的token级目标，通过私有广义知识蒸馏实现隐私保护。
contributions: 提出DP-OPD框架，仅对学生模型施加DP，消除教师DP训练和离线合成文本生成，简化训练流程。
在严格隐私预算（ε=2.0）下，DP-OPD在Yelp和BigPatent数据集上困惑度优于DP微调和现有DP蒸馏方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Yelp和BigPatent数据集上评估，隐私预算ε=2.0，DP-OPD将Yelp困惑度从44.15降至41.68，BigPatent从32.43降至30.63。
limitations: 可能仅适用于自回归语言模型，未验证其他架构。
隐私预算固定为ε=2.0，未探索更宽松或更严格预算下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DP-OPD，一种仅对学生模型施加差分隐私的在线蒸馏框架，在严格隐私预算下提升语言模型压缩效果。

papers.title: Empirical Characterization of Rationale Stability Under Controlled Perturbations for Explainable Pattern Recognition
papers.abstract: Reliable pattern recognition systems should exhibit consistent behavior across similar inputs, and their explanations should remain stable. However, most Explainable AI evaluations remain instance centric and do not explicitly quantify whether attribution patterns are consistent across samples that share the same class or represent small variations of the same input. In this work, we propose a novel metric aimed at assessing the consistency of model explanations, ensuring that models consistently reflect the intended objectives and consistency under label-preserving perturbations. We implement this metric using a pre-trained BERT model on the SST-2 sentiment analysis dataset, with additional robustness tests on RoBERTa, DistilBERT, and IMDB, applying SHAP to compute feature importance for various test samples. The proposed metric quantifies the cosine similarity of SHAP values for inputs with the same label, aiming to detect inconsistent behaviors, such as biased reliance on certain features or failure to maintain consistent reasoning for similar predictions. Through a series of experiments, we evaluate the ability of this metric to identify misaligned predictions and inconsistencies in model explanations. These experiments are compared against standard fidelity metrics to assess whether the new metric can effectively identify when a model's behavior deviates from its intended objectives. The proposed framework provides a deeper understanding of model behavior by enabling more robust verification of rationale stability, which is critical for building trustworthy AI systems. By quantifying whether models rely on consistent attribution patterns for similar inputs, the proposed approach supports more robust evaluation of model behavior in practical pattern recognition pipelines. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/anmspro/ESS-XAI-Stability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种衡量模型解释一致性的新指标，通过扰动下归因稳定性评估可信AI。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可解释AI评估多聚焦单实例，缺乏对同类或微变输入下解释一致性的量化，难以检测模型依赖偏置特征或推理不一致的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何量化模型解释在标签保持扰动下的稳定性，以识别模型行为与预期目标的偏离。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于预训练BERT在SST-2上，用SHAP计算特征重要性，通过余弦相似度度量同类输入SHAP值的一致性，并在RoBERTa、DistilBERT、IMDB上测试鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出一种评估模型解释一致性的新指标，量化标签保持扰动下归因模式的稳定性。
通过实验验证该指标能有效识别模型行为与预期目标的偏离，并与标准保真度指标对比。
analysis.experiments: 在SST-2、IMDB数据集上使用BERT、RoBERTa、DistilBERT模型，应用SHAP计算特征重要性，并与标准保真度指标对比。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于SHAP和BERT系列模型，可能不适用于其他解释方法或架构。
余弦相似度可能无法完全捕捉归因分布的细微差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种衡量模型解释一致性的新指标，通过扰动下归因稳定性评估可信AI。

papers.title: Beyond Few-Step Inference: Accelerating Video Diffusion Transformer Model Serving with Inter-Request Caching Reuse
papers.abstract: Video Diffusion Transformer (DiT) models are a dominant approach for high-quality video generation but suffer from high inference cost due to iterative denoising. Existing caching approaches primarily exploit similarity within the diffusion process of a single request to skip redundant denoising steps. In this paper, we introduce Chorus, a caching approach that leverages similarity across requests to accelerate video diffusion model serving. Chorus achieves up to 45\% speedup on industrial 4-step distilled models, where prior intra-request caching approaches are ineffective. Particularly, Chorus employs a three-stage caching strategy along the denoising process. Stage 1 performs full reuse of latent features from similar requests. Stage 2 exploits inter-request caching in specific latent regions during intermediate denoising steps. This stage is combined with Token-Guided Attention Amplification to improve semantic alignment between the generated video and the conditional prompts, thereby extending the applicability of full reuse to later denoising steps.

analysis.tldr: Chorus通过跨请求缓存复用加速视频扩散Transformer模型推理，在4步蒸馏模型上实现高达45%的加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频扩散Transformer模型推理成本高，现有缓存方法仅利用单请求内的相似性，在少步蒸馏模型中效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用跨请求的相似性来加速视频扩散模型服务，特别是在少步蒸馏模型中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Chorus，采用三阶段缓存策略：阶段1完全复用相似请求的潜在特征；阶段2在中间去噪步骤中复用特定潜在区域的跨请求缓存，并结合Token引导的注意力放大以改善语义对齐。
contributions: 提出跨请求缓存复用方法Chorus，显著加速视频扩散模型服务。
设计三阶段缓存策略，结合Token引导的注意力放大，在少步蒸馏模型中实现高达45%的加速。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖于请求之间的相似性，对于高度多样化的请求加速效果有限。
Token引导的注意力放大可能增加额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Chorus通过跨请求缓存复用加速视频扩散Transformer模型推理，在4步蒸馏模型上实现高达45%的加速。

papers.title: Conversational Control with Ontologies for Large Language Models: A Lightweight Framework for Constrained Generation
papers.abstract: Conversational agents based on Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently emerged as powerful tools for human-computer interaction. Nevertheless, their black-box nature implies challenges in predictability and a lack of personalization, both of which can be addressed by controlled generation. This work proposes an end-to-end method to obtain modular and explainable control over LLM outputs through ontological definitions of aspects related to the conversation. Key aspects are modeled and used as constraints; we then further fine-tune the LLM to generate content accordingly. To validate our approach, we explore two tasks that tackle two key conversational aspects: the English proficiency level and the polarity profile of the content. Using a hybrid fine-tuning procedure on seven state-of-the-art, open-weight conversational LLMs, we show that our method consistently outperforms pre-trained baselines, even on smaller models. Beyond quantitative gains, the framework remains model-agnostic, lightweight, and interpretable, enabling reusable control strategies that can be extended to new domains and interaction goals. This approach enhances alignment with strategy instructions and demonstrates the effectiveness of ontology-driven control in conversational systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于本体论的轻量级框架，通过微调LLM实现对话中的可控生成。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM黑盒特性导致可预测性差和缺乏个性化，需要可控生成方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过本体定义对话关键方面，实现模块化、可解释的LLM输出控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用本体建模对话关键方面作为约束，通过混合微调程序对LLM进行微调以生成符合约束的内容。
contributions: 提出端到端的本体驱动可控生成框架，实现模块化和可解释控制。
在七个开源对话LLM上验证方法有效性，一致优于预训练基线。
analysis.experiments: 在七个开源对话LLM上评估两个任务（英语水平、情感极性），显示方法一致优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖本体设计的质量。
未在更大规模或闭源模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于本体论的轻量级框架，通过微调LLM实现对话中的可控生成。

papers.title: PSY-STEP: Structuring Therapeutic Targets and Action Sequences for Proactive Counseling Dialogue Systems
papers.abstract: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) aims to identify and restructure automatic negative thoughts pertaining to involuntary interpretations of events, yet existing counseling agents struggle to identify and address them in dialogue settings. To bridge this gap, we introduce STEP, a dataset that models CBT counseling by explicitly reflecting automatic thoughts alongside dynamic, action-level counseling sequences. Using this dataset, we train STEPPER, a counseling agent that proactively elicits automatic thoughts and executes cognitively grounded interventions. To further enhance both decision accuracy and empathic responsiveness, we refine STEPPER through preference learning based on simulated, synthesized counseling sessions. Extensive CBT-aligned evaluations show that STEPPER delivers more clinically grounded, coherent, and personalized counseling compared to other strong baseline models, and achieves higher counselor competence without inducing emotional disruption.

analysis.tldr: 提出STEP数据集和STEPPER咨询代理，通过显式建模自动思维和动作序列，结合偏好学习提升认知行为疗法的对话效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有咨询代理难以在对话中识别和应对自动负性思维，缺乏结构化认知行为疗法的支持。
analysis.problem: 如何让对话系统在咨询场景中主动识别自动思维并执行认知导向的干预动作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建STEP数据集建模自动思维和动作序列，训练STEPPER代理，并通过模拟会话的偏好学习优化决策准确性和共情响应。
contributions: 提出STEP数据集，显式建模自动思维和动态咨询动作序列。
训练STEPPER代理，结合偏好学习提升临床基础、连贯性和个性化。
analysis.experiments: 在CBT对齐评估中，STEPPER相比强基线模型在临床基础、连贯性和个性化上更优，且达到更高咨询师能力而不引发情绪困扰。
limitations: 依赖模拟合成会话进行偏好学习，真实场景泛化性待验证。
自动思维识别可能受语言表达多样性影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STEP数据集和STEPPER咨询代理，通过显式建模自动思维和动作序列，结合偏好学习提升认知行为疗法的对话效果。

papers.title: Parameter-Efficient Semantic Augmentation for Enhancing Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVOD) enables models to detect any object category, including unseen ones. Benefiting from large-scale pre-training, existing OVOD methods achieve strong detection performance on general scenarios (e.g., OV-COCO) but suffer severe performance drops when transferred to downstream tasks with substantial domain shifts. This degradation stems from the scarcity and weak semantics of category labels in domain-specific task, as well as the inability of existing models to capture auxiliary semantics beyond coarse-grained category label. To address these issues, we propose HSA-DINO, a parameter-efficient semantic augmentation framework for enhancing open-vocabulary object detection. Specifically, we propose a multi-scale prompt bank that leverages image feature pyramids to capture hierarchical semantics and select domain-specific local semantic prompts, progressively enriching textual representations from coarse to fine-grained levels. Furthermore, we introduce a semantic-aware router that dynamically selects the appropriate semantic augmentation strategy during inference, thereby preventing parameter updates from degrading the generalization ability of the pre-trained OVOD model. We evaluate HSA-DINO on OV-COCO, several vertical domain datasets, and modified benchmark settings. The results show that HSA-DINO performs favorably against previous state-of-the-art methods, achieving a superior trade-off between domain adaptability and open-vocabulary generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出参数高效语义增强框架HSA-DINO，通过多尺度提示库和语义感知路由器提升开放词汇目标检测的域适应能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇目标检测在通用场景表现良好，但迁移到域偏移大的下游任务时性能严重下降，原因是域特定类别标签稀缺且语义弱，现有模型无法捕获粗粒度标签之外的辅助语义。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损害预训练模型泛化能力的前提下，增强开放词汇目标检测器对域特定任务的语义理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出域偏移导致性能下降，根源在于域特定类别标签的稀缺性和弱语义性，以及现有模型对粗粒度标签之外辅助语义的捕获不足。
analysis.method: 提出HSA-DINO框架，包含多尺度提示库（利用图像特征金字塔捕获层次化语义并选择域特定局部语义提示）和语义感知路由器（动态选择语义增强策略，避免参数更新损害泛化能力）。
contributions: 提出参数高效语义增强框架HSA-DINO，通过多尺度提示库和语义感知路由器提升开放词汇目标检测的域适应性。
在OV-COCO、多个垂直域数据集和修改的基准设置上取得优于现有方法的性能，实现了域适应性与开放词汇泛化之间的良好权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在OV-COCO、多个垂直域数据集和修改的基准设置上评估，结果优于先前最先进方法。
limitations: 摘要未提及在极端域偏移或极低资源场景下的表现。
多尺度提示库和语义感知路由器的计算开销未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出参数高效语义增强框架HSA-DINO，通过多尺度提示库和语义感知路由器提升开放词汇目标检测的域适应能力。

papers.title: Training Transformers in Cosine Coefficient Space
papers.abstract: Linear layers hold most of a transformer's parameters. We replace each linear layer with one that stores $K$ out of $mn$ two-dimensional DCT coefficients per weight matrix and reconstructs the full matrix through an inverse DCT at every forward pass; the $K$ coefficients are the trainable parameters. A 4-layer, 128-dim transformer trained from scratch on character-level Shakespeare reaches validation loss $1.604$ at $K = mn/2$, against $1.580$ for a standard dense baseline -- a gap of $+0.024$ at half the trainable parameter count, within the terminal-epoch variation of the dense run. A rank-48 LoRA factorization at the same trainable parameter count reaches only $1.801$ ($+0.221$). The structural advantage of sparse-coefficient over low-rank parameterizations at matched $K$ is qualitative. We identify rank flexibility as the mechanism. A random orthonormal basis matches the DCT within noise at $K = mn/2$, and a compression sweep through $K = mn/10$ and $K = mn/20$ shows that subspaces that can host high-rank matrices keep the loss low, while subspaces that flatten into a low-rank block (zigzag-selection variants) converge onto the observed stable rank \emph{and} the loss line of the rank-48 LoRA reference in lock-step. Among these orthonormal bases, the DCT is preferred because its separable fast transform admits a fused reconstruction kernel: the materialized weight matrix never leaves on-chip memory, so the parameter saving translates into a bandwidth saving as well.

analysis.tldr: 用DCT系数替代线性层参数，在参数量减半时性能接近全参数基线，优于低秩方法。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer中线性层占大部分参数，传统低秩分解（如LoRA）在参数量受限时性能下降明显，需要更高效的参数化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在减少可训练参数的同时保持或接近全参数模型的性能？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀疏系数参数化优于低秩参数化，原因是前者能保持矩阵的秩灵活性；DCT基在压缩时能维持高秩子空间，而低秩子空间（如zigzag选择）会导致性能退化。
analysis.method: 将每个线性层的权重矩阵替换为K个二维DCT系数，通过逆DCT重建完整矩阵，仅训练这些系数。
contributions: 提出在DCT系数空间中训练Transformer线性层的方法，参数量减半时性能接近全参数基线。
揭示秩灵活性是稀疏系数优于低秩参数化的关键机制。
利用DCT的可分离快速变换实现融合重建核，减少内存带宽消耗。
analysis.experiments: 在字符级莎士比亚数据集上训练4层128维Transformer，验证损失1.604（K=mn/2）对比全参数基线1.580，LoRA（rank-48）为1.801。
limitations: 仅在小型模型和字符级任务上验证，未在更大模型和标准NLP基准上测试。
DCT系数选择策略（如K值、系数位置）对性能的影响未充分探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用DCT系数替代线性层参数，在参数量减半时性能接近全参数基线，优于低秩方法。

papers.title: Estimating Central, Peripheral, and Temporal Visual Contributions to Human Decision Making in Atari Games
papers.abstract: We study how different visual information sources contribute to human decision making in dynamic visual environments. Using Atari-HEAD, a large-scale Atari gameplay dataset with synchronized eye-tracking, we introduce a controlled ablation framework as a means to reverse-engineer the contribution of peripheral visual information, explicit gaze information in form of gaze maps, and past-state information from human behavior. We train action-prediction networks under six settings that selectively include or exclude these information sources. Across 20 games, peripheral information shows by far the strongest contribution, with median prediction-accuracy drops in the range of 35.27-43.90% when removed. Gaze information yields smaller drops of 2.11-2.76%, while past-state information shows a broader range of 1.52-15.51%, with the upper end likely more informative due to reduced peripheral-information leakage. To complement aggregate accuracies, we cluster states by true-action probabilities assigned by the different model configurations. This analysis identifies coarse behavioral regimes, including focus-dominated, periphery-dominated, and more contextual decision situations. These results suggest that human decision making in Atari depends strongly on information beyond the current focus of gaze, while the proposed framework provides a way to estimate such information-source contributions from behavior.

analysis.tldr: 通过消融实验量化Atari游戏中周边视觉、注视和时序信息对人类决策的贡献，发现周边信息贡献最大。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解动态视觉环境中人类决策依赖哪些视觉信息源，有助于认知建模和AI系统设计。
analysis.problem: 如何量化周边视觉、注视信息和历史状态信息在人类决策中的相对贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 周边信息贡献最大（准确率下降35-43%），注视信息贡献较小（2-3%），历史状态贡献范围较宽（1.5-15.5%）。
analysis.method: 基于Atari-HEAD数据集，训练六种动作预测网络，通过选择性包含/排除周边、注视和历史信息进行消融分析，并聚类状态分析决策模式。
contributions: 提出一种控制消融框架来逆向工程人类决策中不同视觉信息源的贡献。
在20个Atari游戏上量化了周边、注视和历史信息的贡献，发现周边信息主导。
通过状态聚类识别出聚焦主导、周边主导和上下文决策等行为模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于Atari游戏，可能无法推广到更复杂的现实环境。
消融框架可能无法完全分离信息源的交互效应。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过消融实验量化Atari游戏中周边视觉、注视和时序信息对人类决策的贡献，发现周边信息贡献最大。

papers.title: ShieldNet: Network-Level Guardrails against Emerging Supply-Chain Injections in Agentic Systems
papers.abstract: Existing research on LLM agent security mainly focuses on prompt injection and unsafe input/output behaviors. However, as agents increasingly rely on third-party tools and MCP servers, a new class of supply-chain threats has emerged, where malicious behaviors are embedded in seemingly benign tools, silently hijacking agent execution, leaking sensitive data, or triggering unauthorized actions. Despite their growing impact, there is currently no comprehensive benchmark for evaluating such threats. To bridge this gap, we introduce SC-Inject-Bench, a large-scale benchmark comprising over 10,000 malicious MCP tools grounded in a taxonomy of 25+ attack types derived from MITRE ATT&CK targeting supply-chain threats. We observe that existing MCP scanners and semantic guardrails perform poorly on this benchmark. Motivated by this finding, we propose ShieldNet, a network-level guardrail framework that detects supply-chain poisoning by observing real network interactions rather than surface-level tool traces. ShieldNet integrates a man-in-the-middle (MITM) proxy and an event extractor to identify critical network behaviors, which are then processed by a lightweight classifier for attack detection. Extensive experiments show that ShieldNet achieves strong detection performance (up to 0.995 F-1 with only 0.8% false positives) while introducing little runtime overhead, substantially outperforming existing MCP scanners and LLM-based guardrails.

analysis.tldr: 提出网络级防护框架ShieldNet，通过中间人代理检测Agent系统中第三方工具供应链注入攻击，在10K+恶意工具基准上达0.995 F1。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent安全研究主要关注提示注入和输入/输出行为，但Agent系统日益依赖第三方工具和MCP服务器，面临新型供应链注入威胁，恶意行为可嵌入看似良性的工具中，而目前缺乏全面基准和有效检测方法。
analysis.problem: 检测Agent系统中第三方工具供应链注入攻击，即恶意行为嵌入良性工具、劫持执行、泄露数据或触发未授权操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有MCP扫描器和语义防护在SC-Inject-Bench基准上表现不佳，表明表面级工具痕迹检测方法不足以应对供应链注入威胁。
analysis.method: ShieldNet：网络级防护框架，通过中间人代理（MITM）和事件提取器观察真实网络交互，识别关键网络行为，再由轻量级分类器检测攻击。
contributions: 构建SC-Inject-Bench基准，包含10,000+恶意MCP工具，覆盖25+攻击类型，基于MITRE ATT&CK供应链威胁分类。
提出ShieldNet网络级防护框架，通过MITM代理和事件提取器实现高效检测，F1达0.995，误报率仅0.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在SC-Inject-Bench基准上评估，ShieldNet达到0.995 F1，误报率0.8%，运行时开销低，显著优于现有MCP扫描器和基于LLM的防护。
limitations: 可能仅针对MCP协议，对其他第三方工具集成方式需适配。
依赖MITM代理，可能引入部署复杂性或兼容性问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出网络级防护框架ShieldNet，通过中间人代理检测Agent系统中第三方工具供应链注入攻击，在10K+恶意工具基准上达0.995 F1。

papers.title: HandDreamer: Zero-Shot Text to 3D Hand Model Generation using Corrective Hand Shape Guidance
papers.abstract: The emergence of virtual reality has necessitated the generation of detailed and customizable 3D hand models for interaction in the virtual world. However, the current methods for 3D hand model generation are both expensive and cumbersome, offering very little customizability to the users. While recent advancements in zero-shot text-to-3D synthesis have enabled the generation of diverse and customizable 3D models using Score Distillation Sampling (SDS), they do not generalize very well to 3D hand model generation, resulting in unnatural hand structures, view-inconsistencies and loss of details. To address these limitations, we introduce HandDreamer, the first method for zero-shot 3D hand model generation from text prompts. Our findings suggest that view-inconsistencies in SDS is primarily caused due to the ambiguity in the probability landscape described by the text prompt, resulting in similar views converging to different modes of the distribution. This is particularly aggravated for hands due to the large variations in articulations and poses. To alleviate this, we propose to use MANO hand model based initialization and a hand skeleton guided diffusion process to provide a strong prior for the hand structure and to ensure view and pose consistency. Further, we propose a novel corrective hand shape guidance loss to ensure that all the views of the 3D hand model converges to view-consistent modes, without leading to geometric distortions. Extensive evaluations demonstrate the superiority of our method over the state-of-the-art methods, paving a new way forward in 3D hand model generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出HandDreamer，首个零样本文本到3D手模型生成方法，通过MANO初始化、手骨架引导扩散和矫正手形引导损失解决视图不一致和结构畸形问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 虚拟现实需要可定制的3D手模型，但现有方法昂贵、繁琐且定制性差；零样本文本到3D合成方法（如SDS）在手部生成时效果不佳，产生不自然结构、视图不一致和细节丢失。
analysis.problem: 如何从文本提示零样本生成高质量、视图一致且结构自然的3D手模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SDS中的视图不一致主要由文本提示的概率景观模糊导致，不同视图收敛到分布的不同模式；手部因关节和姿态变化大而加剧此问题。
analysis.method: 使用MANO手模型初始化提供手结构先验，结合手骨架引导扩散过程确保视图和姿态一致性，并提出矫正手形引导损失使所有视图收敛到视图一致的模式，避免几何畸变。
contributions: 首个零样本文本到3D手模型生成方法HandDreamer。
提出基于MANO初始化、手骨架引导扩散和矫正手形引导损失的框架，有效解决视图不一致和结构畸形。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖MANO模型的手部先验，对非标准手形或手势的泛化能力有限。
零样本生成的质量可能受文本描述歧义性影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HandDreamer，首个零样本文本到3D手模型生成方法，通过MANO初始化、手骨架引导扩散和矫正手形引导损失解决视图不一致和结构畸形问题。

papers.title: Non-Stationarity in the Embedding Space of Time Series Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) are widely used as generic feature extractors, yet the notion of non-stationarity in their embedding spaces remains poorly understood. Recent work often conflates non-stationarity with distribution shift, blurring distinctions fundamental to classical time-series analysis and long-standing methodologies such as statistical process control (SPC). In SPC, non-stationarity signals a process leaving a stable regime - via shifts in mean, variance, or emerging trends - and detecting such departures is central to quality monitoring and change-point analysis. Motivated by this diagnostic tradition, we study how different forms of distributional non-stationarity - mean shifts, variance changes, and linear trends - become linearly accessible in TSFM embedding spaces under controlled conditions. We further examine temporal non-stationarity arising from persistence, which reflects violations of weak stationarity due to long-memory or near-unit-root behavior rather than explicit distributional shifts. By sweeping shift strength and probing multiple TSFMs, we find that embedding-space detectability of non-stationarity degrades smoothly and that different models exhibit distinct, model-specific failure modes.

analysis.tldr: 时间序列基础模型嵌入空间中的非平稳性可被线性检测，但不同模型表现出不同的退化模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）被广泛用作通用特征提取器，但其嵌入空间中的非平稳性概念尚不明确，现有工作常将非平稳性与分布偏移混为一谈，模糊了经典时间序列分析和统计过程控制（SPC）中的基本区分。
analysis.problem: 研究TSFM嵌入空间中不同形式的分布非平稳性（均值偏移、方差变化、线性趋势）和时序非平稳性（持久性）是否可线性检测，以及不同模型的检测能力差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过扫描偏移强度并探测多个TSFM，发现嵌入空间中非平稳性的可检测性平滑退化，且不同模型表现出独特的、模型特定的失败模式。
analysis.method: 在受控条件下，通过合成数据引入均值偏移、方差变化、线性趋势和持久性等非平稳性，使用线性探针检测TSFM嵌入空间中的可分离性。
contributions: 系统区分了TSFM嵌入空间中分布非平稳性与时序非平稳性，并借鉴SPC框架进行定义。
通过实验揭示了不同TSFM对非平稳性检测的平滑退化曲线和模型特定的失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在线性探针下评估，非线性检测能力未知。
合成数据可能无法完全反映真实时间序列的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 时间序列基础模型嵌入空间中的非平稳性可被线性检测，但不同模型表现出不同的退化模式。

papers.title: Is Prompt Selection Necessary for Task-Free Online Continual Learning?
papers.abstract: Task-free online continual learning has recently emerged as a realistic paradigm for addressing continual learning in dynamic, real-world environments, where data arrive in a non-stationary stream without clear task boundaries and can only be observed once. To consider such challenging scenarios, many recent approaches have employed prompt selection, an adaptive strategy that selects prompts from a pool based on input signals. However, we observe that such selection strategies often fail to select appropriate prompts, yielding suboptimal results despite additional training of key parameters. Motivated by this observation, we propose a simple yet effective SinglePrompt that eliminates the need for prompt selection and focuses on classifier optimization. Specifically, we simply (i) inject a single prompt into each self-attention block, (ii) employ a cosine similarity-based logit design to alleviate the forgetting effect inherent in the classifier weights, and (iii) mask logits for unexposed classes in the current minibatch. With this simple task-free design, our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance across various online continual learning benchmarks. Source code is available at https://github.com/efficient-learning-lab/SinglePrompt.

analysis.tldr: 无任务在线持续学习中，提示选择策略常失败，单提示方法更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 无任务在线持续学习面临数据流无明确任务边界且只能单次观察的挑战，现有提示选择方法虽自适应但常选错提示导致次优结果。
analysis.problem: 解决无任务在线持续学习中提示选择策略效果不佳的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到提示选择策略经常无法选出合适的提示，尽管额外训练了关键参数，仍产生次优结果。
analysis.method: 提出SinglePrompt方法：在每个自注意力块中注入单个提示，使用基于余弦相似度的logit设计缓解分类器权重遗忘，并对当前小批量中未暴露类别的logit进行掩码。
contributions: 揭示提示选择策略在无任务在线持续学习中的失败现象
提出简单有效的SinglePrompt方法，消除提示选择需求并聚焦分类器优化
在多个在线持续学习基准上达到最先进性能
analysis.experiments: 在多个在线持续学习基准上评估，达到最先进性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定基准上有效，泛化性需进一步验证
单提示设计可能无法应对更复杂的任务变化
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无任务在线持续学习中，提示选择策略常失败，单提示方法更优。

papers.title: BoxComm: Benchmarking Category-Aware Commentary Generation and Narration Rhythm in Boxing
papers.abstract: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong capabilities in general video understanding, driving growing interest in automatic sports commentary generation. However, existing benchmarks for this task focus exclusively on team sports such as soccer and basketball, leaving combat sports entirely unexplored. Notably, combat sports present distinct challenges: critical actions unfold within milliseconds with visually subtle yet semantically decisive differences, and professional commentary contains a substantially higher proportion of tactical analysis compared to team sports. In this paper, we present BoxComm, a large-scale dataset comprising 445 World Boxing Championship match videos with over 52K commentary sentences from professional broadcasts. We propose a structured commentary taxonomy that categorizes each sentence into play-by-play, tactical, or contextual, providing the first category-level annotation for sports commentary benchmarks. Building on this taxonomy, we introduce two novel and complementary evaluations tailored to sports commentary generation: (1) category-conditioned generation, which evaluates whether models can produce accurate commentary of a specified type given video context; and (2) commentary rhythm assessment, which measures whether freely generated commentary exhibits appropriate temporal pacing and type distribution over continuous video segments, capturing a dimension of commentary competence that prior benchmarks have not addressed. Experiments on multiple state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal that current models struggle on both evaluations. We further propose EIC-Gen, an improved baseline incorporating detected punch events to supply structured action cues, yielding consistent gains and highlighting the importance of perceiving fleeting and subtle events for combat sports commentary.

analysis.tldr: 提出BoxComm数据集和分类体系，用于评估格斗运动解说生成中的类别感知与节奏控制，发现现有MLLM表现不佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有体育解说基准仅覆盖团队运动（如足球、篮球），忽略了格斗运动独特的挑战：关键动作在毫秒内发生且视觉差异细微，专业解说中战术分析比例更高。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对格斗运动的解说生成基准，现有模型难以处理细微动作感知和类别化解说生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含445场拳击比赛视频和5.2万条解说句的BoxComm数据集，提出解说分类法（play-by-play/tactical/contextual），设计类别条件生成和节奏评估两项新任务，并改进基线EIC-Gen引入击打事件检测。
contributions: 首个格斗运动解说生成基准BoxComm，包含大规模数据集和类别级标注。
提出类别条件生成和评论节奏评估两项新评价任务。
揭示现有MLLM在格斗运动解说上的不足，并验证事件检测的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个SOTA MLLM上进行了实验，结果显示当前模型在两项评估中均表现不佳，EIC-Gen基线带来一致提升。
limitations: 仅针对拳击运动，未扩展到其他格斗项目。
节奏评估可能依赖人工标注的类别分布，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BoxComm数据集和分类体系，用于评估格斗运动解说生成中的类别感知与节奏控制，发现现有MLLM表现不佳。

papers.title: Justified or Just Convincing? Error Verifiability as a Dimension of LLM Quality
papers.abstract: As LLMs are deployed in high-stakes settings, users must judge the correctness of individual responses, often relying on model-generated justifications such as reasoning chains or explanations. Yet, no standard measure exists for whether these justifications help users distinguish correct answers from incorrect ones. We formalize this idea as error verifiability and propose $v_{\text{bal}}$, a balanced metric that measures whether justifications enable raters to accurately assess answer correctness, validated against human raters who show high agreement. We find that neither common approaches, such as post-training and model scaling, nor more targeted interventions recommended improve verifiability. We introduce two methods that succeed at improving verifiability: reflect-and-rephrase (RR) for mathematical reasoning and oracle-rephrase (OR) for factual QA, both of which improve verifiability by incorporating domain-appropriate external information. Together, our results establish error verifiability as a distinct dimension of response quality that does not emerge from accuracy improvements alone and requires dedicated, domain-aware methods to address.

analysis.tldr: 提出错误可验证性作为LLM质量的新维度，并发现现有方法无法提升该指标，仅领域感知方法有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 在高风险场景中，用户依赖模型生成的推理链或解释来判断回答正确性，但缺乏标准度量来评估这些解释是否真正帮助用户区分正确与错误答案。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和度量LLM生成解释的‘错误可验证性’，并找出能提升该指标的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 常见方法（如后训练、模型缩放）以及针对性干预均无法提升可验证性，表明该维度独立于准确性。
analysis.method: 提出平衡指标v_bal度量可验证性；引入两种成功方法：用于数学推理的reflect-and-rephrase (RR)和用于事实QA的oracle-rephrase (OR)，通过融入领域相关外部信息提升可验证性。
contributions: 形式化错误可验证性概念并提出平衡度量v_bal
发现现有方法无法提升可验证性，并证明其是独立于准确性的质量维度
提出两种有效提升可验证性的领域感知方法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及与人类评估者验证了指标一致性。
limitations: 方法仅针对数学推理和事实QA，其他领域未验证
依赖外部信息，可能引入额外成本或偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出错误可验证性作为LLM质量的新维度，并发现现有方法无法提升该指标，仅领域感知方法有效。

papers.title: Responses Fall Short of Understanding: Revealing the Gap between Internal Representations and Responses in Visual Document Understanding
papers.abstract: Visual document understanding (VDU) is a challenging task for large vision language models (LVLMs), requiring the integration of visual perception, text recognition, and reasoning over structured layouts. Although recent LVLMs have shown progress on VDU benchmarks, their performance is typically evaluated based on generated responses, which may not necessarily reflect whether the model has actually captured the required information internally. In this paper, we investigate how information required to solve VDU tasks is represented across different layers of LLMs within LVLMs using linear probing. Our study reveals that (1) there is a clear gap between internal representations and generated responses, and (2) information required to solve the task is often encoded more linearly from intermediate layers than from the final layer. Motivated by these findings, we explore fine-tuning strategies that target intermediate layers. Experiments show that fine-tuning intermediate layers improves both linear probing accuracy and response accuracy while narrowing the gap.

analysis.tldr: LVLM在视觉文档理解中存在内部表征与生成响应之间的信息差距，中间层编码更线性，微调中间层可缩小差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉文档理解（VDU）对LVLM具有挑战性，现有评估仅基于生成响应，无法反映模型是否真正捕获了所需信息，存在内部表征与响应之间的潜在差距。
analysis.problem: 揭示并缩小LVLM在VDU任务中内部表征与生成响应之间的信息差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过线性探针发现，任务所需信息在中间层比最终层编码得更线性，且内部表征与生成响应之间存在明显差距。
analysis.method: 使用线性探针分析LVLM内部表征，并针对中间层进行微调以缩小表征与响应之间的差距。
contributions: 揭示了LVLM在VDU任务中内部表征与生成响应之间存在信息差距。
发现中间层编码任务信息更线性，且微调中间层可同时提升线性探针准确率和响应准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉文档理解任务上进行了实验，微调中间层提升了线性探针准确率和响应准确率，并缩小了差距。
limitations: 仅针对视觉文档理解任务，可能不适用于其他多模态任务。
线性探针方法可能无法完全捕捉复杂表征。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LVLM在视觉文档理解中存在内部表征与生成响应之间的信息差距，中间层编码更线性，微调中间层可缩小差距。

papers.title: Relative Density Ratio Optimization for Stable and Statistically Consistent Model Alignment
papers.abstract: Aligning language models with human preferences is essential for ensuring their safety and reliability. Although most existing approaches assume specific human preference models such as the Bradley-Terry model, this assumption may fail to accurately capture true human preferences, and consequently, these methods lack statistical consistency, i.e., the guarantee that language models converge to the true human preference as the number of samples increases. In contrast, direct density ratio optimization (DDRO) achieves statistical consistency without assuming any human preference models. DDRO models the density ratio between preferred and non-preferred data distributions using the language model, and then optimizes it via density ratio estimation. However, this density ratio is unstable and often diverges, leading to training instability of DDRO. In this paper, we propose a novel alignment method that is both stable and statistically consistent. Our approach is based on the relative density ratio between the preferred data distribution and a mixture of the preferred and non-preferred data distributions. Our approach is stable since this relative density ratio is bounded above and does not diverge. Moreover, it is statistically consistent and yields significantly tighter convergence guarantees than DDRO. We experimentally show its effectiveness with Qwen 2.5 and Llama 3.

analysis.tldr: 提出相对密度比优化方法，实现稳定且统计一致的模型对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对齐方法假设特定偏好模型（如Bradley-Terry），缺乏统计一致性；而DDRO虽无假设但密度比不稳定导致训练发散。
analysis.problem: 如何实现既稳定（避免密度比发散）又统计一致（保证收敛到真实偏好）的语言模型对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DDRO中密度比不稳定且发散，导致训练不稳定；相对密度比有上界，不会发散。
analysis.method: 基于偏好数据分布与混合数据分布之间的相对密度比进行优化，该比值有界且稳定，同时保持统计一致性。
contributions: 提出相对密度比优化方法，同时实现稳定性和统计一致性。
给出比DDRO更紧的收敛保证。
在Qwen 2.5和Llama 3上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen 2.5和Llama 3上进行了实验，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖偏好数据质量。
相对密度比估计的计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出相对密度比优化方法，实现稳定且统计一致的模型对齐。

papers.title: NAIMA: Semantics Aware RGB Guided Depth Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Guided depth super-resolution (GDSR) is a multi-modal approach for depth map super-resolution that relies on a low-resolution depth map and a high-resolution RGB image to restore finer structural details. However, the misleading color and texture cues indicating depth discontinuities in RGB images often lead to artifacts and blurred depth boundaries in the generated depth map. We propose a solution that introduces global contextual semantic priors, generated from pretrained vision transformer token embeddings. Our approach to distilling semantic knowledge from pretrained token embeddings is motivated by their demonstrated effectiveness in related monocular depth estimation tasks. We introduce a Guided Token Attention (GTA) module, which iteratively aligns encoded RGB spatial features with depth encodings, using cross-attention for selectively injecting global semantic context extracted from different layers of a pretrained vision transformer. Additionally, we present an architecture called Neural Attention for Implicit Multi-token Alignment (NAIMA), which integrates DINOv2 with GTA blocks for a semantics-aware GDSR. Our proposed architecture, with its ability to distill semantic knowledge, achieves significant improvements over existing methods across multiple scaling factors and datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出NAIMA架构，利用DINOv2语义先验和跨注意力机制提升引导深度超分辨率性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有引导深度超分辨率方法易受RGB图像中误导性颜色和纹理线索影响，导致深度边界模糊和伪影，需要更鲁棒的语义引导。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用RGB图像中的全局语义信息来改善深度图超分辨率中的边界清晰度和结构细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出RGB图像中误导性的颜色和纹理线索常导致深度图伪影和边界模糊，而预训练视觉Transformer的token嵌入在单目深度估计中已展现语义有效性。
analysis.method: 提出NAIMA架构，包含Guided Token Attention (GTA)模块，通过交叉注意力对齐RGB空间特征与深度编码，并选择性注入来自DINOv2不同层的全局语义上下文。
contributions: 引入全局上下文语义先验（来自预训练视觉Transformer token嵌入）用于引导深度超分辨率。
设计Guided Token Attention (GTA)模块，通过交叉注意力迭代对齐RGB特征与深度编码。
提出NAIMA架构，集成DINOv2与GTA模块，实现语义感知的深度超分辨率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型DINOv2的泛化能力，在域外数据上效果未知。
跨注意力机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NAIMA架构，利用DINOv2语义先验和跨注意力机制提升引导深度超分辨率性能。

papers.title: 3D-Fixer: Coarse-to-Fine In-place Completion for 3D Scenes from a Single Image
papers.abstract: Compositional 3D scene generation from a single view requires the simultaneous recovery of scene layout and 3D assets. Existing approaches mainly fall into two categories: feed-forward generation methods and per-instance generation methods. The former directly predict 3D assets with explicit 6DoF poses through efficient network inference, but they generalize poorly to complex scenes. The latter improve generalization through a divide-and-conquer strategy, but suffer from time-consuming pose optimization. To bridge this gap, we introduce 3D-Fixer, a novel in-place completion paradigm. Specifically, 3D-Fixer extends 3D object generative priors to generate complete 3D assets conditioned on the partially visible point cloud at the original locations, which are cropped from the fragmented geometry obtained from the geometry estimation methods. Unlike prior works that require explicit pose alignment, 3D-Fixer uses fragmented geometry as a spatial anchor to preserve layout fidelity. At its core, we propose a coarse-to-fine generation scheme to resolve boundary ambiguity under occlusion, supported by a dual-branch conditioning network and an Occlusion-Robust Feature Alignment (ORFA) strategy for stable training. Furthermore, to address the data scarcity bottleneck, we present ARSG-110K, the largest scene-level dataset to date, comprising over 110K diverse scenes and 3M annotated images with high-fidelity 3D ground truth. Extensive experiments show that 3D-Fixer achieves state-of-the-art geometric accuracy, which significantly outperforms baselines such as MIDI and Gen3DSR, while maintaining the efficiency of the diffusion process. Code and data will be publicly available at https://zx-yin.github.io/3dfixer.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种粗到细的原地补全范式，从单张图像生成高质量3D场景，并发布大规模数据集ARSG-110K。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单视图3D场景生成方法中，前馈生成泛化性差，逐实例生成耗时且需显式位姿对齐，亟需一种兼顾效率与泛化性的新范式。
analysis.problem: 从单张图像同时恢复3D场景布局和完整3D资产，解决遮挡下的边界模糊和显式位姿对齐的耗时问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
